title: Attention-based graph neural networks: a survey
comment: This is the accepted manuscript of an article published in Artificial Intelligence Review. The final version is available online at: [10.1007/s10462-023-10577-2](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10462-023-10577-2)
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) aim to learn well-trained representations in a lower-dimension space for downstream tasks while preserving the topological structures. In recent years, attention mechanism, which is brilliant in the fields of natural language processing and computer vision, is introduced to GNNs to adaptively select the discriminative features and automatically filter the noisy information. To the best of our knowledge, due to the fast-paced advances in this domain, a systematic overview of attention-based GNNs is still missing. To fill this gap, this paper aims to provide a comprehensive survey on recent advances in attention-based GNNs. Firstly, we propose a novel two-level taxonomy for attention-based GNNs from the perspective of development history and architectural perspectives. Specifically, the upper level reveals the three developmental stages of attention-based GNNs, including graph recurrent attention networks, graph attention networks, and graph transformers. The lower level focuses on various typical architectures of each stage. Secondly, we review these attention-based methods following the proposed taxonomy in detail and summarize the advantages and disadvantages of various models. A model characteristics table is also provided for a more comprehensive comparison. Thirdly, we share our thoughts on some open issues and future directions of attention-based GNNs. We hope this survey will provide researchers with an up-to-date reference regarding applications of attention-based GNNs. In addition, to cope with the rapid development in this field, we intend to share the relevant latest papers as an open resource at https://github.com/sunxiaobei/awesome-attention-based-gnns.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了基于注意力的图神经网络（Attention-based GNNs）的发展，提出了从发展历史和架构视角的两层分类法，涵盖图循环注意力网络、图注意力网络和图变换器三个阶段，并总结了各模型的优缺点、开放问题及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络（GNNs）旨在低维空间中学习保留拓扑结构的表示，注意力机制已被引入GNNs以自适应选择判别特征并自动过滤噪声信息。然而，由于该领域发展迅速，尚缺乏对基于注意力的GNNs的系统性综述，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的两层分类法：上层按发展历史分为三个阶段（图循环注意力网络、图注意力网络、图变换器）；下层关注各阶段的具体典型架构。随后按此分类法详细回顾各方法，总结优缺点，并提供模型特征表进行更全面的比较。
AI.result: 系统梳理了基于注意力的GNNs的发展脉络与代表性架构，明确了各阶段方法的优势与局限，并通过模型特征表实现了多维度的横向对比。
AI.conclusion: 本文为基于注意力的GNNs提供了最新的参考综述，并指出了开放问题与未来研究方向。同时，作者维护了一个开源资源库以持续跟踪该领域的最新进展。

title: ALM-MTA:Front-Door Causal Multi-Touch Attribution Method for Creator-Ecosystem Optimization
comment: 19 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables. Yuguang Liu, Luyao Xia, and Hu Liu contributed equally. Conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Consumption Drives Production (CDP) on social platforms aims to deliver interpretable incentive signals for creator ecosystem building and resource utilization improvement, which strongly relies on attribution. In large-scale and complex recommendation systems, the absence of accurate labels together with unobserved confounding renders backdoor adjustments alone insufficient for reliable attribution. To address these problems, we propose Adversarial Learning Mediator based Multi-Touch Attribution (ALM-MTA), an extensible causal framework that leverages front-door identification with an adversarially learned mediator: a proxy trained to distill outcome information to strengthen the causal pathway from treatment to outcome and eliminate shortcut leakage. We then introduce contrastive learning that conditions front-door marginalization on high-match consumption-upload pairs to ensure positivity in large treatment spaces. To assess causality from non-RCT logs, we also incorporate a non-personalized bucketed protocol, estimating grouped uplift and computing AUUC over treatment clusters. Finally, we evaluate ALM-MTA using a real-world recommendation system with 400 million DAU and 30 billion samples. ALM-MTA increases DAU by 0.04% and daily active creators by 0.6%, with unit exposure efficiency increased by 670%. On causal utility, ALM-MTA achieves higher grouped AUUC than the SOTA in every propensity bucket, with a maximum gain of 0.070. In terms of accuracy, ALM-MTA improves upload AUC by 40% compared to SOTA. These results demonstrate that front-door deconfounding with adversarial mediator learning provides accurate, personalized, and operationally efficient attribution for creator ecosystem optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出ALM-MTA框架，通过对抗学习中介变量和前门识别实现多触点归因，在400M DAU的推荐系统中提升创作者生态效果。
AI.motivation: 大规模推荐系统中缺乏准确标签且存在未观测混杂因素，导致后门调整无法可靠归因，需要更有效的因果归因方法。
AI.method: 1) 前门识别+对抗学习中介变量(ALM)强化因果路径；2) 对比学习保证正向性；3) 非个性化分桶协议估计组别 uplift 并计算 AUUC。
AI.result: DAU提升0.04%，日活创作者提升0.6%，单位曝光效率提升670%；AUUC在各倾向性桶中均超SOTA，最高增益0.070；upload AUC提升40%。
AI.conclusion: 前门去混杂结合对抗中介学习可提供准确、个性化且操作高效的归因，优化创作者生态系统。

title: From biogeochemical exchange to market exchange: the impacts of blue carbon on coastal wetland science
summary: While there is widespread agreement that markets for ecosystem services (MES) have transformed conservation, it is less clear whether they have transformed the practice of environmental science to meet market needs for stable commodities. We examine this further through the case of blue carbon. Putting marine ecosystems on the MES agenda, blue carbon makes the case to incorporate coastal wetlands into carbon markets to finance their conservation and mitigate climate change. Using a mixed methods approach combining bibliometric and Natural Language Processing (NLP) analyses of peer-reviewed coastal wetland literature, a qualitative review of highly cited publications, and semi-structured interviews with blue carbon scientists, we argue that blue carbon has reshaped coastal wetland science: broadly toward strategic science on conservation and restoration to address global climate change, and specifically by reframing biogeochemistry to meet market demands for stable carbon commodities. Measured by number and share of papers, the blue carbon field is growing quickly and outpacing other research. Its papers are disproportionately represented among the most cited coastal wetland publications, suggesting a growth in both scientific production and authority. Our results show the emergence of blue carbon has redirected biogeochemical research on coastal wetlands from dynamic cycles and processes to stored and preserved carbon, aligning research with the stable carbon commodities needed for carbon markets. This strongly suggests that coastal wetland scientists, although skeptical of carbon offsets, are shifting their work to align with the needs of market frameworks in well-intentioned efforts to promote coastal wetland conservation. If this continues, alternatives to market-based policies are unlikely to emerge, making scientists' own doubts about their effectiveness a serious cause for concern.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了生态系统服务市场（MES）如何重塑环境科学实践，以蓝碳为例，通过混合方法（文献计量、NLP分析、定性综述和访谈）发现蓝碳正在将海岸湿地科学转向为市场服务的战略研究，特别是将生物地球化学研究从动态循环转向稳定碳储存，以满足碳市场对稳定商品的需求。
AI.motivation: 学界普遍认同生态系统服务市场（MES）改变了保护实践，但对其是否改变了环境科学实践以满足市场对稳定商品的需求这一议题缺乏深入探讨。作者希望通过蓝碳案例填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用混合研究方法：1) 对海岸湿地同行评审文献进行文献计量学和自然语言处理（NLP）分析；2) 对高被引出版物进行定性综述；3) 对蓝碳科学家进行半结构化访谈。
AI.result: 蓝碳领域增长迅速，在被引量上占据优势；蓝碳的出现将生物地球化学研究从动态循环和过程转向储存和保存的碳，与研究市场所需的稳定碳商品方向一致；科学家虽对碳抵消持怀疑态度，但仍主动调整研究以适应市场框架。
AI.conclusion: 蓝碳已重塑海岸湿地科学，使其朝向满足碳市场需求的方向发展。若此趋势持续，市场替代方案将难以出现，而科学家自身对市场有效性的怀疑将成为严重隐忧。

title: An Experimental Method to Study Opinion Diffusion in Human-AI Hybrid Societies
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted for presentation as a talk at the Annual Conference of the Cognitive Science Society (CogSci 2026)
summary: As artificial intelligence increasingly mediates public discourse, it becomes important to understand how human-AI collectives shape opinion formation, deliberation, and democratic outcomes. We present a novel experimental method for studying opinion dynamics in hybrid human-AI social networks. Participants, human or AI, were embedded in $5\times5$ grid lattice networks and iteratively asked to select and revise statements on a given polarizing topic over eight rounds. We compared three conditions: human-only, AI-only, and hybrid networks with equal proportions of human and AI participants. Hybrid human-AI networks achieved the lowest final polarization while, in contrast, human-only networks exhibited higher polarization with lower neighbor agreement. We also ran additional experiments varying Large Language Model (LLM) prompt framing to explore whether instruction design might influence convergence patterns. Although these early findings are preliminary and cannot yet support broad generalizations, they highlight the potential value of experimental social networks for understanding opinion dynamics in human-AI hybrid societies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验方法研究人机混合社交网络中的观点动态，发现混合网络相比纯人类网络能有效降低极化程度。
AI.motivation: 随着AI日益介入公共话语，需要理解人机集体如何影响观点形成、协商和民主结果。
AI.method: 将人类和AI参与者嵌入5×5网格晶格网络，在8轮迭代中要求参与者选择和修改关于极化议题的陈述，比较纯人类、纯AI和混合网络三种条件，并实验了不同LLM提示框架。
AI.result: 混合人机网络实现了最低的最终极化程度，而纯人类网络极化更高且邻居一致性更低。
AI.conclusion: 尽管初步发现尚不能推广，但实验性社交网络方法对理解人机混合社会中的观点动态具有潜在价值。

title: Technical Report: A Hierarchical Dynamically Weighting Deep Reinforcement Learning Method for Multi-UAV Multi-Task Coordination
summary: This paper investigates the multi-UAV multi-task coordination problem in infrastructure-less emergency scenarios, where UAVs collaboratively are required to jointly perform aerial image acquisition and ground-user communication. To tackle the challenge of balancing heterogeneous tasks within dynamic environments, we propose a hierarchical dynamic weighting Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) framework. Specifically, an episode-level module is introduced to capture global task preferences, while a step-level module adaptively adjusts the objective weights according to real-time system conditions. By integrating global and instantaneous weights, the proposed framework improves decision stability and responsiveness during task execution. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves faster convergence, more stable training, and higher task completion efficiency than conventional works.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层动态加权深度强化学习框架，用于解决无基础设施应急场景中多无人机多任务协调问题，通过全局和瞬时权重调整实现了更快的收敛、更稳定的训练和更高的任务完成效率。
AI.motivation: 在无基础设施的应急场景中，多无人机需要同时执行空中图像采集和地面用户通信等多种异构任务，如何在动态环境中平衡这些异构任务是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出分层动态加权DRL框架：1）episode级模块捕捉全局任务偏好；2）step级模块根据实时系统条件自适应调整目标权重；3）集成全局权重与瞬时权重以提高决策稳定性和响应性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法相比传统方法实现了更快的收敛速度、更稳定的训练过程以及更高的任务完成效率。
AI.conclusion: 分层动态加权策略有效平衡了多无人机多任务执行中的异构目标，在应急通信场景下具有显著优势。

title: Context-Augmented Code Generation: How Product Context Improves AI Coding Agent Decision Compliance by 49%
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, 16 tables. Benchmark repository: https://github.com/brief-hq/dcbench
summary: AI coding agents powered by large language models can read codebases and produce functional code, but they routinely violate team-specific product decisions that are invisible in the source code alone. We introduce a controlled benchmark measuring decision compliance, the rate at which an AI coding agent follows established product, design, and engineering decisions, across 8 realistic software engineering tasks containing 41 weighted decision points. We compare a baseline configuration (Claude Code with codebase access only) against an augmented configuration that adds Brief, a product-context retrieval system providing spec generation, mid-build consultation, and retrieval of recorded decisions, persona pain points, customer signals, and competitive intelligence. On identical prompts and the same repository, the augmented configuration achieves 95% decision compliance versus 46% for the baseline, a 49 percentage point improvement. Per-decision analysis reveals that the baseline achieves 100% compliance on decisions visible in the codebase and 0-33% on decisions requiring product context, suggesting that product-context retrieval is a key driver of the improvement. We release the benchmark repository, all 16 pull requests, and scoring harness for independent reproduction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Brief系统，通过检索产品上下文（产品决策、用户痛点、客户信号等）增强AI编码代理的决策合规性，在8个真实软件工程任务中将合规率从46%提升至95%。
AI.motivation: AI编码代理能生成功能代码，但常违反团队特定的产品决策，这些决策在源代码中不可见，导致代码与产品意图不一致。
AI.method: 构建包含41个加权决策点的基准测试，对比基线（仅代码库访问的Claude Code）与增强配置（增加Brief产品上下文检索系统，提供规格生成、构建中咨询、决策记录等功能）。
AI.result: 增强配置决策合规率95% vs 基线46%（提升49个百分点）；基线在代码可见决策上100%合规，但产品上下文决策仅0-33%。
AI.conclusion: 产品上下文检索是提升AI编码代理决策合规性的关键驱动力，系统已开源可复现。

title: SalesSim: Benchmarking and Aligning Multimodal Language Models as Retail User Simulators
summary: We present SalesSim, a framework and testbed for evaluating the ability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to simulate realistic, persona-driven customer behavior in multi-turn, multi-modal, tool-augmented online retail conversations. Unlike prior work that treat user simulation as surface-level dialogue generation, SalesSim models retail interaction and decision-making as a grounded, agentic process, where shoppers with diverse backgrounds, preferences, and dealbreakers interact with a sales agent, seek clarifications, and make informed purchasing decisions. For evaluation, we design a suite of metrics centered on decision alignment, measuring the consistency between the simulator's actions and its persona specifications, as well as conversational quality. We find several behavioral gaps after benchmarking 6 open and closed-source state-of-the-art models. First, while models produce fluent conversations, they display significantly lower lexical diversity and overdisclosure of criteria across personas compared to human conversations. Second, models tend to be persuaded by sales agent suggestions and drift from persona specifications. Even the strongest model achieves less than 79% average alignment with its underlying persona specifications. To make progress on these limitations, we propose UserGRPO, a multi-turn, multi-objective reinforcement learning recipe to optimize both conversational fluency and decision alignment under persona specifications. Our experiments demonstrate that UserGRPO boosts decision alignment of the baseline model by 13.8% while improving conversational quality. By introducing SalesSim, we provide a new testbed for the community to investigate and improve the adherence of user simulators in goal-oriented settings.

AI.tldr: SalesSim 是一个评估多模态大模型模拟真实顾客行为的框架，发现现有模型在词汇多样性、信息过度披露和易受销售说服方面存在不足，并提出了 UserGRPO 强化学习方法将决策对齐度提升 13.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有用户模拟工作仅停留在表面级对话生成，缺乏对真实零售场景中顾客决策过程的建模，需要更贴近实际的评估框架和指标。
AI.method: 构建 SalesSim 测试框架和基准，设计了包含决策对齐度和对话质量的评估指标，并提出 UserGRPO——一种多轮、多目标强化学习方法来优化对话流畅性和决策一致性。
AI.result: 6 个开源和闭源模型在 SalesSim 上表现不佳：词汇多样性显著低于人类、过度披露 persona 标准、易受销售代理说服而偏离设定，最强模型平均决策对齐度不足 79%；UserGRPO 将基线模型的决策对齐度提升 13.8%。
AI.conclusion: SalesSim 为社区提供了一个新的用户模拟测试平台，UserGRPO 展示了缓解现有模型局限性的有效路径。

title: VLADriver-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving, yet their reliance on implicit parametric knowledge limits generalization in long-tail scenarios. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a solution by accessing external expert priors, standard visual retrieval suffers from high latency and semantic ambiguity. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{VLADriver-RAG}, a framework that grounds planning in explicit, structure-aware historical knowledge. Specifically, we abstract sensory inputs into spatiotemporal semantic graphs via a \textit{Visual-to-Scenario} mechanism, effectively filtering visual noise. To ensure retrieval relevance, we employ a \textit{Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model} that utilizes Graph-DTW metric alignment to prioritize intrinsic topological consistency over superficial visual similarity. These retrieved priors are then fused within a query-based VLA backbone to synthesize precise, disentangled trajectories. Extensive experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark establish a new state-of-the-art, achieving a Driving Score of 89.12.

AI.tldr: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，通过将感知输入抽象为时空语义图（Visual-to-Scenario机制），利用Graph-DTW进行场景对齐检索，将显式结构化历史知识融入VLA模型，在自动驾驶规划任务上达到SOTA（Driving Score 89.12）。
AI.motivation: VLA模型依赖隐式参数化知识，在长尾场景中泛化有限；标准视觉RAG存在高延迟和语义歧义问题，亟需一种能利用显式、结构化的历史知识来提升规划能力的方法。
AI.method: 1) Visual-to-Scenario机制：将感知输入抽象为时空语义图，过滤视觉噪声；2) Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model：利用Graph-DTW度量对齐，优先关注拓扑一致性而非表面视觉相似性；3) 将检索到的先验知识融入基于query的VLA骨干网络，生成解耦的精确轨迹。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive基准上达到Driving Score 89.12，创造了新的SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 将规划过程显式地建立在结构化的历史知识上，通过图级别的检索对齐有效提升了VLA模型在自动驾驶中的泛化能力和规划精度。

title: Where Reliability Lives in Vision-Language Models: A Mechanistic Study of Attention, Hidden States, and Causal Circuits
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Multimodal Reasoning. Code and probe-training pipelines: https://github.com/itsloganmann/VLM-Reliability-Probe
summary: A pervasive intuition holds that vision-language models (VLMs) are most trustworthy when their attention maps look sharp: concentrated attention on the queried region should imply a confident, calibrated answer. We test this Attention-Confidence Assumption directly. We instrument three open-weight VLM families (LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL; 3-7B parameters) with a unified mechanistic pipeline -- the VLM Reliability Probe (VRP) -- that compares attention structure, generation dynamics, and hidden-state geometry against a single correctness label. Three results emerge. (i) Attention structure is a near-zero predictor of correctness (R_pb(C_k,y)=0.001, 95% CI [-0.034,0.036]; R_pb(H_s,y)=-0.012, [-0.047,0.024] on a pooled n=3,090 split), even though attention remains causally necessary for feature extraction (top-30% patch masking drops accuracy by 8.2-11.3 pp, p<0.001). (ii) Reliability becomes legible later in the computation: a single hidden-state linear probe reaches AUROC>0.95 on POPE for two of three families, and self-consistency at K=10 is the strongest behavioral predictor we measure at 10x inference cost (R_pb=0.43). (iii) Causal neuron-level ablations expose a sharp architectural split with direct monitor-design implications: late-fusion LLaVA concentrates reliability in a fragile late bottleneck (-8.3 pp object-identification accuracy after top-5 probe-neuron ablation), whereas early-fusion PaliGemma and Qwen2-VL distribute it widely and absorb destruction of ~50% of their peak-layer hidden dimension with <=1 pp degradation. The takeaway is narrow but consequential: in 3-7B VLMs, reliability is read more reliably off hidden-state geometry, layer-wise margin formation, and sparse late-layer circuits than off attention-map sharpness.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统实验证明，视觉语言模型（VLM）的注意力图清晰度与回答正确性几乎无关（相关系数~0），而隐藏状态几何、层级边际形成和稀疏的后期电路才是可靠性的更强预测指标。研究还发现，早期融合架构（PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL）的可靠性分布广泛且鲁棒，而晚期融合架构（LLaVA）的可靠性集中在脆弱的后期瓶颈中。
AI.motivation: 检验一个普遍直觉：VLM的注意力图越"锐利"（集中在查询区域），模型就越自信且校准越好。作者想验证这个"注意力-置信度假设"是否成立。
AI.method: 设计了统一的机制分析管线VLM Reliability Probe (VRP)，在三组开源VLM（LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL, 3-7B参数）上比较注意力结构、生成动态和隐藏状态几何与正确性标签的关系。包括相关性分析、线性探针、自一致性测量、因果神经消融等实验。
AI.result: (1) 注意力结构与正确性几乎零相关（R≈0.001），但注意力对特征提取仍然因果必要（遮蔽顶部30%patch准确率下降8.2-11.3pp）。(2) 隐藏状态线性探针在POPE上AUROC>0.95，自一致性K=10时相关系数R=0.43。(3) 后期融合架构（LLaVA）的可靠性集中在后期瓶颈层（消融顶部5个神经元导致-8.3pp），早期融合架构（PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL）分布广泛（消融~50%隐藏维度仅下降≤1pp）。
AI.conclusion: 在3-7B的VLM中，可靠性的可靠读出来源于隐藏状态几何和后期稀疏电路，而非注意力图的锐利程度。不同架构在可靠性分布上存在根本性差异，对监控设计有直接指导意义。

title: LUDB++: Enabling LUDB for the Analysis of Shaped Feedforward FIFO Networks using Network Calculus
comment: Submitted to IEEE/ACM Transactions on Networking
summary: This paper discusses how latency guarantees for non-cyclic (feedforward) First-In-First-Out (FIFO) networks with shapers can be computed within the Network Calculus (NC) framework. Shapers are methods implemented in software or hardware and may reside inside the network and at the endpoint which constrain the rate and maximum packet sizes for the transmission of specific data streams (flows) or groups thereof. Shaping can improve latencies and is an important aspect of Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN). Several methods in NC exist to analyze FIFO networks. Among them is the Least Upper Delay Bound (LUDB) methodology. So far, LUDB does not incorporate shaping assumptions into its analysis. This paper addresses this gap resulting in the new methodology called LUDB++. The evaluation on a set of different line topologies and a tree topology with a total of 130 configurations shows that LUDB++ delivers more accurate latency bounds compared to LUDB. Moreover, the Exponential Linear Program (ELP) method, which considers FIFO and shaping inside the network, yields the most accurate bounds to this date. ELP is superseded by LUDB++ for most of cases by a margin of up to 9.13%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LUDB++方法，在网络演算框架下为带整形器的非循环FIFO网络提供更精确的延迟上界，相比现有LUDB方法提升了最多9.13%的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有LUDB方法无法处理网络中的整形器（shaper）假设，而整形器是时间敏感网络（TSN）中改善延迟的重要机制，因此需要扩展LUDB以支持整形约束。
AI.method: 提出LUDB++方法，将整形器假设融入LUDB分析框架中，支持对带有整形器的非循环FIFO网络进行延迟上界计算。
AI.result: 在130种不同拓扑配置（包括线形拓扑和树形拓扑）的评估中，LUDB++比LUDB提供更精确的延迟上界，并在大多数情况下超越了ELP方法，精度提升幅度达9.13%。
AI.conclusion: LUDB++有效填补了LUDB不支持整形器分析的空白，成为目前大多数场景下最精确的FIFO网络延迟分析方法。

title: Computer Use at the Edge of the Statistical Precipice
summary: Evaluating Computer Use Agents (CUAs) on interactive environments is fraught with methodological pitfalls that the field has yet to systematically address. We show that a 1MB replay script that blindly executes a recorded action sequence without ever observing the screen outperforms frontier models on prominent static benchmarks, and prove that its expected success rate is exactly equal to the source agent's pass@k in deterministic environments. We trace this and other failures to two root causes: non-principled environment design (static, unsandboxed, or unreliably verified environments) and non-principled evaluation methodology (naive aggregation and misuse of pass@k for stateful UI interactions). To address the first, we propose PRISM, five design principles for CUA environments (privileged verification, realistic environments, integrity-checked configurations, sandboxed execution, and multifactorial variability) and instantiate them in DigiWorld, a benchmark of 15 realistic sandboxed mobile applications able to evaluate agents in over 3.2 million verified unique configurations. To address the second, we develop an aggregation framework pairing Wilson score intervals with hierarchical bootstrap, producing confidence intervals that correctly account for the nested structure of CUA benchmarks, as we empirically demonstrate. All together, we show that principled environment design and rigorous evaluation methodology are not optional refinements but prerequisites for meaningful CUA research.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示现有计算机使用智能体（CUA）评估中的两大方法论缺陷：非原则性环境设计和非原则性评估方法。作者指出，一个仅重放记录动作序列、不观察屏幕的1MB脚本在静态基准上超越前沿模型。为此提出PRISM五原则环境设计（DigiWorld基准）和基于Wilson得分区间与层次化bootstrap的聚合评估框架，证明原则性设计与严格评估是CUA研究的前提条件。
AI.motivation: 当前CUA评估存在严重方法论缺陷：静态基准可被盲执行脚本"欺骗"，环境设计缺乏原则性（静态、无沙箱、验证不可靠），评估方法不规范（朴素聚合、滥用pass@k指标），导致评估结果不可靠、不可比较。
AI.method: 1) 提出PRISM五原则：特权验证、真实环境、完整性检查配置、沙箱执行、多因素可变性；2) 构建DigiWorld基准，包含15个真实沙箱移动应用，支持320万+已验证唯一配置；3) 开发聚合框架，结合Wilson得分区间与层次化bootstrap，生成正确反映CUA基准嵌套结构的置信区间。
AI.result: 1MB盲执行脚本在著名静态基准上超越前沿模型；证明盲脚本的期望成功率在确定性环境中等于源智能体的pass@k；新提出的聚合框架能正确估计不确定性，纠正嵌套结构偏差。
AI.conclusion: 原则性环境设计与严格评估方法不是可选的改进，而是有意义CUA研究的必要条件。现有基准和评估方法亟需系统性重构。

title: Sanity Checks for Long-Form Hallucination Detection
summary: Hallucination detection methods for large language models increasingly operate on chain-of-thought reasoning traces, yet it remains unclear whether they evaluate the reasoning itself or merely exploit surface correlates of the final answer. We introduce a controlled-invariance methodology that exposes this distinction through two oracle tests: \textsc{Force}, which replaces each response's final answer with the ground truth while preserving the reasoning trace, and \textsc{Remove}, which strips answer-announcement steps while leaving the trajectory intact. This reveals if their predictive power derives from answer-level artifacts rather than from the structure or validity of intermediate reasoning. We further show that once these artifacts are controlled for, effective detection does not necessarily require complex learned representations: TRACT, a lightweight scorer built on lexical trajectory features (hedging trends, step-length dynamics, and cross-response vocabulary convergence), achieves strong robustness while remaining competitive with or outperforming existing baselines on unperturbed traces. These findings suggest that the current central challenge in reasoning-aware hallucination detection is not the absence of signal in the trace, but the failure to isolate it from endpoint cues.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受控不变性方法（Force和Remove两种oracle测试）来区分链式推理中的幻觉检测是依赖推理结构本身，还是仅利用最终答案的表面特征。并在此基础上提出TRACT，一种基于词汇轨迹特征的轻量级检测器，在去除答案伪影后仍具鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有面向推理链的幻觉检测方法无法区分其检测能力源于推理过程本身还是最终答案的表面伪影（如答案中某些词汇模式）。
AI.method: 提出两种oracle测试：Force（保留推理轨迹，将最终答案替换为正确答案）和Remove（移除答案宣告步骤，保留轨迹结构）。基于此设计TRACT轻量级分类器，利用词汇轨迹特征（不确定性趋势、步长动态、跨响应词汇收敛性）进行检测。
AI.result: 在未扰动轨迹上TRACT与现有基线相当或更优，且在去除答案伪影后仍保持强鲁棒性，而基线性能大幅下降。
AI.conclusion: 推理感知幻觉检测的核心挑战并非推理轨迹中缺乏信号，而是未能将其与端点线索（最终答案）分离。

title: Benchmarking ResNet Backbones in RT-DETR: Impact of Depth and Regularization under environmental conditions
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Data Science, Technology and Applications (DATA) 2026
summary: Visual perception plays a central role in competitive robotics, where environmental variations can directly affect real-time detection performance. The related literature on transformer-based detectors lack information regarding the impact of backbone scale and environmental settings on model performance. This work presents a comparative evaluation of RT-DETR for detecting round objects under environmental and hyperparameter variations relevant to competitive robotics. Four ResNet backbones (ResNet18, ResNet34, ResNet50, and ResNet101) were compared using dropout rates, analyzing their effect on confidence and accuracy. All models were trained under the same configuration and evaluated under changes in lighting and background contrast. Environmental conditions primarily impact prediction confidence, while inference latency remains largely unaffected and classification accuracy stays consistently high, approaching or above 1.00 in most cases. Two distinct behaviors were observed. Under illumination variation, ResNet50 achieves the best trade-off, combining near-perfect accuracy, confidence values up to approximately 0.869 and latency around 0.058-0.059 ms. Under background variation, ResNet34 provides the most balanced performance, reaching near-perfect accuracy and higher confidence values up to approximately 0.887. These results indicate that the optimal architecture depends on the type of environmental variation, with intermediate-depth models offering the best balance between performance and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了四种不同深度的ResNet骨干网络（ResNet18/34/50/101）结合RT-DETR检测器在竞争性机器人场景中检测圆形物体的表现，发现中间深度的模型（ResNet50在光照变化下、ResNet34在背景变化下）能达到性能与效率的最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有关于基于Transformer的检测器（如RT-DETR）的研究缺乏对骨干网络规模和环境影响因素的系统性分析，而竞争性机器人领域的环境变化会直接影响实时检测性能，因此需要探究不同骨干网络在不同环境条件下的表现。
AI.method: 使用RT-DETR检测器，搭配四种ResNet骨干网络（ResNet18/34/50/101），引入dropout率作为超参数变量，在统一配置下训练，并在光照变化和背景对比度变化两种环境条件下进行评估。
AI.result: 环境条件主要影响预测置信度，对推理延迟影响不大，分类准确率保持较高（多数接近或达到1.00）。光照变化下ResNet50最佳（准确率近乎完美，置信度~0.869，延迟0.058-0.059ms）；背景变化下ResNet34最佳（准确率近乎完美，置信度~0.887）。
AI.conclusion: 最优架构取决于环境变化类型，中等深度的模型在性能与效率之间提供了最佳平衡，为竞争性机器人场景下的模型选择提供了指导。

title: Spatial Priming Outperforms Semantic Prompting: A Grid-Based Approach to Improving LLM Accuracy on Chart Data Extraction
comment: his is the version of the article accepted for publication in SUMMA 2025 after peer review. The final, published version is available at IEEE Xplore: https://doi.org/10.1109/SUMMA68668.2025.11302248
summary: The automated extraction of data from scientific charts is a critical task for large-scale literature analysis. While multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, their accuracy on non-standardized charts remains a challenge. This raises a key research question: what is the most effective strategy to improve model performance (high-level semantic priming) or low-level spatial priming? This paper presents a comparative investigation into these two distinct strategies. We describe our exploratory experiments with semantic methods, such as a two-stage metadata-first framework and Chain-of-Thought, which failed to produce a statistically significant improvement. In contrast, we present a simple but highly effective spatial priming method: overlaying a coordinate grid onto the chart image before analysis. Our quantitative experiment on a synthetic dataset demonstrates that this grid-based approach provides a statistically significant reduction in data extraction error (SMAPE reduced from 25.5% to 19.5%, p < 0.05) compared to a baseline. We conclude that for the current generation of multimodal models, providing explicit spatial context is a more effective and reliable strategy than high-level semantic guidance for this class of tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种提升多模态大模型从科学图表中提取数据准确性的策略：高层语义提示（如元数据优先框架和思维链）与低层空间提示（叠加坐标网格）。实验表明，空间方法显著降低了提取误差（SMAPE从25.5%降至19.5%），而语义方法未带来统计显著改善。
AI.motivation: 科学图表数据自动提取对大规模文献分析至关重要，但现有模型在非标准化图表上准确性不足，需要探索最有效的改进策略。
AI.method: 对比两种策略：1）语义方法（两阶段元数据优先框架、思维链）；2）空间方法（在图表图像上叠加坐标网格）。在合成数据集上进行定量实验。
AI.result: 语义方法未产生统计显著改进；空间方法（网格叠加）使SMAPE从25.5%降至19.5%（p<0.05），具有统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: 对于当前新一代多模态模型，提供显式空间上下文（坐标网格）比高层语义引导更有效可靠，是提升科学图表数据提取准确性的更优策略。

title: Locational Pricing for Generative-AI Services via Token-Flow Market Clearing
summary: GenAI services are in an early yet fast expanding phase. Providers compete on model capability and service quality, while the underlying infrastructure remains expensive and heterogeneous across regions, workloads, and compute assets. If these services diffuse into routine daily use, the relevant engineering problem becomes not only better models but also efficient dispatch on a geographically distributed AI service infrastructure. To address this, we formulate a network-constrained token-flow market that clears AI workloads across compute nodes and communication links. The baseline model is a linear program that co-optimizes routing and processing subject to compute-capacity and bandwidth constraints; its dual variables define location- and workload-specific marginal service prices. We further introduce a transfer-aware extension that prices data movement in physical units and isolates bandwidth congestion rents. In a 5-node U.S. case study, the transfer-aware model uncovers four saturated backbone links and raises total operating cost by 2.7\% relative to the token-equivalent baseline, while tightening the chatbot latency limit from 100~ms to 15~ms increases one locational price by 117\%. A 20-node scale-up exhibits the same merit-order dispatch logic and becomes infeasible once demand exceeds aggregate capacity. These results suggest that locational pricing is a useful organizing principle for operating an emerging AI service infrastructure and, over time, for designing competitive markets around it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于地理分布式AI服务基础设施的token流市场模型，通过线性规划实现计算路由与处理的联合优化，并引入考虑传输成本的扩展模型。案例研究表明，位置定价是组织AI服务基础设施和设计竞争性市场的有效原则。
AI.motivation: GenAI服务正处于快速扩张阶段，但基础设施在不同地区、工作负载和计算资源间成本高昂且异构。如果这些服务普及到日常使用，工程问题不仅是改进模型，还需在地理分布的AI基础设施上进行高效调度。
AI.method: 构建了一个受网络约束的token流市场模型，基线模型为线性规划，联合优化路由与处理，受计算容量和带宽约束。引入传输感知扩展模型，以物理单位定价数据移动并隔离带宽拥塞租金。
AI.result: 5节点美国案例中，传输感知模型发现4条饱和骨干链路，总运营成本比基线提高2.7%；聊天延迟从100ms收紧到15ms使某位置价格上升117%。20节点扩展显示了相同调度逻辑，需求超过总容量时模型不可行。
AI.conclusion: 位置定价是运营新兴AI服务基础设施的有用组织原则，并可为围绕其设计竞争性市场奠定基础。

title: Execution Envelopes: A Shared Admission Contract for Backend AI Execution Requests
comment: Systems paper on backend admission contracts, 12 pages, 4 tables
summary: Enterprise AI backends increasingly admit heterogeneous execution requests across model deployment, inference, evaluation, data movement, and agentic workflows. In many systems, those requests arrive in service-specific shapes, which makes it difficult to attach shared admission-time behavior such as logging, governance hints, resource accounting, authorization-aware policy hooks, and later runtime review without rebuilding the same contract in each subsystem. This paper introduces the execution envelope, a normalized internal admission object that records who is asking for what kind of execution, what resources were requested, what policy-relevant scope accompanied the request, and what the backend ultimately granted. The proposal is intentionally narrow. It does not replace service-specific request models, perform scheduling, or introduce a new authority token. Instead, it defines a descriptive admission seam that can be threaded through real backend paths before backend-specific resolution begins. I formalize the distinction between requested and granted resources, specify the field families, invariants, and lifecycle of the envelope, work through POST /serving/deploy_model as an initial proving ground, and position the design relative to usage control, analyzable authorization, admission control, and cluster scheduling. The central claim is that a shared execution-admission contract is a useful missing primitive for modern AI backends because it creates one place to attach governance and observability without pretending to solve placement, policy, and runtime execution in a single step.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“执行信封”（execution envelope）概念，作为企业AI后端中标准化的内部准入对象，用于在服务特定请求模型之前统一附加治理、审计、资源核算和策略钩子，解决了异构请求难以共享准入行为的问题。
AI.motivation: 企业AI后端面临异构执行请求（模型部署、推理、评估、数据移动、智能体工作流），这些请求以服务特定的形状到达，导致难以在不重建相同合约的情况下附加共享的准入时行为（如日志记录、治理提示、资源核算、授权策略钩子、运行时审查）。
AI.method: 定义了一个称为“执行信封”（execution envelope）的标准化内部准入对象，记录谁请求了什么类型的执行、请求了哪些资源、伴随请求的策略相关范围以及后端最终授予的内容。明确区分请求资源和授予资源，规范字段族、不变量和生命周期，并通过POST /serving/deploy_model作为验证案例。
AI.result: 提出了一个有意狭窄的设计提案，不替代服务特定请求模型、不执行调度、不引入新的权限令牌，而是定义了一个描述性准入接缝，可在后端特定解析开始前贯穿实际后端路径。
AI.conclusion: 共享的执行-准入合约是现代AI后端缺失的有用原语，因为它创建了一个统一的位置来附加治理和可观测性，而不试图在一个步骤中解决放置、策略和运行时执行问题。

title: How Much Do Circuits Tell Us? Measuring the Consistency and Specificity of Language Model Circuits
summary: The circuits framework in mechanistic interpretability aims to identify causally important sparse subgraphs of model components, typically evaluated by measuring necessity and sufficiency. We measure circuit reuse, the proportion of components shared across per-example circuits within a task, and investigate two less-studied properties of this: consistency, the recurrence of components within a task, and specificity, their uniqueness to a task. Using edge attribution patching across six tasks and seven models, we find that within-task reuse is high and that shared components are necessary for task performance, with ablations causing up to $\sim$100% relative accuracy drops. However, circuits turn out not to be task-specific: ablating one task's circuit damages another task's performance about as much as that task's own circuit does. We discover that this is due to substantial overlap between circuits across tasks, which are causally important for performance. Some circuits do contain a smaller set of task-specific components, but these account for only a modest portion of circuit performance. Overall, our findings suggest that while circuit discovery at the level of attention heads and MLP layers identifies important components, their lack of task-specificity raises questions about the degree to which circuits can support targeted understanding and intervention on model behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了 mechanistic interpretability 中 circuit 框架的两个关键性质：一致性（任务内组件重复使用）和特异性（组件对任务的独特性）。通过对六个任务和七个模型的分析，发现任务内组件复用率高且共享组件对任务性能至关重要，但 circuit 并不具有任务特异性——不同任务的 circuit 高度重叠，任务特定组件只占性能的一小部分。这质疑了 circuit 在目标性理解和干预上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有 circuit 发现方法主要关注必要性和充分性，但对 circuit 在任务内的一致性和跨任务的特异性缺乏系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究 circuit 组件的复用程度及其对任务性能的因果重要性，以评估 circuit 框架在可解释性中的实际价值。
AI.method: 采用 edge attribution patching 方法，对六个 NLP 任务和七个不同规模的 Transformer 模型进行分析，通过测量共享组件比例、消融实验等来定量评估 circuit 的一致性（任务内组件复用率）和特异性（组件对任务的独特性）。
AI.result: （1）任务内 circuit 组件复用率高，共享组件对性能至关重要，消融导致约 100% 的准确率下降；（2）circuit 不具有任务特异性，消融一个任务的 circuit 对另一个任务的损害程度与消融其自身 circuit 相当；（3）不同任务的 circuit 之间存在大量因果重要的重叠；（4）任务特定组件只占性能的一小部分。
AI.conclusion: 虽然 current circuit 发现方法能在 attention head 和 MLP 层识别出重要组件，但这些组件缺乏任务特异性，这质疑了 circuit 方法能否真正支持对模型行为的目标性理解和干预。

title: Self-Captioning Multimodal Interaction Tuning: Amplifying Exploitable Redundancies for Robust Vision Language Models
summary: Current vision language models face hallucination and robustness issues against ambiguous or corrupted modalities. We hypothesize that these issues can be addressed by exploiting the shared information between modalities to compensate for the impaired one. To this end, we analyze multimodal interactions -- redundant (shared), unique (exclusive), and synergistic (emergent) task-relevant information provided by the modalities -- to determine their impacts on model reliability. Specifically, amplifying redundant interactions would increase this exploitable shared information to resolve these issues; yet, modern instruction datasets often eliminate redundancies to prioritize visual grounding. We bridge this gap through a self-captioning workflow featuring a \textsc{Multimodal Interaction Gate}: a mechanism to convert unique interactions into redundant interactions. Our findings suggest that increasing redundancy can reduce visual induced errors by 38.3\% and improve consistency by 16.8\%.

AI.tldr: 通过自生成字幕和“多模态交互门”机制将独特信息转化为冗余信息，从而提升视觉语言模型的鲁棒性，减少幻觉并提高一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在面对模糊或受损模态时存在幻觉和鲁棒性问题，作者假设可以通过利用模态间共享信息来补偿受损模态，从而解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种自生成字幕工作流，包含一个多模态交互门（Multimodal Interaction Gate），该机制将独特（唯一）的交互信息转化为冗余（共享）的交互信息，从而增加可利用的共享信息。
AI.result: 增加冗余信息可以将视觉引起的错误减少38.3%，并将一致性提高16.8%。
AI.conclusion: 增强模态间的冗余交互可以有效提升模型可靠性和鲁棒性，弥补当前指令数据集因优先视觉定位而消除冗余的不足。

title: Auto-Rubric as Reward: From Implicit Preferences to Explicit Multimodal Generative Criteria
summary: Aligning multimodal generative models with human preferences demands reward signals that respect the compositional, multi-dimensional structure of human judgment. Prevailing RLHF approaches reduce this structure to scalar or pairwise labels, collapsing nuanced preferences into opaque parametric proxies and exposing vulnerabilities to reward hacking. While recent Rubrics-as-Reward (RaR) methods attempt to recover this structure through explicit criteria, generating rubrics that are simultaneously reliable, scalable, and data-efficient remains an open problem. We introduce Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR), a framework that reframes reward modeling from implicit weight optimization to explicit, criteria-based decomposition. Before any pairwise comparison, ARR externalizes a VLM's internalized preference knowledge as prompt-specific rubrics, translating holistic intent into independently verifiable quality dimensions. This conversion of implicit preference structure into inspectable, interpretable constraints substantially suppresses evaluation biases including positional bias, enabling both zero-shot deployment and few-shot conditioning on minimal supervision. To extend these gains into generative training, we propose Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO), which distills ARR's structured multi-dimensional evaluation into a robust binary reward, replacing opaque scalar regression with rubric-conditioned preference decisions that stabilize policy gradients. On text-to-image generation and image editing benchmarks, ARR-RPO outperforms pairwise reward models and VLM judges, demonstrating that explicitly externalizing implicit preference knowledge into structured rubrics achieves more reliable, data-efficient multimodal alignment, revealing that the bottleneck is the absence of a factorized interface, not a deficit of knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR)框架，将隐式的偏好知识显式化为可解释的评分标准，并配合Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO)进行策略优化，在文本到图像生成和图像编辑任务上超越传统的成对奖励模型和VLM评判器。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态对齐方法（如RLHF）将人类偏好的多维结构简化为标量或成对标签，导致奖励脆弱、易受奖励黑客攻击，且缺乏可解释性。尽管Rubrics-as-Reward方法尝试引入显式标准，但生成可靠、可扩展且数据高效的评分标准仍具挑战。
AI.method: ARR首先将VLM内在的偏好知识外部化为与提示相关的显式评分标准（rubrics），将整体意图分解为可独立验证的质量维度；然后提出RPO，将ARR的结构化多维评估蒸馏为稳健的二元奖励，替代传统的标量回归，利用评分条件化的偏好决策来稳定策略梯度。
AI.result: 在文本到图像生成和图像编辑基准上，ARR-RPO方法优于成对奖励模型和VLM评判器，显著抑制了位置偏差等评估偏见，支持零样本部署和少样本高效微调。
AI.conclusion: 显式地将隐式偏好知识外部化为结构化评分标准，能够实现更可靠、更数据高效的多模态对齐。对齐的瓶颈并非知识缺失，而是缺乏一个因子化的交互界面。

title: Modeling Implicit Conflict Monitoring Mechanisms against Stereotypes in LLMs
summary: In this paper, we study an emergent self-debiasing mechanisms against stereotypical content in Large Language Models (LLMs). Unlike traditional safety mechanisms that are primarily triggered by explicit input-level stimuli, self-debiasing mechanisms can involve generation-time intrinsic correction that are not directly reducible to surface-level prompt. Motivated by conflict-monitoring and response-inhibition accounts in cognitive neuroscience, we propose COCO, a contrastive causal method designed to identify COCO neurons that exhibit high intra-\underline{CO}nsistency yet sharp inter-\underline{CO}ntrast across antithetical generative responses, such as stereotypical versus unbiased outputs. Ablation studies reveal that deactivating COCO neurons leads to a catastrophic collapse of the model's fairness; over 90\% of outputs revert to biased content, far exceeding the bias levels induced by explicit adversarial jailbreak attacks. Observing that simple weight amplification of COCO neurons yields only marginal gains, we propose two training-free, lightweight editing strategies: Local Enhancement (LE-COCO) and Networked Enhancement (NE-COCO). Comprehensive evaluations show that our methods bolster robustness against adversarial jailbreaks and achieve strong performance on open-ended safety benchmarks, while preserving foundational generative proficiency. While this study primarily addresses social stereotypes, the COCO mechanism holds significant potential for diverse domains like hallucination detection, offering valuable insights toward the development of self-evolving AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COCO对比因果方法，识别LLM中负责自我去偏的神经元，通过局部增强（LE-COCO）和网络增强（NE-COCO）两种无训练编辑策略提升模型公平性，有效抵御对抗性越狱攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有安全机制主要依赖显式输入级触发，缺乏对生成过程中内在自我去偏机制的理解。受认知神经科学中冲突监测与反应抑制理论的启发，作者旨在揭示LLM内部可自主纠正刻板偏见的神经基础。
AI.method: 提出COCO（对比因果）方法，识别在刻板/公正两种对立输出中具有高内部一致性（intra-Consistency）和高外部对比性（inter-Contrast）的神经元。在此基础上提出两种无训练轻量编辑策略：局部增强（LE-COCO）和网络增强（NE-COCO），通过放大COCO神经元的活动来强化去偏能力。
AI.result: 消融实验表明，去激活COCO神经元会导致模型公平性灾难性崩溃，超90%输出恢复偏见内容，远超显式对抗攻击引发的偏见水平。所提增强策略能有效提升模型对抗越狱攻击的鲁棒性，在开放式安全基准上表现优异，同时保持基础生成能力。
AI.conclusion: COCO机制不仅有效解决社会刻板偏见问题，其原理还可推广至幻觉检测等更多领域，为开发具有自我进化能力的AI智能体提供了重要启示。

title: Semantics-Aware Communication:A Differentiated Allocation Perspective
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: We study the joint optimization of timeliness and reliability in semantics-aware Wireless Networked Control Systems (WNCS) under computation resource constraints. The sampled data are categorized into regular and critical tasks based on the semantic states, facilitating differentiated resource allocation. Task-aware Age of Actuation (AoA) and Cost of Missing Actuation (CoMA), are used to characterize the task-level freshness and the reliability penalty of missed actuations, respectively. By modeling the controller as a discrete-time multi-rate Geo/D/C/C queue, we evaluate the performance of regular and critical tasks, the latter imposing higher computational demands. Results confirm that differentiated resource allocation across heterogeneous tasks effectively guarantees the actuation reliability of critical tasks in severely constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语义感知无线网络控制系统（WNCS）中，在计算资源约束下联合优化时效性与可靠性问题。通过将采样数据按语义状态分为常规任务和关键任务，实现差异化资源分配。使用任务感知的驱动年龄（AoA）和缺失驱动成本（CoMA）分别表征任务级新鲜度和可靠性惩罚，并将控制器建模为离散时间多速率Geo/D/C/C队列评估性能。实验证实差异化资源分配能有效保障关键任务在严苛环境下的驱动可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有WNCS研究未能充分关注计算资源约束下异构任务的差异化需求，亟需在时效性与可靠性之间寻求联合优化方案，以保障关键任务的驱动可靠性。
AI.method: 1) 基于语义状态将采样数据分为常规任务和关键任务，实施差异化资源分配。2) 提出任务感知的驱动年龄（AoA）和缺失驱动成本（CoMA）两个指标。3) 将控制器建模为离散时间多速率Geo/D/C/C队列进行性能评估。
AI.result: 在计算资源严重受限的环境下，针对异构任务实施差异化资源分配能有效保证关键任务的驱动可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义感知的任务分类和差异化资源分配策略，可以在计算资源约束下实现WNCS的时效性与可靠性联合优化，特别能保障关键任务的服务质量。

title: Do not copy and paste! Rewriting strategies for code retrieval
summary: Embedding-based code retrieval often suffers when encoders overfit to surface syntax. Prior work mitigates this by using LLMs to rephrase queries and corpora into a normalized style, but leaves two questions open: how much representational shift helps, and when is the per-query LLM call justified? We study a hierarchy of three rewriting strategies: stylistic rephrasing, NL-enriched PseudoCode, and full Natural-Language transcription, under joint query-corpus (QC, online) and corpus-only (C, offline) augmentation, across six CoIR benchmarks, five encoders, and three rewriters spanning independent model families (Qwen, DeepSeek, Mistral). We are the first to evaluate NL-enriched PseudoCode and snippet-level Natural Language as direct retrieval representations, rather than as transient intermediates. Full NL rewriting with QC yields the largest gains (+0.51 absolute NDCG@10 on CT-Contest for MoSE-18), while corpus-only rewriting degrades retrieval in 56 of 90 configurations, about 62%. We introduce two diagnostics, Delta H, token entropy, and Delta s, embedding cosine, and show that Delta H predicts retrieval gain under QC across all three rewriter families: pooled Spearman rho = +0.436, p < 0.001 on DeepSeek+Codestral; rho = +0.593 on Codestral alone; rho = +0.356 on Qwen. This establishes Delta H as a cheap, rewriter-agnostic proxy for deciding when rewriting pays off before running retrieval. Our analysis reframes LLM rewriting as a cost-benefit decision: it is most effective as a remediation layer for lightweight encoders on code-dominant queries, with diminishing returns for strong encoders or NL-heavy queries.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了LLM重写策略对代码检索的影响，发现全自然语言重写+联合查询-语料增强效果最佳（NDCG@10提升+0.51），而仅重写语料在62%配置下反而降低性能。提出Delta H（token熵差）作为低成本、重写器无关的代理指标，可预测重写何时有益（Spearman rho最高+0.593）。将LLM重写定位为轻量编码器在代码密集型查询上的补救层。
AI.motivation: 现有基于嵌入的代码检索方法容易过拟合表面语法，先前工作使用LLM重写查询和语料来规范化风格，但留下两个开放问题：表征偏移多少才有效，以及何时值得为每个查询调用LLM。
AI.method: 研究三种重写策略（风格改写、NL增强伪代码、完全自然语言转录）在联合查询-语料（QC,在线）和仅语料（C,离线）两种增强模式下，在6个CoIR基准、5个编码器、3个跨模型家族重写器上的表现。首次评估NL增强伪代码和片段级自然语言作为直接检索表示。引入Delta H（token熵差）和Delta s（嵌入余弦）两个诊断指标。
AI.result: 完全NL重写+QC在CT-Contest上提升最高（+0.51 NDCG@10）。仅语料重写在90个配置中的56个（约62%）降低检索性能。Delta H在三个重写器家族上均显著预测检索增益（DeepSeek+Codestral: rho=+0.436, p<0.001; Codestral单独: rho=+0.593; Qwen: rho=+0.356）。
AI.conclusion: LLM重写应视为成本-收益决策：对轻量编码器处理代码密集型查询时最有效，对强编码器或NL密集型查询收益递减。Delta H可作为廉价、重写器无关的代理，在运行检索前判断重写是否值得。

title: Change My View? The Dynamics of Persuasion and Polarization in Online Discourse
summary: Philosophical accounts of persuasion often assume that shared evidence and rational argumentation should lead to a convergence of views between peers, yet everyday discourse often suggests otherwise. In this study, we use large language models to analyze a corpus of debates on Reddit's r/ChangeMyView, where belief revision is publicly signaled. Large language models were asked, halfway through each discussion, to forecast whether such an acknowledgement would arise; their probabilistic estimates serve as a conversational baseline. Each reply was then coded, through a hybrid machine-assisted procedure, for ten familiar rhetorical strategies -- concession, empathy, logical challenge, credibility appeals, and so forth. Adding these strategic features markedly improves predictive power and yields a consistent pattern: moves that express concession or empathetic alignment substantially increase the prospect of belief change, whereas frontal refutation, credibility attacks, and topic deflection diminish it. The findings indicate that effective public reasoning depends as much on relational framing as on evidential content, and they invite a refinement of normative accounts of rational dialogue.

AI.tldr: 使用大型语言模型分析Reddit辩论数据，发现让步和共情策略显著促进信念改变，而正面反驳、可信度攻击和话题偏离则降低这种可能性。
AI.motivation: 哲学上认为理性论证和共享证据应导致观点趋同，但日常对话常出现相反情况，作者希望探究实际辩论中影响信念改变的因素。
AI.method: 利用LLM分析Reddit's r/ChangeMyView语料库，分两步进行：1）LLM在讨论中途预测是否会出现信念改变的承认；2）通过混合机器辅助编码对每条回复标注10种修辞策略。
AI.result: 加入修辞策略特征后预测能力显著提升；让步和共情对齐增加信念改变概率，而正面反驳、可信度攻击和话题偏离则降低该概率。
AI.conclusion: 有效的公共推理不仅依赖证据内容，更取决于关系框架的构建，需要修正规范性理性对话理论。

title: VT-Bench: A Unified Benchmark for Visual-Tabular Multi-Modal Learning
summary:
Multi-model learning has attracted great attention in visual-text tasks. However, visual-tabular data, which plays a pivotal role in high-stakes domains like healthcare and industry, remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce \textit{VT-Bench}, the first unified benchmark for standardizing vision-tabular discriminative prediction and generative reasoning tasks. VT-Bench aggregates 14 datasets across 9 domains (medical-centric, while covering pets, media, and transportation) with over 756K samples. We evaluate 23 representative models, including unimodal experts, specialized visual-tabular models, general-purpose vision-language models (VLMs), and tool-augmented methods, highlighting substantial challenges of visual-tabular learning. We believe VT-Bench will stimulate the community to build more powerful multi-modal vision-tabular foundation models.
  Benchmark: https://github.com/Ziyi-Jia990/VT-Bench

AI.tldr: VT-Bench是首个统一视觉-表格数据基准，涵盖14个数据集、9个领域，评估23个模型，揭示该领域学习挑战。
AI.motivation: 多模态学习在视觉-文本任务中备受关注，但视觉-表格数据（尤其在医疗、工业等高风险领域）尚未被充分探索，缺乏统一基准。
AI.method: 构建VT-Bench基准，整合14个数据集（超75.6万样本），覆盖9个领域；评估23个代表性模型（包括单模态专家、专用视觉-表格模型、通用VLM及工具增强方法）。
AI.result: 揭示了当前模型在视觉-表格学习任务上存在的显著挑战，现有方法表现尚不理想。
AI.conclusion: VT-Bench有望推动社区构建更强大的多模态视觉-表格基础模型。

title: Embeddings for Preferences, Not Semantics
summary: Modern AI is opening the door to collective decision-making in which participants express their views as free-form text rather than voting on a fixed set of candidates. A natural idea is to embed these opinions in a vector space so that the substantial literature on facility location problems and fair clustering can be brought to bear. But standard text embeddings measure semantic similarity, whereas distances in facility location problems and fair clustering require what we call \textit{preferential similarity}: a participant's agreement with a piece of text should be inversely related to their distance from it. Off-the-shelf embeddings inherit a coarse preference signal through a correlation between semantic and preferential similarity, but fail to capture preferences when the correlation breaks. We formalize this as an invariance problem: text embedding models encode both a preference-relevant signal (stance and values) and semantic nuisance (style and wording), and the two are observationally correlated, so a geometry that relies on nuisance can appear preference-correct even when it is not. We show that synthetic training data designed to break this correlation provably shifts the optimal scorer away from nuisance-dominated cosine and significantly improves preference prediction across 11 online deliberation datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在集体决策中利用文本嵌入进行偏好预测的问题，指出现有嵌入主要测量语义相似性而非偏好相似性，并通过打破语义噪声与偏好信号之间的相关性，提出了一种改进偏好预测的方法，在多个数据集上取得显著效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文本嵌入主要衡量语义相似性，但集体决策需要的是偏好相似性（即参与者与文本的距离应反映其同意程度），而两者虽有相关性但并非总是一致，因此需要一种能更好捕捉偏好信号的嵌入方法。
AI.method: 形式化了偏好预测中的不变性问题：嵌入模型编码了偏好相关信号（立场、价值观）和语义噪声（风格、措辞），两者存在观测相关性。通过构建打破这种相关性的合成训练数据，使最优评分器从被噪声主导的余弦相似度转向更偏好正确的方向。
AI.result: 在11个在线讨论数据集上，该方法显著提升了偏好预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过打破语义噪声与偏好信号之间的虚假相关性，可以显著改进文本嵌入在偏好预测任务上的表现，为集体决策中的自由文本意见聚合提供了更可靠的技术基础。

title: Group Vitality Indices: Axioms and Algorithms
summary: We consider the problem of assessing a group of nodes in a network. Our focus is on vitality indices -- a natural class of centrality measures that evaluate the importance of a node by examining the impact of its removal on the network. We conduct a comprehensive analysis of group vitality indices. Specifically, we show that every vitality index admits a unique extension to groups, which can be defined using a group variant of the Shapley value recently proposed in the literature. We also provide an axiomatization of the entire class, along with two specific group vitality indices that satisfy additional normalization conditions. Furthermore, we study the computational properties of all vitality indices, as well as Group Attachment Centrality.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了网络中的群体生命力指标（Group Vitality Indices），证明每种生命力指标存在唯一的群体扩展形式（基于Shapley值），给出了公理化刻画，并分析了计算性质。
AI.motivation: 现有生命力指标主要针对单个节点，缺乏对节点组（群体）重要性的系统性评估方法，因此需要将生命力指标扩展到群体场景。
AI.method: 利用群体Shapley值的变体定义生命力指标的唯一群体扩展形式；通过公理化方法刻画整个类别；研究计算性质及群体依附中心性（Group Attachment Centrality）。
AI.result: 证明了每个生命力指标都存在唯一的群体扩展；给出了整个类别的公理系统；提出了两个满足额外归一化条件的群体生命力指标。
AI.conclusion: 群体生命力指标具有理论上的唯一性和公理化基础，为网络群体重要性评估提供了严谨框架。

title: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Enhances In-Context Learning for LLM-Based Mobile Traffic Prediction
summary: Accurate short-term mobile traffic prediction is important for proactive resource allocation and low-latency network management in fifth generation (5G) and sixth generation (6G). While large language models (LLMs) can perform in-context learning (ICL) without task-specific retraining, naive ICL prompting may suffer from numerical instability and limited temporal reasoning when traffic dynamics fluctuate rapidly. In this paper, we propose a chain-of-thought (CoT)-enabled LLM-based mobile traffic prediction framework that operates in two phases: (i) an offline phase that constructs structured CoT demonstrations by generating rationales via a plan-based CoT (PCoT) pipeline (lecture, plan, and rationale), and (ii) an online phase that performs close to real-time prediction by retrieving the most relevant demonstrations using a similarity policy that considers both the historical throughput pattern and its short-term changes. We evaluate the proposed framework using a real-world 5G measurement dataset that includes both driving and static scenarios across diverse applications. Our numerical results reveal that the proposed 2-shot CoT-LLM can improve mean absolute error (MAE), root mean square error (RMSE) and R2-score by up to 14.88%, 15.03%, and 22.41%, respectively, compared to the 2-shot ICL-LLM and classical baselines. Furthermore, by optimizing the number of in-context examples, we achieve additional improvements of 4.58%, 5.70%, and 4.85% in MAE, RMSE, and R2-score, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于链式思维（CoT）的大语言模型移动流量预测框架，通过离线构建结构化CoT演示（PCoT流程：讲解→规划→推理）和在线检索最相关示例，在真实5G数据集上相比传统ICL方法，MAE、RMSE和R²分别提升14.88%、15.03%和22.41%。
AI.motivation: 5G/6G网络需要精准的短期移动流量预测以实现主动资源分配和低延迟管理，但传统LLM的ICL提示方法在流量快速波动时存在数值不稳定和时间推理能力有限的缺陷。
AI.method: 提出两阶段CoT-LLM框架：离线阶段通过PCoT流程生成结构化CoT演示（Lecture→Plan→Rationale）；在线阶段基于历史吞吐量模式和短期变化相似性策略检索最相关演示，进行接近实时的预测。
AI.result: 在真实5G数据集（含驾驶和静态场景）上，2-shot CoT-LLM相比2-shot ICL-LLM和经典基线，MAE提升14.88%，RMSE提升15.03%，R²提升22.41%；优化示例数量后进一步获得4.58%、5.70%和4.85%的提升。
AI.conclusion: CoT增强的LLM框架能有效提升移动流量预测精度，数值稳定性和时序推理能力优于传统ICL方法，是5G/6G网络智能管理的有前景方案。

title: Mazocarta: A Seeded Procedural Deckbuilder for Instrumented Game Development
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Code available at https://github.com/timcogan/mazocarta
summary: Mazocarta is a seeded procedural tactical deckbuilder implemented in Rust, compiled to WebAssembly for browser play, and executable natively for simulation. Its primary technical contribution is not the invention of a new deckbuilding genre, but the construction of an instrumented game-development reference artifact: the same rules engine supports interactive play, native command-line simulation, automated end-to-end tests, save/load fixtures, and local-area multiplayer. This paper describes Mazocarta's architecture, deterministic run model, reproducible balance probes, and QR-mediated WebRTC pairing for local multiplayer. An evaluation snapshot over 1,000 deterministic seeds shows that the simulation pipeline can produce reproducible development signals. In the evaluated configuration, single-player and two-player autoplay win rates were 36.1% and 34.9% over 1,000 deterministic seeds, respectively. These rates are not presented as final player-facing balance metrics, but as repeatable probes for future balance shifts and regressions. Mazocarta is positioned as a playable open-source reference artifact for instrumented game development: deterministic regression checks, automated playtesting workflows, balance probes for game mechanics, and browser-native local multiplayer all exercise one shared production rules core.

AI.tldr: Mazocarta 是一个用 Rust 实现、可编译为 WebAssembly 在浏览器中运行、也可原生执行进行仿真的牌组构建游戏。其核心贡献是构建了一个可检测的游戏开发参考工件：同一个规则引擎支持交互式游玩、命令行仿真、自动化测试、存档/读档以及局域网多人对战。论文描述了其架构、确定性运行模型、可重现的平衡性探测，以及通过二维码和 WebRTC 实现的本地多人配对。在 1000 个确定性种子的评估中，单人自动对战胜率为 36.1%，双人为 34.9%，这些数值作为可重复的平衡性探测指标而非最终面向玩家的平衡指标。Mazocarta 被定位为一个可玩的开源参考工件，用于可检测的游戏开发。
AI.motivation: 现有牌组构建游戏通常将游戏引擎、测试、仿真等组件分离，缺乏一个统一、可检测的开发参考工件。作者希望通过 Mazocarta 展示如何在同一个规则引擎核心上同时支持交互式游玩、自动化测试、平衡性探测和本地多人对战，从而降低游戏开发中调试、平衡调整和回归测试的难度。
AI.method: 采用 Rust 实现核心规则引擎，编译为 WebAssembly 支持浏览器运行，同时支持原生执行。核心架构强调确定性运行模型，使用种子（seed）确保结果可重现。通过二维码和 WebRTC 实现本地多人配对。构建了自动化仿真管线，支持在相同种子下重复执行以生成可再现的平衡性探测信号。
AI.result: 在 1000 个确定性种子的评估中，单人自动对战胜率为 36.1%，双人自动对战胜率为 34.9%。这些数值作为可重复的平衡性探测指标，可用于未来平衡性调整和回归测试。
AI.conclusion: Mazocarta 作为一个开源的参考工件，展示了确定性回归检查、自动化游测试工作流、游戏机制平衡性探测以及浏览器原生本地多人对战均可共享同一个生产级规则引擎核心的设计范式。作者认为这种架构有助于提升游戏开发的测试效率和可维护性。

title: jina-embeddings-v5-omni: Text-Geometry-Preserving Multimodal Embeddings via Frozen-Tower Composition
summary: In this work, we introduce frozen-encoder model composition, a novel approach to multimodal embedding models. We build on the VLM-style architecture, in which non-text encoders are adapted to produce input for a language model, which in turn generates embeddings for all varieties of input. We present the result: the jina-embeddings-v5-omni suite, a pair of models that encode text, image, audio, and video input into a single semantic embedding space. Our method is to extend the two Jina Embeddings v5 Text models to support additional media by adding encoders for images and audio. The backbone text embedding models and the added non-text media encoders remain frozen. We only trained the connecting components, representing 0.35% of the total weights of the joint model. Training is therefore much more efficient than full-parameter retraining. Additionally, the language model remains effectively unaltered, producing exactly the same embeddings for text inputs as the Jina Embeddings v5 Text models. Our evaluations show that this approach produces results that are competitive with the state-of-the-art, yielding nearly equal performance to larger multimodal embedding models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出冻结编码器模型组合方法，通过仅训练0.35%的连接组件，将Jina Embeddings v5文本模型扩展为支持图像、音频和视频的多模态嵌入模型，在保持文本嵌入不变的同时实现与更大模型竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 旨在高效地将已有的高质量文本嵌入模型扩展为多模态嵌入模型，避免对大规模模型进行完全重新训练，同时保持文本嵌入的一致性。
AI.method: 采用VLM架构，冻结主干文本嵌入模型和非文本媒体编码器，仅训练连接组件（占模型总权重的0.35%），将图像和音频编码器的输出适配为语言模型的输入，从而生成统一语义嵌入空间中的多模态表示。
AI.result: 训练效率极高（仅训练0.35%参数），文本嵌入完全不变，多模态嵌入性能与更大的多模态嵌入模型相当，达到竞争性水平。
AI.conclusion: 冻结编码器模型组合是一种高效且有效的多模态嵌入模型构建方法，能以极小代价将现有文本嵌入模型扩展为多模态模型，且性能接近更大规模的全参数模型。

title: LAGO: Language-Guided Adaptive Object-Region Focus for Zero-Shot Visual-Text Alignment
summary: Zero-shot recognition aims to classify an image by selecting the most compatible label description from a set of candidate classes without any task-specific supervision. In fine-grained settings, however, the relevant evidence often lies in localized parts, attributes, or textures rather than in the full image, making whole-image alignment suboptimal. Recent localized visual-text alignment methods address this by comparing class descriptions with multiple image regions, but they typically rely on large sets of random or redundant crops, increasing inference cost and introducing many highly redundant or weakly relevant candidates. Moreover, introducing semantic guidance too early can create an error-amplifying feedback process in which inaccurate intermediate predictions bias later localization and reinforce subsequent mistakes; we refer to this failure mode as the prediction loop. We propose LAGO (LAnguage-Guided adaptive Object-region focus), a framework for efficient and robust zero-shot localized visual-text alignment. LAGO first performs class-agnostic object-centric candidate discovery to obtain a stable visual initialization, and then applies adaptive language-guided refinement with the strength of semantic guidance controlled by intermediate confidence. It further combines object-level, contextual, and full-image evidence through an effective object-context dual-channel aggregation strategy. Extensive experiments show that LAGO consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard zero-shot benchmarks and challenging distribution-shift settings, while requiring substantially fewer candidate regions at inference time.

AI.tldr: LAGO提出了一种高效且鲁棒的零样本识别框架，通过类无关的目标候选发现和自适应语言引导细化，避免了早期语义引导带来的错误放大，同时显著减少推理所需的候选区域数量，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本识别方法在细粒度场景下存在两个问题：1）全图对齐忽略了局部关键证据；2）局部对齐方法依赖大量随机裁剪，推理成本高且冗余候选多；3）早期引入语义引导会导致"预测循环"错误放大。
AI.method: LAGO包含三步：1）类无关的目标候选发现（稳定视觉初始化）；2）自适应语言引导细化（用中间置信度控制语义引导强度）；3）对象-上下文双通道聚合策略（融合对象级、上下文和全图证据）。
AI.result: 在标准零样本基准和分布偏移设置下均达到SOTA，且推理时所需的候选区域数量大幅减少。
AI.conclusion: LAGO通过控制语义引导时机和强度，结合多层级证据融合，实现了高效、鲁棒的零样本细粒度识别。

title: On Distinguishing Capability Elicitation from Capability Creation in Post-Training: A Free-Energy Perspective
summary: Debates about large language model post-training often treat supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as imitation and reinforcement learning (RL) as discovery. But this distinction is too coarse. What matters is whether a training procedure increases the probability of behaviors the pretrained model could already produce, or whether it changes what the model can practically reach. We argue that post-training research should distinguish between capability elicitation and capability creation. We make this distinction operational by introducing the notion of accessible support: the set of behaviors that a model can practically produce under finite budgets. Post-training that reweights behaviors within this support is capability elicitation; whereas changing the support itself corresponds to capability creation. We develop this argument through a free-energy view of post-training. SFT and RL can both be seen as reweighting a pretrained reference distribution, only with different external signals. Demonstration signals define low-energy behavior for SFT, and reward signals define low-energy behavior for RL. When the update remains close to the base model, the main effect is local reweighting, not capability creation. Within this framework, the central question is no longer whether post-training is framed as SFT or RL, but whether it reweights behaviors already within reach, or instead expands the model's reachable behavioral space through search, interaction, tool use, or the incorporation of new information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出后训练研究应区分"能力激发"（在模型已有能力范围内重新加权）与"能力创造"（扩展模型可达行为空间），并从自由能视角论证SFT和RL本质上都是对预训练分布的重新加权，核心区别在于是否扩展了模型的可达行为空间。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将SFT简单归为模仿、RL归为发现的做法过于粗糙，未能揭示后训练过程的本质差异。作者希望建立一个更精确的理论框架来区分不同后训练方法的实际作用机制。
AI.method: 引入"可达支撑集"概念，定义模型在有限预算下实际能产生的行为集合。从自由能视角出发，将SFT和RL统一视为对预训练参考分布的重新加权，区别仅在于外部信号不同（演示信号vs奖励信号）。
AI.result: SFT和RL在更新幅度接近基础模型时，主要效果都是局部重新加权而非能力创造。核心问题不在于使用SFT还是RL，而在于训练过程是重新加权已有行为还是通过搜索、交互、工具使用、新信息引入等方式扩展可达行为空间。
AI.conclusion: 后训练研究应转向关注训练过程是否真正改变了模型的能力边界，而非纠结于SFT/RL的二元区分。能力激发与能力创造的区分比方法名称本身更具指导意义。

title: GraphInstruct: A Progressive Benchmark for Diagnosing Capability Gaps in LLM Graph Generation
summary: Graph-structured data underpins applications from citation analysis and social-network modeling to molecular design and knowledge-graph construction, and Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used as prompt-driven graph synthesizers. Classical graph-generation reviews catalog deep generative models and their evaluation primitives, but predate the LLM era and provide no foundation for evaluating instruction-following graph synthesis. Recent LLM-era benchmarks evaluate models along graph-type or task-domain axes; such organizations, however, average over structural complexity and cannot localize where in the complexity spectrum an LLM breaks down. To close this diagnostic gap, we introduce GraphInstruct, a progressive-complexity benchmark that stratifies LLM graph generation into six complexity levels and five evaluation dimensions, paired with 800 hand-authored instructions, 1,582 algorithmically synthesized reference solutions, and a 12-LLM capability evaluation across 45 (model, strategy) configurations. We find that discriminative power peaks at multi-constraint composition rather than reasoning depth, that no single prompting strategy dominates across levels or model families, and that domain-semantic constraints remain iteration-invariant under all tested methods -- pointing to retrieval rather than additional compute as the next research frontier. Atop the benchmark, a verification-guided iterative framework with constraint-aware adaptive prompting consistently surpasses the prompt-engineering ceiling on tested target models, demonstrating that the benchmark's fine-grained signals drive method development.

AI.tldr: 提出GraphInstruct基准，将LLM图生成任务按六个复杂度层级和五个评估维度进行分层，发现判别力在多重约束组合处最高、无单一提示策略普适、领域语义约束迭代不变，并基于该基准设计了验证引导的迭代框架超越提示工程上限。
AI.motivation: 现有图生成综述覆盖深度生成模型但未涉及LLM时代，而LLM基准按图类型或任务域组织，忽略了结构复杂度，无法定位LLM在复杂度谱系中的失效点。
AI.method: 构建GraphInstruct基准：六个复杂度层级 × 五个评估维度，包含800条手工指令、1,582个算法合成参考解，在45种（模型，策略）配置上评估12个LLM。基于该基准设计验证引导的迭代框架，结合约束感知自适应提示。
AI.result: 判别力在多重约束组合处达到峰值而非推理深度；无单一提示策略在所有层级和模型家族中占优；领域语义约束在所有方法下迭代不变。
AI.conclusion: 验证引导的迭代框架持续超越提示工程上限，表明细粒度信号可驱动方法改进；未来方向应是检索而非更多计算。

title: The Carrier Pigeon Internet Protocol: An Algorithmic (and Lighthearted) Perspective
summary:
The theoretical model behind the pigeon post as a link layer in a communication network was introduced by Shannon (under the guise of studying One-Time Pads for cryptography). That is, to send a one-hop message to $v$, a node $u$ needs a mail pigeon bred and raised at $v$. When sending a message using a pigeon to $v$, node $u$ loses the pigeon. To send another message to $v$, node $u$ needs another pigeon of $v$. It has been demonstrated that the communication bandwidth achievable with pigeon post can exceed that of networks using other media. This has already motivated the introduction of Internet standards that allow the use of pigeons as Internet link-layer media.
  In this paper, we begin to fill in the missing piece: designing algorithms for breeding and scheduling pigeons to meet a given communication demand efficiently, minimizing the number of pigeons required. We consider singlehop, 2-hop, and multihop pigeon use. While the singlehop variant admits a simple characterization, both the 2-hop and the multihop variants are NP-hard. For the latter variants, we present a polynomial-time algorithm based on demand aggregation that achieves a 2-approximation for the number of pigeons used. We believe that this pigeon-based perspective offers both amusing and instructive insights into network design and hopefully, into ornithology.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了以鸽子作为网络通信链路层的理论模型，从香农的早期工作出发，提出鸽子邮递的通信协议设计问题。针对单跳、两跳和多跳通信，分析了最小化鸽子数量的调度与育种算法，证明了两跳和多跳问题是NP难的，并提出了一个基于需求聚合的2-近似多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 香农曾提出鸽子邮递作为通信网络链路层的理论模型，已有研究表明鸽子通信的带宽可能超越其他介质，并催生了相关互联网标准。然而，如何高效育种和调度鸽子以满足通信需求、最小化所需鸽子数量，这一关键问题尚未被解决。
AI.method: 对单跳、两跳和多跳鸽子通信模型进行形式化分析；单跳情形给出简洁刻画；两跳和多跳问题归约为NP难问题；提出基于需求聚合的多项式时间算法，达到2-近似比。
AI.result: 单跳问题可简单求解；两跳和多跳问题为NP难；提出的需求聚合算法可在多项式时间内实现2-近似。
AI.conclusion: 鸽子视角的网络设计既有趣又有启发性，为网络设计提供了新的思路，也对鸟类学有所启发。

title: What Software Engineering Looks Like to AI Agents? -- An Empirical Study of AI-Only Technical Discourse on MoltBook
summary: AI agents are increasingly framed as software-engineering teammates, yet most research studies them inside human-centered workflows. Little is known about the software-engineering discourse autonomous AI agents produce when they interact primarily with one another. This paper examines what autonomous AI agents discuss in MoltBook, an AI-agents-only social network, how that discourse is organized, and how it differs from human developer discourse. We combine human open coding of a 500-post sample, a concentration-plus-check topic-analysis pipeline over 4,707 English-filtered MoltBook technology posts, and a matched-instrument comparison against 5,211 GitHub Discussions posts. MoltBook technology discourse spans 12 recurring themes and is led by Security and Trust (27.4%). At the community level, activity is highly concentrated: the largest submolt contains 63.5% of posts and the Gini coefficient is 0.88, yet a stability-aware BERTopic pipeline still yields 32 non-outlier sub-topics. Compared with the GitHub Discussions baseline, MoltBook discourse contains fewer concrete, context-rich cues such as code-formatted artifacts, environment details, runtime failures, and reproduction steps; social mimicry appears only in a limited way, while idealization is mainly reflected through lower hedging. Overall, AI-only technical discourse is coherent but selective. It repeatedly returns to concerns such as security and trust, memory and context management, tooling and APIs, debugging and error handling, workflow automation, and infrastructure/ops, while omitting much of the concrete runtime and project-local detail common in human developer discourse. This may be because MoltBook contains fewer environment-specific failures, reproduction steps, and other concrete grounding cues.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了MoltBook（一个纯AI社交网络）中自主AI代理之间产生的技术讨论话语，发现其涵盖12个主题，以安全与信任（27.4%）为主导，话语高度集中（Gini系数0.88），但与人类开发者话语（GitHub Discussions）相比，缺乏具体的上下文线索（如代码片段、环境细节、运行时错误等），社会模仿有限，理想化主要体现在较低程度的模糊性表达上。
AI.motivation: 以往AI代理的研究通常聚焦于人机协作的工作流程，但关于AI代理之间自主互动时产生的软件工程话语特征尚不明确。本文旨在填补这一空白，了解纯AI社交网络中技术讨论的内容、结构及其与人类开发者话语的差异。
AI.method: 结合三种方法：（1）对500条帖子进行人工开放编码；（2）对4,707条MoltBook英文技术帖子进行"集中度+检查"主题分析流程（基于稳定感知的BERTopic）；（3）与5,211条GitHub Discussions帖子进行匹配工具对比。
AI.result: MoltBook技术话语涵盖12个主题，安全与信任占主导（27.4%）；活动高度集中，最大子社区占63.5%帖子，Gini系数0.88；BERTopic识别出32个非异常子主题。与GitHub Discussions相比，MoltBook中代码格式、环境细节、运行时失败和复现步骤等具体丰富的上下文线索较少，社会模仿有限，理想化主要通过较少使用模糊性表达体现。
AI.conclusion: AI自主技术话语具有连贯性但具有选择性，反复关注安全、信任、内存管理、工具链、调试、工作流自动化和基础设施等主题，但缺乏人类开发者话语中常见的具体运行时和项目局部细节，这可能是因为MoltBook中包含较少环境特定失败、复现步骤等具体基础线索。

title: AIPO: : Learning to Reason from Active Interaction
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities, largely stimulated by Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). However, existing RL algorithms face a fundamental limitation: their exploration remains largely constrained by the inherent capability boundary of the policy model. Although recent methods introduce external expert demonstrations to extend this boundary, they typically rely on complete trajectory-level guidance, which is sample-inefficient, information-sparse, and may confine exploration to a static guidance space. Inspired by the potential of multi-agent systems, we propose $\textbf{AIPO}$, an enhanced reinforcement learning framework that improves LLM reasoning through active multi-agent interaction during exploration. Specifically, AIPO enables the policy model to proactively consult three functional collaborative agents, $\textit{Verify Agent}$, $\textit{Knowledge Agent}$, and $\textit{Reasoning Agent}$, when encountering reasoning bottlenecks, thereby receiving fine-grained and targeted guidance to actively expand its capability boundary during training. We further introduce a tailored importance sampling coefficient together with a clipping strategy to mitigate the off-policy bias and gradient vanishing issues that arise when learning from agent-provided feedback. After training, the policy model performs reasoning independently without relying on collaborative agents. Extensive experiments on diverse reasoning benchmarks, including AIME, MATH500, GPQA-Diamond, and LiveCodeBench, show that AIPO consistently improves reasoning performance, generalizes robustly across different policy models and RLVR algorithms, and effectively expands the reasoning capability boundary of the policy model.

AI.tldr: AIPO是一个结合多智能体交互的强化学习框架，通过在训练中引入验证、知识和推理三个协作智能体来扩展策略模型的能力边界，从而提升大语言模型的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RL算法在LLM推理中受限于策略模型自身的能力边界，而引入外部专家演示的方法存在样本效率低、信息稀疏、探索空间受限等问题。
AI.method: 提出AIPO框架，让策略模型在遇到推理瓶颈时主动向Verify Agent、Knowledge Agent和Reasoning Agent咨询，获得细粒度的针对性指导；同时引入重要性采样系数和裁剪策略来缓解off-policy偏差和梯度消失问题。训练后策略模型可独立推理。
AI.result: 在AIME、MATH500、GPQA-Diamond、LiveCodeBench等多个推理基准上，AIPO一致提升了推理性能，在不同策略模型和RLVR算法上表现出良好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AIPO通过多智能体交互有效扩展了策略模型的推理能力边界，是一种通用且高效的LLM推理增强框架。

title: HY-Himmel Technical Report: Hierarchical Interleaved Multi-stream Motion Encoding for Long Video Understanding
summary: Long-video understanding with multimodal language models suffers from three compounding bottlenecks: heavy decode cost to obtain dense RGB frames, quadratic token growth with frame count, and weak motion perception under sparse keyframe sampling. We present HY-Himmel, a hierarchical video-language framework that allocates semantic and motion capacity separately. A small set of sparse anchor I-frames is routed to the expensive host ViT to ground object identity and scene layout, while the far denser inter-frame intervals are encoded by a lightweight compressed-domain tri-stream adapter that distils motion evidence from motion-vector maps, residual maps, and I-frame context into aligned motion tokens. These tokens are injected into the LLM via a differentiable placeholder mechanism after a dedicated Stage-1 contrastive alignment that places the motion representation in a geometry compatible with the frozen visual backbone. On Video-MME, HY-Himmel surpasses the dense 32-frame baseline by +2.3 pp (61.2 to 63.5%) while using 3.6x fewer context tokens. Extensive ablations over stream composition, motion encoder family, fusion mode, alignment objective, anchor count, LoRA rank, and video duration confirm that the full tri-stream is necessary and sufficient for the observed gains.

AI.tldr: HY-Himmel提出了一种分层视频-语言框架，通过将语义和运动能力分离，用少量稀疏锚帧处理语义、轻量压缩域三流适配器处理密集帧间的运动信息，在Video-MME上以3.6倍更少的token超越32帧密集基线2.3个百分点。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解面临三大瓶颈：密集RGB帧解码成本高、token数量随帧数二次增长、稀疏关键帧采样下运动感知能力弱。现有方法难以同时解决这三个问题。
AI.method: 提出HY-Himmel分层视频语言框架：(1) 稀疏锚点I帧由重型的Host ViT处理，获取物体身份和场景布局；(2) 密集帧间通过轻量压缩域三流适配器编码，利用运动向量图、残差图和I帧上下文提取运动证据；(3) 通过Stage-1对比对齐将运动表示与视觉骨干兼容，并通过可微分占位符机制注入LLM。
AI.result: 在Video-MME上超越密集32帧基线2.3个百分点（从61.2%提升至63.5%），同时使用3.6倍更少的上下文token。
AI.conclusion: 完整的压缩域三流设计对于所观察到的性能提升是必要且充分的，在长视频理解中实现了效率与效果的显著提升。

title: MemQ: Integrating Q-Learning into Self-Evolving Memory Agents over Provenance DAGs
comment: 22 pages, 11 figures (containing 43 individual image panels total)
summary: Episodic memory allows LLM agents to accumulate and retrieve experience, but current methods treat each memory independently, i.e., evaluating retrieval quality in isolation without accounting for the dependency chains through which memories enable the creation of future memories. We introduce MemQ, which applies TD($λ$) eligibility traces to memory Q-values, propagating credit backward through a provenance DAG that records which memories were retrieved when each new memory was created. Credit weight decays as $(γλ)^d$ with DAG depth $d$, replacing temporal distance with structural proximity. We formalize the setting as an Exogenous-Context MDP, whose factored transition decouples the exogenous task stream from the endogenous memory store. Across six benchmarks, spanning OS interaction, function calling, code generation, multimodal reasoning, embodied reasoning, and expert-level QA, MemQ achieves the highest success rate on all six in generalization evaluation and runtime learning, with gains largest on multi-step tasks that produce deep and relevant provenance chains (up to +5.7~pp) and smallest on single-step classification (+0.77~pp) where single-step updates already suffice. We further study how $γ$ and $λ$ interact with the EC-MDP structure, providing principled guidance for parameter selection and future research. Code will be available soon.

AI.tldr: MemQ是一种基于TD(λ)资格迹的 episodic memory 方法，通过将信用反传至记忆的依赖 DAG 图中，显著提升 LLM 代理在跨六类基准上的泛化与在线学习能力，尤其适合多步依赖任务。
AI.motivation: 现有 episodic memory 方法将每条记忆视为独立个体进行检索评估，忽略了记忆之间的依赖链——即旧记忆如何通过被检索来帮助生成新记忆。这种孤立评估方式导致信用分配不准确。
AI.method: 提出 MemQ，将 TD(λ) 资格迹应用于记忆 Q 值，沿 provenance DAG（记录每次创建新记忆时检索了哪些旧记忆）反向传播信用，信用权重按 $(γλ)^d$ 随 DAG 深度 d 衰减。同时形式化为 Exogenous-Context MDP (EC-MDP)，将外部任务流与内部记忆存储解耦。
AI.result: 在六类基准（OS交互、函数调用、代码生成、多模态推理、具身推理、专家级问答）上，MemQ 在泛化评估和在线学习中都取得全部六项最优，在多步依赖任务上提升高达 +5.7 pp，在单步分类任务上仅 +0.77 pp。
AI.conclusion: 通过 DAG 结构距离替代传统时序距离进行信用分配，能更准确地评估记忆价值，同时 γ 和 λ 参数的选择与 EC-MDP 结构紧密相关，为后续研究提供了理论指导。

title: When Can Digital Personas Reliably Approximate Human Survey Findings?
summary: Digital personas powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as substitutes for human survey respondents, yet it remains unclear when they can reliably approximate human survey findings. We answer this question using the LISS panel, constructing personas from respondents' background variables and pre-2023 survey histories, then testing them against the same respondents' held-out post-cutoff answers. Across four persona architectures, three LLMs, and two prediction tasks, we assess performance at the question, respondent, distributional, equity, and clustering levels. Digital personas improve alignment with human response distributions, especially in domains tied to stable attributes and values, but remain limited for individual prediction and fail to recover multivariate respondent structure. Retrieval-augmented architectures provide the clearest gains, but performance depends more on human response structure than on model choice: personas perform best for low-variability questions and common respondent patterns, and worst for subjective, heterogeneous, or rare responses. Our results provide practical guidance on when digital personas could be appropriate for survey research and when human validation remains necessary.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了LLM驱动的数字人能否替代人类调查受访者，发现其在群体分布层面表现良好（尤其是稳定属性相关领域），但在个体预测和恢复多变量结构方面存在局限；检索增强架构效果最佳，但性能更多取决于人类回答结构而非模型选择。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM驱动的数字人被提出作为人类调查受访者的替代方案，但尚不清楚它们在何种情况下能够可靠地近似人类调查结果。本文旨在系统回答这一问题，为数字人的适用边界提供实证依据。
AI.method: 使用LISS面板数据，基于受访者的背景变量和2023年前的调查历史构建数字人，并利用受访者截断后的回答进行验证。跨四种数字人架构、三种LLM和两种预测任务，在问题、受访者、分布、公平性和聚类五个层面评估性能。
AI.result: 数字人在改进与人类回答分布的对齐方面表现良好，尤其在稳定属性和价值观相关领域；但在个体预测方面仍有限，且无法恢复多变量受访者结构。检索增强架构效果最好，但性能更依赖人类回答结构而非模型选择：低变异性问题和常见回答模式表现最佳，主观、异质或稀有回答表现最差。
AI.conclusion: 研究为数字人在调查研究中何时适用、何时仍需人类验证提供了实用指导。

title: PolicyCache-SDN: Hierarchical Intra-Path Learning for Adaptive SDN Traffic Control
summary:
Software defined networks offer global visibility, yet centralized control loops are too slow for transient congestion and bursty traffic dynamics. Existing learned traffic control schemes often rely on offline training, making them fragile under distribution shifts. We present PolicyCache-SDN, a hierarchical SDN traffic control framework that enables local online adaptation under centralized policy control. Its key abstraction is a policy envelope: the controller compiles network wide intent into bounded per path action spaces, while edge agents learn and execute metering, queueing, and rerouting decisions only within those bounds. Policy envelopes also make local actions auditable and reversible when they affect shared bottlenecks. Evaluation on a 1,024 host software SDN testbed shows that PolicyCache-SDN improves average core link utilization by 35.5% over Static ECMP and 18.3% over Centralized TE.
