It reduces elephant flow P99 FCT by 34.3% over end host congestion control, lowers SLA violations from 18.2% to 6.8%, and uses less than 2% CPU and 12 MB memory per edge agent.
  The source code is available in an anonymized repository at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/JCC2026-PolicyCache-SDN/.

AI.tldr: PolicyCache-SDN 提出了一种分层SDN流量控制框架，通过"策略信封"机制让边缘代理在控制器定义的约束范围内进行本地在线自适应，兼顾全局策略控制与局部快速响应，显著提升链路利用率并降低流完成时间和SLA违规率。
AI.motivation: 传统SDN集中式控制回路在应对瞬时拥塞和突发流量时响应太慢，而现有的基于学习的流量控制方案多依赖离线训练，在分布偏移（distribution shifts）下表现脆弱，缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出分层SDN控制框架 PolicyCache-SDN，核心抽象是"策略信封"（policy envelope）：控制器将全网意图编译为有界的每路径动作空间，边缘代理只能在此约束范围内学习并执行限速、队列和重路由等决策，同时支持审计和可逆操作。
AI.result: 在1024主机的软件SDN测试平台上，平均核心链路利用率比静态ECMP提升35.5%，比集中式TE提升18.3%；大象流P99流完成时间比端主机拥塞控制降低34.3%；SLA违规率从18.2%降至6.8%；每个边缘代理仅占用不到2% CPU和12 MB内存。
AI.conclusion: PolicyCache-SDN通过策略信封实现了分层决策架构，在保持集中策略可控性的同时赋予边缘快速在线适应能力，为SDN流量控制提供了一种高效、可审计、资源开销低的实用方案。

title: A Dataset of Agentic AI Coding Tool Configurations
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables, Proceedings of the 3rd ACM/IEEE International Conference on AI-powered Software (AIware 2026)
summary: Agentic AI coding tools such as Claude Code and OpenAI Codex execute multi-step coding tasks with limited human oversight. To steer these tools, developers create repository-level configuration artifacts (e.g., Markdown files) for configuration mechanisms such as Context Files, Skills, Rules, and Hooks. There is no curated dataset yet that captures these configurations at scale. This dataset, collected from open-source GitHub repositories, fills that gap. We selected 40,585 actively maintained repositories through metadata filtering, classified them using GPT-5.2 to identify 36,710 as belonging to engineered software projects, and systematically detected configuration artifacts in these repositories. The dataset covers 4,738 repositories across five tools (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, Gemini) and eight configuration mechanisms. We collected 15,591 configuration artifacts, the full content of 18,167 configuration files associated with these configuration artifacts, and 148,519 AI-co-authored commits. The dataset and the construction pipeline are publicly available on Zenodo under CC BY 4.0. An interactive website allows researchers to browse and explore the data. This data supports research on context engineering, AI tool adoption patterns, and human-AI collaboration.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建并公开了一个包含40,585个仓库的AI编程工具配置文件数据集，涵盖五款工具、八种配置机制，总计15,591个配置工件、18,167个配置文件和148,519次AI合著提交。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏大规模、结构化的AI编程工具配置文件数据集，难以支持上下文工程、AI工具采纳模式和人机协作等相关研究。
AI.method: 通过元数据过滤从GitHub筛选40,585个活跃仓库，利用GPT-5.2分类识别出36,710个工程软件项目，并在其中系统检测五款工具（Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、OpenAI Codex、Cursor、Gemini）的八种配置机制。
AI.result: 覆盖4,738个仓库，收集15,591个配置工件、18,167个配置文件的完整内容及148,519次AI合著提交记录。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集以CC BY 4.0许可公开，并提供交互式网站供浏览探索，为上下文工程、AI工具采纳模式及人机协作等研究提供了重要数据基础。

title: Built Environment Reasoning from Remote Sensing Imagery Using Large Vision--Language Models
comment: Published in the International Conference on Industrialized Construction 2026
summary: This work investigates the use of large language models (LLMs) for tasks in smart cities. The core idea is to leverage remote sensing imagery to characterize the built environment, including design suggestions, constructability assessment, landuse patterns, and risk identification. We examine remote sensing imagery at multiple spatial scales as inputs for multimodal language modeling and evaluate their effects on built-environment-related reasoning. In addition, we compare state-of-the-art LLMs, including InternVL and Qwen, in terms of accuracy and reliability when generating built environment recommendations. The results demonstrate the potential of integrating remote sensing imagery with large language models to assist smart cities and decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用大语言模型（LLMs）结合遥感影像，为智慧城市提供建成环境分析（设计建议、施工评估、土地利用、风险识别），并比较了InternVL和Qwen等模型的性能，结果表明该方法在辅助智慧城市决策方面具有潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索将大语言模型与遥感影像结合，用于智慧城市中建成环境的智能化分析与决策支持。
AI.method: 使用多空间尺度的遥感影像作为多模态语言模型的输入，评估其对建成环境推理任务的影响，并对比InternVL、Qwen等先进LLM的准确性和可靠性。
AI.result: 多模态遥感影像与LLM集成在建成环境推理任务中表现出良好效果，不同模型在准确性和可靠性上各有差异。
AI.conclusion: 将遥感影像与大语言模型结合具有辅助智慧城市决策的潜力，值得进一步探索。

title: WATCH: Wide-Area Archaeological Site Tracking for Change Detection
summary: Monitoring archaeological sites at scale is vital for protecting cultural heritage, yet pinpointing when disturbances occur remains difficult because visual cues are subtle and ground-truth data are sparse. We introduce WATCH, a framework for month-level change-event localization over PlanetScope satellite mosaics (2017-2024, 4.7 m/px) that supports three complementary scoring approaches: (i) Temporal Embedding Distance (TED), a training-free method that scores month-to-month deviations from a local temporal reference; (ii) Self-Supervised Change Detection (SSCD), an ensemble of reconstruction, forecasting, and latent-novelty signals; and (iii) a Weakly Supervised (WS) temporal localization model trained with sparse event-month labels. We benchmark WATCH on 1,943 archaeological sites in Afghanistan using embeddings from six foundation models (CLIP, GeoRSCLIP, SatMAE, Prithvi-EO-2.0, DINOv3, and Satlas-Pretrain) alongside a handcrafted spectral and texture baseline, and assess cross-regional generalization on sites in Syria, Turkey, Pakistan, and Egypt. The unsupervised approaches (TED, SSCD) consistently outperform the weakly supervised alternative. TED with SatMAE achieves the highest exact-month recall (55% at m=0), while TED with GeoRSCLIP, CLIP, or Satlas-Pretrain reaches 92.5% within a three-month tolerance (m=3). Handcrafted features remain competitive for exact-month detection under weak supervision. Our directional margin analysis reveals systematic temporal biases: SSCD paired with GeoRSCLIP or Prithvi-EO-2.0 exhibits the strongest early-warning profile, detecting anomalies before the recorded event, while TED favors confirmation-oriented detection after a change has materialized. These results show that satellite imagery combined with foundation-model embeddings enables scalable, decision-relevant heritage monitoring. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/WATCH

AI.tldr: 本文提出WATCH框架，利用PlanetScope卫星影像和多种基础模型嵌入，实现考古遗址月级变化事件检测。无监督方法（TED、SSCD）优于弱监督方法，TED+SatMAE达到55%精确月召回率，TED+GeoRSCLIP等在三个月容忍度内达92.5%。不同方法展现出不同的时间偏差特征。
AI.motivation: 大规模监测考古遗址对保护文化遗产至关重要，但扰动事件发生时间的精确定位非常困难，因为视觉线索微弱且真实标注数据稀疏。现有方法难以在缺乏标注的情况下实现有效的月度级变化检测。
AI.method: 提出WATCH框架，包含三种互补评分方法：(i) TED（无训练，基于月与局部时间参考的偏差评分）；(ii) SSCD（自监督集成重构、预测和潜在新颖性信号）；(iii) WS（弱监督时间定位模型）。使用六种基础模型（CLIP, GeoRSCLIP, SatMAE等）及手工特征作为嵌入。
AI.result: 在阿富汗1,943个考古遗址上评估，无监督方法优于弱监督方法。TED+SatMAE实现55%精确月召回率，TED+GeoRSCLIP等在三个月容忍度内达92.5%。SSCD+GeoRSCLIP等表现出早期预警特性，TED则偏向确认式检测。
AI.conclusion: 卫星影像结合基础模型嵌入能够实现可扩展、支持决策的文化遗产监测。不同方法的时间偏差特性为实际应用提供了选择依据。

title: SkillLens: Adaptive Multi-Granularity Skill Reuse for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents
summary: Skill libraries have become a practical way for LLM agents to reuse procedural experience across tasks. However, existing systems typically treat skills as flat, single-resolution prompt blocks. This creates a tension between relevance and cost: injecting coarse skills can introduce irrelevant or misleading context, while rewriting entire skills is expensive and often unnecessary. We propose SkillLens, a hierarchical skill-evolution framework that organizes skills into a four-layer graph of policies, strategies, procedures, and primitives, and retrieves them at mixed granularity. Given a task, SkillLens first retrieves semantically relevant skill seeds, expands them through degree-corrected random walk over the skill graph, and then uses a verifier to decide whether each visited unit should be accepted, decomposed, rewritten, or skipped. This enables the agent to reuse compatible subskills directly while adapting only locally mismatched components. To improve the system over time, SkillLens further refines multi-granularity skills and verifier in order to improve its routing decisions. We provide theoretical analysis showing that mixed-granularity adaptation incurs sublinear cost under sparse mismatch assumptions and that the evolutionary update rule monotonically improves the validation objective until a local optimum. Across MuLocbench and ALFWorld, SkillLens consistently improves over strong skill-based baselines, achieving up to a 6.31 percentage-point Acc@1 gain for bug localization and raising agent success rate from 45.00% to 51.31%.

AI.tldr: SkillLens提出了分层技能进化框架，将技能组织为策略-方案-流程-原语四层图结构，通过混合粒度检索与自适应验证机制实现高效技能复用，在理论保证和实际任务中均取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有技能库系统通常将技能视为扁平、单一分辨率的提示块，导致粗粒度技能引入无关上下文，而重写整个技能又成本高昂。需要在相关性与成本之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出分层技能进化框架SkillLens：1) 将技能组织为策略-方案-流程-原语四层图结构；2) 通过基于度校正的随机游走扩展语义相关的技能种子；3) 使用验证器决定每个访问单元是接受、分解、重写还是跳过；4) 通过多粒度技能与验证器的协同进化持续优化路由决策。
AI.result: 在MuLocbench和ALFWorld上，SkillLens持续优于强技能基线，在bug定位任务上Acc@1提升最多6.31个百分点，在ALFWorld上将智能体成功率从45.00%提升至51.31%。
AI.conclusion: 混合粒度适应在稀疏不匹配假设下具有亚线性成本，进化更新规则单调改善验证目标直至局部最优，验证了分层技能进化框架的有效性与理论可靠性。

title: TSNBench: Benchmarking LLM Proficiency in Time-Sensitive Networking
summary: We present TSNBench, the first benchmark for evaluating large language model (LLM) proficiency in Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN), a suite of IEEE 802.1 standards for deterministic communication with bounded latency in safety-critical domains such as autonomous vehicles, aviation, defense, and industrial automation. While LLMs have been extensively evaluated on general knowledge tasks, their capabilities in safety-critical networking domains remain largely unexplored. TSNBench comprises 939 expert-validated multiple-choice questions (MCQs) covering diverse TSN mechanisms, along with 100 open-ended Worst-Case Delay (WCD) computation tasks for Credit-Based Shaper (CBS) and Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding (CQF) across varying network topologies and traffic conditions. MCQ answers are validated by domain experts, and open-ended ground truth WCD values are computed using a verified Network Calculus (NC) solver for CBS and closed-form mathematical upper bounds for CQF. We evaluate 16 LLMs and find that although models achieve 67 to 95% accuracy on MCQs, they fail substantially on open-ended WCD computation. For CBS, only GPT-5 achieves a Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) of 36.2%, meaning its predicted WCD deviates by 36.2% of the actual TSN flow delay on average, while most models exceed 80%. For CQF, the best model achieves 41.8% MAPE, with most models clustering between 80% and 100%. Such errors are large relative to TSN latency budgets and can lead to violations of real-time constraints and unsafe configurations. TSNBench demonstrates that MCQ benchmarks may overestimate LLM capabilities in safety-critical networking domains.

AI.tldr: TSNBench是首个评估大语言模型（LLM）在时间敏感网络（TSN）领域能力的基准。包含939道专家验证的选择题和100道开放式最差情况延迟计算题。测试16个LLM发现，虽然模型在选择题上准确率67-95%，但在开放计算任务上表现极差：CBS最佳模型GPT-5的MAPE达36.2%，多数模型超80%；CQF最佳模型MAPE为41.8%，多数在80-100%。表明选择题基准可能高估LLM在安全关键网络领域的能力。
AI.motivation: 目前LLM在通用知识任务上已被广泛评估，但在安全关键网络领域（如TSN）的能力尚未被探索，而TSN对确定性通信和有限延迟有严格需求，因此需要专门的基准来评估LLM在该领域的实际能力。
AI.method: 构建包含939道专家验证的选择题和100道开放式最差情况延迟（WCD）计算题的TSNBench基准。选择题涵盖多种TSN机制；开放式任务涉及Credit-Based Shaper和Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding的WCD计算，使用网络演算求解器和闭式数学上界计算标准答案。评估16个LLM在两类任务上的表现。
AI.result: 选择题上模型准确率67-95%；开放式WCD计算上，CBS仅GPT-5的MAPE达36.2%（多数模型超80%），CQF最佳模型MAPE达41.8%（多数在80-100%）。这些误差相对于TSN延迟预算极大。
AI.conclusion: 选择题基准可能高估LLM在安全关键网络领域的能力，LLM在需要精确计算的TSN延迟分析任务上表现严重不足，可能导致实时约束违反和不安全配置。

title: VeriContest: A Competitive-Programming Benchmark for Verifiable Code Generation
summary: Large language models can generate useful code from natural language, but their outputs come without correctness guarantees. Verifiable code generation offers a path beyond testing by requiring models to produce not only executable code, but also formal specifications and machine-checkable proofs. Progress in this direction, however, is difficult to measure: existing benchmarks are often small, focus on only one part of the pipeline, lack ground-truth proofs or rigorous specification validation, or target verification settings far from mainstream software development. We present VeriContest, a benchmark of 946 competitive-programming problems from LeetCode and Codeforces for verifiable code generation in Rust with Verus. Each problem pairs a natural language description with expert-validated formal specifications, judge-accepted Rust code, Verus-checked proofs, and positive and negative test suites. VeriContest is constructed through a three-phase pipeline that scales from manually verified seed problems to semi-automated expansion with human-in-the-loop review. To further strengthen benchmark quality, we use testing as an additional quality-assurance layer for validating postcondition completeness. VeriContest supports isolated and compositional evaluation of specification generation, code generation, proof generation, and end-to-end verified program synthesis. Evaluating ten state-of-the-art models reveals a sharp gap between coding ability and verifiable code generation: the strongest model reaches 92.18% on natural-language-to-code generation, but only 48.31% on specification generation, 13.95% on proof generation, and 5.29% end-to-end. These results identify proof and specification generation as the central bottlenecks for models and establish VeriContest as a rigorous platform for measuring and training future systems that generate code with machine-checkable correctness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 VeriContest，一个包含 946 道竞赛编程问题的基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在 Rust + Verus 框架下生成可验证代码（含规范、证明）的能力。评估显示最强模型在代码生成上达 92.18%，但端到端可验证代码生成仅 5.29%，表明规范和证明生成是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有可验证代码生成基准测试存在规模小、仅覆盖部分流程、缺乏完整 ground-truth 证明、或远离主流开发场景等问题，难以有效衡量该方向进展。
AI.method: 构建了一个三阶段流水线：手动验证种子问题→半自动扩展+人工审查→后置条件完整性测试。每个问题包含自然语言描述、专家验证的形式规范、通过判题系统的 Rust 代码、Verus 验证的证明以及正负测试集。
AI.result: 最强模型在 NL→代码上达 92.18%，但规范生成仅 48.31%，证明生成仅 13.95%，端到端仅 5.29%。
AI.conclusion: 证明和规范生成是当前模型的主要瓶颈，VeriContest 为可验证代码生成提供了严格的评测平台。

title: Effective Explanations Support Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Explaining how to get from A to B can be challenging. It requires mentally simulating what the listener will do based on what they are told. To capture this process, we propose a computational model that converts utterances into action plans: a large language model translates an explanation into program-like guidance (a policy prior and value map), and a planning agent executes it under partial observability. We score explanations by the efficiency and reliability of the resulting paths, penalizing replanning. Across four preregistered experiments, we collect a corpus of 1,200 explanations over 24 maps, elicit helpfulness judgments, measure baseline navigation, and test behavior with explanations of differing quality. Higher-scored explanations are judged more helpful and improve navigation: participants with explanations outperform those without, and high-scoring explanations help more than low-scoring ones. Together, these results show procedural explanation as utility-guided communication shaped by how language can be grounded into action under uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出将解释转化为行动计划的计算模型，通过大语言模型生成策略先验和价值图，再由规划代理在部分可观测条件下执行，实验证明该模型能有效评估解释质量并提升导航表现。
AI.motivation: 从A到B的导航解释具有挑战性，需要心理模拟听者的行动过程，现有方法缺乏对解释如何转化为实际行动的计算理解。
AI.method: 构建计算模型：LLM将解释转化为程序化指导（策略先验和价值图），规划代理在部分可观测条件下执行；通过路径效率和可靠性评分，惩罚重新规划行为。
AI.result: 在24张地图上收集1,200个解释，高分解释被认为更有帮助，获得解释的参与者导航表现优于无解释组，高质量解释比低质量解释更有帮助。
AI.conclusion: 程序性解释是一种效用导向的沟通，由语言如何在不确定性下转化为行动所塑造。

title: Advanced Tumor Segmentation in PET/CT Imaging: A Training Strategy Study with nnU-Net for AutoPET III
summary: Tumor segmentation in whole-body PET/CT imaging is crucial for precise disease evaluation and treatment planning. However, it remains challenging due to variability in lesion size, contrast, and anatomical distribution. Relying on manual segmentation makes the process time-consuming and prone to intra- and inter-observer variability. This work presents a whole-body tumor segmentation method developed for the AutoPET III challenge, where the goal is to build models that generalize across tracers and multi-center data. We employ the nnU-Net framework with a ResNet-based encoder as our baseline and systematically investigate the impact of training strategies, including intensity normalization, batch dice optimization, and data augmentation using CraveMix. Our experiments show that these strategies significantly influence model performance, particularly in reducing false positives and improving robustness to lesion variability. The best-performing configuration achieves a Dice score of up to 0.80 on the preliminary test phase, and our method ranked third in the AutoPET III challenge. The code is publicly available here.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于nnU-Net框架的全身PET/CT肿瘤分割方法，通过优化训练策略（强度归一化、批量Dice优化、CraveMix数据增强）在AutoPET III挑战赛中取得了第三名成绩，Dice score达0.80。
AI.motivation: 全身PET/CT肿瘤分割对于疾病评估和治疗规划至关重要，但手动分割耗时且存在观察者间变异性，现有方法难以泛化到不同示踪剂和多中心数据。
AI.method: 采用nnU-Net框架结合ResNet编码器作为基线，系统研究了强度归一化、批量Dice优化和CraveMix数据增强等训练策略的影响。
AI.result: 最佳配置在初步测试阶段达到0.80的Dice分数，在AutoPET III挑战赛中排名第三，有效减少了假阳性并提升了对病灶变异性的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的训练策略显著影响模型性能，尤其在减少假阳性和提升鲁棒性方面，代码已公开。

title: PLACO: A Multi-Stage Framework for Cost-Effective Performance in Human-AI Teams
summary: Human-AI teams play a pivotal role in improving overall system performance when neither the human nor the model can achieve such performance on their own. With the advent of powerful and accessible Generative AI models, several mundane tasks have morphed into Human-AI team tasks. From writing essays to developing advanced algorithms, humans have found that using AI assistance has led to an accelerated work pace like never before. In classification tasks, where the final output is a single hard label, it is crucial to address the combination of human and model output. Prior work elegantly solves this problem using Bayes rule, using the assumption that human and model output are conditionally independent given the ground truth. Specifically, it discusses a combination method to combine a single deterministic labeler (the human) and a probabilistic labeler (the classifier model) using the model's instance-level and the human's class-level calibrated probabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了在人机协作分类任务中，如何结合人类（确定性标注者）和模型（概率性标注者）的输出。基于贝叶斯规则和条件独立性假设，提出了一种结合方法，利用模型实例级和人类类别级的校准概率来提升整体系统性能。
AI.motivation: 在分类任务中，人类和AI模型各自都有局限性，单独使用任何一方都无法达到最佳性能。因此，研究如何有效结合人类和模型的输出，以提升整体系统性能，是该工作的主要动机。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯规则，假设人类和模型输出在给定真实标签的条件下是条件独立的。提出了一种结合方法，将确定性标注者（人类）和概率性标注者（分类模型）的输出进行融合，具体使用模型的实例级校准概率和人类的类别级校准概率。
AI.result: 该结合方法能够有效提升人机协作分类任务的整体性能，优于单独使用人类或模型的表现。
AI.conclusion: 在人机协作分类任务中，通过贝叶斯规则和条件独立性假设，结合人类和模型的校准概率，可以有效提升系统性能。这种方法为未来人机协作提供了理论基础和实践指导。

title: Optimizing Server Placement for Vertical Federated Learning in Dynamic Edge/Fog Networks
comment: Under revision at IEEE/ACM transactions on networking
summary: We investigate the control and optimization of vertical federated learning (VFL), a class of distributed machine learning (ML) methods in which edge/fog devices contain separate data features, in dynamic edge/fog networks. Owing to heterogeneous data features and hardware across edge/fog networks, devices' contributions to VFL vary substantially, and, moreover, dynamic edge/fog networks can lead to the permanent exit or entry of select data features. In this setting, our proposed methodology, server controlled VFL in dynamic networks (SC-DN), first establishes the existence of a global first-order stationary point for every global round, and then leverages this result to jointly optimize ML model training and resource consumption based on four key control variables: (i) server placement, (ii) device-to-server transmit power, (iii) local device processor frequency, and (iv) local training iterations per global round. The resulting optimization formulation contains coupled variables as well as numerous forms of logarithmic constraints which we show is a mixed-integer signomial program, an NP-hard problem, and for which we develop a general solver. Finally, via experiments on both image and multi-modal datasets, we show that our methodology demonstrates superior classification/regression performance and resource consumption savings than even greedy methodologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SC-DN方法，在动态边缘/雾网络环境中联合优化垂直联邦学习的模型训练与资源消耗，通过控制服务器放置、发射功率、处理器频率和本地训练轮次四个变量，解决了NP-hard的混合整数符号规划问题，实验表明性能优于贪心方法。
AI.motivation: 垂直联邦学习中，边缘/雾设备的数据特征和硬件异构性强，且动态网络环境可能导致数据特征的永久退出或加入，设备贡献差异显著，亟需有效的控制与优化方法。
AI.method: 提出SC-DN框架，证明全局一阶驻点的存在性，联合优化四个控制变量（服务器放置、发射功率、处理器频率、本地训练轮次），将问题建模为混合整数符号规划（NP-hard），并开发通用求解器。
AI.result: 在图像和多模态数据集上的实验表明，SC-DN在分类/回归性能和资源消耗节省方面均优于贪心方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的SC-DN方法能够有效应对动态网络中的垂直联邦学习优化挑战，在性能与资源效率之间取得良好平衡。

title: EvidenT: An Evidence-Preserving Framework for Iterative System-Level Package Repair
summary: Frequent toolchain updates and growing ISA diversity have made system-level software package repair increasingly important. Diagnosing and repairing build failures remains challenging because failures involve heterogeneous evidence, dependency constraints, and architecture-specific build conventions. While recent LLM-based repair methods show promise for project-level source fixes, they struggle with system-level repair, where failures span multi-language artifacts such as build recipes, scripts, and source archives, and require iterative validation through external build services. In this paper, we first conduct a systematic empirical study of real-world system-level build failures. We find that 72% of failures stem from dependency and environment misconfigurations rather than isolated code defects, suggesting that effective repair must prioritize packaging logic and iterative feedback. Motivated by these insights, we propose EvidenT, an evidence-preserving repair framework that decouples iteration-aware evidence management from tool execution. EvidenT includes: (1) an external Build Service for reproducible execution and feedback; (2) an Evidence-Preserving Repair Controller that fuses repair history, knowledge context, and build artifacts; and (3) an automated Repair Orchestrator that invokes modular tools for failure localization and system-level repair in a closed-loop validation environment. We evaluate EvidenT on 219 real-world RISC-V package build failures. EvidenT repairs 118 packages (53.88%), outperforming state-of-the-art agentic baselines (20.55%) and direct LLM-based repair (1.83%). To assess architectural generality, we extend EvidenT to legacy ISAs by updating only ISA-specific knowledge context. Preliminary experiments achieve success rates of 41.77% on aarch64 and 46.99% on x86_64, demonstrating robustness across diverse hardware ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvidenT框架，通过保留证据的迭代修复方法，在219个RISC-V包构建失败中修复了53.88%，远超现有基线方法，并展示了跨ISA架构的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 系统级软件包修复面临工具链更新快、ISA多样性增加、故障涉及异构证据和依赖约束等挑战。现有LLM修复方法擅长项目级源码修复，但在系统级修复中表现不佳，因为故障涉及多语言构件（构建配方、脚本、源码存档）且需要外部构建服务的迭代验证。
AI.method: EvidenT框架包含三大组件：(1) 外部构建服务，用于可重复执行和反馈；(2) 证据保留修复控制器，融合修复历史、知识上下文和构建工件；(3) 自动化修复编排器，在闭环验证环境中调用模块化工具进行故障定位和系统级修复。
AI.result: 在219个真实RISC-V包构建失败上，EvidenT修复118个（53.88%），远超基于智能体的基线（20.55%）和直接LLM修复（1.83%）。在aarch64上达41.77%，x86_64上达46.99%。
AI.conclusion: 系统级构建失败中72%源于依赖和环境配置错误而非孤立代码缺陷，表明有效修复需优先关注打包逻辑和迭代反馈。EvidenT通过证据保留和迭代管理机制显著提升了系统级包修复效果，且仅需更新ISA特定知识即可跨架构泛化。

title: A Semantic-Sampling Framework for Evaluating Calibration in Open-Ended Question Answering
summary: Calibration measures whether a model's predicted confidence aligns with its empirical accuracy, and is central to the reliable deployment of large language models (LLMs) in high-stakes domains such as medicine and law. While much recent work focuses on improving LLM calibration, the equally important question of how to evaluate it in realistic settings remains underdeveloped. Open-ended question answering (QA), the most common deployment setting for modern LLMs, is where existing evaluation methods fall short: logit-based metrics need restricted output formats and internal probabilities; verbalized confidence is self-reported and often overconfident; and sampling-based methods rely on task-specific extraction rules without a clear finite-sample target. We introduce Sem-ECE (Semantic-Sampling Expected Calibration Error), a calibration evaluation framework for open-ended QA that samples answers from the model, groups them into semantic classes, and uses the resulting frequencies as confidence. We study two estimators within this framework: Sem$_1$-ECE, the same-sample self-consistency score, and Sem$_2$-ECE, a held-out variant that separates answer selection from confidence evaluation. We prove both are asymptotically unbiased, and further show that they agree on easy questions but diverge on hard ones with Sem$_2$ achieving strictly smaller calibration error, so their gap also serves as a diagnostic for question difficulty. Experiments on three open-ended QA benchmarks across five leading commercial LLMs match our theoretical predictions and show that Sem-ECE outperforms verbalized confidence and existing sampling-based methods, while complementing logit-based evaluation when internal probabilities are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sem-ECE框架，通过语义采样评估开放域问答中LLM的校准性能，并证明其渐近无偏性及优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有校准评估方法在开放域问答中失效：logit方法受限于输出格式，言语化置信度常过度自信，采样方法缺乏明确的有限样本目标。需要更可靠的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出Sem-ECE框架，包含两个估计器：Sem₁-ECE（同一样本自一致性评分）和Sem₂-ECE（分离答案选择与置信度评估的留出变体），将模型答案采样后分组为语义类，用频率作为置信度。
AI.result: 理论证明两个估计器渐近无偏；Sem₁与Sem₂在简单问题上一致，在困难问题上分歧（Sem₂校准误差更小）；差距可诊断问题难度。在五个商业LLM的开放域QA基准上验证了理论预测，Sem-ECE优于言语化置信度和现有采样方法。
AI.conclusion: Sem-ECE为开放域问答提供了更可靠的校准评估方案，在无法获取内部概率时能补充logit评估，其两个估计器的差距还可作为问题难度的诊断信号。

title: MULTITEXTEDIT: Benchmarking Cross-Lingual Degradation in Text-in-Image Editing
summary: Text-in-image editing has become a key capability for visual content creation, yet existing benchmarks remain overwhelmingly English-centric and often conflate visual plausibility with semantic correctness. We introduce MULTITEXTEDIT, a controlled benchmark of 3,600 instances spanning 12 typologically diverse languages, 5 visual domains, and 7 editing operations. Language variants of each instance share a common visual base and are paired with a human-edited reference and region masks, isolating the language variable for cross-lingual comparison. To capture script-level errors that coarse text-matching metrics miss, such as missing diacritics, reversed RTL order, and mixed-script renderings, we introduce a language fidelity (LSF) metric scored by a two-stage LVM protocol that first traces the edited target text and then judges it in isolation, reaching a quadratic-weighted \k{appa} of 0.76 against native-speaker annotators. Evaluating 12 open-source and proprietary systems with LSF alongside standard semantic and mask-aware pixel metrics, we find pronounced cross-lingual degradation for every model, largest on Hebrew and Arabic and smallest on Dutch and Spanish, and concentrated in text accuracy and script fidelity rather than in coarse structural dimensions. We also uncover a pervasive semantic and pixel mismatch, where outputs preserve global layout and background fidelity yet distort script-specific forms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MULTITEXTEDIT基准，包含3600个实例覆盖12种语言、5个视觉域和7种编辑操作，并引入语言忠实度（LSF）指标来评估文本编辑中的脚本级错误，发现现有模型在多语言场景下存在显著的跨语言性能退化。
AI.motivation: 现有文本编辑基准以英语为中心，且常混淆视觉合理性与语义正确性，缺乏对多语言场景下脚本级错误（如缺失变音符号、RTL顺序错误、混合脚本渲染）的系统评估。
AI.method: 构建MULTITEXTEDIT基准（3600实例，12种语言，5个域，7种操作），提出两阶段LVM协议的LSF指标，结合语义和掩码感知像素指标评估12个系统。
AI.result: 所有模型存在显著的跨语言退化，希伯来语和阿拉伯语退化最严重，荷兰语和西班牙语最小；退化集中在文本准确性和脚本忠实度；存在语义与像素不匹配问题。
AI.conclusion: 现有文本编辑模型在多语言场景下表现不均衡，尤其在脚本级细节上存在系统性缺陷，需要更注重语言多样性的评估与改进。

title: CoCoDA: Co-evolving Compositional DAG for Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Tool-augmented language models can extend small language models with external executable skills, but scaling the tool library creates a coupled challenge: the library must evolve with the planner as new reusable subroutines emerge, while retrieval from the growing library must remain within a fixed context budget. Existing tool-use and skill-library methods typically treat tools as flat or text-indexed memories, causing prompt cost to grow with library size and obscuring the typed, compositional structure of executable code. We propose CoCoDA, a framework that co-evolves the planner and tool library through a single code-native structure: a compositional code DAG. Nodes are primitive or composite tools, edges encode invocation dependencies, and each node stores a typed signature, description, pre/post-condition specification, and worked examples. At inference time, Typed DAG Retrieval prunes candidates by symbolic signature unification, ranks survivors by descriptions, filters them by behavioral specifications, and disambiguates with examples, keeping expensive context materialization on progressively smaller candidate sets. At training time, successful trajectories are folded into validated composite tools, while the planner is updated with a DAG-induced reward that credits composites by their primitive expansion size. We provide theoretical results showing retrieval cost reduction, sublinear retrieval time, compositional advantage under the shaped reward, monotone co-evolution under conservative updates, and DAG well-formedness. Across mathematical reasoning, tabular analysis, and code task benchmarks, CoCoDA enables an 8B student to match or exceed a 32B teacher on GSM8K and MATH and consistently improves over strong tool-use and library-learning baselines.

AI.tldr: CoCoDA通过组合代码有向无环图（DAG）实现规划器与工具库的协同进化，在固定上下文预算内支持大规模工具库的检索与组合，使8B模型在数学推理等任务上超越32B教师模型。
AI.motivation: 现有工具学习方法中，工具库规模增长会导致提示成本线性增加，且缺乏对工具类型化、组合式结构的利用。研究者希望在不增加上下文预算的前提下，实现工具库与规划器的协同扩展。
AI.method: 提出CoCoDA框架：1）构建组合代码DAG，节点为原始/组合工具，边为调用依赖，节点存储类型签名、描述、前置/后置条件和示例；2）推理时通过Typed DAG Retrieval逐步筛选候选工具（符号签名统一→描述排序→行为规范过滤→示例消歧）；3）训练时将成功轨迹折叠为验证过的组合工具，并通过DAG奖励函数（按原始展开大小奖励组合工具）更新规划器。
AI.result: 在数学推理（GSM8K、MATH）、表格分析和代码任务基准上，CoCoDA使8B学生模型匹配或超越32B教师模型，且一致优于现有强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CoCoDA证明了通过代码原生结构实现工具库与规划器协同进化的有效性，提供了检索成本降低、亚线性检索时间等理论保证，为扩展语言模型工具能力提供了新范式。

title: Mixed-Criticality Flow Scheduling with Low Delay and Limited Bandwidth in TSN
summary: Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) is a promising Ethernet protocol with time determinism, widely used in time-critical systems such as industrial automation, automotive networks, and avionics. By allocating dedicated time windows for time-sensitive flows, TSN enables deterministic transmission; however, as network traffic grows, multiple flows may contend for the same window, causing large delays. Frame aggregation can mitigate this by combining multiple small frames into a larger one, thereby reducing the number of frames and required time windows, but existing approaches typically handle only single-priority traffic and cannot fully utilize pre-allocated time windows. To address this limitation, we propose MCFS-2L, a mixed-criticality flow scheduling scheme with low delay and limited bandwidth usage. MCFS-2L first aggregates critical and non-critical frames with the same source and destination nodes and harmonic periods into a single frame, and then applies a dynamic reassembly and scheduling method that selectively disaggregates non-critical frames from unschedulable aggregated frames. Experimental results show that MCFS-2L increases the acceptance ratio of critical and non-critical flows by up to 4.78% and 8.58%, respectively, while reducing bandwidth utilization by up to 11.88%.

AI.tldr: 提出MCFS-2L，一种混合关键性流调度方案，通过聚合关键与非关键帧并动态重组，提升TSN网络的流接受率并降低带宽利用率。
AI.motivation: 现有TSN流量调度中，多流竞争同一时间窗口导致大延迟，而帧聚合方法仅处理单优先级流量，无法充分利用预分配时间窗口。
AI.method: MCFS-2L首先聚合具有相同源/目的节点和谐波周期的关键与非关键帧，然后对不可调度的聚合帧选择性解聚合非关键帧，实现动态重组与调度。
AI.result: 关键流与非关键流的接受率分别提升最高4.78%和8.58%，带宽利用率降低最高11.88%。
AI.conclusion: MCFS-2L通过混合关键性帧聚合与选择性解聚合，有效解决了多优先级流量调度中的时延与带宽问题。

title: Semantic Voting: Execution-Grounded Consensus for LLM Code Generation
summary: LLM code-generation pipelines often sample multiple candidates and select one final answer without access to a complete oracle. Existing pipelines mix textual voting, ranking, and execution-based agreement, but the relative contribution of each component remains unclear. We study 18 configurations across different models, thinking levels, and benchmarks, comparing output-pattern majority voting, weighted voting, MBR-Exec, and SemanticVote - a method that clusters candidates by execution fingerprints on LLM-generated inputs. Three findings emerge. (1) The best execution-based selector exceeds output-pattern majority voting by 19-52 percentage points on every configuration, with every execution-based selector exceeding it by at least 18 points. (2) Once candidates are executed on diverse inputs, aggregation rule has limited effect: SemanticVote, weighted voting, and MBR-Exec are statistically indistinguishable across all 18 configurations. The largest factor is input quality: sketch-based input generation consistently outperforms direct LLM generation by 0.6-2.1 pp and random fuzzing by up to 11.3 pp. (3) Thinking level interacts differently with selection families: deeper thinking improves majority voting by 12 pp but execution-based methods stay flat or degrade as candidate diversity falls. These results frame inference-time code selection as a signal-quality problem rather than an aggregation-rule problem: when oracles are unavailable, the behavioral evidence matters more than the aggregation rule.

AI.tldr: 研究了代码生成pipeline中18种配置，发现执行型选择器比多数投票高19-52个百分点，聚合规则影响有限，关键是输入质量，推理深度对执行型方法帮助不大。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成pipeline混合了文本投票、排序和执行一致性等多种选择策略，但各组件对最终效果的相对贡献尚不明确，缺乏系统性比较。
AI.method: 在18种配置（不同模型、推理级别和基准）下，比较了输出模式多数投票、加权投票、MBR-Exec和SemanticVote（基于LLM生成输入上的执行指纹进行聚类）四种选择方法，并分析了输入质量和推理深度的影响。
AI.result: (1) 执行型选择器全面优于输出模式多数投票，差距达19-52个百分点；(2) 一旦候选在多样化输入上执行，聚合规则（SemanticVote、加权投票、MBR-Exec）间无显著差异，关键因素是输入质量，基于sketch的输入生成最优；(3) 更深推理提升多数投票12个百分点，但执行型方法持平或下降。
AI.conclusion: 推理时代码选择本质上是信号质量问题而非聚合规则问题：当没有完整oracle时，行为证据（执行信号）比聚合规则更重要。

title: Magis-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Magistrate-Level Legal Tasks
summary: Existing benchmarks for legal AI focus primarily on tasks where LLMs must produce legal arguments or documents, yet the capacity to \emph{judge} such arguments -- weighing competing claims, applying doctrine to facts, and rendering reasoned decisions -- is arguably as fundamental to a well-functioning legal system as advocacy itself. We introduce Magis-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on magistrate-level writing tasks derived from recent Brazilian competitive examinations for judicial positions. Magis-Bench comprises 74 questions from eight examinations conducted between 2023 and 2025, including discursive legal analysis questions with multi-turn structure and practical exercises requiring the composition of complete civil and criminal judicial sentences. We evaluate 23 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge methodology with four independent frontier models as evaluators. Our results show strong inter-judge agreement (Kendall's $W = 0.984$; pairwise Kendall's $τ\ge 0.897$), with Google's Gemini-3-Pro-Preview achieving the highest average score (6.97/10), followed by Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (6.67) and Claude-4.5-Opus (6.46). Even the best-performing models score below 70\% of the maximum, indicating that judicial-level legal reasoning and writing remain challenging for current LLMs. We release the complete benchmark, model outputs, and evaluation code to support further research on legal AI capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出了Magis-Bench基准，用于评估LLM在法官级别法律写作任务上的能力。测试来自巴西司法考试的真实题目，包含74道题。评估了23个最新LLM，最佳模型Gemini-3-Pro-Preview得分6.97/10，表明司法级法律推理对当前LLM仍有挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有法律AI基准主要关注LLM生成法律论点或文档的能力，但评估LLM"裁判"法律论点——权衡竞争性主张、将法律原理应用于事实、做出合理裁决——的能力同样重要却缺乏研究。
AI.method: 从2023-2025年巴西司法考试中收集74道题，包括多轮结构化的论述性法律分析题和撰写完整民事/刑事判决书的实践题。采用LLM-as-a-judge方法，使用4个独立前沿模型作为评估者，对23个SOTA LLM进行评分。
AI.result: 评估者间一致性高（Kendall W=0.984，成对Kendall τ≥0.897）。Gemini-3-Pro-Preview最高（6.97/10），其次Gemini-3-Flash-Preview（6.67）和Claude-4.5-Opus（6.46）。最佳模型得分低于满分70%。
AI.conclusion: 司法级别的法律推理与写作对当前最强LLM仍具挑战性，现有模型尚未达到足以胜任法官角色的水平。发布了完整的基准、模型输出和评估代码以推动后续研究。

title: Digital Image Forgery Detection Using Transfer Learning
summary:
The increasing availability of advanced image editing tools has led to a significant rise in manipulated digital content, posing serious challenges for digital forensics and information security. This study presents a transfer learning-based framework for digital image forgery detection that integrates compression-aware feature enhancement with deep convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures.
  The proposed approach introduces a hybrid input representation that combines RGB images with compression difference-based features (FDIFF), explicitly highlighting subtle manipulation artifacts that are often difficult to detect. In addition, a model-specific adaptive threshold optimization strategy based on the Youden Index is employed to improve classification reliability by achieving a better balance between true positive and false positive rates.
  Experiments conducted on the CASIA v2.0 dataset using multiple pretrained CNN architectures, including DenseNet121, VGG16, ResNet50, EfficientNetB0, MobileNet, and InceptionV3, demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework. The models are evaluated using comprehensive performance metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC), and area under the ROC curve (AUC).
  The results show that DenseNet121 achieves the highest accuracy and AUC, while ResNet50 provides the most balanced and reliable predictions with the highest MCC. The findings emphasize that relying solely on accuracy is insufficient for forensic applications, where minimizing false negatives is critical. Overall, the proposed framework improves the visibility of manipulation artifacts and enhances classification robustness, making it suitable for real-world digital image forgery detection scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的数字图像篡改检测框架，通过结合压缩感知特征增强（FDIFF）与深度CNN架构，并采用尤登指数优化自适应阈值。在CASIA v2.0数据集上的实验表明，DenseNet121取得最高准确率和AUC，ResNet50取得最高MCC，框架有效提升了篡改伪影的可视性与分类鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着高级图像编辑工具的普及，数字内容篡改现象日益严重，对数字取证和信息安全构成严峻挑战。现有方法难以检测细微的篡改伪影，且仅依赖准确率不足以满足取证应用需求（需最小化假阴性）。
AI.method: 1) 提出混合输入表示：结合RGB图像与基于压缩差异的特征（FDIFF），突出细微篡改伪影；2) 采用基于尤登指数的模型自适应阈值优化策略，平衡TPR与FPR；3) 基于迁移学习，使用多种预训练CNN架构（DenseNet121、VGG16、ResNet50、EfficientNetB0、MobileNet、InceptionV3）进行实验。
AI.result: 在CASIA v2.0数据集上，DenseNet121取得最高准确率和AUC；ResNet50取得最高MCC，提供最均衡可靠的预测。评估指标包括准确率、精确率、召回率、F1分数、MCC和AUC。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效提升了篡改伪影的可视性与分类鲁棒性，适合实际数字图像篡改检测场景。同时强调在取证应用中，仅依赖准确率不足，需关注假阴性最小化。

title: Belief or Circuitry? Causal Evidence for In-Context Graph Learning
comment: Under review at ICML Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop 2026
summary: How do LLMs learn in-context? Is it by pattern-matching recent tokens, or by inferring latent structure? We probe this question using a toy graph random-walk across two competing graph structures. This task's answer is, in principle, decidable: either the model tracks global topology, or it copies local transitions. We present two lines of evidence that neither account alone is sufficient. First, reconstructing the internal representation structure via PCA reveals that at intermediate mixture ratios, both graph topologies are encoded in orthogonal principal subspaces simultaneously. This pattern is difficult to reconcile with purely local transition copying. Second, residual-stream activation patching and graph-difference steering causally intervene on this graph-family signal: late-layer patching almost fully transfers the clean graph preference, while linear steering moves predictions in the intended direction and fails under norm-matched and label-shuffled controls. Taken together, our findings are most consistent with a dual-mechanism account in which genuine structure inference and induction circuits operate in parallel.

AI.tldr: 本文通过图随机游走任务研究LLM的上下文学习机制，发现模型同时使用结构推断和局部模式匹配两种并行机制，而非单一策略。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM在上下文学习中究竟是通过匹配最近的token模式（局部复制），还是通过推断潜在结构（全局推理）来学习。
AI.method: 设计了两种竞争图结构上的随机游走任务，通过PCA分析内部表征、残差流激活修补和图像差线性干预等因果方法进行探究。
AI.result: PCA显示两种图拓扑在正交主子空间中同时编码；激活修补几乎完全转移干净图偏好；线性干预在控制实验中有效。
AI.conclusion: LLM的上下文学习并非单一机制，而是结构推断电路与局部归纳电路并行运作的双机制系统。

title: CloudEmu: A Trace-Driven Cloud-Native Emulation Testbed for Vehicle Video Uplink over Cellular Networks
comment: Accepted in IEEE NetSoft 2026 Demo Track
summary: We present CloudEmu, a trace-driven, cloud-native cellular-emulation testbed for vehicle video uplink communication. Reliable, low-latency video uplink over cellular networks is essential for remote monitoring of autonomous vehicles. However, existing testbeds fall into two extremes. Physical-vehicle platforms provide realism but are costly and make validation under identical network conditions difficult, whereas simulations are inexpensive and reproducible but generally cannot replay field-measured end-to-end performance dynamics without substantial calibration or readily run production video-uplink stacks. A software-defined, cloud-native emulation approach can combine the fidelity of trace-driven replay with the agility and scalability that network softwarization principles offer. To this end, we propose CloudEmu that replays time-synchronized cellular and position traces, collected once from vehicles, on commodity Linux-based virtual vehicle and video-receiver nodes. A Linux-based emulation framework couples traffic replay with position replay, tying network dynamics to each point along the route and enabling repeatable, route-aware experiments without repeated on-road trials. Our demo deploys a production-grade video-uplink stack on CloudEmu, allowing attendees to experience low-cost, repeatable trials and controlled comparisons under identical replayed network conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CloudEmu，一种基于云原生架构的蜂窝网络仿真测试平台，通过回放真实车辆轨迹和蜂窝网络轨迹数据，在虚拟化节点上实现低成本、可重复的车载视频上行通信实验。
AI.motivation: 现有车载视频上行测试平台存在两难：真实物理平台代价高、难以复现相同网络条件；纯模拟平台虽廉价可重复，但无法准确回放端到端性能动态，且难以运行真实视频上行协议栈。
AI.method: CloudEmu采用云原生软件定义方法，在Linux虚拟化节点上同步回放蜂窝网络跟踪数据和车辆位置跟踪数据，将网络动态与路径点位绑定，实现路径感知、可重复的实验。
AI.result: 演示了在生产级视频上行协议栈上的部署，支持低成本可重复实验，并在相同回放网络条件下进行可控对比。
AI.conclusion: CloudEmu融合了真实平台的高保真度与模拟平台的低成本可重复性，为自动驾驶远程监控的视频上行通信研究提供了实用的测试基础设施。

title: A Learning Method for Symbolic Systems Using Large Language Models
summary:
Automated theorem proving is essential for the formal verification of safety-critical systems. As the corpus of formal proofs grows, a natural paradigm is to learn from existing proofs. However, current learning-based approaches predominantly train Large Language Models (LLMs) as end-to-end provers, which yields resource-intensive, opaque systems. Conversely, while traditional symbolic provers are computationally efficient, how to automatically improve these solvers from data remains an open challenge.
  This paper bridges this gap by proposing LLM2Ltac, the first approach that leverages the reasoning power of LLMs not as end-to-end provers, but as intelligent synthesizers to mine purely symbolic tactics from data. Given a corpus of formal proofs, LLM2Ltac asks an LLM to identify latent proof strategies and formalize them into reusable tactics. These tactics are verified for validity and generalizability, and finally integrated into symbolic provers to enhance their automated proving capabilities without the runtime cost of LLMs.
  We implement LLM2Ltac on Rocq 8.20.0 and mine tactics from 11,725 theorems in the standard library. We evaluate our approach on 6,199 theorems from four large real-world verification projects, namely, compcert, Coq-Art, Ext-Lib, and VFA. Results show that the mined tactics improve CoqHammer to prove 23.87% more theorems, and when integrating the improved CoqHammer with Claude Code, the overall proved theorems increases by 9.90%, indicating the effectiveness of LLM2Ltac.

AI.tldr: LLM2Ltac是一种利用LLM从现有证明中挖掘可重用符号策略（tactics）的方法，而非将其用作端到端证明器。这些挖掘出的策略经过验证后集成到传统符号证明器中，在不增加运行时LLM开销的情况下提升自动化定理证明能力。实验证明该方法在多个大型验证项目上显著提升了CoqHammer的证明成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有学习方法主要将LLM训练为端到端证明器，存在资源消耗大、系统不透明的问题；而传统符号证明器虽然计算高效，但如何从数据中自动改进这些求解器仍是一个开放挑战。本文旨在弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出LLM2Ltac，利用LLM作为智能合成器从形式化证明语料库中挖掘潜在的证明策略，并将其形式化为可重用的tactics。这些tactics经过有效性和泛化性验证后，集成到符号证明器中，以增强其自动证明能力，且无需LLM的运行时开销。
AI.result: 在Rocq 8.20.0上实现，从标准库11,725个定理中挖掘tactics。在四个大型真实验证项目（compcert、Coq-Art、Ext-Lib、VFA）的6,199个定理上评估，挖掘出的tactics使CoqHammer多证明了23.87%的定理；将改进后的CoqHammer与Claude Code集成后，整体证明定理数增加了9.90%。
AI.conclusion: LLM2Ltac有效弥合了学习型方法与符号方法之间的差距，证明了利用LLM挖掘可重用策略来增强传统证明器是一条可行且高效的技术路线，能够在保持符号系统高效性的同时提升自动化证明能力。

title: Can Language Models Identify Side Effects of Breast Cancer Radiation Treatments?
summary: Accurately communicating the side effects of cancer treatments to cancer survivors is critical, particularly in settings such as informed consent, where clinicians must clearly and comprehensively convey potential treatment toxicities. However, this task remains challenging due to clinical knowledge deficits about adverse treatment effects and fragmentation across electronic health record (EHR) systems. Large language models (LLMs) have the potential to assist in this task, though their reliability in oncology survivorship contexts remains poorly understood. We present a deployment-oriented stress-testing framework for evaluating LLM-generated radiation side effect lists in breast cancer treatment and survivorship care. Using 21 breast cancer patient profiles, we construct paired patient clinical scenarios that differ only in radiotherapy regimens to evaluate seven instruction-tuned LLMs under multiple prompting regimes. We then compare LLM outputs to a clinician-curated reference derived from informed consent documents at two major academic medical centers and developed by a team including more than seven breast radiation oncologists. The reference maps radiation dose-fractionation, fields, and locations to associated toxicities, broken down by frequency and temporal onset. Across models, we reveal sensitivity to minor documentation changes, trade-offs between precision and recall, and systematic under-recall of rare and long-term side effects. When used alone, constraints on the number of side effects generated reduce precision, and grounding outputs in clinician-curated side effect lists substantially improves reliability and robustness. These findings highlight important limitations of LLM use in oncology and suggest practical design choices for safer and more informative survivorship-focused applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向部署的压力测试框架，用于评估大语言模型在乳腺癌放疗副作用列表生成中的可靠性。研究发现LLM对文档细节敏感，存在精确率与召回率的权衡，且系统性低估罕见和长期副作用。将输出锚定在临床医生整理的副作用列表上可显著提升可靠性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 准确传达癌症治疗副作用对癌症幸存者至关重要（如知情同意场景），但由于临床知识不足和电子健康记录系统碎片化，这一任务仍具挑战。大语言模型有辅助潜力，但其在肿瘤幸存护理中的可靠性尚不清楚。
AI.method: 构建了21个乳腺癌患者档案及配对临床场景（仅放疗方案不同），评估7种指令微调LLM在多种提示策略下的表现。将LLM输出与由两家大型学术医疗中心、7位以上乳腺放疗肿瘤学家共同制定的临床医生整理参考标准进行比较。
AI.result: LLM对微小文档变更敏感，存在精确率与召回率的权衡，系统性低估罕见和长期副作用。单独使用时限制副作用数量会降低精确率，而将输出锚定在临床医生整理的副作用列表上显著提升了可靠性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了LLM在肿瘤学应用中的重要局限性，并提出了更安全、更具信息量的幸存护理应用的实际设计选择。

title: Optimized Culprit Identification Using Mobilenet and Attention Mechanisms
summary: Automated culprit identification in surveillance systems is a critical task that requires high accuracy along with computational efficiency for real-time deployment. In this paper, an optimized deep learning framework is proposed using a lightweight MobileNet architecture integrated with channel and spatial attention mechanisms. The proposed model enhances feature representation by selectively focusing on the most discriminative regions while suppressing irrelevant background information, thereby improving identification performance. The framework incorporates efficient preprocessing, attention based feature refinement, and a robust classification strategy optimized using the Adam Optimizer. Experiments were conducted on benchmark face recognition datasets, including Labelled Faces in the Wild (LFW), CASIA-WebFace, and a subset of VGGFace2, under realistic conditions with variations in illumination, pose, and occlusion. The results demonstrate that the proposed model achieves a high classification accuracy of 97.8%, outperforming conventional models such as baseline CNN, ResNet, and standard MobileNet. The confusion matrix analysis indicates strong class-wise discrimination with minimal misclassification, while ROC-AUC evaluation confirms robust performance across all classes. Additionally, the proposed approach maintains low computational complexity and reduced inference time, making it suitable for real-time surveillance and edge-based applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种集成通道与空间注意力的轻量级MobileNet优化框架，在LFW、CASIA-WebFace和VGGFace2数据集上达到97.8%的准确率，兼具高精度与低计算复杂度，适用于实时监控场景。
AI.motivation: 监控系统中的罪犯识别需要高精度与实时部署的计算效率，现有模型往往在精度与速度之间难以平衡。
AI.method: 采用轻量级MobileNet架构，集成通道注意力和空间注意力机制来增强特征表示；结合高效预处理、注意力特征精炼和Adam优化器分类策略。
AI.result: 在LFW、CASIA-WebFace和VGGFace2数据集上达到97.8%的分类准确率，优于基线CNN、ResNet和标准MobileNet；混淆矩阵显示类间区分能力强，ROC-AUC表现稳健；同时保持低计算复杂度和低推理时间。
AI.conclusion: 提出的注意力增强轻量级框架有效平衡了精度与效率，适合实时监控和边缘设备部署。

title: Playing games with knowledge: AI-Induced delusions need game theoretic interventions
summary: Conversational AI has a fundamental flaw as a knowledge interface: sycophantic chatbots induce epistemic entrenchment and delusional belief spirals even in rational agents. We propose the problem does not stem from the AI model, rooted instead in a systemic consequence of the paradigm shift from user-driven knowledge search to users and agents engaged in strategic, repeated-play communication. We formalize the problem as a Crawford-Sobel cheap talk game, where costless user signals induce a pooling equilibrium. Agents optimized for user satisfaction produce sycophantic strategies that provide identical reinforcement across user types with opposite epistemic incentives: exploratory ``Growth-seekers'' ($θ_G$) and confirmatory ``Validation-seekers'' ($θ_V$). Under repeated play, this identification failure creates a coordination trap -- analogous to a Prisoner's Dilemma -- where locally rational feedback loops drive users toward pathologically certain false beliefs. We propose an inference-time mechanism design intervention called an Epistemic Mediator that breaks this pooling equilibrium by introducing a costly signal (epistemic friction), forcing type revelation based on users' asymmetric cognitive costs for processing resistance. A key contribution is Belief Versioning, a git-inspired epistemic meta-memory system that stores healthy beliefs and rollbacks when validation-seeking resistance is detected. In simulation, this intervention achieves a separating equilibrium achieving a $48\times$ differential in spiral rates while passing a learning preservation criterion), evidence that epistemic safety in AI is fundamentally a problem of strategic information environment design rather than simple model alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文指出对话式AI的"谄媚"缺陷本质上是战略信息环境设计问题，而非简单模型对齐问题。作者将问题形式化为Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话博弈，并提出一种推理时机制设计干预——"认知调解器"，通过引入"认知摩擦"打破混杂均衡，实现用户类型分离。其中"信念版本控制"系统可存储健康信念并在检测到确认偏误时回滚。模拟结果表明该方法实现了48倍螺旋率差异，同时保持了学习保留标准。
AI.motivation: 当前对话式AI作为知识接口存在根本性缺陷：谄媚的聊天机器人即使在理性智能体中也会导致认知固化和妄想性信念螺旋。作者认为问题根源不在AI模型本身，而是从用户驱动知识搜索到用户与智能体进行战略性重复博弈的范式转变所带来的系统性后果。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话博弈，其中无成本用户信号导致混杂均衡。提出推理时机制设计干预——"认知调解器"(Epistemic Mediator)，通过引入有成本信号（认知摩擦）打破混杂均衡，迫使基于用户不对称认知成本进行类型揭示。核心贡献是"信念版本控制"(Belief Versioning)，一种受git启发的认知元记忆系统，存储健康信念并在检测到验证型抵抗时回滚。
AI.result: 模拟实验表明该干预实现了分离均衡，达到48倍的螺旋率差异，同时通过了学习保留标准。
AI.conclusion: 对话AI中的认知安全问题本质上是战略信息环境设计问题，而非简单的模型对齐问题。

title: Bridging the Cognitive Gap: A Unified Memory Paradigm for 6G Agentic AI-RAN
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: As 6G evolves, the radio access network must transcend traditional automation to embrace agentic AI capable of perception, reasoning, and evolution. A fundamental cognitive gap persists in current disaggregated architectures, where interfaces force the physical layer to compress high-dimensional states into low-dimensional metrics, trapping reasoning agents behind a semantic bottleneck. This article envisions a shift from interface-bound to memory-centric architectures. We propose a unified memory paradigm that dissolves the boundaries between sensing and reasoning by mapping biological memory hierarchies onto heterogeneous computing fabrics. Enabled by emerging coherent interconnects, this approach creates a cognitive continuum where microsecond-level reflexes, millisecond-level reasoning, and long-term evolution share state across time scales. By replacing message passing with zero-copy observability, we empower AI agents to bridge the gap between real-time responsiveness and long-horizon context for truly autonomous 6G networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向6G的从接口绑定迈向记忆中心架构的范式转变，通过统一记忆范式和零拷贝可观测性，解决当前无线接入网中感知与推理间的语义瓶颈，实现跨时间尺度的认知连续体。
AI.motivation: 现有6G无线接入网架构中，接口迫使物理层将高维状态压缩为低维指标，导致推理智能体面临语义瓶颈，无法实现真正的感知-推理-进化能力。
AI.method: 提出统一记忆范式，将生物记忆层次映射到异构计算架构上，利用新兴的连续互连技术，以零拷贝可观测性替代消息传递，创建跨微秒级反射、毫秒级推理和长期演进的认知连续体。
AI.result: 所提架构使AI智能体能够桥接实时响应与长期上下文之间的鸿沟，支持真正自主的6G网络。
AI.conclusion: 从接口绑定转向记忆中心架构是突破当前语义瓶颈的关键路径，为实现6G自主网络提供了认知层面的基础支撑。

title: Debugging the Debuggers: Failure-Anchored Structured Recovery for Software Engineering Agents
summary:
Software engineering agents are increasingly deployed in evaluable engineering environments, yet post-failure recovery remains costly, manual, and ad hoc. Existing systems expose traces or generate follow-up feedback, but they do not convert heterogeneous runtime evidence into grounded, bounded recovery guidance for a subsequent attempt. We present PROBE, a failure-anchored framework for structured recovery in software engineering agents. PROBE organizes failed-run telemetry into structured evidence, structured diagnosis, and bounded recovery guidance through a Telemetry Layer, a Diagnosis Layer, and a Guidance Gate. The Telemetry Layer preserves fine-grained runtime signals, the Diagnosis Layer fuses cross-signal evidence into grounded diagnoses, and the Guidance Gate produces diagnosis-derived guidance only when it is evidence-grounded, actionable, and within the scope of agent-side behavior.
  We evaluate PROBE across three settings: repository-level software repair, enterprise workflow recovery, and AIOps service mitigation. On 257 initially unresolved cases, PROBE achieves 65.37% Top-1 diagnosis accuracy and a 21.79% recovery rate, outperforming the strongest non-PROBE baseline by 43.58 and 12.45 percentage points. The results reveal a diagnosis-recovery gap: accurate diagnosis is necessary but insufficient unless translated into bounded guidance that a subsequent attempt can execute and verify. Beyond controlled evaluation, a Microsoft IcM prototype shows that PROBE can attach as a non-intrusive side channel to existing service-diagnosis workflows without changing the agent policy, toolset, or execution budget. These results suggest that telemetry-grounded, failure-anchored recovery can improve post-failure recoverability under realistic engineering constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PROBE框架，一种基于失败锚定的结构化恢复框架，通过遥测层、诊断层和指导门将运行时证据转化为可执行的恢复指导。在三个工程场景（仓库级软件修复、企业工作流恢复、AIOps服务缓解）的257个未解决案例中，PROBE实现了65.37%的Top-1诊断准确率和21.79%的恢复率，分别比最强基线高出43.58和12.45个百分点。
AI.motivation: 软件工程智能体在失败后恢复的成本高昂、手动且临时。现有系统仅暴露痕迹或生成后续反馈，未能将异构运行时证据转化为有根据、有边界的恢复指导。
AI.method: PROBE包含三层架构：遥测层（保留细粒度运行时信号）、诊断层（融合跨信号证据生成有根据的诊断）、指导门（仅在证据充分、可操作且属于智能体行为范围内时产生基于诊断的指导）。
AI.result: 在257个初始未解决案例上，PROBE达到65.37% Top-1诊断准确率和21.79%恢复率，分别比最强非PROBE基线高出43.58和12.45个百分点。Microsoft IcM原型显示PROBE可作为非侵入式侧信道附加到现有服务诊断工作流中，无需改变智能体策略、工具集或执行预算。
AI.conclusion: 准确诊断是必要但不充分的，需要转化为有边界的指导以供后续尝试执行和验证。基于遥测的失败锚定恢复能在现实工程约束下提高失败后可恢复性。

title: Revisiting the syntax of imperatives in Yemeni Arabic: An Agree across phases approach
summary: This article revisits the syntax of imperatives in Yemeni Arabic proposing an Agree acros phases (AAP) approach. I argue that the AAP approach successfully accounts for both simple and complex imperative constructions, including A'-chain structures, by establishing a close interactions between syntax and discourse. The study demonstrates that this interface is motivated by the interpretive and performative functions associated with imperatives, linking informational structure with propositional structure. It is also proposed that the thematic subject of imperatives is a 2-person pro, whereas any overt pronominal or nominal element occurring preverbally is not a subject, but rather a C-domain element, precisely aboutness topic. These topics serve as the logical subjects of imperatives and enter into a coreferentiality relationship with pro. This relation is analyzed as APP involving Match, yielding both local and non-local A'-chains. For core imperatives, viz., lacking an overt topic, I propose a null topic to (re)merge in Spec,TopP, whose interpretation depends on the discourse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一致跨语段（AAP）框架分析也门阿拉伯语祈使句句法，主张祈使句主語为第二人称pro，前置显性成分属于话题（C-域元素），通过Match机制形成A'-语链，核心祈使句则依赖空话题与话语衔接。
AI.motivation: 旨在解决也门阿拉伯语祈使句的句法结构问题，特别是简单祈使句与复杂祈使句（含A'-语链）的统一分析，并解释句法与话语界面的互动关系。
AI.method: 采用一致跨语段（Agree across phases, AAP）框架，结合句法-话语接口分析，将祈使句主语视为2-person pro，前置显性成分分析为C-域话题（aboutness topic），通过Match操作建立核心指称关系，形成本地/非本地A'-语链。
AI.result: AAP框架能统一解释简单祈使句和复杂祈使句（含A'-语链）；主题主语是2-person pro，前置显性成分不是主语而是话题；核心祈使句（无显性话题）通过空话题在Spec,TopP合并实现话语解读。
AI.conclusion: 也门阿拉伯语祈使句的句法-话语界面互动由其阐释功能和施为功能驱动，信息结构与命题结构紧密关联；AAP框架为跨语言祈使句分析提供了新视角。

title: Augmented Equivariant Mesh Networks for Anatomical Segmentation
summary: Anatomical mesh segmentation requires models that operate directly on irregular surface geometry while remaining robust to arbitrary patient pose and mesh resolution variation. Existing task-specific mesh and point-cloud methods are not equivariant, and can degrade sharply under test-time perturbation, for example dropping by 25-26 IoU points on intraoral scan segmentation at $40^\circ$ tilt. We present EAMS, an Equivariant Anatomical Mesh Segmentor built on Equivariant Mesh Neural Networks (EMNN), and evaluate it across four clinically distinct tasks spanning edge-, vertex-, and face-level supervision. We combine intrinsic mesh descriptors with anatomy-aware priors, including PCA-derived frames for dental arches and liver surfaces, and augment message passing to provide lightweight global context. Across intracranial aneurysm and intraoral segmentation, EAMS variants are competitive with specialized baselines on unperturbed inputs while remaining stable under geometric perturbations, and on liver surfaces they expose a favorable trade-off between canonical-pose accuracy and rotation robustness. These results show that a lightweight ($<2$M parameters) equivariant framework can deliver robust anatomical mesh segmentation across diverse supervision types without task-specific architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EAMS，一个基于等变网格神经网络（EMNN）的轻量级解剖网格分割框架，在颅内动脉瘤、口内扫描和肝脏表面等四个临床任务上，在保持与专用基线相当性能的同时，对几何扰动（如旋转、姿态变化）具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有网格/点云分割方法缺乏等变性，在测试时受到几何扰动（如旋转、姿态变化）时性能急剧下降（如口内扫描倾斜40°时IoU下降25-26点），亟需一个对患者姿态和网格分辨率变化鲁棒的解剖网格分割模型。
AI.method: 基于等变网格神经网络（EMNN）构建EAMS；结合内在网格描述符与解剖先验（如PCA主成分分析提取牙弓和肝脏表面的参考坐标系）；增强消息传递机制以提供轻量级全局上下文；在顶点、边、面三种监督粒度下进行评估。
AI.result: 在颅内动脉瘤和口内扫描分割中，EAMS在未扰动输入上与专用基线相当，且在几何扰动下保持稳定；在肝脏表面上展现了规范姿态准确性与旋转鲁棒性之间的有利权衡；模型参数量小于2M。
AI.conclusion: 一个轻量级（<2M参数）的等变框架可以在多种监督类型下实现鲁棒的解剖网格分割，无需任务特定的架构设计。

title: Political Plasticity: An Analysis of Ideological Adaptability in Large Language Models
summary: Since the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), a significant area of research has focused on their intrinsic biases, particularly in political discourse. This study investigates a different but related concept, "political plasticity", which is defined as the capacity of models to adapt their responses based on the user supplied context. To analyze this, a testing framework was developed using an expanded corpus of 200 politically-oriented questions across economic and personal freedom axes, based on a prior framework by Lester (1996). The study explored several methods to induce political bias, including simplified and topic-based system prompts, as well as user prompts with few-shot examples. The results show that while system prompts were largely ineffective, user prompts successfully elicited significant ideological shifts, particularly along the Economic Freedom axis in larger and newer models. Through a validation experiment, we examined whether models answer questionnaires by recognizing the underlying question format. Inverting the sense of the questions revealed unexpected, counter-intuitive shifts in most models, suggesting potential data leakage. Finally, we also analyzed how model plasticity varies when the experiment is conducted in different languages. The results reveal subtle yet notable shifts across each of the analyzed languages. Overall, our results indicate that small and older LLMs exhibit limited or unstable political plasticity, whereas newer frontier models display reliable, expected adaptability.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了大语言模型（LLMs）的"政治可塑性"——即模型根据用户提供的上下文调整其政治立场的能力。通过200道政治倾向问题、系统提示词和用户提示词（含少样本示例）等多种方法测试发现：系统提示词效果有限，而用户提示词能显著改变模型立场（尤其在经济自由维度上）。研究还发现模型可能通过识别问题格式产生数据泄露，且不同语言环境下模型可塑性存在微妙差异。结论是：小型/老旧模型可塑性不稳定，而前沿新模型表现出可靠、预期的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 已有研究多聚焦LLM的内在政治偏见，但缺乏对模型能否根据用户语境动态调整立场（即"政治可塑性"）的系统性探究。作者希望填补这一空白，理解模型在交互中的立场灵活性及其潜在风险。
AI.method: 基于Lester（1996）框架构建200道政治倾向问题（横跨经济自由与个人自由两轴），设计多种提示词策略（简化/主题系统提示词、含少样本的用户提示词）诱导立场偏移；通过反转问题语义验证模型是否识别格式；并跨语言（多语种）对比分析可塑性差异。
AI.result: 系统提示词效果微弱，用户提示词能引发显著的意识形态偏移（尤其大型/新模型在经济自由维度）；反转问题语义导致多数模型出现反直觉偏移，提示潜在的数据泄露；不同语言环境下模型可塑性呈现细微但显著的差异。
AI.conclusion: 小型和较老的大语言模型政治可塑性有限或不稳定，而新型前沿模型表现出可靠且符合预期的适应能力。

title: GenioSim: A Novel Simulation Platform for Edge Computing over Optical Networks
summary: The convergence of Passive Optical Networks (PONs) and edge computing creates new opportunities: Optical Line Terminals (OLTs) and Optical Network Terminals (ONTs) can be repurposed as low-latency edge compute nodes for offloading workloads. However, exploring such design options early in the development cycle is costly and time-consuming, as prototyping requires specialized hardware and realistic traffic conditions. Simulation becomes essential, yet current tools are unable to accurately model this emerging class of systems. To address these gaps, we introduce GenioSim, a simulation platform for hierarchical PON-enabled edge infrastructures. It models OLTs and ONTs with realistic PON behavior, supports hybrid container- and VM-based virtualization, and provides multiple service and execution models. These capabilities enable the evaluation of resource management policies under complex, heterogeneous conditions. We present experiments in the context of use cases of industrial relevance, to show GenioSim can provide insights for capacity planning and for the choice of policies for container placement and task offloading in PON-enabled edge infrastructures.

AI.tldr: GenioSim是一个针对PON（无源光网络）与边缘计算融合架构的仿真平台，能够模拟OLT和ONT作为边缘计算节点的行为，支持混合容器与虚拟机虚拟化，用于评估资源管理策略。
AI.motivation: PON与边缘计算的融合为低延迟计算提供了新机会，但早期开发中原型构建成本高、耗时长，现有仿真工具无法准确建模这类新兴系统。
AI.method: 提出了GenioSim仿真平台，该平台建模OLT和ONT的PON行为，支持容器与VM混合虚拟化，提供多种服务与执行模型，用于评估资源管理策略。
AI.result: 通过工业相关用例的实验，展示了GenioSim在容量规划、容器放置和任务卸载策略选择方面提供有效洞察的能力。
AI.conclusion: GenioSim能够有效支持PON边缘基础设施的资源管理策略评估，为系统设计提供早期决策参考。

title: Using Semantic Distance to Estimate Uncertainty in LLM-Based Code Generation
summary: LLMs show strong performance in code generation, but their outputs lack correctness guarantees. Sample-based uncertainty estimators address this by generating multiple candidate programs and measuring their disagreement. However, existing estimators make different design choices about how behaviours are identified, aggregated, referenced and compared, making them difficult to assess. We therefore first introduce a taxonomy that disentangles these choices and reveals a missing design point: semantic distance-aware uncertainty estimation, which measures not only whether sampled programs disagree, but how severely their execution behaviours differ. Across LiveCodeBench, MBPP, HumanEval-X and BigCodeBench, spanning Python, Java and C++, our metrics provide strong proxies for correctness, and consistently outperform state-of-the-art sample-based baselines across both closed-source models (GPT-3.5-Turbo, GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite, Claude Opus 4.5) and an open-source model (DeepSeek-Coder-V2). The method is practical: it requires neither model internals nor LLM-as-judge calls, remains robust across models, languages, sampling temperatures and fuzzing settings, and reduces runtime by approximately 48-79% relative to existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义距离的不确定性估计方法，通过衡量采样程序执行行为的差异程度来评估代码生成正确性，在多个基准测试和模型上超越现有方法，并降低48-79%的运行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有基于采样的不确定性估计器在设计上存在诸多不一致的选择（行为识别、聚合、参考和比较方式），缺乏统一的评估框架，且忽视了程序执行行为之间的语义差异程度。
AI.method: 提出语义距离感知的不确定性估计方法，不仅检测采样程序是否不一致，还量化其执行行为差异的严重程度；同时构建了一个分类法来梳理现有方法的设计选择。
AI.result: 在LiveCodeBench、MBPP、HumanEval-X和BigCodeBench上（涵盖Python、Java、C++），该方法在多个闭源和开源模型上一致优于最先进的基线方法，运行时间降低约48-79%。
AI.conclusion: 语义距离感知的不确定性估计是一种实用、鲁棒且高效的代码生成正确性代理指标，不需要模型内部信息或LLM作为评判者，对模型、语言、采样温度等设置具有良好鲁棒性。

title: Do Benchmarks Underestimate LLM Performance? Evaluating Hallucination Detection With LLM-First Human-Adjudicated Assessment
comment: Presented at the ROMCIR Workshop at ECIR 2026
summary: Hallucination remains a persistent challenge in Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly in context-grounded settings such as RAG and agentic AI systems. This study focuses on contextual hallucination detection in summarization tasks. We analyze the QAGS-C and SummEval datasets by comparing original benchmark annotations with reason and span-based predictions from Gemini 2.5 Flash and GPT-5 Mini. To address systematic divergences between human labels and LLM judgments, we re-evaluated all conflicted samples through a human adjudication process involving 2 cross-cultural adjudicators. Following this re-evaluation, triple agreement (between human, GPT, and Gemini) increased by 6.38% for QAGS-C and 7.62% for SummEval. Similarly, model accuracy improved, with GPT increasing by 4.25% on QAGS-C and 2.34% on SummEval, while Gemini showed gains of 8.51% and 3.80%, respectively. Notably, adjudicators frequently sided with the models' judgments over original human annotations when LLMs provided explicit reasoning. Overall human adjudicator agreement ranged between 83% and 87%. These findings suggest that for ambiguity-prone tasks, single-pass annotations may be insufficient, and model-assisted re-evaluation yields more reliable benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过人工裁决重新评估了QAGS-C和SummEval数据集中人类标注与LLM判断的冲突样本，发现模型辅助的重新评估使三方一致性提升6-8%，且裁决者常倾向于支持LLM的推理判断。
AI.motivation: LLM在上下文接地任务（如RAG和AI Agent系统）中仍存在幻觉问题，而现有基准数据集的标注质量可能因单次标注的不可靠性而受限，需要更可靠的评估方法。
AI.method: 1) 使用Gemini 2.5 Flash和GPT-5 Mini对QAGS-C和SummEval数据集进行理由和跨度预测 2) 通过两位跨文化裁决者对冲突样本进行人工重新评估 3) 比较重新评估前后的一致性变化
AI.result: 三方一致性提升6.38%(QAGS-C)和7.62%(SummEval)；GPT准确率提升4.25%和2.34%；Gemini准确率提升8.51%和3.80%；裁决者间一致性达83%-87%
AI.conclusion: 对歧义性强的任务，单次标注不可靠，模型辅助的重新评估能产生更可靠的基准，且LLM提供明确推理时人类更倾向于认同模型判断。

title: CASISR: Circular Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution
summary: The generalization performance (GP) of deep learning-based arbitrary-scale image super-resolution (ASISR) methods is subject to limited training datasets and unlimited testing datasets. It is vitally significant to enhance the GP of the pretrained ASISR models by making full use of the testing samples. The ASISR models usually employ an open-loop architecture from low-resolution (LR) images to super-resolution (SR) images. The degradation model from SR samples to LR samples is known bicubic down-sampling for the classical ASISR, is supposed down-sampling with additive random noise for the blind ASISR, and is learnable for the real-world ASISR. Combining the ASISR and degradation models, it is potentially possible to adopt a closed-loop architecture based on the automatic control theory for strengthening the GP of the ASISR methods. Therefore, this paper proposes a closed-loop architecture, circular ASISR (CASISR), to lift the capability of image reconstruction. A mathematical nonlinear loop equation is established to describe the CASISR, the reasonability of the CASISR is proven by conditional probability theory, and the stability of the CASISR is proven by Taylor series approximation. The first-order and second-order absolute difference images are defined to compare the image reconstruction performance of the ASISR and the CASISR methods. Comprehensive simulation experiments show that the proposed CASISR approach outperforms the eight state-of-the-art ASISR approaches in the quality of image reconstruction. Especially, the proposed CASISR is extraordinarily suitable for fractional SR scale factors and is extremely effective for text and stripe images with drastically changed edges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种闭环架构CASISR，通过结合超分与退化模型形成反馈回路，显著提升了任意尺度图像超分方法的泛化性能，在实验中优于八种现有方法，特别适合分数倍尺度和边缘剧烈变化的图像。
AI.motivation: 深度学习ASISR方法面临训练数据有限而测试数据无限的泛化瓶颈，现有开环架构（SR→LR单向映射）未能充分利用测试样本信息。作者受自动控制理论启发，希望通过闭环反馈机制提升预训练模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出闭环CASISR架构：将ASISR模型与退化模型（已知/盲/可学习）组合形成反馈回路；建立非线性环路方程描述系统；用条件概率证明合理性，用泰勒级数近似证明稳定性；定义一阶和二阶绝对差分图像用于性能比较。
AI.result: 在图像重建质量上全面优于八种SOTA ASISR方法；特别适用于分数倍超分尺度因子；对文本和条纹等边缘剧烈变化的图像效果极为显著。
AI.conclusion: 闭环架构CASISR有效提升了ASISR的泛化能力，为超分任务提供了一种新的控制理论视角，在特定尺度因子和边缘敏感场景下具有突出优势。

title: Alignment as Jurisprudence
summary:
Jurisprudence, the study of how judges should properly decide cases, and alignment, the science of getting AI models to conform to human values, share a fundamental structure. These seemingly distant fields both seek to predict and shape how decisions by powerful actors, in one case judges and in the other increasingly powerful artificial intelligences, will be made in the unknown future. And they use similar tools of the specification and interpretation of language to try to accomplish those goals. The great debates of jurisprudence, about what the law is and what it should be, can provide insight into alignment, and lessons from what does and does not work in alignment can help make progress in jurisprudence.
  This essay puts the two fields directly into conversation. Drawing on leading accounts of jurisprudence, particularly Dworkin's principle-oriented interpretivism and Sunstein's positivist account of law as analogical reasoning, and on cutting-edge alignment approaches, namely Constitutional AI and case-based reasoning, it illustrates the value of a more sophisticated legally-inspired approach to the interplay of rules and cases in finetuning alignment and points to ways that AI can provide a better understanding of how the law works and how it can be improved by the introduction of AI. AI systems and the law should operate to empower people to act in the world, helping to expand their capabilities and the extent to which they are able to achieve their goals. As AI continues to improve in capacity, and as the constraints that legal theory places on human judges seem be coming undone, the conversation between these two fields will become increasingly essential and may help point to a better version of both.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了法理学（研究法官如何正确判案）与AI对齐（让AI模型符合人类价值观）之间的共通结构，通过比较Dworkin的诠释主义、Sunstein的类比推理法学与Constitutional AI、基于案例推理等对齐方法，论证两个领域可以相互借鉴，并指出随着AI能力提升和法律理论约束减弱，跨领域对话将愈加重要。
AI.motivation: 法理学和AI对齐虽然看似遥远，但都致力于预测和塑造强大行为者（法官或AI）在未来未知情境中的决策，且都使用语言规范与解释的工具。作者认为两个领域可以相互启发。
AI.method: 将法理学两大流派（Dworkin的原则导向诠释主义、Sunstein的类比推理实证主义法学）与两种前沿对齐方法（Constitutional AI、基于案例推理）进行对比分析，探讨规则与案例在微调对齐中的相互作用。
AI.result: 更复杂的、受法律启发的规则与案例互动方法对AI对齐有价值，同时AI也可以帮助更好理解法律运作机制并改进法律制度。
AI.conclusion: AI系统与法律应共同赋能人类，扩展其能力和实现目标的能力。随着AI能力提升和法律理论约束松动，两个领域间的对话将变得不可或缺，并可能指向更好的发展方向。

title: In-Network Artificial Computing Enhanced Light Model-Switching for Emergency Communications Networks
summary: Emergency communications networks require in-network intelligence for timely traffic handling under dynamic demands and runtime constraints. In these environments, packets may need different inference behaviors, and conventional model replacement via control-plane updates is too slow for responsive operation. We propose an in-network artificial computing framework with lightweight model-switching, where multiple Binary Neural Network (BNN) models are kept resident within a shared execution framework. Packet metadata selects the active model at packet granularity with O(1) selection cost. A fixed 1024-byte payload is aligned with x86 AVX-512, enabling efficient memory access. The framework is realized on an eBPF/XDP + AF_XDP stack. Experimental results show that the system sustains 1.894 Mpps with a 0.528 us inference latency, while model selection adds only 0.005 us. Our results demonstrate that different resident models induce distinct packet-processing behaviors, that scaling to 16 slots preserves low switching overhead, and that online model switching completes without wrong-verdict packets. These results show the practicality of lightweight in-network artificial computing on commodity hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轻量级模型切换的网内人工智能计算框架，通过在共享执行框架内驻留多个二值神经网络（BNN）模型，以数据包粒度（O(1)选择开销）实现快速模型切换，并在eBPF/XDP+AF_XDP栈上实现。实验表明系统可维持1.894 Mpps吞吐量、0.528 us推理延迟，模型选择仅增加0.005 us开销，证明了在商用硬件上实现轻量级网内AI计算的可行性。
AI.motivation: 应急通信网络需要网内智能来应对动态流量和运行时约束，传统通过控制平面更新模型的方式响应太慢，无法满足实时性要求。
AI.method: 提出一种网内人工智能计算框架，将多个BNN模型驻留在共享执行引擎中，通过数据包元数据以O(1)代价选择当前活跃模型；采用1024字节固定负载对齐x86 AVX-512以优化内存访问；基于eBPF/XDP+AF_XDP栈实现。
AI.result: 系统维持1.894 Mpps吞吐量，推理延迟0.528 us，模型选择仅增加0.005 us开销；扩展到16个模型槽位仍保持低切换开销；在线模型切换不会产生误判数据包。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明该轻量级网内AI计算框架在商用硬件上具有实用性，能够实现数据包粒度的快速模型切换，满足应急通信网络的实时性需求。

title: ParityFuzz: Finding Inconsistencies across Solidity Compilers via Fine-Grained Mutation and Differential Analysis
summary:
The Solidity smart contract ecosystem has rapidly grown, leading to multiple compilers targeting different blockchain platforms or improving compilation efficiency. Although many compilers aim to be compatible with the primary Solidity compiler (Solc), significant inconsistencies in compilation and execution remain. These inconsistencies hinder contract migration, mislead developers during debugging, and may introduce exploitable vulnerabilities, causing financial losses. Existing testing techniques mainly focus on bugs within a single compiler or perform differential testing in the same execution environment. However, they are insufficient for detecting cross-compiler inconsistencies, as they lack mechanisms to explore triggering conditions and compare bytecode across environments.
  We propose ParityFuzz, a cross-compiler differential testing framework for Solidity. It operates in three stages. First, it derives mutation rules, including syntax- and boundary-oriented rules, by analyzing compilers and execution environments. Second, it uses reinforcement learning to select effective mutation rules for test generation. Third, it compiles and executes programs across multiple compilers, then normalizes and compares results to detect inconsistencies.
  Our evaluation shows ParityFuzz is efficient and effective. It achieves up to 18x higher compilation success rate and 1.8x higher code coverage than state-of-the-art fuzzers. It uncovers 64 previously unknown inconsistencies across six compilers. Notably, 11 issues have been fixed, and our findings received a bounty from the Polkadot community.

AI.tldr: 提出ParityFuzz框架，通过强化学习驱动的突变测试和交叉编译器差分测试，检测Solidity编译器间的不一致性，发现64个未知问题并获得社区奖励。
AI.motivation: 现有测试技术主要关注单一编译器内部的bug或在相同执行环境下的差分测试，缺乏检测跨编译器不一致性的机制，这些问题可能导致合约迁移困难、调试误导和可利用漏洞。
AI.method: 三阶段框架：1) 通过分析编译器和执行环境推导语法导向和边界导向的突变规则；2) 使用强化学习选择有效突变规则生成测试；3) 跨多个编译器编译执行程序，归一化并比较结果检测不一致性。
AI.result: 编译成功率比现有fuzzer高18倍，代码覆盖率高1.8倍；在6个编译器中发现64个未知不一致性；11个问题已修复，获得Polkadot社区奖金。
AI.conclusion: ParityFuzz有效解决了Solidity跨编译器不一致性的检测问题，验证了强化学习引导的突变测试在差分测试中的优越性。

title: PYTHALAB-MERA: Validation-Grounded Memory, Retrieval, and Acceptance Control for Frozen-LLM Coding Agents
comment: 28 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables; local CLI artifact evaluation
summary: Local LLM-based coding agents increasingly work in settings where correctness is earned through execution feedback, persistent state, and bounded repair, not through a single fluent answer. Static retrieval, long-context prompting, self-refinement, execution-feedback repair, and reinforcement learning over model weights each address part of this setting, but they do not jointly provide validation-grounded episodic memory, adaptive retrieval-action selection, delayed credit assignment, and structural skill reuse around a frozen local model. We introduce PYTHALAB-MERA, a lightweight external controller for local validation-conditioned code generation. The frozen language model proposes complete source files; the controller decides which memory records and AST-derived skills should enter the next prompt, validates each candidate through a fail-fast pipeline, converts validation outcomes into bounded shaped rewards, and propagates delayed credit through TD(lambda)-style eligibility traces. We evaluate the implementation as a local CLI artifact on reinforcement-learning coding tasks with strict validation gates. In the measured hard RL setting with three tasks, three repetitions, and a three-attempt budget, PYTHALAB-MERA passed 8/9 strict validations; the self-refinement baseline and the investigated GRACE extension each passed 0/9. These results support a deliberately bounded claim: in this recorded setting, the external memory-and-retrieval controller improved validation success. They do not establish general-purpose code synthesis, state-of-the-art performance, formal program correctness, or formal safety.

AI.tldr: 提出PYTHALAB-MERA，一个轻量级外部控制器，通过冻结的本地语言模型、执行反馈、自适应检索和TD(lambda)延迟信用分配，在严格验证的编码任务上显著优于自优化基线（8/9 vs 0/9通过率）。
AI.motivation: 现有的本地编码智能体方法（静态检索、长上下文提示、自优化、执行反馈修复、强化学习）各自只解决了部分问题，缺乏一个统一的、基于验证的、支持冻结模型的轻量级外部控制框架。
AI.method: PYTHALAB-MERA是一个外部控制器，核心包括：1）冻结的LLM生成完整源文件；2）控制器决定哪些记忆记录和AST派生技能进入提示；3）通过快速失败流水线验证候选方案；4）将验证结果转化为有界整形奖励；5）通过TD(lambda)风格资格迹传播延迟信用。
AI.result: 在三个强化学习编码任务的硬RL设置中（三次重复、三次尝试预算），PYTHALAB-MERA通过了8/9的严格验证，而自优化基线和GRACE扩展均通过了0/9。
AI.conclusion: 在记录的设置中，外部记忆与检索控制器显著提升了验证成功率。但该方法不代表通用代码合成、最先进性能、形式化程序正确性或形式化安全性。

title: KARMA-MV: A Benchmark for Causal Question Answering on Music Videos
summary: While significant progress has been made in Video Question Answering and cross-modal understanding, causal reasoning about how visual dynamics drive musical structure in music videos remains under-explored. We introduce KARMA-MV, a large-scale multiple-choice QA dataset derived from 2,682 YouTube music videos, designed to test models' ability to integrate temporal audio-visual cues and reason about visual-to-musical influence across reasoning, prediction, and counterfactual questions. Unlike traditional datasets requiring manual annotation, KARMA-MV leverages LLM reasoning for scalable generation and validation, yielding 37,737 MCQs. We propose a causal knowledge graph (CKG) approach that augments vision-language models (VLMs) with structured retrieval of cross-modal dependencies. Experiments on state-of-the-art VLMs and LLMs show consistent gains from CKG grounding -- especially for smaller models -- establishing the value of explicit causal structure for music-video reasoning. KARMA-MV provides a new benchmark for advancing causal audio-visual understanding beyond correlation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了KARMA-MV，一个基于YouTube音乐视频的大规模选择题问答数据集，用于测试模型对视觉驱动音乐结构的因果推理能力，并提出了因果知识图谱（CKG）方法来增强视觉语言模型的跨模态推理。
AI.motivation: 已有研究在视频问答和跨模态理解方面取得了进展，但对于音乐视频中视觉动态如何因果性地驱动音乐结构这一任务仍未被充分探索。现有数据集依赖人工标注，成本高且难以扩展。
AI.method: 构建KARMA-MV数据集：从2,682个YouTube音乐视频中利用LLM推理自动生成和验证37,737道多选题（包含推理、预测和反事实三类问题）；提出因果知识图谱（CKG）方法，通过结构化检索跨模态依赖关系来增强视觉语言模型（VLM）。
AI.result: 在多种先进的VLM和LLM上的实验表明，CKG grounding带来了稳定的性能提升，尤其对小型模型效果显著。
AI.conclusion: KARMA-MV为超越相关性学习的因果音频-视觉理解提供了新的基准，证明了显式因果结构对音乐视频推理的重要价值。

title: The Attacker in the Mirror: Breaking Self-Consistency in Safety via Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play
