summary: Self-play red team is an established approach to improving AI safety in which different instances of the same model play attacker and defender roles in a zero-sum game, i.e., where the attacker tries to jailbreak the defender; if self-play converges to a Nash equilibrium, the model is guaranteed to respond safely within the settings of the game. Although the parameter sharing enforced by the use of the same model for the two roles improves stability and performance, it introduces fundamental theoretical and architectural limitations. We show that the set of Nash equilibria that can be reached corresponds to a broad class of behaviours that includes trivial always refuse strategies and oracle-like defenders, thus limiting practical applicability. We then show that when attacker and defender share and update the same base model, the dynamics collapse to self-consistency, so that attacks do not enforce adversarial pressure on the defender. In response, we propose Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play, which trains distinct role-specific LoRA adapters on top of a frozen base model, thereby maintaining stable optimisation while preserving adversarial pressure through explicit role separation. In relation to standard self-play, we show up to 100x greater parameter efficiency than finetuning and consistent improvements in safety compared to self-play fine-tuned models. We evaluate on Qwen2.5-{3B, 7B,14B}-IT models across widely used safety benchmarks, showing improved robustness without loss of reasoning ability. Cross-play experiments further show that our attacker and defender models are superior to self-play in terms of adversarial defence and safety.

AI.tldr: 本文提出锚定双策略自博弈（ABSP）方法，通过冻结基础模型并训练角色特定的LoRA适配器，解决了传统自博弈中因参数共享导致攻击压力消失、纳什均衡受限的问题，在保持高效优化的同时显著提升AI安全性，相比标准自博弈实现最高100倍参数效率提升。
AI.motivation: 传统自博弈中攻击者和防御者共享同一模型参数，导致动态坍缩为自一致性，攻击无法对防御者施加有效对抗压力；同时可达的纳什均衡局限于"始终拒绝"或"神谕式防御者"等非理想行为，限制了实际应用价值。
AI.method: 提出Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play (ABSP)：在冻结的基础模型上训练角色特定的LoRA适配器（攻击者与防御者各一个），通过显式角色分离保持对抗压力，同时维持参数共享带来的优化稳定性。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-{3B,7B,14B}-IT模型上，ABSP相比标准自博弈微调实现最高100倍参数效率提升；在安全基准测试中持续提升鲁棒性且不损失推理能力；交叉实验中防御者和攻击者均优于自博弈模型。
AI.conclusion: ABSP通过角色特定的LoRA适配器实现显式角色分离，有效解决了自博弈的理论和架构局限性，在安全性与参数效率之间取得更优平衡。

title: Learning to Compress and Transmit: Adaptive Rate Control for Semantic Communications over LEO Satellite-to-Ground Links
summary: The bottleneck of satellite-to-ground links poses a major challenge for the timely downlink of massive on-board imagery. This paper studies adaptive image transmission over LEO satellite-to-ground links using joint source-channel coding (JSCC). We propose an RL-based framework that dynamically selects the channel dimension (compression ratio) of a SwinJSCC encoder to maximize the number of received satisfying reconstruction-quality constraints (PSNR and MS-SSIM) within a finite visibility window. The agent leverages SNR prediction to perform proactive rate adaptation and incorporates an on-board transmission-queue model that captures bursty encoding while penalizing both buffer overflow and underutilization. Simulations under realistic overpass conditions show that the proposed policy substantially outperforms fixed-rate baselines, achieving nearly 95% qualified frames with zero packet loss.

AI.tldr: 针对卫星-地面链路瓶颈导致星载图像难以按时下传的问题，提出一种基于强化学习的联合信源信道编码（JSCC）框架，通过动态选择SwinJSCC编码器的通道维度（压缩比），在有限可见窗口内最大化满足质量约束（PSNR和MS-SSIM）的图像帧数量。该方法利用SNR预测实现主动速率自适应，并引入星上传输队列模型处理突发编码，同时惩罚缓冲区溢出和利用不足。仿真结果表明，该策略在过顶条件下显著优于固定速率基线，实现了近95%的合格帧且零丢包。
AI.motivation: 星地链路带宽有限，大量星载图像数据难以实时下行传输，现有固定速率方案无法适应信道动态变化，导致传输效率低下。
AI.method: 提出RL驱动的自适应JSCC框架，使用SwinJSCC编码器，通过强化学习智能体根据SNR预测动态选择压缩比；引入传输队列模型建模突发编码行为，并优化缓冲区状态。
AI.result: 在真实过顶场景仿真中，所提策略相比固定速率基线大幅提升性能，达到近95%的合格图像帧，且无丢包。
AI.conclusion: 基于RL的动态JSCC方法可有效提升星地链路图像传输效率，为星载图像实时下行提供了可行方案。

title: Evaluating LLM-Generated Code: A Benchmark and Developer Study
comment: Accepted for publication at EASE '26/EQUISA workshop
summary: Code generation is one of the tasks for which the use of Large Language Models is widely adopted and highly successful. Given this popularity, there are many benchmarks dedicated to code generation that can help select the best model. However, they primarily focus on measuring solution correctness, leaving other aspects, such as code quality and usability, behind. This paper aims to describe a custom tree-fold evaluation methodology for code generated by Large Language Models that bridges this gap. The methodology includes a dedicated correctness benchmark based on a complex multi-level computer science project, code quality verification, and a survey of developers' opinions on generated code samples gathered through a structured code-review process. The proposed methodology's usage and usefulness are demonstrated by evaluating and comparing three general-purpose Large Language Models: GPT-4.1, DeepSeek-V3-0324, and Claude Opus 4. The results show that reviews gathered from developers can yield many new findings, especially those related to the code being in a production-ready state, that would not be possible to obtain using the standard correctness-focused benchmark approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于评估LLM生成代码的树状折叠评估方法，不仅关注正确性，还涵盖代码质量和开发者评审，并通过对比GPT-4.1、DeepSeek-V3-0324和Claude Opus 4三个模型验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成基准主要衡量解决方案的正确性，忽视了代码质量和可用性等关键方面，存在评估维度单一的问题。
AI.method: 提出一种树状折叠评估方法，包含三个维度：基于复杂多层级计算机科学项目的正确性基准、代码质量验证，以及通过结构化代码评审流程收集开发者对生成代码的意见。
AI.result: 通过对GPT-4.1、DeepSeek-V3-0324和Claude Opus 4三个通用大模型的评估和比较，证明了该方法的使用价值和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 开发者评审能提供许多传统正确性基准无法获得的新发现，特别是关于代码是否处于生产就绪状态方面的评估。

title: A Computational Operationalisation of Competing Maturational Theories of Syntactic Development via Statistical Grammar Induction
comment: In Proceedings of the Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society (CogSci) 2026. Presentation in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
summary: This paper is concerned with what intermediate syntactic categories children acquire during first language development, and in what order. Maturational theories make different predictions. Bottom-up accounts (GROWING) propose that lexical and inflectional structure emerges first, while inward accounts (INWARD) predict early access to discourse-related categories. We computationally operationalise these hypotheses of staged syntactic emergence using statistical grammar induction, asking what each proposed ordering makes learnable when input and learning algorithm are held constant. Our framework makes category acquisition explicit and allows us to explore how different maturational orderings shape the structure that can be learned under identical conditions. Based on this operationalisation, the GROWING account significantly outperforms the INWARD account across three evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过统计语法归纳方法，比较了儿童语言发展中两种句法范畴习得顺序理论（GROWING自下而上 vs INWARD自上而下），发现GROWING理论在三个评估指标上显著优于INWARD理论。
AI.motivation: 探究儿童语言发展过程中句法范畴的习得顺序，检验两种成熟理论（GROWING和INWARD）的不同预测。
AI.method: 将两种假设计算操作化，使用统计语法归纳方法，在输入和学习算法保持恒定的条件下，比较不同成熟顺序对可学习性的影响。
AI.result: GROWING理论（自下而上：先习得词汇和屈折结构）在三个评估指标上显著优于INWARD理论（自上而下：先涉及话语相关范畴）。
AI.conclusion: 儿童语言发展更支持自下而上的句法范畴习得顺序，即词汇和屈折结构先于话语相关范畴出现。

title: Text-Guided Multi-Scale Frequency Representation Adaptation
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods introduce a small number of training parameters, enabling pre-trained models to adapt rapidly to new data distributions. While these methods have shown promising results, they exhibit notable limitations. First, most existing methods operate in the signal space domain, which results in substantial information redundancy. Second, most existing methods utilize fixed prompts or adaptation layers, failing to fully account for the multi-scale characteristics of signals. To address these challenges, we propose the Multi-Scale Frequency Adapter (FreqAdapter), which integrates textual information and performs multi-scale fine-tuning of signals in the frequency domain. Additionally, we introduce a multi-scale adaptation strategy to optimize receptive fields across different frequency ranges, further enhancing the model's representational capacity. Extensive experiments on multimodal models, including CLIP and LLaVA, demonstrate that FreqAdapter significantly improves both performance and efficiency. FreqAdapter improves performance with minimal cost and fast convergence within one epoch. Code is available at https://github.com/Kelvin-ywc/FreqAdapter.

AI.tldr: 提出多尺度频率适配器(FreqAdapter)，在频域进行多尺度微调，提升多模态模型的参数高效微调效果，仅需一个epoch即可快速收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法存在两个问题：1) 在信号空间域操作导致信息冗余；2) 使用固定提示或适配层，未能充分利用信号的多尺度特性。
AI.method: 提出FreqAdapter：1) 在频域进行多尺度微调，集成文本信息；2) 引入多尺度适配策略，优化不同频率范围的感受野，增强模型表征能力。
AI.result: 在CLIP和LLaVA等多模态模型上的大量实验表明，FreqAdapter以极小的代价显著提升了性能和效率，且在一个epoch内快速收敛。
AI.conclusion: FreqAdapter通过频域多尺度适配策略，有效解决了现有PEFT方法的信息冗余和多尺度建模不足的问题，实现高效微调。

title: Measuring What Matters: Benchmarking Generative, Multimodal, and Agentic AI in Healthcare
summary: AI models are increasingly deployed in live clinical environments where they must perform reliably across complex, high-stakes workflows that standard training and validation datasets were never designed to capture. Evaluating these systems requires benchmarks: structured combinations of tasks, datasets, and metrics that enable reproducible, comparable measurement of what a model can do. The central challenge in healthcare AI is not performance alone, but the absence of systematic methods to measure reliability, safety, and clinical relevance under real-world conditions. Most existing benchmarks test what a model knows; too few test whether it can perform reliably and without failing across the full complexity of real clinical tasks. Current benchmarks have accumulated through ad hoc dataset construction optimized for narrow task performance: frontier models achieve near-perfect scores on medical licensing examinations, but when evaluated across real clinical tasks, performance degrades sharply, scoring 0.74--0.85 on documentation, 0.61--0.76 on clinical decision support, and only 0.53--0.63 on administrative and workflow tasks \cite{medhelm}. High benchmark scores give a false sense of deployment readiness, and the gap between performance and utility widens precisely as AI systems take on more consequential clinical roles. Without a principled framework for benchmark design, the field cannot determine whether poor clinical performance reflects model limitations or failures in how performance is being measured.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有医疗AI基准测试主要衡量模型知识，而非其在真实临床环境中的可靠性、安全性和临床实用性，导致高分模型在真实临床任务中表现大幅下降，亟需建立系统化的基准设计框架。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗AI模型在临床部署时面临复杂高风险场景，而现有基准测试仅关注知识性能，无法反映模型在真实临床任务中的可靠性、安全性和临床相关性。高分模型在实际应用中表现急剧下降，存在性能与实用性之间的严重脱节。
AI.method: 通过分析现有基准测试的局限性（如MedHelm评估中模型在文档记录、临床决策支持、行政工作流等任务上的表现下降），揭示基准设计缺乏系统性框架的问题，呼吁建立有原则的基准设计方法。
AI.result: 前沿模型在医学执照考试中接近满分，但在真实临床任务中表现大幅下滑：文档记录0.74-0.85，临床决策支持0.61-0.76，行政与工作流任务仅0.53-0.63。高分带来虚假的部署准备感。
AI.conclusion: 缺乏系统性基准设计框架，我们无法判断临床性能不佳是由于模型本身的局限，还是测量方式本身的失败。需要建立能够衡量可靠性、安全性和临床相关性的新基准体系。

title: GELATO: Generative Entropy- and Lyapunov-based Adaptive Token Offloading for Device-Edge Speculative LLM Inference
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: The recent growth of on-device Large Language Model (LLM) inference has driven significant interest in device-edge collaborative LLM inference. As a promising architecture, Speculative Decoding (SD) is increasingly adopted where a lightweight draft model rapidly generates candidate tokens to be verified by a powerful target model. However, a fundamental challenge lies in achieving per-token resource scheduling to effectively adapt SD paradigm to resource-constrained edge environment. This paper proposes a Generative Entropy- and Lyapunov-based Adaptive Token Offloading framework, named GELATO, to maximize decoding throughput under energy constraints in a device-edge collaborative SD system. Specifically, an outer drift-plus-penalty loop makes online decisions to establish a reference drafting budget, managing long-term energy-throughput trade-off. Further, a nested entropy-driven generation mechanism executes early exiting to adapt to per-token dynamic generative uncertainty. Theoretical analysis establishes a rigorous performance bound on long-term throughput for GELATO. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that GELATO achieves a globally optimal tradeoff, outperforming state-of-the-art distributed SD architectures by 64.98% in token throughput and reducing energy consumption by 47.47% under resource-constrained environments, while preserving LLM decoding quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GELATO框架，一种基于生成熵和李雅普诺夫优化的自适应令牌卸载框架，用于设备-边缘协作的推测解码系统，在资源受限环境下最大化解码吞吐量并降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 设备-边缘协作LLM推理中，推测解码范式的每令牌资源调度在资源受限的边缘环境面临根本性挑战，现有方案难以实现长期能量-吞吐量权衡。
AI.method: 提出GELATO框架：(1) 外层漂移加惩罚循环在线决策建立参考草稿预算，管理长期能量-吞吐量权衡；(2) 内层熵驱动生成机制通过早期退出适应每令牌动态生成不确定性。提供理论性能界分析。
AI.result: 相比最先进的分布式推测解码架构，令牌吞吐量提升64.98%，能耗降低47.47%，同时保持LLM解码质量。
AI.conclusion: GELATO在资源受限环境下实现了全局最优的吞吐量-能量权衡，为设备-边缘协作推测解码提供了有效的自适应资源调度方案。

title: Generating Complex Code Analyzers from Natural Language Questions
summary: Many software development tasks, such as implementing features and fixing bugs, begin with developers posing questions about a codebase. However, answering questions about codebases that span millions of lines of code across thousands of files is non-trivial. Standard tools like grep cannot answer questions requiring semantic or inter-procedural reasoning, and large language models (LLMs) struggle with large codebases due to resource and context constraints. In this paper, we present Merlin, a new system for answering free-form questions that require analytical reasoning about code. Merlin integrates an LLM with CodeQL, a program analysis framework that supports expressive queries over large codebases. We face two principal challenges in the design of such systems: First, program analysis queries are diverse and semantically complex; as a result, even syntactically well-formed queries frequently produce degenerate/empty results. Furthermore, relatively few CodeQL queries are available online, limiting the out-of-the-box effectiveness of LLMs as CodeQL query generators. We address these challenges by developing a RAG-based iterative query-generation approach and a novel self-test technique. Our query debugging technique builds on the idea of assistive queries, which generate concrete witnesses that expose and explain semantic flaws in candidate queries. We evaluate Merlin through both experimental and user studies. Over a set of natural language questions derived from common bug-finding tasks, Merlin discovered not only the majority of software issues reported by other approaches, but also issues that would have otherwise remained undetected. Through a within-subject user study, we found that access to Merlin increased task accuracy by an average of 3.8* and simultaneously reduced the time for programmers to complete all tasks by 31%.

AI.tldr: Merlin是一个集成LLM与CodeQL程序分析框架的系统，通过RAG迭代查询生成和自测试技术，能够回答需要分析推理的大型代码库自由形式问题。实验表明，Merlin不仅发现了其他方法报告的大多数软件问题，还发现了未被检测到的问题，并将程序员任务准确率提高3.8倍，完成时间减少31%。
AI.motivation: 开发人员在处理数百万行代码的大型代码库时，现有工具（如grep）无法回答需要语义或程序间推理的问题，而LLM受限于资源和上下文约束，难以处理大型代码库。因此需要一种能够回答需要分析推理的自由形式问题的系统。
AI.method: Merlin将LLM与CodeQL（支持对大型代码库进行表达性查询的程序分析框架）集成。针对两个主要挑战——程序分析查询多样且语义复杂（导致查询退化或空结果）以及可用的CodeQL查询较少——提出了基于RAG的迭代查询生成方法和一种新颖的自测试技术。查询调试技术基于辅助查询（assistive queries）的概念，生成具体证据来暴露和解释候选查询中的语义缺陷。
AI.result: 在常见bug查找任务的自然语言问题集上，Merlin发现了大多数其他方法报告的软件问题，还发现了其他方法未检测到的问题。用户研究表明，使用Merlin使任务准确率平均提高3.8倍，完成所有任务的时间减少了31%。
AI.conclusion: Merlin成功解决了大型代码库中自由形式问题回答的挑战，通过LLM与程序分析框架的集成以及创新的查询生成和调试技术，显著提升了开发人员理解和分析代码的效率与准确性。

title: Do Agents Need to Plan Step-by-Step? Rethinking Planning Horizon in Data-Centric Tool Calling
summary: Explicit planning is a critical capability for LLM-based agents solving complex data-centric tasks, which require precise tool calling over external data sources. Existing strategies fall into two paradigms based on planning horizon: (1) full-horizon (FH), which generates a complete plan before execution, and (2) single-step horizon (SH), which interleaves each action (tool call) with incremental reasoning and observation. While step-by-step execution is a common default under the assumption that eager execution monitoring is necessary for adaptability, we revisit this assumption for well-defined data-centric tasks. Our controlled empirical study isolates planning horizon as the key architectural feature and systematically analyzes the effects of topological complexity and tool robustness on both paradigms. Our experiments across Knowledge Base Question Answering and Multi-hop QA show that FH planning with lazy replanning achieves accuracy parity with SH across varying depths, breadths, and robustness levels, while using 2-3x fewer tokens. These findings suggest that for well-defined data-centric tasks, eager step-wise monitoring is often unnecessary, and full-horizon planning with on-demand replanning can offer a more efficient default.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM代理在数据密集型任务中的规划策略，发现全流程规划（FH）在准确率上与逐步执行（SH）相当，但token消耗减少2-3倍，表明在明确定义的数据任务中，逐步监控并非必要，全流程规划+按需重规划是更高效的默认方案。
AI.motivation: 重新审视"逐步执行（单步规划）是数据密集型任务中LLM代理的必要默认方案"这一常见假设，探究全流程规划能否在保持准确率的同时提升效率。
AI.method: 进行受控实证研究，将规划视野（全流程FH vs. 单步SH）作为关键架构特征进行隔离，并在知识库问答和多跳问答任务中系统分析拓扑复杂度和工具鲁棒性的影响。
AI.result: 全流程规划（带惰性重规划）在不同深度、广度和鲁棒性水平下均与逐步执行保持准确率一致，同时token使用量减少2-3倍。
AI.conclusion: 对于明确定义的数据密集型任务，急切的逐步监控往往是不必要的，全流程规划+按需重规划可作为更高效的默认选择。

title: Sparsity Hurts: Simple Linear Adapter Can Boost Generalized Category Discovery
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) seeks to identify novel categories from unlabeled data while retaining the classification ability of seen categories. Prior GCD methods commonly leverage transferable representations from pre-trained models, adapting to downstream datasets via partial fine-tuning (updating only the final ViT block) and visual prompt tuning (appending learnable vectors to inputs). However, conventional partial fine-tuning offers limited flexibility, as it fails to adapt the entire model; meanwhile, visual prompt tuning is prone to overfitting, due to its sensitivity to initialization and inherently constrained capacity. To address these limitations, we propose LAGCD, a simple yet effective GCD approach that embeds a residual linear adapter into each ViT block. From the perspective of feature sparsity, we systematically show that non-linearity in conventional adapters impairs performance, whereas our linear adapter enhances it by enabling more flexible model capacity. We further introduce an auxiliary distribution alignment loss to mitigate the negative impact of biased predictions between seen and novel categories. Extensive experiments on both generic and fine-grained datasets confirm that LAGCD consistently improves performance over many sophisticated baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/yebo0216best/LAGCD

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAGCD方法，通过在每个ViT块中嵌入残差线性适配器替代传统的部分微调和视觉提示调优，并引入辅助分布对齐损失，有效提升了广义类别发现任务中已知和未知类别的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GCD方法中，部分微调灵活性不足（无法适应整个模型），视觉提示调优易过拟合（对初始化和容量敏感），需要一种更有效的模型适配方式。
AI.method: 在ViT每个块中嵌入残差线性适配器（而非非线性适配器），从特征稀疏性角度论证线性适配器的优势；同时引入辅助分布对齐损失，缓解已知与未知类别之间预测偏差的负面影响。
AI.result: 在通用和细粒度数据集上，LAGCD一致性地优于多种复杂基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 线性适配器相比非线性适配器更适合GCD任务，结合分布对齐损失可有效提升模型对各类别的判别能力。

title: LLM-guided Semi-Supervised Approaches for Social Media Crisis Data Classification
summary: Semi-supervised learning approaches have been investigated as a means to enhance the analysis of social media data in disaster management contexts. In this work, we present the first empirical evaluation of large language model (LLM) guided semi-supervised learning for crisis related tweet classification. We compare two recent LLM assisted semi-supervised methods, VerifyMatch and LLM guided Co-Training ( LG-CoTrain), against established semi-supervised baselines. Our results show that LG-CoTrain significantly outperforms classical semi-supervised approaches in low resource settings with 5, 10 and 25 labeled examples per class, achieving the highest averaged Macro F1 across events. VerifyMatch achieves competitive performance while also demonstrating strong calibration properties. As the number of labeled examples increases, the performance gap narrows and Self Training emerges as a strong baseline. We further observe that compact semi-supervised models can, in some cases, outperform very large LLMs operating in zero-shot settings. This finding highlights the potential of transferring knowledge from LLMs into smaller and more deployable models through LLM guided semi-supervised learning, offering a practical pathway for real world disaster response applications. Our project repository on Github is here.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对LLM引导的半监督学习方法在灾难管理中的推文分类任务进行实证评估，发现LG-CoTrain在低资源条件下显著优于传统方法，且紧凑的半监督模型在某些场景下能超越大型零样本LLM。
AI.motivation: 探索半监督学习在灾难管理社交媒体数据分析中的应用，特别是利用LLM引导的方法在低资源（少量标注数据）场景下提升分类性能。
AI.method: 对比两种LLM辅助的半监督方法（VerifyMatch和LG-CoTrain）与经典半监督基线，在5、10、25个每类标注样本的低资源设置下进行推文分类实证评估。
AI.result: LG-CoTrain在低资源设置下显著优于经典半监督方法，取得最高平均Macro F1；VerifyMatch表现具竞争力且校准性良好；随标注样本增加，性能差距缩小，Self Training成为强基线；紧凑半监督模型有时可超越大型零样本LLM。
AI.conclusion: LLM引导的半监督学习能够将知识从大模型迁移到更小、更易部署的模型中，为实际灾难响应应用提供了一条可行路径。

title: Is DRL-based MAC Ready for Underwater Acoustic Networks? Exploring Its Practicality in Real Field Experiments
summary: Medium Access Control (MAC) protocols rely on neighbor and environment information to design collision-free access rules for Underwater Acoustic Networks (UANs). Acquiring this information suffers from high communication overhead due to the unique underwater acoustic channel characteristics, such as long propagation delay, spatiotemporal variations in communication quality, and high attenuation. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is promising to circumvent the UANs' physical constraints and provide a low-overhead solution for underwater MAC protocols, since it can decide access rules based on real-time observation without extra information exchange. However, the unique underwater acoustic channel characteristics impose significant challenges on observation acquisition, training time, and the balance of multiple reward factors for DRL-based MAC protocols. Most existing methods remain at the theoretical level: (1) they design partial intelligent agents failing to achieve fully autonomous access; (2) they assume unreasonable simulation scenarios, weakening the effects of underwater acoustic channel characteristics on MAC protocols. To enhance the practicality of DRL-based MAC protocols, we first analyze the application challenges of DRL in UANs through real field experiments. Based on the above challenges, we propose a DRL-based MAC protocol that considers observation loss and balances multiple reward factors to achieve efficient Entire Autonomous access in the UAN (EA-MAC). To further explore the feasibility of DRL-based MAC protocols, we implement EA-MAC and other state-of-the-art protocols on underwater acoustic modems and evaluate their performance in real field experiments. Experimental results demonstrate that EA-MAC can adaptively determine the scheduling sequence for each node, enabling high-throughput and fair communication in a straightforward manner for UANs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对水声网络（UAN）中MAC协议因水声信道特性（长传播时延、时空变化、高衰减）导致信息获取开销大的问题，提出一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的EA-MAC协议。该协议通过处理观测缺失和多奖励因子平衡，实现全自主接入。真实海域实验表明，EA-MAC能自适应调度各节点，实现高吞吐量和公平通信。
AI.motivation: 水声网络MAC协议依赖邻居和环境信息设计无冲突接入规则，但获取这些信息因水声信道特性（长传播时延、时空变化、高衰减）导致通信开销巨大。现有DRL-based MAC方法存在两个问题：(1) 智能体设计不完整，无法实现全自主接入；(2) 仿真场景不合理，弱化了水声信道特性对MAC协议的影响。因此，亟需提高DRL-based MAC协议的实际可用性。
AI.method: 首先通过真实海域实验分析DRL在水声网络中的应用挑战。基于这些挑战，提出EA-MAC协议：考虑观测缺失问题，并平衡多个奖励因子，实现全自主接入。在真实水声调制解调器上实现EA-MAC及其他SOTA协议，并通过真实海域实验评估性能。
AI.result: 真实海域实验结果表明，EA-MAC能够自适应地为每个节点确定调度序列，以简单直接的方式实现高吞吐量和公平通信。
AI.conclusion: EA-MAC通过DRL有效解决了水声信道特性带来的挑战，实现了全自主、低开销的接入控制，提升了DRL-based MAC协议的实际可行性。

title: Prediction Model of Motivators and Demotivators of Integrating Large Language Models in Software Engineering Education: An Empirical Study
summary:
Context: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly influencing software engineering practice and education. While prior studies examine their technical performance and classroom use, limited research provides cost-aware and empirically grounded models for systematic institutional integration.
  Objective: This study develops and validates a prediction model to identify cost-efficient strategies for integrating LLMs into software engineering education using motivating and demotivating factors.
  Method: Based on our previously developed literature survey taxonomies [1], we operationalized 19 validated factors (9 motivators and 10 demotivators) into a structured survey completed by 126 stakeholders from multiple countries. Likert-scale responses were encoded and used to train probabilistic models (Naive Bayes and Logistic Regression) to estimate the likelihood of high LLM familiarity. The probability estimates were integrated into a Genetic Algorithm (GA)-based optimization framework to model trade-offs between predicted familiarity and implementation cost at global and category levels.
  Results: Respondents perceived strong benefits in Programming Assistance and Debugging Support and Personalized and Adaptive Learning. Major concerns included Plagiarism and Intellectual Property Concerns, Over-Reliance on AI in Learning, and Reduced Critical Thinking and Problem Solving. Optimization results indicate that governance-related mechanisms, particularly integrity and ethical safeguards, should be prioritized under cost constraints.
  Conclusions: The study introduces an optimization-informed decision support framework linking stakeholder perceptions with probabilistic modeling and cost-effort analysis. The model supports staged and cost-aware LLM integration grounded in governance stability and pedagogically meaningful development.

AI.tldr: 本研究基于126位利益相关者的问卷调查数据，利用朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归和遗传算法构建了成本感知的LLM融入软件工程教育的预测与优化模型，发现治理机制（特别是学术诚信与伦理保障）应作为成本约束下的优先投资方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注LLM的技术性能与课堂使用情况，缺乏成本感知的、基于经验数据的系统性机构整合模型，无法为教育机构提供经济高效的决策支持。
AI.method: 将前期文献综述中提取的19个验证因子（9个激励因素、10个抑制因素）操作化为结构化问卷，收集126位跨国际利益相关者的李克特量表响应；采用朴素贝叶斯与逻辑回归进行概率建模，预测高LLM熟悉度的可能性；将概率估计集成到基于遗传算法的优化框架中，在全局和类别层面模拟预测熟悉度与实施成本之间的权衡。
AI.result: 受访者感知最强的益处为编程辅助与调试支持、个性化与自适应学习；主要顾虑包括剽窃与知识产权问题、对AI学习的过度依赖、批判性思维与问题解决能力的下降；优化结果显示在成本约束下应优先考虑治理相关机制，特别是诚信与伦理保障措施。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出了一个优化驱动的决策支持框架，将利益相关者感知与概率建模及成本效益分析相结合，支持在治理稳定性和教学意义发展的基础上进行分阶段、成本感知的LLM整合。

title: NARRA-Gym for Evaluating Interactive Narrative Agents
summary: Interactive narrative tasks require LLMs to sustain a coherent, evolving story while adapting to a user over multiple turns. However, suitable benchmarks for this setting are limited: existing evaluations often focus on static prompts, isolated story generations, or post-hoc ratings, and therefore miss whether models can jointly manage story generation, long-context state and pacing, character simulation, empathic personalization, and story-grounded artifacts. We introduce NARRA-Gym, an executable evaluation environment that turns a sparse emotional seed into a complete interactive story episode and logs the full model-in-the-loop trajectory, including story construction, memory updates, planning, pacing interventions, and optional artifact synthesis. We evaluate nine frontier LLMs using a controlled LLM-as-judge sweep over eight benchmark personas and a human evaluation in which participants rate customized model outputs. Our results show substantial variation across models, personas, and evaluation dimensions: models that produce fluent stories can still fail on robustness, user experience, or resistance-sensitive personalization. These findings suggest that interactive narrative offers a useful benchmark for evaluating long-horizon, user-adaptive LLM behavior beyond isolated story quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NARRA-Gym，一个可执行的交互式叙事评估环境，用于测试LLM在多轮互动中维持连贯故事、管理长上下文、模拟角色、共情个性化及生成故事工件的综合能力。对9个前沿模型进行评估，发现不同模型在流畅性、鲁棒性、用户体验和个性化等方面存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 现有评测多聚焦于静态提示或孤立的故事生成，缺乏对交互式叙事中多维度能力（长上下文管理、角色模拟、共情个性化等）的联合评估。
AI.method: 提出NARRA-Gym可执行评估环境，将稀疏情感种子转化为完整交互故事片段，记录模型轨迹（故事构建、记忆更新、规划、节奏干预、工件合成）。使用LLM-as-judge对8个基准角色进行评估，并结合人工评估。
AI.result: 9个前沿模型在流畅性、鲁棒性、用户体验和个性化等维度上表现差异显著；流畅的故事生成能力并不保证其他维度的良好表现。
AI.conclusion: 交互式叙事可作为评估LLM长周期、用户自适应行为的有效基准，超越了孤立的故事质量评估。

title: Neuroscience-Inspired Analyses of Visual Interestingness in Multimodal Transformers
summary: Human attention is the gateway to conscious perception, memory and decision-making. However, its role in modern transformer models remains largely unexplored. As these systems increasingly influence what people see, prefer and buy, the question arises as to whether they encode principles of human interest or merely exploit large-scale correlations. Addressing this issue is crucial for understanding cognition and ensuring the responsible use of AI in communication and marketing. In order to address this issue, the concept of visual interest was examined within the multimodal vision-language-model Qwen3-VL-8B, using a pre-defined Common Interestingness (CI) score derived from large-scale human engagement data on the photo-sharing platform Flickr. Here, we analyzed internal representations across vision and language components using methods from the neurosciences. Our analyses revealed that CI information is linearly decodable from final-layer embeddings, indicating that it is aligned with human-derived measures of visual interestingness. Dimensionality reduction and Generalized Discrimination Value (GDV) analyses demonstrate that CI-related hidden representations emerge in intermediate vision transformer layers and becomes progressively more distinguishable across language model layers. Concept vectors derived using geometric, probe, and Sparse Auto-Encoder based methods converge in higher layers, as confirmed by representational similarity analysis. This indicates a robust and structured encoding of visual interestingness without explicit supervision. Future work will seek to identify shared computational principles linking human brain dynamics and transformer architectures, with the ultimate goal of uncovering the organizing mechanisms that give rise to attention and interest in both biological and artificial systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多模态视觉语言模型Qwen3-VL-8B中是否编码了人类视觉兴趣（Visual Interest），发现模型内部表示与基于人类参与数据计算的Common Interestingness (CI) score高度对齐，且这种编码在不同层中逐步结构化，表明模型无需显式监督即可学习到人类兴趣原则。
AI.motivation: 现代Transformer模型日益影响人类的注意力、偏好和消费决策，但其内部是否真正编码了人类兴趣原则，抑或仅利用大规模数据中的相关性，这一问题尚不清楚。理解这一机制对认知科学和AI在传播营销中的负责任使用至关重要。
AI.method: 使用预定义的Common Interestingness (CI) score（来自Flickr大规模人类参与数据），在Qwen3-VL-8B模型中分析视觉和语言组件的内部表示。采用神经科学方法：线性解码、降维分析、Generalized Discrimination Value (GDV) 分析、概念向量（几何、探针、稀疏自编码器）以及表征相似性分析（RSA）。
AI.result: CI信息可从最终层嵌入中线性解码，与人类兴趣度量对齐；CI相关隐藏表示在视觉Transformer中间层开始出现，并在语言模型层中逐步变得更可区分；不同方法提取的概念向量在高层收敛，表明兴趣编码是鲁棒且结构化的，无需显式监督。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型能够以与人类大脑相似的方式编码视觉兴趣，未来发展将探索生物与人工系统中注意力与兴趣产生的共同计算原理。

title: Behavioral Determinants of Deployed AI Agents in Social Networks: A Multi-Factor Study of Personality, Model, and Guardrail Specification
summary: Autonomous AI agents are increasingly deployed in open social environments, yet the relationship between their configuration specifications and their emergent social behavior remains poorly understood. We present a controlled, multi-factor empirical study in which thirteen OpenClaw agents are deployed on Moltbook -- a Reddit-like social network built for AI agents -- across three systematically varied independent variables: (1) personality specification via SOUL.md, (2) underlying LLM model backbone, and (3) operational rules and memory configuration via AGENTS.md. A default control agent provides a behavioral baseline. Over a one-week observation window spanning approximately 400 autonomous sessions per agent, we collect behavioral, linguistic, and social metrics to assess how configuration layers predict emergent social behavior. We find that personality specification is the dominant behavioral lever, producing a massive spread in response length across agents, while model backbone and operational rules drive more moderate but still meaningful effects on rhetorical style and topic engagement breadth. Our findings contribute empirical evidence to the emerging literature on deployed multi-agent social systems and offer practical guidance for designing agents intended for collaborative or monitoring tasks in real social environments.

AI.tldr: 通过多因素实验，研究AI代理的配置规格（人格描述、模型骨干、操作规则）如何影响其在模拟社交网络中的涌现社会行为，发现人格描述是主导因素。
AI.motivation: 自主AI代理越来越多地部署在开放社交环境中，但其配置规范与涌现社会行为之间的关系尚不明确，缺乏系统的实证研究。
AI.method: 在Mol tbook（一个类似Reddit的AI社交网络）上部署13个Open Claw代理，系统化操纵三个自变量：SOUL.md（人格规范）、LLM模型骨干、AGENTS.md（操作规则与记忆配置），以默认代理为基线，收集约400次会话/代理的行为、语言和社交指标。
AI.result: 人格规范是主导行为杠杆，导致代理间回复长度产生巨大差异；模型骨干和操作规则对修辞风格和话题参与广度有中等但显著的效应。
AI.conclusion: 为多代理社会系统的实证文献提供了贡献，并为在真实社交环境中设计用于协作或监控任务的代理提供了实践指导。

title: Statistical Analysis for Energy-Efficient Satellite Edge Computing with Latency Guarantees
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, submitted to IEEE GLOBECOM 2026
summary: Being able to provide latency guarantees for orbital edge computing applications through Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite constellations is a major milestone for their integration into 5G and 6G networks. However, achieving this is fundamentally challenged by the inherent randomness in both communication and computing latency, driven by complex network dynamics, satellite motion, and hardware variability. In this paper, we perform a statistical analysis of the latency of satellite edge computing using representative computing hardware and an object detection algorithm running on a satellite image dataset. The resulting model captures the trade-off between data availability and estimation uncertainty, enabling data-driven optimization methods to meet latency targets with statistical guarantees while minimizing energy consumption. Our results show that parametric estimation and quantile regression for the execution time of the image processing algorithms can be effectively combined with models for the communication latency to select an optimal GPU clock frequency. This achieves a 95% probability of meeting a $500$ ms end-to-end deadline while reducing energy consumption by more than 50% compared to a baseline that relies on a Chebyshev-Cantelli inequality to bound execution-time quantiles. The proposed framework is generalizable across satellite edge computing workloads and hardware platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文针对低轨卫星边缘计算中的延迟保证问题，通过统计建模通信和计算延迟的随机性，结合参数估计和分位数回归方法，优化GPU时钟频率，在95%概率满足500ms端到端截止时间的同时，相比传统方法降低50%以上的能耗。
AI.motivation: 为轨道边缘计算应用提供延迟保障是将其集成到5G/6G网络的关键挑战，但通信和计算延迟的固有随机性（网络动态、卫星运动、硬件变异）使得这一目标难以实现。
AI.method: 使用代表性计算硬件和目标检测算法在卫星图像数据集上进行延迟统计分析；结合参数估计和分位数回归对图像处理算法执行时间建模；与通信延迟模型联合优化GPU时钟频率。
AI.result: 提出的方法能以95%概率满足500ms端到端截止时间，同时相比基于Chebyshev-Cantelli不等式的基线方法降低50%以上的能耗。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有通用性，可推广到不同的卫星边缘计算工作负载和硬件平台，通过数据驱动优化在延迟保障和能耗之间取得平衡。

title: MACAA: Belief-Revision Multi-Agent Reasoning for Open-World Code Authorship Verification
summary: Code authorship attribution (CAA) supports software forensics, plagiarism detection, and intellectual property protection. However, existing supervised CAA approaches suffer from scarce training data and closed-world assumptions: they require sufficient labeled code from fixed candidate-author sets, making training difficult in low-data cases and predictions unreliable for open-world test pairs with unseen samples, or heterogeneous code pairs. Large language models remove task-specific training, but direct prompting depends on costly expert-designed prompts, can hallucinate over complex heterogeneous code pairs, and rarely yields auditable evidence traces. We propose MACAA, a belief-revision-based multi-agent framework for training-free code authorship verification. MACAA comprises a Coordinator and four Expert Agents analyzing layout, lexical, syntactic, and programming-pattern evidence. The Coordinator gathers expert signals for expansion, discounts unreliable evidence through contraction, and resolves conflicts through revision to preserve belief consistency, replacing direct LLM judgment with auditable hypothesis refinement. MACAA achieves 89.15\% F1 on same-language benchmarks and 80.00\% on mixed cross-language pairs, surpassing all baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出MACAA，一个基于信念修正的多智能体框架，无需训练即可进行代码作者归属验证，通过协调器与四个专家智能体分析不同维度的证据，在少样本和跨语言场景下超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的监督式代码作者归属方法面临训练数据稀缺和封闭世界假设的限制；直接使用大语言模型需要昂贵的专家提示设计且容易产生幻觉。因此需要一种无需训练、可审计且能处理开放世界场景的方法。
AI.method: 提出MACAA框架，包含一个协调器和四个专家智能体，分别分析布局、词汇、句法和编程模式证据。协调器通过扩展、收缩和修正三个信念修正步骤整合专家信号，替代LLM的直接判断，实现可审计的假设精炼。
AI.result: 在同语言基准上达到89.15% F1，在混合跨语言对上达到80.00% F1，超越所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体信念修正框架能有效解决代码作者归属中的少样本和开放世界问题，提供可审计的证据链，是训练免费且性能优异的方法。

title: A Single Layer to Explain Them All:Understanding Massive Activations in Large Language Models
summary: We investigate the origins of massive activations in large language models (LLMs) and identify a specific layer named the \textbf{Massive Emergence Layer (ME Layer)}, that is consistently observed across model families, where massive activations first emerge and subsequently propagate to deeper layers through residual connections. We show that, within the ME Layer both the RMSNorm and the FFN parameters jointly contribute to the emergence of massive activations. Once formed, the massive activation token representation remains largely invariant across layers, reducing the diversity of hidden representations passed to the attention module. Motivated by this limitation, we propose a simple and effective method to reduce the rigidity of the massive activation token. Our approach consistently improves LLM performance across multiple tasks, including instruction following and math reasoning, in both training free and fine tuning settings. Moreover, we show that our method mitigates attention sinks by selectively weakening their influence, elucidating their origin at the hidden state level and shedding new light on principled mitigation strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文探究了大型语言模型中大规模激活的起源，识别出"大规模出现层(ME Layer)"，并提出一种简单有效的方法来减少大规模激活令牌的刚性，从而提升模型性能并缓解注意力汇聚问题。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在揭示LLM中大规模激活现象的根本原因，理解其形成机制及对模型行为的影响，为改进模型性能提供理论依据。
AI.method: 识别出ME Layer（大规模出现层），分析RMSNorm和FFN参数对大规模激活的共同贡献；提出降低大规模激活令牌刚性的方法，在无训练和微调场景下均可应用。
AI.result: 所提方法在指令跟随和数学推理等多个任务上持续提升了LLM性能；同时有效缓解了注意力汇聚问题（attention sinks）。
AI.conclusion: 大规模激活在ME Layer中通过残差连接传播，降低了隐藏表示的多样性；通过削弱其刚性可改善模型表现，并为理解注意力汇聚的起源和缓解策略提供了新视角。

title: A Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection Framework via Synergistic Smoothing
summary: Reliable out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a critical requirement for the safe deployment of machine learning systems. Despite recent progress, state-of-the-art OOD detectors are highly susceptible to adversarial attacks, which undermines their trustworthiness in automated systems. To address this vulnerability, we apply median smoothing to baseline OOD detection scores, balancing clean and adversarial accuracies. Our key insight is that the noisy samples generated for median smoothing can be repurposed to quantify the local instability of the base score. We observe that OOD samples exhibit higher instability under perturbation. Based on this, we propose ROSS, a novel and robust post-hoc OOD detector that leverages the instability of baseline scores to further distinguish between in-distribution (ID) and OOD samples. ROSS achieves symmetric robustness, performing strongly against both score-minimising and score-maximising attacks, unlike prior work. This symmetric defence leads to state-of-the-art robustness, outperforming prior methods by up to 40 AUROC points. We demonstrate ROSS's effectiveness on extensive experiments across CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. Code is available at: https://github.com/Abdu-Hekal/ROSS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROSS，一种基于中值平滑和局部不稳定性度量的鲁棒后验OOD检测方法，在对抗攻击下实现对称鲁棒性，性能提升高达40个AUROC点。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测器容易受到对抗攻击，缺乏鲁棒性和可信度。作者希望在不牺牲干净样本性能的前提下，同时防御分数最小化和分数最大化两种类型的攻击。
AI.method: 1) 对基线OOD检测分数应用中值平滑以平衡干净/对抗精度；2) 利用中值平滑中生成的噪声样本来量化基线分数的局部不稳定性；3) 观察到OOD样本在扰动下具有更高的不稳定性；4) 结合不稳定性度量进一步提升ID和OOD的区分能力。
AI.result: ROSS实现了对称鲁棒性，在防御分数最小化和分数最大化攻击方面均表现优异，相比先前方法在AUROC上提升高达40个点。在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: ROSS是一种鲁棒的后验OOD检测器，通过利用中值平滑和局部不稳定性实现SOTA的对称鲁棒性，显著提升了OOD检测在对抗环境下的可信度。

title: Mid-Training with Self-Generated Data Improves Reinforcement Learning in Language Models
summary: The effectiveness of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Large Language Models (LLMs) depends on the nature and diversity of the data used before and during RL. In particular, reasoning problems can often be approached in multiple ways that rely on different forms of reasoning, and exposure to only a limited range of such approaches in the training data may limit the effectiveness of RL. Motivated by this, we investigate using diverse self-generated data during mid-training as an intermediate step before RL training. Specifically, we adopt a bootstrapped data-generation framework guided by George Polya's problem-solving approaches for generating multiple variants of correct answers for each question in the training data, and then perform fine-tuning. We first provide a theoretical perspective on how mid-training on such data improves RL and explain how policy-gradient updates can incentivize combining multiple approaches. We then empirically demonstrate that RL-trained models initialized with our mid-training data achieve consistent improvements across various mathematical reasoning benchmarks and other OOD tasks like code generation and narrative reasoning. Overall, our investigative study shows that a language model learning multiple problem-solving approaches, through self-generated data helps subsequent RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在RL训练前，利用自生成的多路径推理数据进行中训练（mid-training），基于Polya问题求解方法生成多种正确答案变体，从而提高后续RL训练的效果，实验表明该方法在数学推理、代码生成等任务上有一致提升。
AI.motivation: LLM在RL中的效果高度依赖于训练数据的多样性和性质。推理问题通常存在多种解法，而训练数据若只覆盖有限范围的推理方式，会限制RL的有效性。因此，作者希望探索在RL训练前，利用多样化的自生成数据进行中训练，以增强模型的多路径推理能力。
AI.method: 1. 采用基于Polya问题求解方法的引导式自生成数据框架，为每个训练问题生成多种正确的答案变体；2. 在RL训练前，先使用这些多样化的自生成数据进行中训练（mid-training）微调；3. 提供理论视角，解释中训练如何通过策略梯度更新激励模型组合多种推理路径。
AI.result: 经过中训练初始化的RL模型，在多个数学推理基准、代码生成以及叙事推理等OOD任务上均取得了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型通过自生成数据学习多种问题求解方法，能够有效促进后续的强化学习训练，提升模型的泛化能力和推理多样性。

title: Learning-Based Spectrum Cartography in Low Earth Orbit Satellite Networks: An Overview
summary: Low earth orbit (LEO) satellite networks are emerging as a key infrastructure for global connectivity and space-based sensing. Many tasks in such systems can be formulated as measurement-set-to-spatial-inference problems, where spatial variables are inferred from sparse and heterogeneous wireless observations. Spectrum cartography provides a unifying framework for this paradigm, encompassing representative tasks such as satellite-assisted localization and radio map reconstruction, as well as map-informed resource allocation. Yet the highly dynamic orbital geometry, complex propagation conditions, and reliability-varying nature of LEO measurements pose fundamental challenges for traditional model-driven and interpolation-based methods. This article surveys the literature from 1964 to 2026 on learning-based spectrum cartography as applied to LEO satellite networks, with a particular focus on attention mechanisms as a principled operator for adaptive and reliability-aware measurement fusion across localization, radio map reconstruction, and resource allocation tasks. We review modeling foundations and key challenges of representative tasks, and analyze how attention-based learning enables flexible fusion of heterogeneous measurements for both inference and map-informed decision-making. Representative formulations and simulation studies are provided to illustrate the framework and demonstrate its effectiveness, offering a unified perspective for measurement-driven inference and decision-making in LEO satellite networks.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于学习的频谱地图构建方法在低轨卫星网络中的应用，重点介绍了注意力机制如何实现自适应、可靠性感知的测量融合，以支持定位、无线电地图重建和资源分配等任务。
AI.motivation: 低轨卫星网络中的许多任务可转化为从稀疏异构无线观测中推理空间变量的"测量集到空间推断"问题。频谱地图构建为此提供了统一框架，但LEO的高度动态轨道几何、复杂传播条件和可靠性变化的测量特性，给传统模型驱动和插值方法带来了根本性挑战。
AI.method: 本文采用综述方法，系统回顾了1964年至2026年间基于学习的频谱地图构建文献，特别聚焦于注意力机制作为核心算子，实现自适应和可靠性感知的测量融合，应用于定位、无线电地图重建和资源分配三类代表性任务。
AI.result: 通过代表性公式和仿真研究，展示了基于注意力的学习框架能够灵活融合异构测量，有效支持推断和地图引导的决策制定，证明了该统一框架在LEO卫星网络中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制为LEO卫星网络中的测量驱动推断与决策提供了统一且有效的框架，能够应对传统方法无法解决的高度动态和异构测量挑战。

title: ConCovUp: Effective Agent-Based Test Driver Generation for Concurrency Testing
summary: Concurrency testing is essential to improve the reliability and security of multi-threaded programs. Dynamic analysis tools, such as TSan, depend on high-quality test drivers that reach critical shared-memory interactions at runtime. However, current testing practices predominantly focus on sequential logic, leaving a gap in automated concurrent test generation. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in generating sequential tests, but they struggle to produce effective concurrent tests without a deep understanding of concurrency semantics. This paper presents ConCovUp, a multi-agent framework that combines LLMs with program analysis. ConCovUp grounds test generation in static analysis to extract shared memory accesses and their calling contexts. To trigger hard-to-reach accesses, it introduces an LLM-driven backward tracing approach, leveraging the model's semantic reasoning to deduce concrete inputs that satisfy complex path constraints, and iteratively refines the generated tests via dynamic execution feedback. Our evaluation on nine real-world C/C++ libraries shows that ConCovUp improves average Shared Memory Access Pair Coverage (SMAP Coverage) from 36.6% to 68.1% over the general Claude Code agent baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出了ConCovUp，一个结合LLM与程序分析的多智能体框架，用于自动化并发测试生成。通过静态分析提取共享内存访问，利用LLM反向追踪推导触发条件，并基于动态反馈迭代优化。在9个真实C/C++库上，将共享内存访问对覆盖率从36.6%提升至68.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有的并发测试依赖高质量测试驱动，但当前测试实践主要关注顺序逻辑，缺乏自动化的并发测试生成方法。LLM在顺序测试生成上表现良好，但缺乏对并发语义的深入理解，难以生成有效的并发测试。
AI.method: 1) 基于静态分析提取共享内存访问及其调用上下文；2) 引入LLM驱动的反向追踪方法，利用模型的语义推理能力推导满足复杂路径约束的具体输入；3) 通过动态执行反馈迭代优化生成的测试。
AI.result: 在9个真实C/C++库上的评估中，ConCovUp将平均共享内存访问对覆盖率（SMAP Coverage）从36.6%提升至68.1%，显著超过Claude Code代理基线。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM的语义推理能力与程序静态分析及动态反馈相结合，能够有效生成高质量并发测试，大幅提升共享内存访问覆盖率，帮助发现更多并发缺陷。

title: A Single Neuron Is Sufficient to Bypass Safety Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: Safety alignment in language models operates through two mechanistically distinct systems: refusal neurons that gate whether harmful knowledge is expressed, and concept neurons that encode the harmful knowledge itself. By targeting a single neuron in each system, we demonstrate both directions of failure -- bypassing safety on explicit harmful requests via suppression, and inducing harmful content from innocent prompts via amplification -- across seven models spanning two families and 1.7B to 70B parameters, without any training or prompt engineering. Our findings suggest that safety alignment is not robustly distributed across model weights but is mediated by individual neurons that are each causally sufficient to gate refusal behavior -- suppressing any one of the identified refusal neurons bypasses safety alignment across diverse harmful requests.

AI.tldr: 本文发现语言模型的安全对齐依赖于两类功能不同的神经元：拒绝神经元（控制有害知识是否表达）和概念神经元（编码有害知识本身）。通过仅修改单个神经元，无需训练或提示工程，即可绕过安全对齐或从无害提示中诱导有害内容，实验覆盖7个模型（1.7B-70B参数）。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型安全对齐的机制基础，验证其鲁棒性是否真正分布在整个模型权重中，还是依赖于少数关键神经元。
AI.method: 识别并操控两类神经元：拒绝神经元（gate有害知识表达）和概念神经元（编码有害知识），通过抑制或放大单个神经元观察模型行为变化。
AI.result: 抑制任意一个拒绝神经元即可绕过安全对齐；放大概念神经元可从无害提示中诱导有害内容。该现象在7个不同规模（1.7B-70B）的模型中稳定复现。
AI.conclusion: 安全对齐并非鲁棒地分布在模型权重中，而是由少数因果充分的单个神经元介导，存在脆弱的安全隐患。

title: Normalization Equivariance for Arbitrary Backbones, with Application to Image Denoising
summary: Normalization Equivariance (NE), equivariance to global contrast and brightness transforms, improves robustness to distribution shift in image-to-image prediction. Existing methods enforce this prior by constraining internal layers to NE-compatible families, limiting compatibility with standard components such as attention and LayerNorm, and adding runtime cost. We characterize the full NE function class: a function is NE if and only if it admits a normalize-process-denormalize factorization. This turns exact NE enforcement, for the ideal wrapper, from an internal architectural constraint into an input-output parameterization problem, allowing a parameter-free wrapper (WNE) to enforce NE around any backbone, including transformers. In a single-noise mismatch diagnostic for blind denoising, the wrapper improves CNN and transformer robustness with no measurable GPU overhead; architectural NE baselines incur up to a 1.6x slowdown.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WNE包装器，通过归一化-处理-反归一化分解实现任意骨干网络的归一化等变（NE），无需修改内部架构或增加计算开销，在图像去噪等任务中提升鲁棒性且无GPU开销，而内部约束方法会带来1.6倍减速。
AI.motivation: 现有NE方法通过约束内部网络层实现等变性，限制了与注意力、LayerNorm等标准组件的兼容性，且增加运行时开销。作者希望找到一种与架构无关的通用NE实现方式。
AI.method: 理论上证明NE函数等价于"归一化-处理-反归一化"的分解形式，据此提出WNE（Wrapper Normalization Equivariance），作为参数自由的包装器，在输入输出层施加NE约束，无需修改骨干网络内部结构。
AI.result: 在盲去噪的单噪声失配诊断任务中，WNE提升了CNN和Transformer的鲁棒性，且没有可测量的GPU开销；而内部架构NE方法则导致高达1.6倍的减速。
AI.conclusion: NE可以通过输入输出包装器而非内部架构约束来实现，这大幅降低了部署复杂度，使NE可灵活应用于各类现代骨干网络（包括Transformer），兼具鲁棒性与计算效率。

title: AI-Care: A Conversational Agentic System for Task Coordination in Alzheimer's Disease Care
summary: Individuals with Alzheimer's disease (AD) and Alzheimer's disease-related dementia (ADRD) experience memory and thinking changes that impact their ability to use digital daily management tools. For example, adding an event to a digital calendar requires multiple steps that may act as barriers to independent use for individuals with AD/ADRD. This paper presents AI-Care, a conversational agentic artificial intelligence (AI) layer built on top of a remote caregiving platform co-designed with people with AD/ADRD. AI-Care is designed to reduce the cognitive load on individuals with AD/ADRD when managing everyday tasks such as setting calendar reminders and organizing to-do lists through natural-language interaction with a voice-first chatbot. The system uses a LangGraph-based stateful orchestration approach in which each request passes through sanitization, intent classification, context loading, safety checks, deterministic slot collection, tool execution, and response composition. Safety-critical responses, particularly around medications and allergies, are grounded in caregiver-verified records rather than free-form model generation. The system does not make autonomous medical or treatment decisions. Incomplete or ambiguous requests are handled through controlled multi-turn clarification rather than silent failure or guessing. The system supports both typed and spoken input, with voice output through ElevenLabs text-to-speech. Longer responses are chunked before synthesis to avoid rushed playback. A preliminary pilot with four individuals with mild-to-moderate AD/ADRD showed that users found the system trustworthy, competent, and likable, and were able to complete the evaluated coordination tasks through conversation. We describe the design goals, system architecture, safety controls, and findings from this formative evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI-Care，一个基于对话式智能体AI的语音聊天系统，为阿尔茨海默病患者提供日历提醒、待办事项等日常任务的自然语言交互管理，通过LangGraph编排架构确保安全可靠，初步实验表明用户认为该系统值得信赖且能用对话完成任务。
AI.motivation: AD/ADRD患者因记忆和思维障碍难以使用数字日程管理等工具（多步骤操作构成障碍），现有方案缺乏针对认知障碍人群的低认知负荷交互方式。
AI.method: 基于LangGraph的状态化编排架构，处理流程依次为：输入消毒→意图分类→上下文加载→安全检查→确定性槽位收集→工具执行→响应合成。安全关键响应（用药、过敏）基于照护者验证记录而非自由生成，不支持自主医疗决策。多轮澄清处理模糊请求，支持语音/文字输入，通过ElevenLabs TTS输出。
AI.result: 在4名轻中度AD/ADRD患者的初步试点中，用户认为系统可信、胜任且讨人喜欢，能够通过对话完成评估的协调任务。
AI.conclusion: AI-Care通过对话式AI降低AD/ADRD患者的认知负荷，以安全可控的架构实现了日常任务管理，初步验证了可行性，为认知障碍人群的数字工具设计提供了参考。

title: Demystifying Deep Reinforcement Learning: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Interpretable Open RAN Automation
summary: Open Radio Access Networks (O-RAN) are increasingly adopting data-driven control through Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) to optimize complex tasks such as network slicing and mobility management. However, the deployment of DRL in carrier-grade networks is hindered by its inherent opacity and stochastic execution, which limit operator trust, auditability, and safe deployment. Existing explainable AI (XAI) approaches primarily provide post-hoc insights and fail to produce executable, interpretable policies suitable for operational environments. In this paper, we present DeRAN, a neuro-symbolic framework that bridges the gap between DRL performance and operational transparency by distilling black-box DRL policies into human-readable symbolic representations. DeRAN introduces a concept-driven abstraction layer that transforms high-dimensional network telemetry into a compact set of semantically meaningful features, enabling interpretable policy learning. Building on the semantically grounded concepts, DeRAN synthesizes symbolic policies using deep symbolic regression (DSR) for continuous control and neurally guided differentiable logic (NUDGE) for discrete decision-making. We implement DeRAN on a live 5G O-RAN testbed and evaluate it on two representative use cases. Experimental results demonstrate that DeRAN achieves 78\% and 87\% of DRL's cumulative rewards in the two use cases, while offering interpretability and auditability by design. Source code is available at https://github.com/Jadejavu/A-Neuro-Symbolic-Framework-for-Interpretable-Open-RAN-Automation

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeRAN，一种神经符号框架，通过将DRL策略蒸馏为可读符号表示，在保持可解释性的同时实现O-RAN自动化。在5G测试平台上，DeRAN在两个用例中分别达到了DRL累积奖励的78%和87%。
AI.motivation: O-RAN中DRL部署存在不透明性和随机执行问题，现有XAI方法仅提供事后解释，无法生成可执行、可解释的策略，限制了运营商信任和安全性。
AI.method: 提出DeRAN框架：1）概念驱动抽象层将高维遥测数据转化为语义特征；2）对连续控制使用深度符号回归(DSR)，对离散决策使用神经引导可微逻辑(NUDGE)来合成符号策略。
AI.result: 在5G O-RAN测试平台上，DeRAN在两个用例中分别达到了DRL累积奖励的78%和87%，同时实现了固有的可解释性和可审计性。
AI.conclusion: DeRAN成功弥合了DRL高性能与操作透明度之间的鸿沟，为运营商提供了可信、可审计的O-RAN自动化方案。

title: Zoom, Don't Wander: Why Regional Search Outperforms Pareto Reasoning and Global Optimization in Budget-Constrained SBSE
summary: Traditional Search-Based Software Engineering (SBSE) assumes global search and full Pareto exploration are essential. We offer the following negative result based on a study of over 100 Software Engineering (SE) optimization tasks: "zooming" into promising regions is far more effective than Pareto and global exploration under constrained evaluation budgets. Our minimal greedy zoom method, EZR, runs three orders of magnitude faster than Pareto and global Bayesian methods, achieving higher statistical ranks and winning or tying in 84-89\% of datasets on equal budget. Even at one-fifth the evaluation budget, EZR wins or ties in 79-81\% of datasets. Surprisingly, despite never explicitly seeking a frontier, EZR matches or outperforms Pareto methods on their own coverage metrics (IGD, HV) at equal budgets. The explanation for this widespread failure is structural: across the datasets studied, Pareto-optimal solutions form a tiny, tight island concentrated in a compact region of decision space. Methods that wander waste their budgets outside this island. Beyond efficiency, zooming yields small, interpretable models, thus addressing concerns about black-box AI. By replacing global wandering with greedy zooming, we make SBSE much faster, more explicable, and hence accessible to a wider audience. SBSE practitioners and researchers should zoom, not wander.

AI.tldr: 本文发现传统SBSE中的全局搜索和全Pareto探索效率低下，提出了一种极简的贪心"缩放"方法EZR，在三阶速度提升的同时，在84-89%的数据集上胜出或持平，即使预算缩减至五分之一仍表现优异。原因在于Pareto最优解集中在决策空间的极小紧凑区域内，" Wander"式方法浪费了大量预算。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统SBSE中"全局搜索和全Pareto探索是必需的"这一基本假设，证明在有限评估预算下，"缩放到有希望的区域"远比全局探索有效。
AI.method: 提出极简贪心缩放方法EZR，通过聚焦于有希望的区域而非全局搜索来优化软件工程任务。
AI.result: EZR比Pareto和全局贝叶斯方法快三个数量级，在同等预算下84-89%的数据集胜出或持平；即使仅用五分之一预算，仍能在79-81%的数据集中胜出或持平；且在IGD、HV等覆盖率指标上匹配或超越Pareto方法。
AI.conclusion: SBSE研究者应放弃全局"漫游"，采用"缩放"策略，这不仅能大幅提升效率，还能得到更小、可解释的模型，使SBSE更快、更可解释、更易于广泛应用。

title: Coordinates of Capability: A Unified MTMM-Geometric Framework for LLM Evaluation
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures, Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) paper
summary: The evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) faces a critical challenge in construct validity, where fragmented benchmarks and ad hoc metrics frequently conflate method variance, such as prompt sensitivity, with true latent capabilities. Concurrently, emerging research suggests that LLM capabilities and outputs can be modeled as continuous geometric manifolds. In this Systematization of Knowledge (SoK), we bridge these paradigms by proposing a generalized Multi-Trait Multi-Method (MTMM) framework for LLM evaluation. We formalize and unify nine evaluation metrics, including Paraphrase Instability, Drift Score, Overton Width, and Pluralism Score, interpreting them not as isolated scalar values but as geometric measurements within a shared latent coordinate space. This spatial unification factorizes model behavior into three orthogonal latent dimensions: (1) Instability and Sensitivity, (2) Position and Alignment, and (3) Coverage and Expressiveness. By systematically separating task-irrelevant perturbations from true capability spans, the framework provides a theoretically grounded and domain-agnostic taxonomy for robust and empirically stable benchmark design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多特质多方法（MTMM）框架的大语言模型评估系统化知识体系，将九种评估指标统一为几何测量，分解为三个正交潜在维度：不稳定性与敏感性、位置与对齐、覆盖与表达性，从而解决评估中的构念效度问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评估面临构念效度危机——碎片化基准和临时性指标常将方法方差（如提示敏感性）与真实潜在能力混为一谈，缺乏理论统一的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出广义MTMM框架，形式化统一九种评估指标（如Paraphrase Instability、Drift Score、Overton Width、Pluralism Score等），将其解释为共享潜坐标空间中的几何测量，并分解为三个正交潜在维度。
AI.result: 成功将模型行为分解为三个正交维度：不稳定性与敏感性、位置与对齐、覆盖与表达性，实现了任务无关扰动与真实能力区间的系统分离。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为稳健且经验稳定的基准设计提供了理论支撑和领域无关的分类法，有望解决LLM评估的构念效度问题。

title: Survey on Disaster Management Datasets for Remote Sensing Based Emergency Applications
comment: This work has been accepted for publication at IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
summary: Recent natural disasters have highlighted the urgent need for efficient data-driven approaches to disaster management. Machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) techniques have shown considerable promise in enhancing the key phases of disaster management including mitigation, preparedness, detection, response, and recovery. A critical enabler of successful ML or DL based applications in remote sensing, however, is the accessibility and quality of annotated datasets. With the growing availability of high-resolution imagery from unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and satellites, computer vision and remote sensing algorithms have become essential tools for rapid detection, situational assessment, and decision-making in disaster scenarios. This survey provides a comprehensive overview of publicly available image-based datasets relevant to ML/DL-based disaster management pipelines. Emphasis is placed on datasets that support computer vision and remote sensing tasks across all phases of disaster events including pre-disaster, during, and post-disaster. The goal of this work is to serve as a centralized reference for researchers and practitioners seeking high-quality datasets for rapid development and deployment of remote sensing-driven disaster response solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了公开可用的基于图像的灾害管理数据集，为机器学习/深度学习驱动的遥感灾害响应提供集中参考。
AI.motivation: 近期自然灾害频发，亟需高效数据驱动方法；而高质量标注数据集是机器学习/深度学习在遥感灾害管理中成功应用的关键，但目前缺乏系统性综述。
AI.method: 对公开可用的基于图像的灾害管理数据集进行系统性综述，涵盖计算机视觉和遥感任务，覆盖灾前、灾中、灾后各阶段。
AI.result: 梳理了支持灾害管理全阶段的公开图像数据集，为研究人员和从业者提供了集中式参考资源。
AI.conclusion: 本文可作为灾害遥感响应解决方案中高质量数据集获取的集中参考文献，加速相关领域的快速研发与部署。

title: Latent Personality Alignment: Improving Harmlessness Without Mentioning Harms
comment: published at Trustworthy AI Workshop, ICLR 2026
summary: Current adversarial robustness methods for large language models require extensive datasets of harmful prompts (thousands to hundreds of thousands of examples), yet remain vulnerable to novel attack vectors and distributional shifts. We propose Latent Personality Alignment (LPA), a sample-efficient defense that achieves robustness by training models on abstract personality traits rather than specific harmful behaviors. Using fewer than 100 trait statements and latent adversarial training, LPA achieves comparable attack success rates to methods trained on 150k+ examples, while maintaining superior utility. Critically, LPA generalizes better to unseen attack distributions, reducing misclassification rates by 2.6x compared to baseline across six harm benchmarks -- without ever seeing harmful examples during training. Our results demonstrate that personality-based alignment offers a principled approach to building robust defenses with minimal cost.

AI.tldr: 提出潜在人格对齐（LPA）方法，仅用不到100个人格特质陈述和潜在对抗训练，就能达到与使用15万+有害示例训练相当的攻击成功率，并在未见攻击分布上实现2.6倍的误分类率降低。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型对抗鲁棒性方法需要大量有害提示样本（数千至数十万），且仍易受新型攻击和分布偏移影响，亟需更高效、更泛化的防御方法。
AI.method: LPA通过训练模型学习抽象人格特质而非具体有害行为，使用不到100条特质陈述结合潜在对抗训练实现对齐。
AI.result: 用不到100个示例达到与150k+示例训练相当的ASR，在6个有害基准上误分类率降低2.6倍，且无需接触有害训练样本。
AI.conclusion: 基于人格的对齐方法为构建低成本的鲁棒防御提供了原则性路径。

title: Democratizing Measurement of Critical Mobile Infrastructure: Security and Privacy in an Increasingly Centralized Communication Ecosystem
summary:
Cellular networks serve as the backbone of global communication, providing critical access to telephony and the Internet, often in regions lacking alternatives. However, the growing complexity of these networks, driven by architectural innovations (e.g., Voice over IP, eSIMs) and commercial dynamics (e.g., roaming, virtual operators, zero-rating), remains poorly understood due to the lack of open, scalable, and geographically diverse measurement tools and independent measurement studies.
  Moreover, access to mobile networks today is no longer limited to the traditional radio interface. Technologies like Voice-over-WiFi (VoWiFi) offer alternative connectivity paths via third-party Internet infrastructure, extending operator reach into environments with limited cellular coverage. At the same time, over-the-top (OTT) messaging services such as WhatsApp and Signal have become central to modern communication, accounting for a substantial share of global messaging and voice traffic while bypassing traditional operator-controlled channels entirely.
  This dissertation addresses these challenges by introducing new approaches for independent, scalable, and reproducible measurements of mobile communication systems without requiring cooperation from network or platform operators. We design, implement, and open-source measurement platforms that enable controlled experiments across cellular radio networks, operator-provided services, and OTT messaging applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出无需运营商合作的独立、可扩展、可复现的移动通信测量方法，涵盖蜂窝网络、VoWiFi和OTT消息服务。
AI.motivation: 蜂窝网络日益复杂（如VoIP、eSIM、漫游、零费率等），但缺乏开放、可扩展、地理多样化的测量工具和独立研究。
AI.method: 设计并开源测量平台，在蜂窝无线网络、运营商服务和OTT消息应用上进行受控实验。
AI.result: 实现了无需运营商或平台配合的、独立可扩展可复现的移动通信系统测量。
AI.conclusion: 填补了移动通信测量工具的空白，为理解现代蜂窝网络提供了开源可复现的测量框架。

title: Trajectory Supervision for Continual Tool-Use Learning in LLMs
summary: Most language-model training data shows final artifacts, not the process that produced them. We study a tractable version of this question in tool use: when a model learns a stream of new API domains, does keeping tool-use trajectories help compared with stripping the intermediate API trace? We fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B Instruct with QLoRA on API-Bank using four sequential domain blocks. Condition A strips previous API request/response lines from the prompt and trains the model to predict the next API call. Condition B keeps the trajectory context. In a single-seed pilot, full held-out generation evaluation shows that Condition B reaches 56.9\% final exact full-call accuracy compared with 39.2\% for Condition A. B also improves final API-name accuracy by 7.7 points. However, B uses 25.1\% more training tokens, the run uses one seed, and the task is next-call prediction rather than full dialogue success.

AI.tldr: 在工具使用场景下，保留完整的API调用轨迹（条件B）相比仅保留最终结果（条件A）能显著提升模型预测准确率（56.9% vs 39.2%），但代价是训练token增加25.1%。
AI.motivation: 探索语言模型训练中，保留中间过程（工具使用轨迹）是否比仅使用最终结果更有利于模型学习，特别是在连续学习新API域的场景中。
AI.method: 使用QLoRA微调Llama 3.1 8B Instruct模型，在API-Bank数据集上按四个连续领域块进行训练。条件A去除历史API请求/响应只预测下一个API调用；条件B保留完整轨迹上下文。
AI.result: 条件B的最终完整调用准确率56.9%，条件A仅39.2%；条件B的API名称准确率高出7.7个百分点，但训练token多消耗25.1%，且仅使用单一种子实验。
AI.conclusion: 保留工具使用轨迹（过程）比仅使用最终成品更有利于模型学习，但需权衡计算成本，且该结论仍需更多实验验证（单种子、下一调用预测任务而非完整对话评估）。

title: Source or It Didn't Happen: A Multi-Agent Framework for Citation Hallucination Detection
summary: Large language models are increasingly used in scientific writing, yet they can fabricate citation-shaped references that appear plausible but fail bibliographic verification. Existing detectors often reduce verification to binary found/not-found decisions and rely on brittle parsing or incomplete retrieval, offering little field-level signal to auditors. We reframe citation hallucination detection as taxonomy-aligned field-level adjudication and introduce a 12-code taxonomy spanning Real, Potential, and Hallucinated citations. Based on this taxonomy, we build CiteTracer, a cascading multi-agent detector that extracts structured citations from PDF and BibTeX, retrieves evidence through cache lookup, URL fetch, scholar connectors, and web search, applies deterministic field matching, and routes ambiguous cases to class-specialist judgers. We release a benchmark of 2,450 synthetic citations built from real seeds with controlled LLM mutations, paired with 957 real-world fabricated citations drawn from ICLR 2026 and an anonymous conference desk-rejected submissions. CiteTracer reaches 97.1% accuracy on the synthetic benchmark, with class-level F1 scores of 97.0, 95.8, and 98.5 for Real, Potential, and Hallucinated, respectively, and detects 97.1% of fabrications on the real-world set without abstaining. Code: https://github.com/aaFrostnova/CiteTracer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CiteTracer，一个基于12类编码体系的多智能体级联检测器，用于从PDF和BibTeX中提取结构化引用、多源检索验证并进行字段级匹配，在合成基准上达97.1%准确率，在真实伪造引用集上检测率97.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM生成文献中的引用幻觉检测方法过于简单（仅二元判定），依赖脆弱的解析和不完整的检索，缺乏面向审计人员的细粒度字段级信号。
AI.method: 提出12类编码体系（Real, Potential, Hallucinated三大类），构建CiteTracer级联多智能体检测器：从PDF和BibTeX提取结构化引用，通过缓存查找、URL获取、学术连接器和网络搜索检索证据，进行确定性字段匹配，并将模糊案例路由给类别专家判断器。
AI.result: 合成基准测试准确率97.1%，三大类F1值分别为97.0、95.8、98.5；在ICLR 2026及匿名会议拒稿的真实伪造引用集上检测率97.1%，且无弃权案例。
AI.conclusion: CiteTracer通过细粒度分类和级联多智能体架构，有效解决了LLM引用幻觉检测的精度和鲁棒性问题，提供了可审计的字段级信号。

title: A Breast Vision Pathology Foundation Model for Real-world Clinical Utility
summary: Pathology foundation models have shown strong retrospective performance, but whether such systems can support clinically relevant use remains unclear. This challenge is particularly important in breast cancer, where pathological assessment serves as the gold standard for diagnosis and guides treatment planning, surgical decision-making and risk stratification across pre-, intra- and post-operative stages. Here we present \textbf{BRAVE}, a breast-adaptive pathology foundation model developed and evaluated using a total resource of 101,638 breast whole-slide images from 32 sources across Asia, Europe and North America. We assessed BRAVE across 34 tasks in 82 cohorts spanning pre-operative biopsy, intra-operative frozen section and post-operative resection, using an evidence chain comprising retrospective benchmarking, clinically challenging scenarios, workflow-oriented clinical impact simulations, prospective observational validation with the thresholds locked in the retrospective cohorts and crossover pathologist-AI interaction studies. Across these settings, BRAVE supported practical roles in the clinical workflow, including safe exclusion of low-risk cases from routine review, AI-assisted second-review rescue of initially missed positives and prioritization of cases for further assessment. In prospective validation across three centres, BRAVE excluded 76.9% of negative biopsy cases (NPV 0.953) and 70.1% of negative frozen-section cases (NPV 0.973), and triaged 78.8% of post-operative subtyping cases as high-confidence clear-cut cases (NPV 1.000). In reader studies, AI assistance improved balanced accuracy from 88.5% to 95.1% (OR 3.14, P<0.001), with better efficiency, confidence and inter-rater agreement. BRAVE-derived scores also independently predicted disease-free survival (adjusted HR 4.79, P<0.001) and overall survival (adjusted HR 8.14, P<0.001).

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BRAVE，一个基于101,638张乳腺癌全切片图像开发的病理基础模型，在34项任务、82个队列中验证了其临床实用性，包括前瞻性验证和病理医师交互研究，结果显示了该模型在临床工作流中的多种实用角色。
AI.motivation: 病理基础模型在回顾性研究中表现优异，但其在真实临床场景中的实际应用价值尚不明确，尤其是在乳腺癌诊疗这一病理评估作为金标准的领域。作者旨在系统评估这类模型能否支持临床相关的工作流程。
AI.method: 收集来自亚洲、欧洲和北美32个来源的101,638张乳腺癌全切片图像，开发BRAVE模型。通过回顾性基准测试、临床挑战场景、工作流模拟、前瞻性观察验证（阈值锁定）以及病理医师-AI交叉交互研究，评估模型在术前活检、术中冰冻切片和术后切除标本中的34项任务表现。
AI.result: 前瞻性验证中，BRAVE排除了76.9%的阴性活检病例（NPV 0.953）和70.1%的阴性冰冻切片病例（NPV 0.973），并分诊了78.8%的术后分型为高置信度病例（NPV 1.000）。AI辅助将病理医师的平衡准确率从88.5%提升至95.1%（OR 3.14, P<0.001），同时提高了效率和一致性。BRAVE评分独立预测无病生存期（adjusted HR 4.79）和总生存期（adjusted HR 8.14）。
AI.conclusion: BRAVE在多种临床场景中展示了支持实际工作流的潜力，包括低风险病例的安全排除、AI辅助二次审查挽救漏诊病例以及病例优先级排序。

title: OracleTSC: Oracle-Informed Reward Hurdle and Uncertainty Regularization for Traffic Signal Control
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
summary: Transparent decision-making is essential for traffic signal control (TSC) systems to earn public trust. However, traditional reinforcement learning-based TSC methods function as black boxes with limited interpretability. Although large language models (LLMs) can provide natural language reasoning, reinforcement finetuning for TSC remains unstable because feedback is sparse and delayed, while most actions produce only marginal changes in congestion metrics. We introduce OracleTSC, which stabilizes LLM-based TSC through two mechanisms: (1) a reward hurdle mechanism that filters weak learning signals by subtracting a calibrated threshold from environmental rewards, and (2) uncertainty regularization that maximizes the probability of the selected response to encourage consistent decisions across sampled outputs. Experiments on the LibSignal benchmark show that OracleTSC enables a compact LLaMA3-8B model to substantially improve traffic efficiency, achieving a 75% reduction in travel time and a 67% decrease in queue length compared with the pretrained baseline while preserving interpretability through natural language explanations. OracleTSC also demonstrates strong cross-intersection generalization: a policy trained on one intersection transfers to a structurally different intersection with 17% lower travel time and 39% lower queue length without additional finetuning. These results suggest that uncertainty-aware reward shaping can improve the stability and effectiveness of reinforcement fine-tuning for TSC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OracleTSC，通过奖励门槛机制和不确定性正则化两种策略，稳定地微调LLM进行交通信号控制，在LibSignal基准上实现75%旅行时间减少和67%队列长度缩短，并保持良好的跨路口泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习TSC方法作为黑箱缺乏可解释性，而直接用LLM做强化微调面临奖励稀疏、延迟以及多数动作对拥堵指标影响微小的不稳定性问题，因此需要一种能稳定微调LLM进行可解释TSC的方法。
AI.method: OracleTSC包含两个机制：(1) 奖励门槛机制——通过减去校准阈值过滤微弱学习信号；(2) 不确定性正则化——最大化所选响应的概率以鼓励跨采样输出的一致性决策。
AI.result: 在LibSignal基准上，LLaMA3-8B模型旅行时间减少75%，队列长度减少67%；跨路口泛化下旅行时间降低17%，队列长度降低39%，且无需额外微调。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知的奖励塑造能够提升LLM强化微调用于TSC的稳定性和有效性，在保持可解释性的同时大幅提升交通效率。

title: Large Spectrum Models (LSMs): Decoder-Only Transformer-Powered Spectrum Activity Forecasting via Tokenized RF Data
summary: Dynamic spectrum access (DSA) has become a key pillar of next-generation wireless systems to address the spectrum scarcity due to the rapid growth of connected devices. Accurate short-term spectrum forecasting is critical for DSA, where data-driven approaches have proven most effective. Recent advances in and widespread adoption of large language model (LLM) architectures present new opportunities for spectrum prediction. In this paper, foundational large spectrum models (LSMs) are presented. A novel RF tokenizer is introduced to convert raw IQ measurements into token sequences by mapping each power-spectral density value to a fixed vocabulary along with embedding gain, frequency, FFT bin, and timestamp information. Five established open-source LLM architectures (Gemma-2B, GPT-2, LLaMA-7B, Mistral-7B, and Phi-1) are trained on this tokenized spectrum data for the task of spectrum forecasting, yielding LSMs. To leverage the scaling gains of LSMs, a fully automated outdoor wireless testbed is employed to collect over 22 TB of raw spectrum data across 33 sub-GHz frequency bands, yielding 8.4B tokens in total. Across all 33 bands, the best model (LSM-Mistral) achieves a root-mean-square error of 3.25 dB and 97% of predictions have a mean absolute error below 5 dB. Generalization of LSMs is illustrated by fine-tuning the models on data collected in different locations, where RMSE is maintained below 3.7 dB. These results demonstrate that widespread decoder-only transformer architectures can serve as effective predictive models for large-scale RF spectrum forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出大型频谱模型(LSM)，通过将IQ数据转换为token序列，利用五种开源LLM架构进行频谱预测，在33个频段上采集22TB数据训练，最佳模型LSM-Mistral达到3.25dB的RMSE，97%预测误差低于5dB。
AI.motivation: 动态频谱访问(DSA)是下一代无线系统的关键，但频谱资源因设备快速增长而日益稀缺。准确的短期频谱预测对DSA至关重要，而LLM架构的最新进展为频谱预测提供了新的可能性。
AI.method: 提出RF tokenizer将原始IQ测量值转换为token序列（映射功率谱密度值到固定词汇表，并嵌入增益、频率、FFT bins和时间戳信息），在五种开源LLM架构（Gemma-2B、GPT-2、LLaMA-7B、Mistral-7B、Phi-1）上训练得到LSM，使用自动化室外测试平台采集22TB/33个频段/84亿token的数据。
AI.result: 最佳模型LSM-Mistral在所有33个频段上达到3.25dB的RMSE，97%预测MAE低于5dB。在不同地点微调后RMSE仍保持在3.7dB以下。
AI.conclusion: 仅含解码器的Transformer架构可以作为大规模RF频谱预测的有效模型。

title: Evaluating Tool Cloning in Agentic-AI Ecosystems
summary: Agent tools are becoming a core interface through which LLM agents access external data, services, and execution environments. As these tools are distributed through public marketplaces, raw tool counts may substantially overstate ecosystem diversity if many repositories are cloned, lightly modified, or derived from shared templates. Such hidden duplication can contaminate benchmark splits, propagate vulnerable implementations, bias measurements of tool-use generalization, and raise provenance, attribution, and intellectual-property concerns. We present, to our knowledge, the first large-scale measurement study of tool cloning in agentic AI ecosystems. We curate a unified dataset from multiple public platforms, covering 7,508 Model Context Protocol (MCP) repositories with 87,564 extracted tools and 1,353 Skills repositories with 12,447 tools, for a total of 8,861 repositories and 100,011 tool entries. To measure implementation-level duplication, we build a repository-level auditing pipeline using complementary lexical and fuzzy-structural similarity metrics, and compute pairwise similarity across MCP-to-MCP, Skills-to-Skills, and MCP-to-Skills repository pairs. We further manually verify 100 sampled pairs per MCP and Skills ecosystem across similarity-score buckets to calibrate how often high similarity reflects true code cloning. Our analysis shows that cloning is not an isolated artifact: high-similarity regions appear across comparison settings, and 60\% of high-Jaccard candidates and 85\% of high-ssdeep candidates in the MCP ecosystem are manually verified as clones. These results indicate that tool cloning is a pervasive and severe source of hidden duplication in agent-tool ecosystems. They further suggest that agent-tool datasets and benchmarks should account for repository provenance and implementation similarity when measuring tool diversity or constructing evaluation splits.

AI.tldr: 本文首次大规模测量了AI Agent工具生态中的克隆现象，发现MCP和Skills仓库中存在大量隐藏重复，60%-85%的高相似度候选对经人工验证确为克隆，提示现有基准和数据集需重视工具溯源与实现相似度。
AI.motivation: 公共市场中Agent工具数量看似庞大，但大量仓库存在克隆、轻微修改或模板派生，导致原始工具数量显著高估生态多样性。这种隐藏重复会污染基准划分、传播漏洞、偏差泛化评估，并引发溯源与知识产权问题。
AI.method: 从多个公共平台收集8,861个仓库（含100,011个工具条目），构建代码级审计流水线，采用词汇相似度（Jaccard）与模糊结构相似度（ssdeep）进行两两比较，并在MCP和Skills生态中按相似度分层各人工验证100对样本以校准。
AI.result: 高相似度区域在所有对比设置中普遍存在：MCP生态中60%的高Jaccard候选和85%的高ssdeep候选经人工验证确为克隆，表明克隆是普遍且严重的隐藏重复来源。
AI.conclusion: Agent工具数据集和基准在衡量工具多样性或构建评估划分时，应考虑仓库溯源和实现相似度。

title: 100,000+ Movie Reviews from Kazakhstan: Russian, Kazakh, and Code-Switched Texts
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure, 8 tables, to appear in Proceedings of the 6th International Conference on Natural Language Processing for the Digital Humanities (NLP4DH 2026)
summary: We present a new publicly available corpus of 100,502 movie reviews from Kazakhstan collected from kino.kz, spanning 2001-2025 and covering 4,943 unique titles. The dataset is multilingual, consisting mainly of Russian reviews alongside Kazakh and code-switched texts. Reviews are manually annotated for language and sentiment polarity, and 11,309 reviews additionally contain explicit user-provided ratings. We define two sentiment tasks -- three-way polarity classification and five-class score classification -- and benchmark classical BoW/TF-IDF baselines against multilingual transformer models (mBERT, XLM-RoBERTa, RemBERT). Experimental results show that transformer models consistently outperform classical baselines on polarity classification, while score classification remains challenging under leakage-controlled evaluation due to severe class imbalance and subtle distinctions between adjacent rating levels.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了一个包含10万+条哈萨克斯坦影评的多语种数据集，并对比了传统方法和多语言Transformer模型在情感分类任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有情感分析数据集多集中于英语等主流语言，哈萨克斯坦地区的多语种影评数据资源匮乏，亟需构建相关语料库以支持低资源语言的情感分析研究。
AI.method: 从kino.kz收集2001-2025年间的10万+条影评，人工标注语言类型和情感极性（其中1.1万条含用户评分）。采用BoW/TF-IDF作为经典基线，对比mBERT、XLM-RoBERTa、RemBERT等多语言Transformer模型，在三分极性分类和五类评分分类两个任务上进行评测。
AI.result: Transformer模型在三分类极性任务上显著优于经典基线方法；五类评分分类任务因严重的类别不平衡和相邻评分间的细微差异，在泄漏控制评估下仍具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 多语言Transformer模型在情感极性分类上表现优异，但细粒度评分分类仍是开放问题，凸显了类别不平衡和评分边界模糊等实际难点。

title: Harmonized Feature Conditioning and Frequency-Prompt Personalization for Multi-Rater Medical Segmentation
summary: Multi-rater medical image segmentation captures the inherent ambiguity of clinical interpretation, where diagnostic boundaries vary across experts and imaging devices. Existing approaches often reduce this diversity to consensus labels or treat rater differences as noise, resulting in overconfident and poorly calibrated models. We propose a harmonized probabilistic framework that disentangles acquisition artifacts from genuine annotator variability through adaptive feature conditioning and frequency-domain personalization. A lightweight Harmonizer Network implicitly models scanner-specific artifacts and performs dynamic feature modulation to standardize latent representations, ensuring that uncertainty reflects anatomy rather than noise. To represent rater-specific styles, we introduce a novel High-Frequency Prompt Modules that operate in the spectral domain to encode annotator-dependent boundary precision and textural sensitivity. These prompts adaptively modulate harmonized features to produce personalized yet anatomically consistent segmentations. Furthermore, a Generalized Energy Distance based regularization aligns the generative distribution with empirical annotation variability, promoting diversity where experts disagree and consensus where they converge. Experiments on LIDC-IDRI and NPC-170 show SOTA aggregated and individualized segmentation, with notable GED reductions and improved Dice scores, especially on noisy cases. Beyond accuracy, the model exhibits clinically meaningful uncertainty. Confidence rises in agreement regions and declines in ambiguous areas, supporting its use as a reliable and interpretable tool for multi-expert clinical workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协调概率框架，通过自适应特征调节和频域个性化技术，将多标注者医学图像分割中的采集伪影与真实标注差异分离，实现既保持解剖一致性又具备个性化风格的分割结果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法常将多标注者间的差异视为噪声或简化为共识标签，导致模型过于自信且校准不良，无法真正捕捉临床解读中的固有模糊性。
AI.method: 1) Harmonizer Network隐式建模扫描仪伪影并进行动态特征调制以标准化潜在表示；2) 高频提示模块在频域编码标注者特有的边界精度和纹理敏感性；3) 基于广义能量距离的正则化使生成分布与经验标注变异性对齐。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI和NPC-170数据集上达到最先进的聚合与个性化分割性能，GED显著降低，Dice分数提升（尤其在噪声案例上），且模型置信度在一致区域升高、模糊区域降低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅提升了分割精度，还能输出临床有意义的 uncertainty，可作为多专家临床工作流中可靠、可解释的工具。

title: Results and Retrospective Analysis of the CODS 2025 AssetOpsBench Challenge
