In this paper, we stress-test the multi-turn understanding of LLMs and study the following two sub-tasks: (1) detecting whether the user pivots or refines in the current turn, and (2) shortlisting relevant context from previous turns. To this end, we construct synthetic benchmarks based on real-world datasets from varied domains, as to simulate context shifts of different levels of difficulty. We then evaluate the zero-shot performance of ten LLMs (open-weight, closed-source and reasoning), and demonstrate that only some reasoning and strongly instructed LLMs are accurate in detecting pivots; open-weight LLMs struggle with the task and frequently carry stale context even with explicit cues; and all models suffer from a position bias. Based on the results, we discuss key takeaways for improving long-term robustness in multi-turn capabilities for LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多轮对话中LLM对用户话题转变（pivot）与细化（refine）的检测能力，以及从历史轮次中筛选相关上下文的能力。通过构建基于真实数据集的合成基准，评估了10个LLM的零样本表现，发现仅有推理型和强指令型模型能准确检测话题转变，开源模型表现较差且易携带过时上下文，所有模型存在位置偏差。
AI.motivation: LLM在多轮对话中经常无法识别用户的话题转变，错误地延续无关的历史上下文，导致回答不准确。现有研究缺乏对这一能力的系统性压力测试与评估。
AI.method: 构建基于真实多领域数据集的合成基准，模拟不同难度级别的上下文转变；定义两个子任务：检测当前轮次是pivot还是refine，以及从历史轮次中筛选相关上下文；在零样本设置下评估10个LLM（包括开源、闭源和推理型模型）。
AI.result: 只有推理型和经过强指令微调的LLM能够准确检测话题转变；开源模型在此任务上表现困难，即使有明确提示也常常携带过时的上下文；所有模型都存在位置偏差。
AI.conclusion: 指出了提升LLM多轮对话长期鲁棒性的关键方向，包括改进位置偏差、增强开源模型的上下文筛选能力等。

title: IPAD-CLIP: Teaching CLIP to Detect Image Local Perceptual Artifacts
summary: Current image quality assessment methods are heavily biased towards global distortions (e.g., noise, blur), neglecting local perceptual artifacts such as ghosting, lens flare, and moire effects. Although significant progress has been made in artifact removal, the fundamental problem of automatic artifact detection remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we formalize the Image Perceptual Artifact Detection (IPAD) task to address this gap. We contribute a benchmark dataset comprising 3,520 artifact images, including 520 real-captured and 3,000 synthetic samples, each paired with pixel-level masks across three representative artifact categories. The core challenge of IPAD lies in the localized, subtle, and semantically weak nature of these artifacts, which makes them prone to missed detection. To overcome this, we introduce IPAD-CLIP, a novel framework built upon CLIP that enhances artifact discrimination in both textual and visual spaces while preserving generalization capabilities. Our key insight is that local artifacts often exhibit strong correlations with specific semantic contexts. Accordingly, we learn artifact-aware text embeddings to explicitly model the object-artifact relationships, resulting in enhanced representations that clear differentiate between clean and artifact prompts. These text embeddings are then used as anchors to shift the visual encoder's attention from high-level semantics to subtle, low-level artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IPAD-CLIP offers a resource-efficient adaptation of CLIP for detection, significantly outperforming advanced image anomaly detection and manipulation detection methods on our benchmark. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study addressing multi-class local perceptual artifact detection in terms of both dataset and model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出图像感知伪影检测（IPAD）任务，针对局部、细微的感知伪影（如鬼影、镜头光晕、摩尔纹）进行检测。贡献了一个包含3,520张图像的基准数据集，并提出了IPAD-CLIP框架，通过学习伪影感知的文本嵌入，增强CLIP在文本和视觉空间中对伪影的区分能力，实验表明该方法显著优于现有异常检测和操作检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法过度偏向全局失真（如噪声、模糊），忽略了局部感知伪影（如鬼影、镜头光晕、摩尔纹）。尽管伪影去除方面已有进展，但自动伪影检测这一基础问题仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 形式化定义了IPAD任务；2) 构建了包含3,520张图像的基准数据集（520张真实拍摄+3,000张合成样本，含像素级掩码）；3) 提出IPAD-CLIP框架，利用CLIP模型，学习伪影感知的文本嵌入来建模目标-伪影关系，以区分干净与含伪影的提示，并将这些文本嵌入作为锚点，引导视觉编码器的注意力从高层语义转向低层细微伪影。
AI.result: IPAD-CLIP在资源高效的前提下实现了对CLIP的适应，在基准数据集上显著优于先进的图像异常检测和操作检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次从数据集和模型两个层面系统性地研究了多类局部感知伪影检测问题，填补了该领域的空白。

title: Re$^2$Math: Benchmarking Theorem Retrieval in Research-Level Mathematics
summary: Large language models are increasingly capable at closed-world mathematical reasoning, but research assistance also requires source-grounded use of the literature. When a proof reaches a non-trivial step, a useful assistant should determine whether the needed tool (e.g., a lemma) already exists, identify a suitable scholarly source, and verify that its assumptions align with the current proof context. To rigorously evaluate such capabilities, we introduce Re$^2$Math, a benchmark for tool-grounded retrieval from partial mathematical proofs. Each instance is built from a candidate instrumental citation in the proof of a main theorem, with hierarchical context and an optional leakage-controlled anchor hint. We also make the task source-grounded yet citation-agnostic in that any admissible theorem sufficient for the proof transition is accepted. Evaluation uses a release-frozen retrieval artifact, ensuring reproducibility, while the benchmark itself supports automatic, continual expansion with newly constructed instances. On the current benchmark test set, the best fixed-judge ToolAcc reaches 7.0%, despite substantially higher rates of source grounding, indicating that current systems often retrieve valid statements but fail to establish their applicability to the local proof step. By decoupling citation recall, grounding, and proof-gap sufficiency, Re$^2$Math transforms literature-grounded mathematical tool use into a controlled diagnostic task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Re²Math基准，用于评估大语言模型在数学证明中检索和验证适用引理的能力。实验表明当前最佳系统在工具适用性上的准确率仅7.0%，尽管检索和引用能力较高，但无法判断引理是否适用于具体证明步骤。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在封闭世界数学推理方面能力提升，但在研究辅助场景中需要基于文献来源的工具使用（如判断引理是否存在、选择学术来源、验证假设是否与证明上下文一致）。目前缺乏严格评估此类能力的基准。
AI.method: 提出Re²Math基准，每个实例基于主定理证明中的候选工具引用构建，包含层次化上下文和可选的泄密控制锚点提示。任务设计为源引用但不知名引用（任何可证明该步骤的定理均可接受）。采用发布冻结的检索构件保证可复现性，支持自动持续扩展。
AI.result: 当前最佳固定评判工具准确率(ToolAcc)仅7.0%，尽管源引用率显著更高。表明现有系统常能检索有效语句，但无法建立其与局部证明步骤的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解引用召回、源引用和证明间隙充分性三个维度，Re²Math将文献基础数学工具使用转化为可控诊断任务，揭示当前模型在工具适用性判断上的根本性短板。

title: DeltaRubric: Generative Multimodal Reward Modeling via Joint Planning and Verification
summary: Aligning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) requires reliable reward models, yet existing single-step evaluators can suffer from lazy judging, exploiting language priors over fine-grained visual verification. While rubric-based evaluation mitigates these biases in text-only settings, extending it to multimodal tasks is bottlenecked by the complexity of visual reasoning. The critical differences between responses often depend on instance-specific visual details. Robust evaluation requires dynamically synthesizing rubrics that isolate spatial and factual discrepancies. To address this, we introduce $\textbf{DeltaRubric}$, an approach that reformulates multimodal preference evaluation as a plan-and-execute process within a single MLLM. DeltaRubric operates in two steps: acting first as a $\textit{Disagreement Planner}$, the model generates a neutral, instance-specific verification checklist. Transitioning into a $\textit{Checklist Verifier}$, it executes these self-generated checks against the image and question to produce the final grounded judgment. We formulate DeltaRubric as a multi-role reinforcement learning problem, jointly optimizing planning and verification capabilities. Validated on Qwen3-VL 4B and 8B Instruct models, DeltaRubric achieves solid empirical gains. For instance, On VL-RewardBench, it improves base model overall accuracy by $\textbf{+22.6}$ (4B) and $\textbf{+18.8}$ (8B) points, largely outperforming standard no-rubric baselines. The results demonstrate that decomposing evaluation into structured, verifiable steps leads to more reliable and generalizable multimodal reward modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeltaRubric，通过将多模态偏好评估分解为"分歧规划"和"清单验证"两步，并在单一MLLM内联合优化，从而获得更可靠的奖励模型。在Qwen3-VL上，该方法在VL-RewardBench上相比基线提升+22.6（4B）和+18.8（8B）个点。
AI.motivation: 现有单步奖励模型存在"懒惰评判"问题，即利用语言先验而忽略细粒度视觉验证。虽然基于rubric的评估在纯文本场景有效，但将其扩展到多模态任务受限于视觉推理的复杂性——关键差异往往依赖于实例特定的视觉细节。
AI.method: DeltaRubric将多模态偏好评估建模为"计划-执行"过程：1) 分歧规划器（Disagreement Planner）生成中性、实例特定的验证清单；2) 清单验证器（Checklist Verifier）对照图像和问题执行自生成的检查，得出最终判断。该方法通过多角色强化学习联合优化规划和验证能力。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL 4B和8B Instruct模型上验证，DeltaRubric在VL-RewardBench上分别取得+22.6和+18.8个点的准确率提升，大幅优于无rubric的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 将评估分解为结构化的可验证步骤能够带来更可靠、更具泛化性的多模态奖励建模。

title: EditSleuth: A Dataset of Grounded Reasoning Chains for Image-Edit Forensics
summary: Forensic analysis of AI-edited images requires more than binary real-versus-fake prediction: a useful system should localize the edit, identify its semantic type, and ground its decisions in visual evidence. Existing image-forensics datasets typically emphasize detection or localization, while reasoning-supervised vision-language datasets rarely target image manipulation and often rely on LLM-generated rationales whose faithfulness is difficult to verify. We introduce EditSleuth, a dataset of 257,725 image-edit triplets constructed from existing image-editing corpora for grounded image-edit forensic reasoning. Each example includes an edited image, its source image, a binary edit mask, a 12-class edit taxonomy label, a difficulty score, and a six-step reasoning chain. EditSleuth chains are generated deterministically from triplet-grounded upstream artifacts, with each statement tied to a specific computable source of evidence. Our analysis reveals that a naive four-component difficulty formulation suffers from a rank-2 correlation collapse among magnitude features; a simplified three-component formulation substantially increases score dispersion on both Pico-Banana and MagicBrush. Difficulty also varies meaningfully within most edit categories, indicating that the score is not a proxy for edit type. As an initial learning study, we fine-tune Qwen2-VL-2B with LoRA and find that chain-as-target supervision matches a label-only baseline on classification accuracy among parseable answers, while additionally yielding grounded explanatory prose that label-only supervision cannot produce. We release the dataset, the deterministic construction pipeline, and pilot training scripts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EditSleuth数据集（257,725个图像编辑三元组），用于AI编辑图像的取证推理。该数据集包含确定性生成的六步推理链，并改进了难度评分体系。初步实验表明，链式监督能在保持分类准确率的同时产生可解释的推理文本。
AI.motivation: 现有图像取证数据集仅关注检测或定位，缺乏可解释的推理能力；而视觉语言数据集的推理标注多依赖LLM生成，可信度难以验证。因此需要构建一个具有确定性、可验证推理链的图像编辑取证数据集。
AI.method: 1）从现有图像编辑语料库构建257,725个三元组（编辑图+源图+掩码）；2）设计12类编辑分类体系；3）提出确定性六步推理链生成方法（每步绑定可计算证据源）；4）改进难度评分，从四分量简化为三分量解决秩相关崩溃问题；5）使用Qwen2-VL-2B+LoRA进行微调实验。
AI.result: 1）原始四分量难度公式存在秩-2相关崩溃问题，三分量公式显著提升分数分散度；2）难度分数在各编辑类别内存在有意义的差异，非编辑类型的简单代理；3）链式监督在分类准确率上与纯标签基线持平，同时能生成纯标签监督无法产生的可解释推理文本。
AI.conclusion: EditSleuth为图像编辑取证提供了首个兼具大规模、确定性推理链和难度标注的数据集。链式监督训练范式在保持性能的同时赋予模型可解释性，为可信AI取证奠定基础。数据集和构建工具已开源。

title: CATO: Charted Attention for Neural PDE Operators
summary: Neural operators have emerged as powerful data-driven solvers for PDEs, offering substantial acceleration over classical numerical methods. However, existing transformer-based operators still face critical challenges when modeling PDEs on complex geometries: directly processing over massive mesh points is computationally expensive, while operating in raw discretization coordinates may obscure the intrinsic geometry where physical interactions are more naturally expressed. To address these limitations, we introduce the Charted Axial Transformer Operator (CATO), a geometry-adaptive and derivative-aware neural operator for PDEs on general geometries. Instead of applying attention directly in the physical coordinate system, CATO learns a continuous latent chart that maps mesh coordinates into a learned chart space, where chart-conditioned axial attention efficiently captures long-range dependencies with reduced computational cost. In addition, CATO introduces a derivative-aware physics loss for steady-state PDEs that jointly supervises solution values, mesh-consistent gradients, and an auxiliary flux-like field, improving physical fidelity and reducing oversmoothing. We further provide a theoretical approximation result showing that, under a favorable chart, charted axial attention can represent low-rank axial solution operators with controlled error, and that small chart perturbations induce bounded approximation degradation. CATO achieves the best performance across all evaluated datasets, yielding an average improvement of approximately 26.76\% over the strongest competing baselines while reducing the number of parameters by 81.98\%. These results highlight the effectiveness of learning geometry-adaptive charts and derivative-aware physical supervision for accurate and efficient PDE operator learning.

AI.tldr: CATO提出了一种几何自适应且导数感知的神经算子，通过学习连续潜图表(chart)将网格坐标映射到图表空间，结合图表条件轴向注意力(chart-conditioned axial attention)高效捕获长程依赖，并引入导数感知物理损失函数，在复杂几何上的PDE求解中取得了显著优于现有方法的性能（平均提升26.76%，参数量减少81.98%）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的神经算子在处理复杂几何上的PDE时面临两大挑战：直接在大量网格点上操作计算成本高昂，且在原始离散坐标空间中建模可能掩盖物理交互更自然表达的内在几何结构。
AI.method: (1) 学习一个连续的潜图表(chart)将网格坐标映射到学习的图表空间；(2) 在图表空间中应用图表条件轴向注意力(chart-conditioned axial attention)以降低计算成本；(3) 引入导数感知物理损失函数，联合监督解值、网格一致梯度和辅助通量场。
AI.result: 在所有评估数据集上达到最佳性能，比最强基线平均提升约26.76%，同时参数量减少81.98%。
AI.conclusion: 学习几何自适应图表和导数感知物理监督对于准确高效的PDE算子学习是有效的。

title: BetaEdit: Null-Space Constrained Sequential Model Editing
summary: Null-space-based methods have garnered considerable attention in model editing by constraining updates to the null space of the pre-existing knowledge representation, thereby preserving the model's original behavior. However, in practice these methods rely on an approximate null space--leading to knowledge leakage--and further suffer from severe performance degradation during sequential editing. Recent work shows that history-aware editing strategies can empirically mitigate this decline, yet the underlying reason remains unclear. In this paper, we first expose the knowledge leakage inherent in existing null-space approaches and then analyze why history-aware updates effectively preserve both editing performance and general capabilities during long-horizon editing. Building on these insights, we propose BetaEdit, a refined framework that effectively controls the knowledge leakage and integrates history-aware updates into the null-space paradigm. Extensive experiments on three large language models across two standard benchmarks show that BetaEdit consistently outperforms prior methods in the challenging regime of massive-scale sequential editing. Code is available at: https://github.com/lbq8942/BetaEdit.

AI.tldr: 本文揭露了基于零空间模型编辑方法中的知识泄露问题，分析了历史感知策略如何缓解性能退化，并提出BetaEdit框架，在大规模顺序编辑中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有零空间编辑方法存在知识泄露问题，且在顺序编辑中性能严重下降；历史感知策略虽能缓解但原因不明，缺乏理论分析。
AI.method: 首先理论分析零空间方法的固有知识泄露，剖析历史感知更新为何有效；在此基础上提出BetaEdit框架，控制知识泄露并将历史感知整合到零空间范式中。
AI.result: 在三种大模型和两个标准基准上，BetaEdit在大规模顺序编辑场景中持续优于此前所有方法。
AI.conclusion: BetaEdit通过控制知识泄露并融合历史感知更新，有效提升了顺序编辑的鲁棒性，代码已开源。

title: Supersampling Stable Diffusion and More: An Approach for Interpolating Neural Networks Using Common Interpolation Methods
summary: Stable Diffusion (SD) has evolved DDPM (Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model) based image generation significantly by denoising in latent space instead of feature space. This popularized DDPM-based image generation as the cost and compute barrier was significantly lowered. However, these models could only generate fixed-resolution images according to their training configuration. When we attempt to generate higher resolutions, the resulting images show object duplication artifacts consistently. To solve this problem without finetuning SD models, recent works have tried dilating the convolution kernels of the models and have achieved a great level of success. But dilated kernels are harder to fine-tune due to being zero-gapped. Apart from this, other methods, such as patched diffusion, could not solve the object-duplication problem efficiently. Hence, to overcome the limitations of dilated convolutions, we propose kernel interpolation of SD models for higher-resolution image generation. In this work, we show mathematically that interpolation can correctly scale convolution kernels if multiplied by a constant coefficient and achieve competitive empirical results in generating beyond-training-resolution images with Stable Diffusion using zero training. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method enables interpolation of deep neural networks to adapt to higher-dimensional training data, with a worst-case performance drop of $2.6\%$ in accuracy and F1-Score relative to the baseline. This shows the applicability of our method to be general, where we interpolate fully-connected layers, going beyond convolution layers. We also discuss how we can reduce the memory footprints of training neural networks, using our method up to at least $4\times$.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过核插值（Kernel Interpolation）的方法，在无需微调的情况下，让 Stable Diffusion 模型生成超训练分辨率的高质量图像，解决物体重复伪影问题，并且该方法可推广到全连接层，支持至少4倍的内存压缩。
AI.motivation: Stable Diffusion 模型只能在固定分辨率下生成图像，当生成更高分辨率时会出现物体重复伪影。现有方法如空洞卷积存在零间隔导致难以微调的问题，而 patched diffusion 等方法效果不佳，因此需要一种无需微调且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出核插值（Kernel Interpolation）方法，通过乘以常数系数对卷积核进行插值缩放，从而正确扩展模型以适应更高分辨率输入。该方法无需训练，可应用于卷积层和全连接层。
AI.result: 在超分辨率图像生成任务上取得了有竞争力的实证结果；在扩展到高维训练数据时，准确率和 F1 分数相比基线的最差性能下降仅为 2.6%；可将神经网络训练的内存占用减少至少 4 倍。
AI.conclusion: 核插值是一种通用且高效的方法，能够在不重新训练模型的情况下解决高分辨率生成中的物体重复问题，并展示出在深度神经网络中扩展到更高维度数据的潜力，同时显著降低内存开销。

title: SearchSkill: Teaching LLMs to Use Search Tools with Evolving Skill Banks
summary: Teaching language models to use search tools is not only a question of whether they search, but also of whether they issue good queries. This is especially important in open-domain question answering, where broad or copied queries often waste retrieval budget and derail later reasoning. We propose \Ours, a framework that makes query planning explicit through reusable search skills. At each step, the model first selects a skill, then generates a search or answer action conditioned on the selected skill card. The skill inventory itself is not fixed: SearchSkill maintains an evolving SkillBank, expands or refines it from recurrent failure patterns, and reconstructs affected trajectories before supervised training. The resulting two-stage SFT recipe aligns training with the inference-time protocol of skill selection followed by skill-grounded execution. Across open-source and closed-source models, SearchSkill improves exact match on knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks and yields better retrieval behavior, including fewer copied first queries, more atomic hop-focused queries, and more correct answers within a small search budget. These results suggest that explicit skill-conditioned query planning is a lightweight alternative to treating search as an undifferentiated action.

AI.tldr: 提出SearchSkill框架，通过显式的可复用搜索技能（SkillBank）让模型先选择技能再生成查询，从而优化搜索查询质量，提升开放域问答性能。
AI.motivation: 语言模型使用搜索工具时，查询质量低下（如查询过于宽泛或直接复制问题）会浪费检索预算并干扰后续推理，尤其是在开放域问答中。
AI.method: 提出SearchSkill框架，包含可演化的SkillBank；模型每一步先选择技能，再基于技能卡片生成搜索或回答动作；技能库从失败模式中扩展或精炼，并重构受影响轨迹后进行两阶段SFT训练。
AI.result: 在多个开源和闭源模型上，SearchSkill在知识密集型QA基准上提升了精确匹配，减少了复制式首次查询，生成了更多原子化跳转查询，并在小搜索预算下获得更多正确答案。
AI.conclusion: 显式的基于技能的查询规划是一种轻量级替代方案，优于将搜索视为无差别动作的处理方式。

title: LEAF-SQL: Level-wise Exploration with Adaptive Fine-graining for Text-to-SQL Skeleton Prediction
summary: Text-to-SQL translates natural language questions into executable SQL queries, enabling intuitive database access for non-experts. While large language models achieve strong performance on Text-to-SQL with prompting, they still struggle with complex queries that involve deeply nested logic or multiple clauses. A widely used approach employs SQL skeletons--intermediate representations of query logic--to streamline generation, but existing methods are limited by their reliance on a single structural hypothesis and lack of progressive reasoning. To overcome these limitations, we propose LEAF-SQL, a novel framework that reframes skeleton prediction as a coarse-to-fine tree search process. LEAF-SQL enables systematic exploration of diverse structural hypotheses with adaptive refinement. Several key techniques are employed in LEAF-SQL: (1) a three-level skeleton hierarchy to guide the search, (2) a Skeleton Formulation Agent to generate diverse candidates, and (3) a Skeleton Evaluation Agent to efficiently prune the search space. This integrated design yields skeleton candidates that are both structurally diverse and granularity-adaptive, providing a stronger foundation for the SQL generation. Extensive experiments show that LEAF-SQL consistently improves the performance of various LLM backbones. On the official hidden test set of the challenging BIRD benchmark, our method achieves 71.6 execution accuracy, which outperforms leading search-based and skeleton-based methods, affirming its effectiveness for complex queries.

AI.tldr: LEAF-SQL 提出将SQL骨架预测重构为从粗到细的树搜索过程，通过三层骨架层次结构、骨架生成与评估智能体，在BIRD基准上达到71.6%执行准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL方法在处理复杂嵌套查询时表现不佳，基于骨架的方法受限于单一结构假设且缺乏渐进推理能力。
AI.method: 将骨架预测建模为粗到细的树搜索过程，包含：(1) 三层骨架层次结构指导搜索；(2) 骨架生成智能体生成多样化候选；(3) 骨架评估智能体高效剪枝搜索空间。
AI.result: 在BIRD基准隐藏测试集上达到71.6%执行准确率，优于领先的搜索方法和骨架方法，且能一致提升多种LLM骨干的性能。
AI.conclusion: LEAF-SQL通过树搜索与多智能体协作生成结构多样且粒度自适应的骨架，为复杂SQL生成提供了更优基础。

title: Gate-and-Merge: Zero-shot Compositional Personalization of Vision Language Models
summary: This paper tackles compositional personalization of vision-language models (VLMs). In this problem, multiple user-defined concepts must be recognized or described jointly at test time. We introduce Gate-and-Merge, a zero-shot framework that enables compositional personalization without the need for co-occurrence training. During personalization, each concept is learned independently as a lightweight LoRA adapter, paired with a concept token. The base model remains unchanged and concepts are kept disentangled. At inference, we enable composition by merging concept-specific LoRA updates directly in weight space. To suppress irrelevant activations and prevent interference, a gating mechanism is employed to estimate textual and visual cues and select only the modules that contribute to the prediction. We further stabilize composition by combining only the most meaningful and mutually consistent updates, helping preserve each concept's identity. Our quantitative and qualitative analyses show consistent gains in performance across multiple personalization tasks in both single-concept and compositional settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Gate-and-Merge框架，通过独立学习每个概念的LoRA适配器，在推理时利用门控机制合并权重空间中的更新，实现零样本的组合个性化，无需共现训练。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在处理多个用户定义概念的组合识别或描述时表现不佳，通常需要共现训练数据，缺乏零样本组合个性化能力。
AI.method: 1) 每个概念独立学习为轻量级LoRA适配器并配对一个概念token；2) 基模型保持不变，概念之间保持解耦；3) 推理时在权重空间合并概念特定的LoRA更新；4) 采用门控机制估计文本和视觉线索，选择对预测有贡献的模块；5) 仅组合最有意义且相互一致的更新，以保持各概念的身份。
AI.result: 在多个个性化任务（单概念和组合设置）中，定量和定性分析均显示一致性的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Gate-and-Merge作为一种零样本框架，有效解决了VLM的组合个性化问题，无需共现训练即可实现多概念的联合识别或描述。

title: UxSID: Semantic-Aware User Interests Modeling for Ultra-Long Sequence
summary: Modeling ultra-long user sequences involves a difficult trade-off between efficiency and effectiveness. While current paradigms rely on either item-specific search or item-agnostic compression, we propose UxSID, a framework exploring a third path: semantic-group shared interest memory. By utilizing Semantic IDs (SIDs) and a dual-level attention strategy, UxSID captures target-aware preferences without the heavy cost of item-specific models. This end-to-end architecture balances computational parsimony with semantic awareness, achieving state-of-the-art performance and a 0.337% revenue lift in large-scale advertising A/B test.

AI.tldr: UxSID是一个通过语义组共享兴趣记忆来建模超长用户序列的框架，利用语义ID和双级注意力机制，在保持计算效率的同时实现了出色的效果，在大规模广告A/B测试中带来了0.337%的收入提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模超长用户序列时存在效率与效果的权衡难题：基于item的精确搜索成本过高，而item无关的压缩方法又丢失语义信息。作者希望探索第三条路径，在计算效率和语义感知之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出UxSID框架，核心创新包括：(1) 使用语义ID（Semantic IDs）构建分组共享的兴趣记忆；(2) 采用双级注意力策略（dual-level attention）捕获目标感知的偏好信息；(3) 端到端架构实现计算简洁性与语义感知的统一。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上达到最先进水平，并在大规模广告A/B测试中实现0.337%的收入提升。
AI.conclusion: 语义分组共享兴趣记忆是平衡超长用户序列建模中效率与效果的有效方案，UxSID验证了第三条路径的可行性。

title: Mem-W: Latent Memory-Native GUI Agents
summary: GUI agents are beginning to operate the web, mobile, and desktop as interactive worlds, where successful control depends on carrying forward visual, procedural, and task-level evidence beyond the fleeting present screen. Yet most agents still treat memory as an external, human-readable artifact: histories are summarized, categorized, retrieved, and reinserted as text or structured records before being encoded again by the policy. This creates a mismatch between the representational form in which experience is stored and the latent embedding sequence over which modern GUI policies actually act. We introduce Mem-W, a series of latent-memory-native GUI agents that treat memory as part of the agent's continuous context rather than as an auxiliary symbolic scaffold. Mem-W weaves both historical trajectories (as experiential memory) and in-session segments (as working memory) into compact memory tokens through a shared trajectory-to-latent compressor. These tokens are woven with the current GUI observation and local context into one continuous embedding sequence, allowing the agent to read successes, failures, and unfinished progress through the same machine-native interface. Mem-W is trained with self-distillation and outcome-aware supervision to preserve decision-relevant state while filtering memory toward evidence that truly supports task success. Across four web and mobile navigation benchmarks, Mem-W consistently improves diverse backbones and memory-enhanced baselines, with gains of up to $+30.0$, suggesting that latent-context-native memory can serve as a scalable foundation for long-horizon GUI agency.

AI.tldr: Mem-W是一种将记忆作为连续潜在上下文嵌入的GUI代理方法，通过轨迹压缩器和自蒸馏训练，在多个导航基准上提升性能高达30%。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理将记忆作为外部人工可读的文本或结构化记录存储，与策略实际作用的潜在嵌入序列存在表征形式上的不匹配，限制了长期任务性能。
AI.method: 提出Mem-W系列潜在记忆原生GUI代理，通过共享的轨迹到潜在压缩器将历史轨迹（经验记忆）和会话内片段（工作记忆）压缩为紧凑的记忆令牌，使其与当前GUI观测拼接为连续的嵌入序列。采用自蒸馏和面向结果的监督进行训练。
AI.result: 在四个Web和移动导航基准上，Mem-W持续改进多种基础和基线方法，性能提升高达+30.0。
AI.conclusion: 潜在上下文原生记忆可作为长程GUI代理的可扩展基础。

title: UniShield: Unified Face Attack Detection via KG-Informed Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Unified face attack detection (UAD) requires recognizing physical spoofing and digital forgery within a shared decision space, yet existing discriminative or prompt-based methods largely rely on appearance correlations and provide limited evidence-grounded reasoning. We propose UniShield, a knowledge-grounded multimodal reasoning framework for unified face attack defense. UniShield constructs a Face Attack Knowledge Graph (FAKG) that links attack categories to diagnostic visual cues and attack-conditioned relations, and uses it to synthesize 52,025 FAKG-QA examples for Attack-Graph Instruction Tuning (AGIT). To improve rationale consistency, we further introduce Graph-Consistent Reasoning Optimization (GCRO), a GRPO-based objective with a KG-consistency reward that encourages generated rationales to match graph-supported cues while penalizing incompatible claims. Experiments on our multimodal UAD benchmark show that UniShield achieves strong performance across binary, coarse-grained, and fine-grained protocols, with consistently high ACC and low HTER. These results suggest that structured attack knowledge can improve both detection accuracy and reasoning reliability over discriminative baselines and general-purpose MLLMs. Our code will be released at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Unishield-A6A3/.

AI.tldr: UniShield 是一个知识增强的多模态推理框架，通过构建面攻击知识图谱（FAKG）和推理优化策略，在统一的面攻击检测任务中同时提升了检测准确率和推理可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有统一面攻击检测方法（判别式或提示式）主要依赖外观相关性，缺乏基于证据的推理能力，难以在共享决策空间中同时识别物理伪造和数字伪造。
AI.method: 1) 构建面攻击知识图谱（FAKG），将攻击类别与诊断性视觉线索及攻击条件关系相关联；2) 基于FAKG合成52,025个FAKG-QA样本进行攻击图指令微调（AGIT）；3) 提出图一致性推理优化（GCRO），使用GRPO目标函数与KG一致性奖励，鼓励生成推理与图谱支持的线索匹配，惩罚不一致的表述。
AI.result: 在多模态UAD基准测试中，UniShield在二元、粗粒度和细粒度协议上均表现优异，保持了高ACC和低HTER。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的攻击知识能够提高检测准确性和推理可靠性，优于判别式基线方法和通用多模态大语言模型。

title: Test-Time Speculation
summary:
Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by using a fast draft model to generate tokens and a more accurate target model to verify them. Its performance depends on the $\textit{acceptance length}$, or number of draft tokens accepted by the target. Our studies show that the acceptance length of even state-of-the-art speculators, like DFlash, EAGLE-3 and PARD degrade with generation length, reaching values close to 1 (i.e. no speedup) within just a few thousand output tokens, making speculators ineffective for long-response tasks. Acceptance lengths decline because most speculators are trained offline on short sequences, but are forced to match the target model on much longer outputs at inference, well beyond their training distribution.
  To address this issue, we propose $\textit{Test-Time Speculation (TTS)}$, an online distillation approach that continuously adapts the speculator at test-time. TTS leverages the key insight that the token verification step already invokes the target model for each draft token, providing the training signal needed to adapt the draft at no additional cost. Treating the draft as the student and the target as a teacher, TTS adjusts the draft over several speculation rounds, with each update improving the draft's accuracy as generation proceeds. Our results across multiple models from the Qwen-3, Qwen-3.5, and Llama3.1 families show that TTS improves acceptance lengths over state-of-the-art speculators by up to $72\%$ and $41\%$ on average, with the benefits scaling with increased generation lengths.

AI.tldr: 提出Test-Time Speculation (TTS)，一种在推理时持续在线蒸馏草稿模型的方法，解决投机解码中接受长度随生成序列变长而退化的问题，将平均接受长度提升最高72%。
AI.motivation: 现有投机解码器（如DFlash、EAGLE-3、PARD）的接受长度随生成长度增加而退化，在仅数千token后就接近1（无加速），原因是它们离线训练于短序列，但在推理时被迫处理远超训练分布的长序列。
AI.method: 提出Test-Time Speculation (TTS)，一种在线蒸馏方法：利用验证步骤中已调用的目标模型（教师）提供训练信号，在多次投机轮次中持续调整草稿模型（学生），无需额外计算成本。
AI.result: 在Qwen-3、Qwen-3.5和Llama3.1系列模型上，TTS将接受长度相比最先进的投机解码器提升最高72%，平均提升41%，且收益随生成长度增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: TTS通过测试时在线蒸馏有效解决了投机解码在长文本生成中的性能退化问题，使投机解码在长响应任务中保持有效，且无需额外计算开销。

title: From Articulated Kinematics to Routed Visual Control for Action-Conditioned Surgical Video Generation
summary: Action-conditioned surgical video generation is a critical yet highly challenging problem for robotic surgery. The core difficulty is that low-dimensional control vectors must precisely govern complex image-space evolution. In this work, we propose a kinematic-to-visual lifting paradigm that converts articulated kinematics into a unified set of five image-aligned control modalities. Building on this representation, we introduce a hierarchically routed visual control framework that selectively activates the most relevant control modalities and motion scales. Instead of uniformly applying all control signals, our model performs hierarchical routing to dynamically allocate conditioning capacity. We further design kinematic-prior-guided routing loss functions to ensure physically meaningful, temporally stable, and efficient expert utilization. To improve efficiency, we propose a budgeted training and inference scheme that leverages routing-induced sparsity. By selectively discarding low-significance control pathways during training and execution, our approach enables adaptive computation that is complementary to standard distillation. We additionally construct a new benchmark with curated articulated annotations, obtained through human-in-the-loop semantic labeling and differentiable pose tracking, providing realistic supervision for action-conditioned surgical video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently improves action faithfulness, visual fidelity, and cross-domain generalization over diverse baselines. Moreover, our efficient variant achieves substantial reductions in latency while maintaining strong control accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于运动学到视觉提升范式的层次化路由视觉控制框架，用于条件化手术视频生成。通过将关节运动学转化为五种图像对齐的控制模态，并设计路由机制动态分配控制能力，配合预算训练与推理策略，实现了高保真、高效且跨域泛化的手术视频生成。
AI.motivation: 手术视频生成中，低维控制向量需精确控制复杂图像演化，现有方法难以处理关节运动学与视觉空间之间的鸿沟。作者希望建立一种能够将运动学信息有效映射到视觉控制信号、并实现高效动态分配的生成框架。
AI.method: 1) 提出运动学到视觉的提升范式，将关节运动学转化为五种图像对齐的控制模态；2) 设计层次化路由视觉控制框架，动态选择最相关的控制模态和运动尺度；3) 设计运动学先验引导的路由损失函数，保证物理合理性与时间稳定性；4) 提出预算训练与推理方案，利用路由产生的稀疏性丢弃低显著性控制通路，实现自适应计算。
AI.result: 在自建基准数据集上，该方法在动作忠实度、视觉保真度和跨域泛化能力上均稳定优于多种基线模型；高效变体在显著降低延迟的同时保持了较强的控制精度。
AI.conclusion: 层次化路由与运动学引导的稀疏计算能够有效解耦手术视频生成中的控制复杂性，为动作条件视频生成提供了一种高效、可控且泛化性强的解决方案。

title: CauSim: Scaling Causal Reasoning with Increasingly Complex Causal Simulators
summary: Despite surpassing human performance across mathematics, coding, and other knowledge-intensive tasks, large language models (LLMs) continue to struggle with causal reasoning. A core obstacle is the target data itself: causal systems are complex and often expressed in non-executable forms, while ground-truth answers to causal queries are inherently scarce. We introduce CauSim, a framework that turns causal reasoning from a scarce-label problem into a scalable supervised one. CauSim constructs increasingly complex causal simulators: executable structural causal models (SCMs), incrementally built by LLMs, that scale to globally complex systems while maintaining verifiable answers to causal queries. CauSim operates across representations by formalizing non-executable causal knowledge into code, enabling data augmentation, and translating executable SCMs into natural language, enabling supervision in previously difficult-to-supervise representations. We structure our research into two parts: (1) how to construct increasingly complex causal simulators, and (2) a systematic study of what CauSim enables, demonstrating generalization across representations, consistent gains from curriculum scaling and data volume, LLM self-improvement through self-generated simulators, and data augmentation via formalization of existing domain knowledge.

AI.tldr: CauSim是一个将因果推理从标签稀缺问题转化为可扩展监督问题的框架，通过构建可执行的结构化因果模型（SCMs）来生成训练数据，实现跨表示的泛化和自改进。
AI.motivation: LLMs在因果推理上表现不佳，主要原因在于因果系统复杂且通常以非可执行形式表达，而因果查询的真实答案天然稀缺，缺乏足够的监督信号。
AI.method: 提出CauSim框架，让LLM逐步构建越来越复杂的可执行SCMs，将非可执行因果知识形式化为代码进行数据增强，再将可执行SCMs翻译为自然语言，从而在难以监督的表示上实现监督学习。
AI.result: CauSim实现了跨表示泛化、课程学习与数据量的持续增益、LLM通过自生成模拟器实现自我改进，以及通过现有领域知识形式化进行数据增强。
AI.conclusion: CauSim成功将因果推理从标签稀缺问题转化为可扩展的监督学习问题，为提升LLM因果推理能力提供了一条系统性的路径。

title: RuPLaR : Efficient Latent Compression of LLM Reasoning Chains with Rule-Based Priors From Multi-Step to One-Step
summary: The Chain-of-Thought (CoT) paradigm, while enhancing the interpretability of Large Language Models (LLMs), is constrained by the inefficiencies and expressive limits of natural language. Latent Chain-of-Thought (latent CoT) reasoning, which operates in a continuous latent space, offers a promising alternative but faces challenges from structural complexities in existing multi-step or multi-model paradigms, such as error propagation and coordination overhead. In this paper, we introduce One-Model One-Step, a novel compression framework for Latent Reasoning with Rule-Based Priors(RuPLaR) to address this challenge. Our method trains an LLM to autonomously generate latent reasoning tokens in a single training stage, guided by rule-based prior probability distributions, thereby eliminating cascaded processes and inter-model dependencies. To ensure reasoning quality, we design a joint training objective that enforces answer consistency via cross-entropy, aligns soft tokens with rule-based priors via KL divergence (the Soft Thinking constraint), and adds a problem-thought semantic alignment constraint in the representation space. Extensive experiments show that our compression framework not only improves accuracy by 11.1% over existing latent CoT methods but also achieves this with minimal token usage, underscoring its effectiveness and extensibility. Code: https://github.com/xiaocen-luo/RuPLaR.

AI.tldr: 提出One-Model One-Step框架(RuPLaR)，用单模型单阶段训练+规则先验分布来压缩潜在思维链推理，相比现有方法提升准确率11.1%且token消耗极少。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在CoT推理方法存在多步/多模型结构导致的错误传播和协调开销问题，且自然语言CoT效率低、表达能力有限。
AI.method: 单模型单阶段训练LLM自主生成潜在推理token，使用规则先验概率分布引导；联合训练目标包括交叉熵保证答案一致性、KL散度(Soft Thinking约束)对齐软token与规则先验、以及问题-思维语义对齐约束。
AI.result: 相比现有潜在CoT方法准确率提升11.1%，且token使用量极少。
AI.conclusion: RuPLaR框架有效解决了潜在CoT的结构复杂性问题，兼具高效性和扩展性。

title: EAR: Enhancing Uni-Modal Representations for Weakly Supervised Audio-Visual Video Parsing
summary: Weakly supervised Audio-Visual Video Parsing (AVVP) aims to recognize and temporally localize audio, visual, and audio-visual events in videos using only coarse-grained labels. Faced with the challenging task settings, existing research advances along two main paths: pre-training pseudo-label generators for fine-grained cross-modal semantic guidance, or refining AVVP model architectures to enhance audio-visual fusion. However, since audio and visual signals are typically unaligned, achieving accurate video parsing fundamentally relies on precise perception of uni-modal events. Yet these multi-modal focused strategies excessively emphasize multi-modal fusion while inadequately guiding and preserving uni-modal semantics, resulting in noisy pseudo-labels and sub-optimal video parsing performance. This paper proposes a novel framework that enhances uni-modal representations for both the pseudo-label generator and the AVVP model. Specifically, we introduce a similarity-based label migration approach to annotate pre-training data, thereby enabling the pseudo-label generator to better understand uni-modal events. We also employ a soft-constrained manner to refine modeling of uni-modal features in parallel with multi-modal fusion. These designs enable coordinated attention to both uni-modal and cross-modal representations, thus boosting the localization performance for events. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both pseudo-label and AVVP performance.

AI.tldr: 针对弱监督视听视频解析中多模态融合策略忽视单模态语义的问题，提出通过相似性标签迁移增强伪标签生成器的单模态理解，并利用软约束并行优化单模态特征建模与多模态融合，显著提升事件定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督AVVP方法过度关注多模态融合，忽视了音频和视觉信号未对齐时单模态事件的精确感知，导致伪标签含有噪声、视频解析性能次优。
AI.method: 1) 相似性标签迁移方法为预训练数据标注，增强伪标签生成器对单模态事件的理解；2) 软约束方式在并行优化单模态特征建模与多模态融合，实现联合关注单模态和跨模态表征。
AI.result: 在伪标签生成和AVVP任务上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强单模态表征（伪标签生成器和AVVP模型两端），能有效解决多模态融合策略导致的单模态语义缺失问题，提升弱监督视听视频解析的定位精度。

title: Constant-Target Energy Matching: A Unified Framework for Continuous and Discrete Density Estimation
summary: Density estimation is a central primitive in probabilistic modeling, yet continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable domains are often treated by separate objectives, limiting the ability to exploit a common statistical structure across data types. Continuous score-based methods rely on log-density gradients, while discrete extensions typically use concrete score whose unbounded targets become unstable near low-probability states. We introduce Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM), a unified energy-based framework for density estimation on general state spaces. CTEM replaces ordinary density-ratio regression with a bounded energy-difference transform and derives from it a sample-only training objective with the constant target 1. The learned scalar potential recovers log p without partition-function estimation or explicit unbounded ratio regression. Across continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable benchmarks, CTEM substantially improves density estimation over competitive baselines and yields higher-quality samples under standard sampling procedures.

AI.tldr: CTEM提出了一个统一的基于能量的密度估计框架，通过有界能量差变换替代传统密度比回归，用常数目标1训练，无需估计配分函数或显式无界比值回归，在连续、离散和混合变量基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有密度估计方法对连续、离散、混合变量使用不同的目标函数，限制了跨数据类型共享统计结构的能力；连续方法依赖对数密度梯度，离散扩展使用的具体分数在低概率状态附近不稳定。
AI.method: 提出Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM)，将密度比回归替换为有界能量差变换，推导出以常数1为目标的纯样本训练目标，学到的标量势函数可直接恢复log p，无需配分函数估计或无界比值回归。
AI.result: 在连续、离散和混合变量基准上，CTEM显著优于竞争基线，并在标准采样流程下生成更高质量的样本。
AI.conclusion: CTEM提供了一个统一的能量框架，有效解决了跨数据类型密度估计的挑战，同时提高了密度估计质量和样本质量。

title: HOME-KGQA: A Benchmark Dataset for Multimodal Knowledge Graph Question Answering on Household Daily Activities
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables, accepted at LREC2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) provide flexible natural language processing capabilities, while knowledge graphs (KGs) offer explicit and structured knowledge. Integrating these two in a complementary manner enables the development of reliable and verifiable AI systems. In particular, knowledge graph question answering (KGQA) has attracted attention as a means to reduce LLM hallucinations and to leverage knowledge beyond the training data. However, existing KGQA benchmark datasets are biased toward encyclopedic knowledge, limited to a single modality, and lack fine-grained spatiotemporal data, which limits their applicability to real-world scenarios targeted by Embodied AI. We introduce HOME-KGQA, a novel KGQA benchmark dataset built on a multimodal KG of daily household activities. HOME-KGQA consists of complex, multi-hop natural language questions paired with graph database query languages. Compared to existing benchmarks, it includes more challenging questions that involve multi-level spatiotemporal reasoning, multimodal grounding, and aggregate functions. Experimental results show that the LLM-based KGQA methods fail to achieve performance comparable to that on existing datasets when evaluated on HOME-KGQA. This highlights significant challenges that should be addressed for the real-world deployment of KGQA systems. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/aistairc/home-kgqa

AI.tldr: 本文提出HOME-KGQA，一个基于多模态家务知识图谱的KGQA基准数据集，包含复杂多跳问题，涉及多级时空推理、多模态对齐和聚合函数。实验表明现有LLM-based KGQA方法在该数据集上表现不佳，揭示了真实场景部署面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有KGQA基准数据集存在三个局限：百科知识偏斜、单模态、缺乏细粒度时空数据，限制了在具身AI等真实场景中的应用。作者旨在构建一个更贴近现实、更具挑战性的多模态KGQA基准。
AI.method: 基于日常家务活动的多模态知识图谱，构建了包含复杂多跳自然语言问题与图数据库查询语言配对的基准数据集HOME-KGQA。问题设计涉及多级时空推理、多模态对齐及聚合函数。
AI.result: 现有基于LLM的KGQA方法在HOME-KGQA上的性能远低于在已有数据集上的表现，说明当前方法难以应对真实世界中的复杂KGQA任务。
AI.conclusion: HOME-KGQA填补了现有KGQA基准在真实场景适用性上的空白，揭示了多模态、时空推理和聚合查询等挑战，为未来KGQA系统在具身AI等领域的实际部署提供了重要的评估与改进方向。

title: SynerMedGen: Synergizing Medical Multimodal Understanding with Generation via Task Alignment
summary: Unifying multimodal understanding and generation is a compelling frontier that is beginning to emerge in the medical field. However, the limited existing unified medical models typically treat understanding and generation as disjoint objectives, lacking a meaningful functional synergy. In this work, we identify and address a critical question in unified medical modeling: what form of understanding truly benefits generation. We present SynerMedGen, a unified framework built on the proposed principle of generation-aligned understanding, which synergizes understanding objectives with generation tasks via task alignment. SynerMedGen introduces three generation-aligned understanding tasks and a two-stage training strategy that transfers generation-beneficial representations learned during understanding training to medical image synthesis. Remarkably, even with understanding training alone, our SynerMedGen achieves strong zero-shot performance across 22 medical image synthesis tasks and demonstrates robust generalization to unseen datasets. When combined with generation training, SynerMedGen consistently outperforms state-of-the-art specialized medical image synthesis models as well as recent unified medical models. We also release a large-scale dataset named SynerMed consisting of 1M paired synthesis samples and 2M generation-derived understanding instances to support further research on understanding-generation synergy. Our project can be accessed at https://github.com/Mhilab/SynerMedGen.

AI.tldr: SynerMedGen是一个统一的多模态医疗理解和生成框架，提出“生成对齐的理解”原则，通过三个新任务和两阶段训练策略，实现了理解与生成任务的协同。仅理解训练即可零样本完成22项医疗图像合成任务，结合生成训练后性能超越现有专门模型和统一模型，并发布了包含100万配对合成样本和200万生成派生理解实例的大规模数据集SynerMed。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗领域的统一模型通常将理解和生成视为互不相干的目标，缺乏有意义的协同作用。作者想要探究：什么样的理解形式才能真正有益于生成任务？
AI.method: 提出生成对齐理解（generation-aligned understanding）原则，设计三个生成对齐的理解任务，以及两阶段训练策略：第一阶段仅进行理解训练以学习有利于生成的表征，第二阶段将表征迁移到医学图像合成任务中。
AI.result: 仅理解训练即可在22项医疗图像合成任务上实现强零样本性能，对未见数据集有良好泛化；结合生成训练后，持续超越最先进的专用医疗图像合成模型和现有统一医疗模型。
AI.conclusion: 理解与生成并非只能作为分离目标，通过设计生成对齐的理解任务，理解训练本身就能为生成任务带来显著的零样本能力，两者结合可达到最优性能。

title: Token Economics for LLM Agents: A Dual-View Study from Computing and Economics
summary: As LLM agents evolve, tokens have emerged as the core economic primitives of Agentic AI. However, their exponential consumption introduces severe computational, collaborative, and security bottlenecks. Current surveys remain fragmented across system optimization, architecture design, and trust, lacking a unified framework to evaluate the fundamental trade-off between output quality and economic cost. To bridge this gap, this survey presents the first comprehensive survey of Token Economics. By unifying computer science and economics, we conceptualize tokens as production factors, exchange mediums, and units of account. We synthesize existing literature across a four-dimensional taxonomy: (1) Micro-level (Single Agent): Optimizing budget-constrained factor substitution via neoclassical firm theory. (2) Meso-level (Multi-Agent Systems): Minimizing collaboration friction using transaction cost and principal-agent theories. (3) Macro-level (Agent Ecosystems): Addressing congestion externalities and pricing via mechanism design. (4) Security: Internalizing adversarial threats as endogenous economic constraints. Finally, we outline frontier directions, including differentiable token budgets and dynamic markets, to lay the theoretical foundation for scalable next-generation agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次从经济学视角系统综述了Token经济学，将Token视为生产因素、交换媒介和记账单位，从微观（单智能体）、中观（多智能体）、宏观（智能体生态）和安全四个维度构建了统一分析框架，探讨输出质量与经济成本之间的根本权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有关于Token消耗的研究分散在系统优化、架构设计和安全等不同领域，缺乏一个统一框架来评估输出质量与经济成本之间的根本权衡。
AI.method: 将计算机科学与经济学理论相结合，构建四维分类法：（1）微观层面：用新古典企业理论研究预算约束下的因素替代；（2）中观层面：用交易成本和委托-代理理论研究协作摩擦最小化；（3）宏观层面：用机制设计研究拥堵外部性和定价；（4）安全层面：将对抗性威胁内化为经济约束。
AI.result: 提出了Token作为经济基元的统一概念框架，涵盖生产因素、交换媒介和记账单位三重角色。
AI.conclusion: 指出了可微分Token预算和动态市场等前沿方向，为可扩展的下一代智能体系统奠定理论基础。

title: Cross-Cultural Transfer of Emoji Semantics and Sentiment in Financial Social Media
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary:
Emojis are widely used in online financial communication, but it is unclear whether they provide transferable sentiment signals across languages, platforms, and asset communities. This study examines the extent to which emoji usage, semantics, and sentiment polarity remain stable across financial communities, and how these layers influence zero-shot sentiment transfer. Using large corpora of Twitter and StockTwits posts in four languages, we measure cross-community divergence and evaluate sentiment models trained under emoji-only, text-only, and text+emoji inputs.
  We find that emoji frequencies differ across communities, especially across languages, but their semantics and sentiment polarity are largely stable. Cross-asset transferability shows minimal degradation, while cross-language transfer remains the most challenging. Including emojis consistently reduces transfer gaps relative to text-only models. These results indicate that financial communication exhibits a partially shared ``emoji code,'' and that emojis provide compact, language-independent sentiment cues that improve model generalization across markets and platforms.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了金融交流中emoji在不同语言、平台和资产社区间的情感信号可迁移性。通过分析Twitter和StockTwits上四种语言的语料，发现emoji的使用频率存在差异，但其语义和情感极性相对稳定。加入emoji可以缩小不同社区间的情感迁移差距。
AI.motivation: 虽然emoji在在线金融交流中被广泛使用，但尚不清楚它们能否在不同语言、平台和资产社区间提供可迁移的情感信号，这影响了跨领域情感分析的泛化能力。
AI.method: 收集四种语言的Twitter和StockTwits金融相关帖子，分别构建仅含emoji、仅含文本、文本+emoji三种输入条件的情感模型，测量跨社区的情感偏差并评估迁移性能。
AI.result: Emoji使用频率在不同社区（尤其是跨语言）存在差异，但语义和情感极性基本稳定；跨资产迁移性能下降较小，跨语言迁移挑战最大；加入emoji始终能缩小迁移差距。
AI.conclusion: 金融交流中存在部分共享的"emoji代码"，emoji提供了紧凑且语言无关的情感线索，能够改善模型跨市场和跨平台的泛化能力。

title: Control Your View: High-Resolution Global Semantic Manipulation in Learned Image Compression
summary: Learned image compression (LIC) integrates deep neural networks (DNNs) to map high-dimensional images into compact latent representations, reducing redundancy and achieving superior rate-distortion (RD) performance in benign settings. Unfortunately, due to inherent vulnerabilities in DNNs, LIC systems are susceptible to adversarial perturbations that lead to downstream deterioration, compression rate degradation, untargeted distortion, and both local semantic manipulation (LSM) and low-resolution ($3\times28\times28$) global semantic manipulation (GSM). However, high-resolution GSM remains unexplored due to its intractability. Notably, the existing project gradient descent (PGD) method achieves near-perfect white-box attacks for classification, segmentation, and other tasks, yet fails to generalize to high-resolution GSM. Our theoretical and empirical analyses reveal that well-performing GSM drives adversarial examples from the Identity Region to the Amplification Region through the Lazying-Oscillating-Refining stages. General $\ell_{\infty}$-bounded attacks fail on high-resolution GSM because their step-size schedules cannot accommodate both the Oscillating and Refining stages. Based on this, we propose the Periodic Geometric Decay schedule that enables $\ell_{\infty}$-bounded high-resolution GSM. To verify our approach, we integrate it with PGD, yielding a minimal variant, PGD$^{2}$-GSM. Extensive experiments on the Kodak $(3\times768\times512)$ demonstrate that our PGD$^{2}$-GSM is the first to stably achieve high-resolution GSM, thereby exposing a novel threat to LIC systems. Code is available at https://github.com/chinaliangjiaming/PGD2-GSM.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有攻击方法无法在Learned Image Compression (LIC)系统上实现高分辨率全局语义操控（GSM），并理论分析了原因在于步长调度无法同时适应振荡和细化阶段，据此提出周期性几何衰减调度（Periodic Geometric Decay）与PGD²-GSM方法，首次稳定实现高分辨率GSM攻击。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率全局语义操控（GSM）在LIC系统中一直未被探索，现有ℓ∞有界攻击（如PGD）在分类/分割任务上近乎完美，却无法泛化到高分辨率GSM，存在研究空白和实际威胁隐患。
AI.method: 通过理论及实证分析发现GSM驱动对抗样本经历Lazying-Oscillating-Refining三个阶段，现有步长调度无法兼顾Oscillating和Refining；据此提出Periodic Geometric Decay调度，集成到PGD得到PGD²-GSM。
AI.result: 在Kodak数据集（3×768×512）上，PGD²-GSM首次稳定实现高分辨率GSM攻击，暴露了LIC系统的新型安全威胁。
AI.conclusion: 高分辨率GSM是LIC系统面临的真实威胁，Periodic Geometric Decay调度有效解决了步长调度难题，代码已开源。

title: When (and How) to Trust the Expert: Diagnosing Query-Time Expert-Guided Reinforcement Learning
summary: Many continuous-control problems ship with a competent but suboptimal controller (a tuned PID, a hand-designed gait). A growing family of methods uses such controllers as queryable experts during RL, but each method has been proposed in isolation, on a different benchmark, without imperfect-expert testing. We harmonize the comparison on a shared SAC backbone, common HPO and evaluation protocols, 100/50 seeds per (env, method), and a degradation sweep over expert undertuning, action bias, and observation noise. The comparison surfaces three failure modes single-paper evaluations miss: (F1) a critic blind spot under argmax-plus-bootstrap that drags IBRL below no-expert SAC on experts close to the no-expert-RL ceiling (RL-near-ceiling, distinct from the absolute physical ceiling); (F2) residual saturation on far-from-optimal experts; and (F3) warm-start buffer poisoning that collapses training-time-handoff methods under deployment-time expert undertuning. No single method dominates: each wins on one task-structure regime and fails predictably elsewhere; on RL-near-ceiling experts (FourTank, GlassFurnace) no query-time method clears the expert within our 1M-step budget, leaving open whether this is a fundamental wall or a budget effect. We convert the spread into a testable decision rule keyed on three pre-training observables (expert quality, task termination, perturbation type). The benchmark, taxonomy, and decision rule are the primary contribution; we additionally describe EDGE, a softmax-over-ensemble-LCB design point used to demonstrate that both axes the taxonomy points to (gate form, scoring rule) are individually exploitable.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文系统比较了多种使用次优控制器作为可查询专家的强化学习方法（如IBRL等），在共享SAC骨干、统一超参数调优和评估协议下，通过大量种子测试和专家退化扫描，揭示了三种单篇论文评估中遗漏的失败模式，并提出了基于三个预训练可观测量的决策规则，同时提出了EDGE方法作为设计空间探索的示例。
AI.motivation: 许多连续控制问题已有现成的次优控制器（如调好的PID、手工设计的步态），但这些控制器可以作为可查询专家与强化学习结合。然而，现有方法各自在独立环境中提出，缺乏统一的基准测试，也未考虑不完美专家的情况。论文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在共享SAC骨干网络上，统一了超参数调优和评估协议，使用100/50个种子（环境/方法），并对专家进行退化扫描（欠调谐、动作偏差、观测噪声）。比较多种专家引导的RL方法，识别失败模式，并基于三个预训练可观测量（专家质量、任务终止类型、扰动类型）构建决策规则。此外，提出了EDGE方法（基于集成LCB的softmax变体）来验证设计空间的两个关键维度。
AI.result: 发现了三种失败模式：(F1) 在专家接近RL天花板时，IBRL的评论家盲点（argmax加bootstrap导致性能低于无专家SAC）；(F2) 在远离最优的专家上残差饱和；(F3) 在线专家切换方法在部署阶段专家欠调谐时出现缓冲中毒。没有单一方法在所有场景下占优，每种方法只在一个任务结构域中胜出。在RL天花板附近的专家上（FourTank, GlassFurnace），查询类方法无法在1M步内超越专家。EDGE方法验证了门控形式和评分规则两个维度均可独立利用。
AI.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于建立了统一的基准测试框架、失败模式分类和可测试的决策规则。没有方法在所有场景中占优，但可以通过预训练可观测量选择合适的专家引导RL方法。EDGE作为新设计点展示了设计空间两个维度的可开发利用性。在RL天花板附近专家上查询方法无法超越专家的问题，留待未来研究解决。

title: Perception Without Engagement: Dissecting the Causal Discovery Deficit in LMMs
summary: Although Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved strong performance on general video understanding, their susceptibility to textual prior shortcuts during causal discovery has been recognized as a critical deficit. The underlying mechanisms of this phenomenon remain incompletely understood, as existing benchmarks only measure response accuracy without revealing the sources and extent of the deficit. We introduce ProCauEval, a perturbation-based evaluation protocol that shifts from outcome assessment to mechanism diagnosis, probing causal discovery through five controlled configurations that systematically manipulate visual and textual modalities to decompose their respective contributions to model behavior and dissect the failure modes. Evaluating 17 mainstream LMMs, we find that models faithfully perceive video content yet systematically underexploit it during causal reasoning. We further observe that stronger post-training amplifies rather than mitigates textual prior reliance, and that higher baseline performance correlates with greater fragility under perturbation. To address these, we propose Anti-Distillation Policy Optimization (ADPO), a reinforcement learning framework built on negative teacher alignment, which augments GRPO by explicitly pushing the policy away from a prior-only counterfactual teacher induced by visual corruption. Specifically, ADPO maximizes the divergence between the policy distributions conditioned on the original and visually corrupted inputs, thereby forcing the model to ground its reasoning in visual evidence rather than textual shortcuts. Extensive experiments show that ADPO improves visual engagement without sacrificing fundamental comprehension, thus offering a preliminary step toward reliable causal discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProCauEval协议，通过五种扰动配置系统评估LMM在因果发现中对文本先验的依赖；发现模型虽能感知视频内容但未充分利用，后训练强化反而加剧文本依赖；并提出ADPO强化学习方法，通过对抗负教师模型来强制模型依赖视觉证据进行推理。
AI.motivation: 现有基准只衡量响应准确性，无法揭示LMM在因果发现中因过度依赖文本先验而导致失败的深层机制和来源。
AI.method: 1) 提出ProCauEval评估协议，含五种控制性扰动配置，解耦视觉和文本模态贡献；2) 提出ADPO强化学习框架，基于负教师对齐，通过最大化原始输入与视觉损坏输入之间策略分布的KL散度，强制模型依赖视觉证据。
AI.result: 1) 模型能忠实感知视频内容但系统性未充分利用；2) 后训练越强文本先验依赖越重；3) 基线性能越高对扰动越脆弱；4) ADPO有效提升视觉参与度而不损害基础理解。
AI.conclusion: LMM存在严重的文本先验依赖问题，ADPO提供了一种初步但有效的解决方案，为走向可靠的因果发现迈出了第一步。

title: Unison: Harmonizing Motion, Speech, and Sound for Human-Centric Audio-Video Generation
summary: Motion, speech, and sound effects are fundamental elements of human-centric videos, yet their heterogeneous temporal characteristics make joint generation highly challenging. Existing audio-video generation models often fail to maintain consistent alignment across these modalities, leading to noticeable mismatches between motion, speech, and environmental sounds. We present Unison, a unified framework that explicitly promotes coherence across the motion, speech, and sound modalities. Within the audio stream, Unison employs a semantic-guided harmonization strategy that decouples the generation of speech and sound-effect components. Leveraging bidirectional audio cross-attention and semantic-conditioned gating for semantic-driven adaptive recomposition, this approach effectively mitigates speech dominance and enhances acoustic clarity. For audio-motion synchronization, we propose a bidirectional cross-modal forcing strategy where the cleaner modality guides the noisier one through decoupled denoising schedules, reinforced by a progressive stabilization strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Unison achieves state-of-the-art performance in both audio perceptual quality and cross-modal synchronization, highlighting the importance of explicit multimodal harmonization in human-centric video generation.

AI.tldr: Unison是一个统一框架，通过语义引导的音频解耦生成和双向跨模态强制同步策略，在人类中心视频中实现运动、语音和音效的连贯对齐，达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音视频生成模型无法在运动、语音和环境音效之间保持一致的模态对齐，存在明显的失配问题。
AI.method: 1) 语义引导的音频解耦策略：将语音和音效分离生成，通过双向音频交叉注意力和语义条件门控进行自适应重组；2) 双向跨模态强制策略：用更干净的模态引导更嘈杂的模态，通过解耦去噪调度和渐进稳定策略增强同步。
AI.result: 在音频感知质量和跨模态同步方面均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式的多模态协调对于人类中心视频生成至关重要。

title: Data-driven Circuit Discovery for Interpretability of Language Models
summary: Circuit discovery aims to explain how language models (LMs) implement a specific task by localizing and interpreting a circuit, a computational subgraph responsible for the LM's behavior. Existing circuit discovery methods are hypothesis-driven; they first informally define a task with a dataset, and then apply a circuit discovery algorithm over that dataset to obtain a single circuit. This imposes two strong assumptions: that the LM implements the task with a single circuit, and that the dataset adequately represents the task as humans understand it. We systematically test these assumptions across four previously studied tasks and find that even minor dataset variations that preserve task semantics can produce circuits with low edge overlap and cross-dataset faithfulness. More strikingly, when applied to a mixed dataset with two distinct tasks whose separately discovered circuits have near-zero cross-faithfulness, existing methods still return a single circuit with high faithfulness across both tasks. This indicates that current methods discover dataset-specific circuits, rather than general task circuits. We propose Data-driven Circuit Discovery (DCD), a new discovery framework that drops both assumptions: instead of returning a single circuit for a dataset, DCD first clusters examples in the dataset by how similarly the model processes them and discovers a separate circuit for each group. This allows distinct mechanisms to appear separately rather than merged into a single circuit; each circuit explains its group, not the full task. Experiments show that DCD discovers multiple circuits per dataset, each more faithful to its group than a single circuit discovered by existing methods. Broadly, DCD lets the data reveal mechanistic structure within LMs, rather than relying on human-defined task boundaries that may not align with how models organize their computation.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有的电路发现方法（通过数据集发现单一电路）存在两大错误假设：模型用单一电路实现任务、数据集充分代表任务。实验表明数据集微小变化会导致电路显著不同。作者提出数据驱动电路发现（DCD），先聚类再为每组发现独立电路，从而揭示模型内部真正的计算结构。
AI.motivation: 现有电路发现方法假设模型用单一电路实现任务且数据集充分代表人类理解的任务，但这些假设可能不成立，导致发现的电路实际上是"数据集特定"而非"任务通用"的。
AI.method: 提出DCD框架：先对数据集中的样本按模型内部处理方式的相似性进行聚类，然后为每个聚类独立发现电路，而非对整个数据集输出单一电路。
AI.result: 1）跨四个任务验证：数据集微小变化（保持任务语义）导致电路边缘重叠度低、跨数据集保真度差；2）混合两个不同任务时，现有方法仍输出单一高保真电路，但各自独立发现的电路间保真度近零；3）DCD每个聚类的电路比现有方法的单一电路更忠实于其对应组。
AI.conclusion: 应放弃"单一电路假设"和"数据集代表任务假设"，DCD让数据本身揭示模型内部的机制结构，而非依赖人类定义的任务边界。

title: PumpSense: Real-Time Detection and Target Extraction of Crypto Pump-and-Dumps on Telegram
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Blockchain and Cryptocurrency (ICBC)
summary: Cryptocurrency pump-and-dump schemes coordinated via Telegram threaten market integrity. However, existing research addressing this specific threat has not yet produced solutions that combine reliable results with fast response. This is in part due to the absence of publicly available, message-level labeled data, as well as design choices. In this paper, we address both issues. In particular, we introduce a corpus of over 280,000 Telegram posts from 39 pump-organizing groups, all manually reviewed to identify 2,246 pump announcements and their targeted cryptocurrency and exchange. Leveraging this dataset, we define two tasks: real-time pump-announcement detection and target cryptocurrency/exchange extraction. For detection, we compare two machine-learning models: a lightweight tree-based LightGBM classifier (F1=0.79, latency=9.4 s/sample) and a transformer-based BGE-M3 (F1=0.83, latency=50 ms/sample). With our proposed approach, we show that message analysis can achieve near-instant pump detection at the level of individual Telegram message windows. Unlike prior work that relies purely on market data and typically detects pumps tens of seconds after abnormal trading activity is observed, our method operates directly on the coordination messages themselves and can be evaluated in microseconds per window on commodity hardware. To our knowledge, we also establish the first benchmark for manipulated coin and exchange extraction. We demonstrate that traditional rule-based extraction methods, widely relied upon in prior literature, are ineffective due to ticker ambiguity. In contrast, LLMs achieve the highest accuracy with a score of 0.91.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了超28万条Telegram帖子数据集，提出了基于LightGBM和BGE-M3的实时拉盘检测方法（检测延迟低至50ms/样本），以及基于LLM的加密货币/交易所提取方法（准确率0.91），首次建立了操纵币种和交易所提取的基准。
AI.motivation: 加密货币拉盘骗局通过Telegram组织，威胁市场完整性。现有研究缺乏结合可靠结果与快速响应的解决方案，主要因为缺乏公开的、消息级标注数据以及设计选择问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建了包含超28万条Telegram帖子的语料库，人工标注了2,246条拉盘公告及相关加密货币/交易所信息；2) 定义实时拉盘公告检测和加密货币/交易所提取两个任务；3) 检测任务对比LightGBM（F1=0.79，延迟9.4s/样本）和BGE-M3（F1=0.83，延迟50ms/样本）；4) 提取任务对比传统规则方法与LLM（准确率0.91）。
AI.result: BGE-M3模型在检测任务上取得F1=0.83，延迟仅50ms/样本，可实现近瞬时检测；LLM在提取任务上取得0.91的准确率，大幅超越传统基于规则的方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于消息分析的方法能在微秒级完成拉盘检测，优于传统依赖市场数据（延迟数十秒）的方法。LLM能有效解决由于代码歧义导致的提取难题，建立了首个操纵币种和交易所提取的基准。

title: CollabVR: Collaborative Video Reasoning with Vision-Language and Video Generation Models
summary: Recent "Thinking with Video" approaches use Video Generation Models (VGMs) for visual reasoning by producing temporally coherent Chain-of-Frames as reasoning artifacts. Even strong VGMs, however, exhibit two recurring failure modes on goal-directed tasks: long-horizon drift on multi-step tasks and mid-clip simulation errors that compound. Both stem from the absence of explicit reasoning built upon the VGM's short-horizon visual prior, a role naturally filled by Vision-Language Models (VLMs), but where to place the VLM is non-trivial: upfront plans commit before any frame is generated and post-hoc critiques over whole videos intervene too late. We propose VLM-VGM Collaborative Video Reasoning (CollabVR), a closed-loop framework that couples the VLM with the VGM at step-level granularity: the VLM plans the immediate next action, inspects the clip the VGM generates, and folds the verifier's diagnosis directly into the next action prompt to repair detected failures. On Gen-ViRe and VBVR-Bench, CollabVR improves both open-source and closed-source VGMs over single-inference, Pass@$k$, and prior test-time scaling baselines at matched compute, with the largest gains on the hardest tasks. It also yields further improvements on top of a reasoning-fine-tuned VGM, indicating that step-level VLM supervision is orthogonal to and stackable with reasoning-oriented fine-tuning. We provide video samples and additional qualitative results at our project page: https://joow0n-kim.github.io/collabvr-project-page.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CollabVR框架，通过VLM与VGM在步骤级别的闭环协作（VLM规划下一步动作→VGM生成片段→VLM检查并反馈修复），解决了视频生成模型在目标导向任务中的长期漂移和复合误差问题，在Gen-ViRe和VBVR-Bench上超越多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有"Thinking with Video"方法使用VGM进行视觉推理时存在两个关键失败模式：多步任务中的长期漂移和片段内的复合模拟误差。根本原因是VGM缺乏明确的推理能力，而VLM虽能弥补这一缺陷，但前置规划（在生成帧之前提交）和后置批评（在整段视频后干预）都效果不佳，需要更细粒度的协同方式。
AI.method: CollabVR是一个闭环框架，以步骤级别粒度耦合VLM和VGM：VLM规划当前立即要执行的下一步动作，VGM生成对应的视频片段，VLM检查生成的片段质量，并将验证器的诊断结果直接融入下一步动作提示中，以修复检测到的失败。
AI.result: 在Gen-ViRe和VBVR-Bench基准上，CollabVR同时改进了开源和闭源VGM，超越单次推理、Pass@k以及先前测试时扩展基线（相同计算量下）。最大增益出现在最困难的任务上。此外，在推理微调后的VGM基础上，CollabVR仍有进一步提升，表明步骤级VLM监督与推理微调是正交且可叠加的。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级别的VLM-VGM闭环协作是一种有效的测试时扩展策略，能够弥补VGM在目标导向推理中的不足，且与推理微调方法互补，为视频推理任务提供了新思路。

title: MCP-Cosmos: World Model-Augmented Agents for Complex Task Execution in MCP Environments
summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has unified the interface between Large Language Models (LLMs) and external tools, yet a fundamental gap remains in how agents conceptualize the environments within which they operate. Current paradigms are bifurcated: Task-level planning often ignores execution-time dynamics, while reactive execution lacks long-horizon foresight. We present MCP-Cosmos, a framework that infuses generative World Models (WM) into the MCP ecosystem to enable predictive task automation. By unifying three disparate technologies, namely MCP, World Model, and Agent, we demonstrate that a "Bring Your Own World Model" (BYOWM) strategy allows agents to simulate state transitions and refine plans in a latent space before execution. We conducted experiments using two strategies, namely ReAct and SPIRAL with 2 planning models and 3 representative world models over 20+ MCP-Bench tasks. We observed improvements in Agent's environment interaction KPI such as tool success rate and tool parameter accuracy. The framework also offers new metrics such as Execution Quality to generate new insights about the effectiveness of world models compared to baseline.

AI.tldr: MCP-Cosmos 是一个将生成式世界模型（World Model）融入 MCP 生态系统的框架，通过“自带世界模型”（BYOWM）策略让智能体在潜在空间中模拟状态转换并优化计划，实验表明在工具成功率和参数准确性等关键指标上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体范式存在分裂：任务级规划忽略执行时的动态变化，而反应式执行缺乏长期前瞻能力。MCP 虽然统一了 LLM 与外部工具的接口，但智能体对操作环境的认知仍存在根本性缺口。
AI.method: 提出 MCP-Cosmos 框架，将生成式世界模型注入 MCP 生态系统，采用 BYOWM（Bring Your Own World Model）策略，使智能体在潜在空间中执行状态模拟和计划优化后再进行实际执行。统一了 MCP、世界模型和智能体三种技术。
AI.result: 在 20+ 个 MCP-Bench 任务上使用 ReAct 和 SPIRAL 两种策略、2 个规划模型和 3 个代表性世界模型进行实验，观察到智能体与环境交互的关键指标（如工具成功率、工具参数准确性）有所提升。同时提出执行质量（Execution Quality）等新指标以更深入评估世界模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MCP-Cosmos 框架通过注入世界模型有效弥合了规划与执行之间的鸿沟，BYOWM 策略能够提升智能体的工具使用能力和执行质量，为 MCP 生态中的智能体设计提供了新的方向。

title: Key Coverage Matters: Semi-Structured Extraction of OCR Clinical Reports
summary: Clinical reports are often fragmented across healthcare institutions because privacy regulations and data silos limit direct information sharing. When patients seek care at a different hospital, they often carry paper or scanned reports from prior visits. This hinders EHR integration and longitudinal review, and downstream applications that depend on more complete patient records, such as patient management, follow-up care, real-world studies, and clinical-trial matching. Although OCR can digitize such reports, reliable extraction remains challenging because clinical documents are heterogeneous, OCR text is noisy, and many healthcare settings require low-cost on-premise deployment. We formulate this problem as canonical key-conditioned extractive question answering over OCR-derived clinical reports. Because the key fields are neither fixed nor known in advance, the key space is open. We maintain a canonical key inventory through iterative key mining, normalization, clustering, and lightweight human verification, and introduce key coverage as a metric to quantify inventory completeness. Using a 0.2B BERT-based model, experiments on real-world reports from more than 20 hospitals show performance improves monotonically with key coverage. The model achieves F1 scores of 0.839 and 0.893 under exact match and boundary-tolerant matching, respectively, once the Top-90 canonical keys are covered. These results show that key coverage is a dominant factor for end-to-end performance. At Top-90 coverage, our model outperforms a fine-tuned Qwen3-0.6B baseline under exact match. Although our annotated corpus is Chinese, the method relies on the language-agnostic key-value organization of semi-structured clinical reports and can be adapted to other settings given an appropriate canonical key inventory and alias mapping.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键条件抽取式问答的临床报告信息提取方法，通过建立规范化关键键清单（Canonical Key Inventory）并引入键覆盖率（Key Coverage）指标，使用0.2B BERT模型在20多家医院的真实报告上实现了高精度信息提取，F1最高达0.893。
AI.motivation: 临床报告因隐私法规和数据孤岛而分散在各医疗机构，纸质或扫描报告难以集成到电子健康档案（EHR）中，影响纵向回顾、患者管理、随访、真实世界研究和临床试验匹配；现有OCR技术在异构临床文档中提取可靠性差，且许多场景需要低成本的本地部署方案。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为基于规范化关键键的条件抽取式问答（canonical key-conditioned extractive QA）；通过迭代的关键键挖掘、归一化、聚类和轻量人工验证维护开放的关键键清单；引入键覆盖率作为评估清单完整性的指标；使用0.2B参数的BERT模型进行实验。
AI.result: 在20多家医院的真实报告上，性能随键覆盖率单调提升；在Top-90规范化键覆盖下，精确匹配F1为0.839，边界容忍匹配F1为0.893；在精确匹配下优于微调的Qwen3-0.6B基线。
AI.conclusion: 键覆盖率是影响端到端性能的主导因素；该方法依赖临床报告的键值组织方式，具有语言无关性，可适应其他语言和领域，只需配备相应的规范化键清单和别名映射。

title: ReorgGS: Equivalent Distribution Reorganization for 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: A converged 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) model may approximate the target scene while remaining poorly parameterized for further optimization. We identify this failure mode as \emph{parameterization degeneration}: high-opacity floaters attenuate gradients to true surfaces through alpha compositing, and redundant overlapping clusters create strongly coupled parameter blocks with nearly collinear Jacobian responses. These effects explain why continued optimization can plateau even when the model still contains removable artifacts. We propose ReorgGS, an equivalent distribution reorganization method for converged 3DGS models. ReorgGS treats the existing Gaussian set as an empirical probability field, resamples centers from it, estimates local anisotropic covariances with kNN, initializes low opacity, and continues optimization with the original 3DGS renderer and loss. Unlike opacity reset, which only rescales opacity on the old overlap graph, ReorgGS rebuilds centers, covariances, and visibility structure, thereby changing the graph itself. Our analysis shows that distributional equivalence is not optimization equivalence. The reorganized model preserves scene support while improving gradient accessibility under alpha compositing and reducing opacity-weighted overlap, thereby weakening local parameter coupling during subsequent optimization. Under the same additional optimization budget, ReorgGS improves fitting quality at a fixed Gaussian count, suppresses persistent floaters, and reduces rendering overhead from redundant overlap.

AI.tldr: 提出ReorgGS方法，通过重新组织已收敛的3D高斯分布来解决参数化退化问题（高透明度漂浮物遮挡梯度、冗余重叠簇导致参数耦合），在保持场景表示等价的前提下改善梯度可达性并减少重叠，从而提升后续优化效果。
AI.motivation: 已收敛的3DGS模型存在参数化退化问题：高不透明度漂浮物通过alpha合成遮挡真实表面的梯度，冗余重叠簇产生强耦合参数块，导致继续优化停滞但仍存在可移除伪影。
AI.method: 将现有高斯集合视为经验概率场，重新采样中心点，用kNN估计局部各向异性协方差，初始化低不透明度，然后继续使用原始3DGS渲染器和损失函数优化。
AI.result: 在相同额外优化预算下，ReorgGS在固定高斯数量下提升拟合质量，抑制持续存在的漂浮物，并减少冗余重叠带来的渲染开销。
AI.conclusion: 分布等价不等于优化等价，重新组织模型能保持场景支持同时改善alpha合成下的梯度可达性，并减少不透明度加权重叠，从而削弱参数耦合。

title: Beyond Position Bias: Shifting Context Compression from Position-Driven to Semantic-Driven
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional performance across diverse tasks. However, their deployment in long-context scenarios faces high computational overhead and information redundancy. While soft prompt compression has emerged as a promising way to mitigate these costs by compressing sequences into compact embeddings, existing paradigms remain fundamentally constrained by position bias: they primarily rely on learnable tokens insertion at fixed positions or group tokens according to their physical token layout, thereby inducing performance instability and semantic fragmentation. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose Semantic Consistency Context Compression (SeCo), a method that shifts context compression from position-driven to semantic-driven. Rather than constraint by physical token layout, SeCo dynamically anchors compression directly in the semantic space by selecting query-relevant tokens as semantic centers and aggregating remaining tokens via consistency-weighted merging. This design inherently preserves semantic consistency while eliminating position bias. Extensive experiments on 14 benchmarks across two backbone models demonstrate that SeCo consistently shows superiority in downstream tasks, inference latency, and out-of-domain robustness. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/seco-EE5E.

AI.tldr: SeCo提出了一种从位置驱动转向语义驱动的上下文压缩方法，通过选择与查询相关的语义中心并聚合周围标记，有效消除了位置偏差，在14个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有软提示压缩方法受限于位置偏差（基于固定位置插入可学习标记或按物理布局分组），导致性能不稳定和语义碎片化，亟需更优的压缩范式。
AI.method: SeCo采用语义驱动策略：动态选择与查询相关的语义中心，并通过一致性加权聚合剩余标记，直接在语义空间而非物理布局中进行压缩，保持语义一致性。
AI.result: 在14个基准测试、两个骨干模型上，SeCo在下游任务性能、推理延迟和域外鲁棒性方面均表现出优越性。
AI.conclusion: SeCo通过语义一致性上下文压缩，克服了位置偏差瓶颈，实现了高效且鲁棒的长上下文压缩。

title: Simultaneous Monitoring of Shape and Surface Color via 4D Point Clouds: A Registration-free Approach
summary: Advanced manufacturing technologies allow for the production of intricate parts featuring high shape complexity and spatially-varying material composition. Data fusion of point clouds with chromatic attributes provides 4D point clouds, a compact and informative representation that encodes both shape and material information. In this paper, we present a registration-free framework for Simultaneous Monitoring of shApe and Color (SMAC) via 4D point clouds. The proposed framework leverages Laplace-Beltrami operator spectral properties to capture and monitor geometric features and the relationship between shape and surface color. A combined monitoring scheme is proposed to effectively detect shape deformations and color anomalies, along with a spatially-aware post-signal diagnostic procedure to determine the source of change and localize color anomalies. Importantly, neither component relies on registration or mesh reconstruction, eliminating error-prone and computationally expensive preprocessing steps. A Monte Carlo simulation study and a case study on functionally graded materials demonstrate that SMAC achieves effective detection performance, particularly for subtle defects, while providing diagnostic capabilities to identify the source and location of anomalies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于4D点云（形状+颜色）的无配准监控框架SMAC，利用拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子谱特性同时检测形状变形和颜色异常，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟和功能梯度材料案例验证了其对微小缺陷的有效检测和诊断能力。
AI.motivation: 先进制造技术可生产形状复杂且材料成分空间变化的零件，但现有方法依赖配准或网格重建，计算昂贵且易出错，缺乏同时监控形状和颜色的无配准框架。
AI.method: 利用拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子谱特性捕获几何特征及形状与表面颜色的关系；提出联合监控方案检测形状变形和颜色异常；开发空间感知的后信号诊断程序定位异常来源和颜色异常位置；全程无需配准或网格重建。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛模拟和功能梯度材料案例表明SMAC能有效检测微小缺陷，并具备识别异常来源和位置的能力。
AI.conclusion: SMAC是一种无配准、高效且具有诊断能力的4D点云监控框架，适用于复杂制造零件的形状与颜色同步异常检测。

title: Do LLMs Experience an Internal Polylogue? Investigating Reasoning through the Lens of Personas
summary: Recent work shows that large language models (LLMs) encode behavioural traits ("personas") as linear directions in activation space, often called "persona vectors". Prior work has used such directions as static handles for behavioural steering. Building on this, we treat them as dynamic signals instead: probes we can monitor and intervene on as reasoning unfolds. We use the term polylogue to denote the time series of alignments between persona vectors and hidden activations over the course of generation. Experiments across four open-weight models show that polylogue features predict correctness on MMLU-Pro competitively with low-dimensional activation baselines, while remaining interpretable through their associated persona directions. They also suggest concrete steering targets, namely which latent directions to modulate at different stages of a response. We instantiate this as a simple paragraph-conditioned intervention that improves accuracy on three of four models, pointing to stage-aware latent steering as a promising direction for reasoning-time control. Together, this positions the polylogue as an interpretable tool for reasoning-time monitoring and intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"polylogue"概念，将LLM中的"人格向量"从静态操控工具转变为动态监测信号，通过追踪推理过程中人格向量与隐藏激活的对齐时序，实现对模型推理过程的可解释监控与干预，并在MMLU-Pro上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将LLM中的人格向量视为静态的操控手柄，忽略了其在推理过程中动态变化的潜力。作者希望将这些向量作为动态信号来监测和干预推理过程，从而获得更细粒度的行为理解与控制。
AI.method: 提出polylogue概念，即人格向量与隐藏激活在生成过程中的对齐时间序列。通过对四个开源模型在MMLU-Pro上的实验，分析polylogue特征与正确率的关系，并基于段落条件实施简单的干预方法。
AI.result: Polylogue特征能够与低维激活基线竞争性地预测模型正确率，同时在人格方向方面保持可解释性。基于段落条件的干预方法在三个模型上提升了准确率。
AI.conclusion: Polylogue可作为推理阶段可解释的监测与干预工具，为"阶段感知的潜在操控"这一推理时控制方向提供了有力支持。

title: FinMoji: A Framework for Emoji-driven Sentiment Analysis in Financial Social Media
summary: This paper explores the use of emojis in financial sentiment analysis, focusing on the social media platform StockTwits. Emojis, increasingly prevalent in digital communication, have potential as compact indicators of investor sentiment, which can be critical for predicting market trends. Our study examines whether emojis alone can serve as reliable proxies for financial sentiment and how they compare with traditional text-based analysis. We conduct a series of experiments using logistic regression and transformer models. We further analyze the performance, computational efficiency, and data requirements of emoji-based versus text-based sentiment classification. Using a balanced dataset of about 528,000 emoji-containing StockTwits posts, we find that emoji-only models achieve F1 approximately 0.75, lower than text-emoji combined models, which achieve F1 approximately 0.88, but with far lower computational cost. This is a useful feature in time-sensitive settings such as high-frequency trading. Furthermore, certain emojis and emoji pairs exhibit strong predictive power for market sentiment, demonstrating over 90 percent accuracy in predicting bullish or bearish trends. Finally, our research reveals large statistical differences in emoji usage between financial and general social media contexts, stressing the need for domain-specific sentiment analysis models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究金融情绪分析中表情符号的作用，发现在StockTwits平台上，仅使用表情符号的模型（F1≈0.75）虽不如文本+表情符号的联合模型（F1≈0.88），但计算成本更低，某些表情符号对市场趋势预测准确率超过90%。研究还揭示了金融领域表情符号使用与一般社交媒体存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 探索表情符号能否作为金融情绪的可靠指标，以及与传统文本分析方法相比的优劣，旨在为时间敏感的高频交易场景提供高效的情绪分析方案。
AI.method: 使用约52.8万条StockTwits帖子构建平衡数据集，采用逻辑回归和Transformer模型进行实验，比较纯表情符号、纯文本以及文本+表情符号组合三种分类方法的性能、计算效率和数据需求。
AI.result: 纯表情符号模型F1约为0.75，文本+表情符号联合模型F1约为0.88；某些表情符号及表情符号对预测市场趋势准确率超90%；金融领域与通用社交媒体中表情符号的使用模式存在显著统计差异。
AI.conclusion: 表情符号在金融情绪分析中具有实用价值，尤其适用于对计算效率要求高的场景；需构建领域特定的情感分析模型，不能直接套用通用社交媒体中的表情符号分析模式。

title: Contour-Native Bridge Defect Detection and Compact Digital Archiving with Frequency-Supervised Fourier Contours
summary: AI-assisted bridge defect inspection often produces bounding boxes with crude geometry or raster masks that are costly to store, transmit, and reuse. This study investigates how detected defects can be represented as compact, recoverable contour-level vector records in image space. We propose Frequency-Supervised Fourier Series Detection (FS-FSD), which directly regresses Fourier contour descriptors and evaluates boxes, masks, and contours under a unified polygon-space protocol. On 3,767 UAV-collected bridge images with 42,346 defect instances, FS-FSD achieves higher polygon-space accuracy and better matched-TP geometric quality than representative detection, segmentation, and contour baselines. These results show that, compared with bounding boxes and raster masks, Fourier contour records preserve defect-boundary geometry in a more compact, recoverable, and shareable form for engineering review and downstream information workflows. Future work will study the modeling of multi-region, fragmented, and adjacent bridge-defect boundaries and extend the framework toward long-term bridge-defect tracking and lifecycle-oriented management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出频率监督傅里叶级数检测（FS-FSD），通过直接回归傅里叶轮廓描述符，以紧凑、可恢复的矢量形式表示桥梁缺陷边界，在3767张无人机采集图像上相比检测、分割和轮廓基线方法取得了更高的多边形空间精度和更好的几何质量。
AI.motivation: 现有AI辅助桥梁缺陷检测通常输出粗糙的边界框或存储成本高的栅格掩码，缺乏一种紧凑、可恢复且易于共享的缺陷边界表示形式，以支持工程审查和信息工作流。
AI.method: 提出FS-FSD方法，直接回归傅里叶轮廓描述符（Fourier contour descriptors），并在统一的多边形空间协议下评估边界框、掩码和轮廓。
AI.result: 在3767张无人机采集桥梁图像（42,346个缺陷实例）上，FS-FSD在多边形空间精度和匹配真阳性的几何质量上优于检测、分割和轮廓基线方法。
