These results suggest that visual-encoding efficiency can be substantially improved without sacrificing downstream performance, providing a practical design direction for efficient high-resolution MLLMs. All model weights and code will be publicly released to support further research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLaVA-UHD v4，通过切片编码（slice-based encoding）替代全局编码，并引入ViT内部早期压缩（intra-ViT early compression），在保持甚至提升下游任务性能的同时，将视觉编码FLOPs降低55.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs对高分辨率图像采用全局编码+后ViT压缩的策略，导致视觉编码成为计算瓶颈——全局编码产生大量token，后压缩无法避免ViT全二次注意力成本。作者希望重新审视编码策略和压缩时机，提升高分辨率输入的视觉编码效率。
AI.method: 1) 切片编码（slice-based encoding）：将图像切分为多个切片分别编码，保留局部细节信息；2) 早期压缩（intra-ViT early compression）：在ViT浅层即进行token缩减，而非等到ViT输出后再压缩，大幅降低计算量。两者结合形成LLaVA-UHD v4。
AI.result: 在文档理解、OCR、通用VQA等多个基准上，LLaVA-UHD v4相比基线减少55.8%视觉编码FLOPs，性能持平或超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 视觉编码效率可以在不牺牲下游性能的前提下大幅提升。切片编码优于全局编码，早期压缩优于后压缩，为高效高分辨率MLLMs提供了实际的设计方向。

title: Do Linear Probes Generalize Better in Persona Coordinates?
summary: It is becoming increasingly necessary to have monitors check for harmful behaviors during language model interactions, but text-only monitoring has not been sufficient. This is because models sometimes exhibit strategic deception and sandbagging, changing their behavior during evaluation. This motivates the use of white-box monitors like linear probes, which can read the model internals directly. Currently, such probes can fail under distribution shift, limiting their usefulness in real settings. We study whether there exists a low-dimensional subspace of the model internals that captures harmful behaviors more robustly, while leaving out spuriously correlative features. Inspired by the Assistant Axis and Persona Selection Model, we construct persona axes for deception and sycophancy using contrastive persona prompts. The first principal components, obtained by unsupervised PCA of the persona-specific vectors, cleanly separate harmful and harmless personas. Across 10 evaluation datasets, we show that persona-derived directions transfer non-trivially and probes trained on persona-PC projections generalize better than probes trained on raw activations. We also find that a unified axis consisting of multiple harmful and harmless behaviors improves generalization across behaviors and datasets. Overall, persona vectors provide a useful inductive bias for building more transferable behavior probes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用对比人格提示构建人格轴（persona axes），通过PCA降维得到能更鲁棒检测有害行为的低维子空间。该方法训练的探测比基于原始激活的探测具有更好的跨数据集泛化能力，并发现统一的人格轴能进一步改善跨行为和跨数据集的泛化。
AI.motivation: 文本监控无法检测模型在评估时的策略性欺骗和沙袋行为（sandbagging），而白盒探测器（如线性探测）在分布偏移下容易失效，亟需更鲁棒的内部分析方法。
AI.method: 受Assistant Axis和Persona Selection Model启发，使用对比人格提示构建欺骗与谄媚的人格轴；对人格特定向量进行无监督PCA，取第一主成分作为表征方向；在该低维投影上训练线性探测器。
AI.result: 在10个评估数据集上，基于人格主成分投影的探测器比基于原始激活的探测器具有更好的泛化能力；统一轴（整合多个有害/无害行为）进一步提升了跨行为和跨数据集的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 人格向量为构建更具可迁移性的行为探测器提供了有用的归纳偏置，有望在实际场景中更稳健地检测语言模型的有害行为。

title: Position: Academic Conferences are Potentially Facing Denominator Gaming Caused by Fully Automated Scientific Agents
summary: The implicit policy of maintaining relatively stable acceptance rates at top AI conferences, despite exponentially growing submissions, introduces a critical structural vulnerability. This position paper characterizes a new systemic threat we term Agentic Denominator Gaming, in which a malicious actor deploys AI agents to generate and submit a large volume of superficially plausible but low-quality papers. Crucially, their objective is not the acceptance of low-quality papers, but rather to inflate the submission denominator and overwhelm reviewing capacity. Under a relatively stable acceptance rate, this dilution can systematically increase the publication probability of a small, targeted set of legitimate papers. We analyze the practical feasibility of this threat and its broader consequences, including intensified reviewer burnout, degraded review quality, and the emergence of industrialized automated agent mills. Finally, we propose and evaluate a range of mitigation strategies, and argue that durable protection will require system-level policy and incentive reforms, rather than relying primarily on technical detection alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的系统性威胁——"Agentic Denominator Gaming"（代理分母游戏），即恶意行为者利用AI代理生成并提交大量低质量论文来膨胀投稿分母，从而在固定接收率下系统性提高目标合法论文的录用概率，并探讨了缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 顶级AI会议在投稿量指数级增长的情况下仍维持相对稳定的接收率，这种隐含政策引入了关键的结构性漏洞，可能被恶意利用。
AI.method: 通过分析"Agentic Denominator Gaming"威胁的可行性及其后果（审稿人倦怠、审稿质量下降、自动化代理工厂），并评估多种缓解策略。
AI.result: 论证了这种分母操控攻击在现实中具备可行性，并指出单纯依赖技术检测不足以防御，需要系统层面的政策和激励改革。
AI.conclusion: 持久有效的防御需要系统级的政策和激励改革，而非主要依赖技术检测手段。

title: CT-IDP: Segmentation-Derived Quantitative Phenotypes for Interpretable Abdominal CT Disease Classification
summary: In this retrospective multi-institutional study, a quantitative phenotyping framework, CT-IDP (CT Image-Derived Phenotypes) was developed on the MERLIN abdominal CT benchmark (training, validation, and test sets- 15,175, 5,018, and 5,082 studies, respectively) and externally evaluated on two independent dataset: Duke-Abdomen (2,000) and AMOS (1,107). Multi-organ segmentations were generated with TotalSegmentator and used to derive over 900 organ and compartment-level descriptors spanning morphometry, attenuation, and contextual/burden findings. Sparse disease-specific logistic regression with elastic-net regularization was trained on MERLIN and externally validated under a frozen specification. Performance was compared against a DINOv3-based vision-transformer baseline using AUC and average precision (AP), supported by phenotype-stratified audits and coefficient-level inspection. Macro-AUC for CT-IDP versus the baseline was 0.897 versus 0.880 on MERLIN, 0.877 versus 0.857 on the Duke-Abdomen dataset, and 0.780 versus 0.756 on AMOS.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了CT-IDP定量表型分析框架，基于腹部CT数据提取900+器官特征，使用弹性网络逻辑回归进行疾病预测，在三个独立数据集上表现优于DINOv3视觉Transformer基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CT的疾病预测方法多依赖深度学习黑箱模型，缺乏可解释性和可量化的生物学特征，亟需一种能从CT影像中提取可解释的定量表型特征的方法。
AI.method: 使用TotalSegmentator进行多器官分割，提取超过900个涵盖形态测量、衰减值和上下文/负荷特征的器官级描述符；采用弹性网络正则化的稀疏疾病特异性逻辑回归进行训练，并在冻结参数规范下进行外部验证。
AI.result: CT-IDP在MERLIN（0.897 vs 0.880）、Duke-Abdomen（0.877 vs 0.857）和AMOS（0.780 vs 0.756）三个数据集上的Macro-AUC均优于DINOv3视觉Transformer基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于定量影像表型的CT-IDP框架在腹部CT疾病预测任务中表现出比视觉Transformer更优的性能，且具有更好的可解释性和泛化能力。

title: Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning
summary: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个多模态时间序列分类的智能体推理框架MarsTSC，通过自进化知识库和反射式智能体推理，在少量样本下显著提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在少样本多模态时间序列分类任务中表现不佳，缺乏能动态积累和修正知识的推理机制。
AI.method: 构建三角色协作框架：Generator负责推理分类，Reflector诊断错误原因并提供判别性洞察，Modifier更新知识库防止上下文崩溃；同时引入测试时更新策略持续优化知识库。
AI.result: 在12个主流时间序列基准上，跨越6个VLM骨干网络均取得显著且一致的性能提升，优于经典方法和基于基础模型的方法。
AI.conclusion: MarsTSC在少样本条件下有效缓解了偏差和分布偏移问题，并能生成可解释的分类依据。

title: Team-Based Self-Play With Dual Adaptive Weighting for Fine-Tuning LLMs
summary: While recent self-training approaches have reduced reliance on human-labeled data for aligning LLMs, they still face critical limitations: (i) sensitivity to synthetic data quality, leading to instability and bias amplification in iterative training; (ii) ineffective optimization due to a diminishing gap between positive and negative responses over successive training iterations. In this paper, we propose Team-based self-Play with dual Adaptive Weighting (TPAW), a novel self-play algorithm designed to improve alignment in a fully self-supervised setting. TPAW adopts a team-based framework in which the current policy model both collaborates with and competes against historical checkpoints, promoting more stable and efficient optimization. To further enhance learning, we design two adaptive weighting mechanisms: (i) a response reweighting scheme that adjusts the importance of target responses, and (ii) a player weighting strategy that dynamically modulates each team member's contribution during training. Initialized from a SFT model, TPAW iteratively refines alignment without requiring additional human supervision. Experimental results demonstrate that TPAW consistently outperforms existing baselines across various base models and LLM benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/TPAW.

AI.tldr: TPAW是一种基于团队自对弈和双重自适应加权的无监督对齐算法，通过历史检查点协作与竞争，配合响应重加权和玩家加权策略，显著提升LLM对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法存在两个关键局限：(i)对合成数据质量敏感，导致迭代训练不稳定和偏差放大；(ii)正负响应差距逐渐缩小，导致优化效率下降。
AI.method: 提出TPAW算法：采用团队框架让当前策略模型与历史检查点既协作又竞争；设计两种自适应加权机制——响应重加权（调整目标响应重要性）和玩家加权策略（动态调节团队成员的贡献）。
AI.result: 在不同基础模型和LLM基准测试中，TPAW持续优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TPAW在完全自监督环境下有效提升LLM对齐性能，且无需额外人工标注，代码已开源。

title: FlashClear: Ultra-Fast Image Content Removal via Efficient Step Distillation and Feature Caching
summary: Recently, diffusion-based object removal models have achieved impressive results in eliminating objects and their associated visual effects. However, they indiscriminately denoise all tokens across all timesteps, ignoring that removal usually involves small foreground regions. This strategy introduces substantial computational overhead and prolonged inference times. To overcome this computational burden, we propose a latent discriminator to implement Region-aware Adversarial Distillation (RAD), yielding a highly efficient few-step model named FlashClear. Furthermore, tailored to few-step diffusion models, we propose FPAC (Foreground-Prioritized Asymmetric Attention and Caching), a training-free acceleration strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework provides massive acceleration while maintaining or exceeding the performance of our base model, ObjectClear. Notably, on the OBER benchmark, our FlashClear achieves up to 8.26$\times$ and 122$\times$ speedup over ObjectClear and OmniPaint, respectively, while maintaining high visual quality and fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlashClear，通过区域感知对抗蒸馏（RAD）和前景优先非对称注意力与缓存（FPAC）策略，在物体移除任务上实现8-122倍加速，同时保持或超越原有模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在物体移除时对所有token无差别去噪，忽略了移除仅涉及小前景区域，导致计算量大、推理时间长。
AI.method: 1) 提出区域感知对抗蒸馏（RAD），利用潜在判别器实现高效少步模型FlashClear；2) 针对少步扩散模型提出FPAC（前景优先非对称注意力与缓存），一种免训练加速策略。
AI.result: 在OBER基准上，FlashClear相较于ObjectClear加速8.26倍，相较于OmniPaint加速122倍，同时保持高视觉质量和保真度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在显著加速的同时维持或超越基模型性能，验证了区域感知策略在扩散模型加速中的有效性。

title: Strategic commitments shape collective cybersecurity under AI inequality
summary: The growing integration of AI into cybersecurity is reshaping the balance between attackers and defenders. When access to advanced AI-enabled defence tools is uneven, resource-limited defenders may be unable to adopt effective protection, creating persistent system vulnerabilities. We study the impact of differential AI access using an evolutionary game-theoretic model in a finite population. We first show that when high-capability defence is costly, the population is driven toward low-cost, weak-defence behaviour, sustaining attacks and weakening long-run security. To address this problem, we introduce differential access to AI defence tools by allowing defenders to choose between low- and high-capability protection based on their resources. We then examine the role of a small group of committed defenders who always adopt strong defence and influence others through social learning. Although commitment increases the prevalence of strong defence, it alone cannot stabilise secure outcomes due to high defence costs. We therefore incorporate a targeted subsidy to remove the cost disadvantage from committed defenders. Our analysis shows that subsidised commitment significantly increases strong defence adoption, suppresses successful attacks, and improves overall system resilience. Simulations across a broad parameter space confirm that subsidies consistently outperform commitment alone. In addition, social-welfare analysis shows improved defender outcomes while keeping attacker gains low. These findings suggest that targeted support for key defenders can be an effective mechanism for stabilising cybersecurity in AI-driven environments and provide a theoretical bridge between cybersecurity policy, AI governance, and strategic allocation of defensive AI capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文使用进化博弈论模型研究了AI防御工具的不平等获取问题。研究发现，当高性能防御成本高昂时，群体倾向于低成本弱防御，导致攻击持续。引入"承诺型防御者"（始终采用强防御的小群体）虽能增加强防御普及率，但无法单独稳定安全结果。通过定向补贴消除承诺型防御者的成本劣势后，强防御采纳率显著提升，攻击成功率降低，系统韧性增强。模拟和福利分析验证了补贴策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: AI在网络安全中的整合改变了攻防平衡，但高级AI防御工具获取不均导致资源有限的防御者无法有效保护系统，形成持续性漏洞。作者希望研究这种不平等获取的影响，并寻找稳定网络安全的机制。
AI.method: 使用有限种群进化博弈论模型，引入"承诺型防御者"概念（始终采用强防御的固定群体），并通过定向补贴机制消除防御成本差异。通过理论分析和广泛参数空间的仿真模拟验证策略效果。
AI.result: 1）高性能防御成本高时，群体自发趋向低成本弱防御；2）承诺型防御者单独作用无法稳定安全结果；3）定向补贴显著提高强防御采纳率、抑制攻击成功率、提升系统韧性；4）社会福利分析显示补贴改善了防御者结果，同时保持攻击者收益较低。
AI.conclusion: 定向补贴关键防御者是稳定AI驱动环境中网络安全的有效机制，为网络安全政策、AI治理与防御性AI能力战略分配提供了理论桥梁。

title: Evolving Knowledge Distillation for Lightweight Neural Machine Translation
summary: Recent advancements in Neural Machine Translation (NMT) have significantly improved translation quality. However, the increasing size and complexity of state-of-the-art models present significant challenges for deployment on resource-limited devices. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a promising approach for compressing models, but its effectiveness diminishes when there is a large capacity gap between teacher and student models. To address this issue, we propose Evolving Knowledge Distillation (EKD), a progressive training framework in which the student model learns from a sequence of teachers with gradually increasing capacities. Experiments on IWSLT-14, WMT-17, and WMT-23 benchmarks show that EKD leads to consistent improvements at each stage. On IWSLT-14, the final student achieves a BLEU score of 34.24, narrowing the gap to the strongest teacher (34.32 BLEU) to just 0.08 BLEU. Similar trends are observed on other datasets. These results demonstrate that EKD effectively bridges the capacity gap, enabling compact models to achieve performance close to that of much larger teacher models.Code and models are available at https://github.com/agi-content-generation/EKD.

AI.tldr: 提出渐进式知识蒸馏框架EKD，通过一系列容量递增的教师模型逐步训练学生模型，有效缩小师生模型间的容量差距，使紧凑模型性能接近大模型。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏在师生模型容量差距过大时效果下降，需要解决大模型压缩到小模型时的性能损失问题。
AI.method: EKD渐进训练框架：学生模型依次从一系列容量逐渐增大的教师模型中学习，实现渐进式蒸馏。
AI.result: 在IWSLT-14上学生模型BLEU达34.24，与最强教师模型(34.32)差距仅0.08；在WMT-17和WMT-23上也取得一致改进。
AI.conclusion: EKD能有效弥合容量差距，使紧凑模型达到接近大模型的性能，在资源受限设备部署上有重要价值。

title: The Direct Integration Theorem: A Rigorous Framework for Consistent Discrete Solutions of the Inverse Radon Problem
comment: Submitted to IEEE TPAMI. Code and data available at https://github.com/Mozerov-iitp/radon-dit/
summary: This paper presents a novel Direct Integration Theorem (DIT), derived as a non-trivial corollary of the classical Central Slice Theorem (CST). The DIT provides a mathematically consistent transition from the continuous to the discrete domain - a fundamental challenge in computed tomography - thereby eliminating the need for frequency-domain interpolation without resorting to conventional ramp-filtering. The proposed approach circumvents two principal limitations inherent in traditional methods: (i) the zero-frequency singularity and spectral distortions introduced by the mandatory ramp-filtering step, and (ii) discretization inaccuracies associated with frequency-domain interpolation. Based on the DIT, we develop a rigorous framework for consistent discrete solutions of the inverse Radon problem. Mathematical modeling demonstrates that this approach achieves quasi-exact reconstruction, with errors constrained solely by sampling parameters and grid geometry. Furthermore, while Filtered Back Projection (FBP) inherently distorts the variance of the reconstructed image, the DIT-based algorithm preserves it. Comparative simulations confirm that the proposed method eliminates common artifacts, such as intensity cupping, and consistently outperforms FBP in terms of PSNR, SSIM, and reprojection fidelity, faithfully restoring the original image's statistical characteristics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出直接积分定理（DIT），作为经典中心切片定理的推论，解决了CT重建中从连续到离散域的数学过渡问题，无需频域插值和传统斜坡滤波，实现准精确重建并保持图像统计特性。
AI.motivation: 传统CT重建方法（如FBP）存在两大局限：斜坡滤波引入零频奇异点和频谱畸变；频域插值导致离散化误差。本文旨在克服这些固有限制，提供一种数学上一致的离散逆Radon变换解决方案。
AI.method: 从中心切片定理推导直接积分定理（DIT），建立从连续到离散域的严格数学框架，绕过斜坡滤波和频域插值步骤，实现逆Radon问题的离散一致解。
AI.result: DIT方法实现准精确重建，误差仅受采样参数和网格几何约束；与FBP相比，消除了杯状伪影，在PSNR、SSIM和重投影保真度上一致优于FBP，并保留了重建图像的方差特性。
AI.conclusion: DIT为CT重建提供了一种数学上更严谨的替代方案，克服了FBP的固有限制，在保持统计特性的同时实现了更高质量的图像重建。

title: From Passive Reuse to Active Reasoning: Grounding Large Language Models for Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay
summary: While experience replay is essential for data efficiency in reinforcement learning (RL), standard methods treat the replay buffer as a passive memory system, prioritizing samples based on numerical prediction errors rather than their semantic significance. This approach stands in contrast to human learning, which accelerates mastery by actively abstracting fragmented experiences into behavioral rules. To bridge this gap, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay (NSER), a framework that transforms experience replay from a passive sample reuse mechanism into an active engine for knowledge construction. Specifically, NSER addresses the incompatibility between linguistic reasoning and numerical optimization through a novel neuro-symbolic grounding pipeline. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot manner to induce candidate behavioral rules from accumulated trajectories, grounds these insights into differentiable first-order logic representations, and utilizes the resulting symbolic structures to dynamically reweight the replay distribution. By allowing abstract knowledge to directly shape policy optimization, NSER achieves consistent superior sample efficiency and convergence speed across reactive, rule-based, and procedural benchmarks.

AI.tldr: NSER将经验回放从被动采样机制转变为主动知识构建引擎，通过LLM零样本提取行为规则并转化为可微逻辑表示，动态调整回放分布，显著提升样本效率和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 标准经验回放将回放缓冲区视为被动存储系统，仅基于数值预测误差采样，缺乏语义理解，与人类主动抽象经验为行为规则的学习方式存在差距。
AI.method: 提出神经符号经验回放框架(NSER)：1) 利用LLM零样本从累积轨迹中归纳候选行为规则；2) 将规则转化为可微一阶逻辑表示；3) 利用符号结构动态重加权回放分布，使抽象知识直接塑造策略优化。
AI.result: 在反应型、规则型和程序型基准测试中，NSER一致地实现了更优的样本效率和收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 通过桥接语言推理与数值优化之间的不兼容性，NSER将经验回放从被动采样转变为主动知识构建，有效提升了强化学习的数据效率。

title: PruneTIR: Inference-Time Tool Call Pruning for Effective yet Efficient Tool-Integrated Reasoning
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) enables large language models (LLMs) to enhance their capabilities by interacting with external tools, such as code interpreters (CI). Most recent studies focus on exploring various methods to equip LLMs with the ability to use tools. However, how to further boost the reasoning ability of already tool-capable LLMs at inference time remains underexplored. Improving reasoning at inference time requires no additional training and can help LLMs better leverage tools to solve problems. We observe that, during tool-capable LLM inference, both the number and the proportion of erroneous tool calls are negatively correlated with answer correctness. Moreover, erroneous tool calls are typically resolved successfully within a few subsequent turns. If not, LLMs often struggle to resolve such errors even with many additional turns. Building on the above observations, we propose PruneTIR, a rather effective yet efficient framework that enhances the tool-integrated reasoning at inference time. During LLM inference, PruneTIR prunes trajectories, resamples tool calls, and suspends tool usage through three components: Success-Triggered Pruning, Stuck-Triggered Pruning and Resampling, and Retry-Triggered Tool Suspension. These three components enable PruneTIR to mitigate the negative impact of erroneous tool calls and prevent LLMs from getting stuck in repeated failed resolution attempts, thereby improving overall LLM performance. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of PruneTIR, which significantly improves Pass@1 and efficiency while reducing the working context length for tool-capable LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PruneTIR框架，通过剪枝轨迹、重采样工具调用和暂停工具使用三种策略，在推理阶段提升已具备工具使用能力的大语言模型的推理表现，显著提高准确率和效率。
AI.motivation: 已有研究主要关注如何让LLM学会使用工具，但如何进一步提升已经具备工具使用能力的LLM在推理时的表现仍未被充分探索。推理时增强不需要额外训练，且能帮助LLM更好地利用工具解决问题。
AI.method: 基于观察（错误工具调用数量与回答正确性负相关，错误通常在少数轮次内解决），提出PruneTIR框架，包含三个组件：1) Success-Triggered Pruning（成功触发剪枝）；2) Stuck-Triggered Pruning and Resampling（卡住触发剪枝与重采样）；3) Retry-Triggered Tool Suspension（重试触发工具暂停）。
AI.result: 大量实验表明PruneTIR显著提升了Pass@1指标和效率，同时减少了工具具备型LLM的工作上下文长度。
AI.conclusion: PruneTIR通过有效的推理时干预策略，能够减轻错误工具调用的负面影响，防止LLM陷入重复失败的解决尝试中，从而提升整体性能。

title: Relightable Gaussian Splatting for Virtual Production Using Image-Based Illumination
summary: Virtual production (VP) use LED walls to provide both background imagery and image-based lighting. While this enables on-set compositing, it couples lighting to background and scene appearance, limiting flexibility for downstream editing. In addition, inverse rendering conventionally relies on physically-based rendering to estimates 3D geometry and lighting, using environment maps. However, these maps are typically low-resolution and assume far-field lighting. In VP, with near-field and high-resolution image-based lighting, this can lead to inaccuracies and introduce complexities when editing. Addressing this, we propose a VP-specific framework for 3D reconstruction and relighting using Gaussian Splatting. This uses the known background imagery to condition the relighting process. This avoids relying on environment maps and reduces compositing to a background-image editing task. To realize our framework, we introduce a process (and associated dataset) that captures real VP scenes under varying background content and illumination conditions. This data is used to decompose a 3D scene into fixed appearance and variable lighting components. The variable lighting process simulates light transport by parameterizing each primitive with a UV coordinate, intensity value and resolution modifier. Using mipmaps, these directly sample the background texture in image space - implicitly capturing reflections and refractions without physically-based rendering. Combined with the fixed appearance component, this allows us to render relit scenes using a Gaussian Splatting rasterizer. Compared to baselines, our approach achieves higher-quality 3D reconstruction and controllable relighting. The method is efficient (<3 GB RAM, <5 GB VRAM, <2 hours training, ~35 FPS) and supports rendering useful arbitrary output variables including depth, lighting intensity, lighting color, and unlit renders.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对虚拟制作的3D重建与重光照框架，利用高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）和已知背景图像实现无需环境映射的高效、可控重光照，支持实时渲染和低内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统虚拟制作中LED墙提供背景与光照但耦合了光照与场景外观，限制了后期编辑灵活性；传统逆渲染依赖低分辨率环境映射，在近场高分辨率光照下不准确且复杂。因此需要一种VP专用的解耦方案。
AI.method: 提出VP专用框架，使用高斯泼溅进行3D重建与重光照。利用已知背景图像调节重光照过程，替代环境映射。每个图元参数化为UV坐标、强度值和分辨率修饰符，通过mipmap直接采样背景纹理，隐式捕捉反射与折射，无需基于物理的渲染。结合固定外观组件，用高斯泼溅光栅化器渲染重光照场景。
AI.result: 相比基线方法，实现了更高质量的3D重建和可控重光照。效率高：<3GB RAM、<5GB VRAM、<2小时训练、~35 FPS。支持渲染深度、光照强度、光照颜色、未光照渲染等多种任意输出变量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VP框架有效解耦了光照与场景外观，避免了环境映射的局限性，实现了高效、高质量的重光照与编辑，适合虚拟制作实际应用。

title: SimWorld Studio: Automatic Environment Generation with Evolving Coding Agent for Embodied Agent Learning
summary: LLM/VLM-based digital agents have advanced rapidly thanks to scalable sandboxes for coding, web navigation, and computer use, which provide rich interactive training grounds. In contrast, embodied agents still lack abundant, diverse, and automatically generated 3D environments for interactive learning. Existing embodied simulators rely on manually crafted scenes or procedural templates, while recent LLM-based 3D generation systems mainly produce static scenes rather than deployable environments with verifiable tasks and standard learning interfaces. We introduce SimWorld Studio, an open-source platform built on Unreal Engine 5 for generating evolving embodied learning environments. At its core is SimCoder, a tool/skill-augmented coding agent that writes and executes engine-level code to construct physically grounded 3D worlds from language/image instructions. SimCoder self-evolves by using verifier feedback (e.g., compilation errors, physics checks, VLM critiques) to revise environments and autonomously add reusable tools and skills to its library. Generated worlds are exported as Gym-style environments for embodied agent learning. SimWorld Studio further enables co-evolution between environment generation and embodied learning: agent performance feedback guides SimCoder to generate adaptive curricula near the learner's capability frontier, so that environments become increasingly challenging as the embodied agent improves. Three case studies on embodied navigation show that self-evolution improves generation reliability, generated environments substantially improve embodied agent performance that generalizes to unseen benchmarks, and co-evolution yields an 18-point success-rate gain over fixed-environment learning and a 40-point gain over an untrained agent.

AI.tldr: 提出SimWorld Studio平台，通过自进化编码代理SimCoder在Unreal Engine 5中自动生成可交互的3D具身学习环境，并支持环境与代理的协同进化。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体缺乏丰富、多样且自动生成的3D交互环境，大多数3D生成系统只能产生静态场景，无法提供可验证任务和标准学习接口。
AI.method: 构建基于Unreal Engine 5的开源平台SimWorld Studio，核心是SimCoder代理：它通过编写和执行引擎级代码从语言/图像指令构建物理真实的3D世界，利用验证器反馈（编译错误、物理检查、VLM批评）自我进化，并自动将工具和技能加入库中；生成环境导出为Gym风格接口；支持环境生成与具身学习的协同进化。
AI.result: 在具身导航三个案例中：自进化提升生成可靠性；生成的环境显著提升具身代理性能并泛化到未见基准；协同进化相比固定环境学习提升18个百分点的成功率，相比未训练代理提升40个百分点。
AI.conclusion: SimWorld Studio实现了从静态场景生成到动态、可交互、自适应难度环境的跨越，为具身智能体学习提供了可扩展的自动环境生成方案。

title: FocuSFT: Bilevel Optimization for Dilution-Aware Long-Context Fine-Tuning
summary: Large language models can now process increasingly long inputs, yet their ability to effectively use information spread across long contexts remains limited. We trace this gap to how attention budget is spent during supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on long sequences: positional biases and attention sinks cause the model to allocate most of its attention to positionally privileged tokens rather than semantically relevant content. This training-time attention dilution (the starvation of content tokens in the attention distribution) weakens the gradient signal, limiting the model's ability to learn robust long-context capabilities. We introduce FocuSFT, a bilevel optimization framework that addresses this problem at training time. An inner loop adapts lightweight fast-weight parameters on the training context to form a parametric memory that concentrates attention on relevant content, and the outer loop performs SFT conditioned on this sharpened representation. Both loops apply bidirectional attention over context tokens while preserving causal masking for responses, reducing the causal asymmetry that gives rise to attention sinks and aligning inner-outer behavior. On BABILong, FocuSFT improves accuracy by up to +14pp across 4K--32K context lengths; on RULER, it raises CWE aggregation from 72.9\% to 81.1\% at 16K; and on GPQA with agentic tool use, it yields a 24\% relative gain in pass@1. Attention analysis shows that FocuSFT reduces attention sink mass by 529$\times$ and triples context engagement during training. Code: https://github.com/JarvisPei/FocuSFT

AI.tldr: FocuSFT通过双层优化框架在监督微调阶段解决长上下文注意力稀释问题，将注意力从位置特权token重新聚焦到语义相关内容，显著提升长上下文任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在处理长上下文时效果有限，原因是SFT阶段存在注意力稀释问题：位置偏置和注意力沉溺导致模型将大部分注意力分配给位置特权token（如序列开头/结尾），而非语义相关的内容，这削弱了梯度信号，限制了模型学习鲁棒长上下文能力。
AI.method: 提出FocuSFT双层优化框架：内循环在训练上下文中适配轻量级快速权重参数，形成参数化记忆以集中注意力于相关内容；外循环在此锐化表示条件下执行标准SFT。双向注意力用于上下文token，保留响应的因果掩码，减少因果不对称性。
AI.result: BABILong上4K-32K上下文长度准确率提升最高+14pp；RULER上16K时CWE聚合从72.9%提升至81.1%；GPQA代理工具使用中pass@1相对提升24%；注意力沉溺质量降低529倍，上下文参与度提升3倍。
AI.conclusion: 训练阶段的注意力稀释是限制LLM长上下文能力的关键因素，FocuSFT通过双层优化有效缓解该问题，为提升长上下文LLM训练提供了新范式。

title: MedFL-Stress: A Systematic Robustness Evaluation of Federated Brain Tumor Segmentation under Cross-Hospital MRI Appearance Shift
summary: Federated learning enables hospitals to collaboratively train segmentation models without sharing patient data. However, current evaluation protocols report only average performance across clients, masking failures at individual sites. In clinical deployment, a model that fails consistently at one hospital is a real safety risk that a good mean score can hide entirely. We introduce MedFL-Stress, a controlled stress-testing framework that exposes exactly this failure mode. Using 2D axial slices from BraTS 2020 distributed across four simulated hospital clients, we apply graded MRI appearance shifts (gamma contrast, scale-shift, and noise-plus-blur) reflecting scanner and acquisition variability in real multi-site deployments. Three federated baselines are evaluated: FedAvg, FedProx, and FedBN. Worst-hospital Dice and inter-hospital disparity are treated as primary metrics, not supplementary observations. FedAvg achieves the highest global mean Dice (0.8159) but conceals a 0.0850 gap between its best and worst-performing hospital. FedBN closes that gap by 41% (0.0850 to 0.0503) while sacrificing less than half a Dice point in mean accuracy (0.8159 to 0.8109), and the weakest hospital gains 3.5 Dice points outright (0.7309 to 0.7656). These findings demonstrate that robustness-oriented evaluation protocols are essential for reliable federated medical imaging deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 MedFL-Stress，一种针对联邦医学图像分割模型的压力测试框架，揭示仅靠平均性能指标会掩盖个别医院站点模型失败的风险。实验表明 FedBN 在保持高均值的同时显著缩小了医院间性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有评估仅报告所有客户端的平均性能，掩盖了单个医院站点的模型失败。在临床部署中，模型在某一医院持续失败是真实的安全隐患，而高分均值完全可能隐藏这一问题。
AI.method: 提出 MedFL-Stress 压力测试框架，利用 BraTS 2020 的 2D 轴向切片分布在四个模拟医院客户端上，应用逐步 MRI 外观偏移（Gamma 对比度、尺度偏移、噪声加模糊）来模拟真实多站点部署中的扫描仪和采集差异。评估三种联邦基线：FedAvg、FedProx 和 FedBN，将最差医院 Dice 和医院间差异作为主要指标。
AI.result: FedAvg 全局均值 Dice 最高（0.8159），但最佳与最差医院间存在 0.0850 的差距。FedBN 将差距缩小 41%（降至 0.0503），均值仅损失不到 0.5 个 Dice 点（降至 0.8109），最弱医院直接提升 3.5 个 Dice 点（0.7309→0.7656）。
AI.conclusion: 面向鲁棒性的评估协议对于可靠的联邦医学影像部署至关重要。

title: VulTriage: Triple-Path Context Augmentation for LLM-Based Vulnerability Detection
summary: Automated vulnerability detection is a fundamental task in software security, yet existing learning-based methods still struggle to capture the structural dependencies, domain-specific vulnerability knowledge, and complex program semantics required for accurate detection. Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong code understanding ability, but directly prompting them with raw source code often leads to missed vulnerabilities or false alarms, especially when vulnerable and benign functions differ only in subtle semantic details. To address this, we propose VulTriage, a triple-path context augmentation framework for LLM-based vulnerability detection. VulTriage enhances the LLM input through three complementary paths: a Control Path that extracts and verbalizes AST, CFG, and DFG information to expose control and data dependencies; a Knowledge Path that retrieves relevant CWE-derived vulnerability patterns and examples through hybrid dense--sparse retrieval; and a Semantic Path that summarizes the functional behavior of the code before the final judgment. These contexts are integrated into a unified instruction to guide the LLM toward more reliable vulnerability reasoning. Experiments on the PrimeVul pair test set show that VulTriage achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing deep learning and LLM-based baselines on key pair-wise and classification metrics. Further ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each path, and additional experiments on the Kotlin dataset demonstrate the generalization ability of VulTriage under low-resource and class-imbalanced settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/vinsontang1/VulTriage

AI.tldr: 提出VulTriage，一个三路径上下文增强框架，通过控制流、知识库和语义三条路径增强LLM输入，提升漏洞检测性能，在PrimeVul和Kotlin数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的漏洞检测方法难以捕捉结构依赖、领域知识和复杂程序语义；直接使用LLM检测原始代码易漏报误报，尤其当漏洞函数与正常函数仅存在细微语义差异时。
AI.method: VulTriage框架包含三条互补路径：1）控制路径（Control Path）提取并文本化AST、CFG、DFG信息以暴露控制与数据依赖；2）知识路径（Knowledge Path）通过混合稠密-稀疏检索获取CWE漏洞模式与示例；3）语义路径（Semantic Path）在最终判断前总结代码功能行为。三者整合为统一指令引导LLM推理。
AI.result: 在PrimeVul配对测试集上达到SOTA，超越现有深度学习和LLM基线；消融实验验证各路径有效性；在Kotlin数据集上展示低资源、类别不平衡场景下的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多路径上下文增强能有效提升LLM在漏洞检测任务上的表现，尤其适用于细微语义差异场景，具有良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。

title: TRACER: Verifiable Generative Provenance for Multimodal Tool-Using Agents
summary: Multimodal large language models increasingly solve vision-centric tasks by calling external tools for visual inspection, OCR, retrieval, calculation, and multi-step reasoning. Current tool-using agents usually expose the executed tool trajectory and the final answer, but they rarely specify which tool observation supports each generated claim. We call this missing claim-level dependency structure the provenance gap. The gap makes tool use hard to verify and hard to optimize, because useful evidence, redundant exploration, and unsupported reasoning are mixed in the same trajectory. We introduce TRACER, a framework for verifiable generative provenance in multimodal tool-using agents. Instead of adding citations after generation, TRACER generates each answer sentence together with a structured provenance record that identifies the supporting tool turn, evidence unit, and semantic support relation. Its relation space contains Quotation, Compression, and Inference, covering direct reuse, faithful condensation, and grounded derivation. TRACER verifies each record through schema checking, tool-turn alignment, source authenticity, and relation rationality, and then converts verified provenance into traceability constraints and provenance-derived local credit for reinforcement learning. We further construct TRACE-Bench, a benchmark for sentence-level provenance reconstruction from coarse multimodal tool trajectories. On TRACE-Bench, simply adding tools often introduces noise. With Qwen3-VL-8B, TRACER reaches 78.23% answer accuracy and 95.72% summary accuracy, outperforming the strongest closed-source tool-augmented baseline by 23.80 percentage points. Compared with tool-only supervised fine-tuning, it also reduces total test-set tool calls from 4949 to 3486. These results show that reliable multimodal tool reasoning depends on provenance-aware use of observations, not on more tool calls alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRACER框架，为多模态工具智能体生成的每个句子附带结构化溯源记录（包含支持工具轮次、证据单元和语义支持关系），并通过TRACE-Bench验证该方法在答案准确率（78.23%）和总结准确率（95.72%）上显著优于基线，同时减少了工具调用次数。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态工具智能体在执行任务时会暴露工具调用轨迹和最终答案，但很少说明每个生成的主张（claim）具体由哪个工具观测结果支持，这种缺失的"溯源鸿沟"使得工具使用难以验证和优化，有用证据、冗余探索和未受支持的推理混杂在一起。
AI.method: TRACER框架在生成每个答案句子时附带结构化溯源记录，包含三个要素：支持工具轮次、证据单元和语义支持关系。其关系空间分为三类——引述（Quotation）、压缩（Compression）和推理（Inference），分别对应直接复用、忠实凝练和有根据的推导。通过模式检查、工具轮次对齐、来源真实性和关系合理性进行验证，并将验证后的溯源转化为可追溯性约束和局部信用信号用于强化学习。
AI.result: 在TRACE-Bench上，基于Qwen3-VL-8B的TRACER达到78.23%答案准确率和95.72%总结准确率，比最强的闭源工具增强基线高23.80个百分点。与仅使用工具监督微调相比，总测试集工具调用从4949次减少到3486次。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的多模态工具推理依赖于对观测结果的溯源感知使用，而非单纯增加工具调用次数。

title: When Style Similarity Scores Fail: Diagnosing Raw CSD Cosine in Artist-Style Evaluation
summary: Raw cosine in the 768-dimensional output space of the Contrastive Style Descriptor (CSD) is now widely read as an absolute, calibrated style-fidelity score for text-to-image and style-imitation evaluation. We introduce the discrimination gap, a corpus-internal, prototype-free and threshold-free diagnostic that tests whether contrastive style cosines admit an absolute same-versus-different interpretation on a candidate artist corpus. On a 1799-artwork, 91-artist public-domain corpus, raw CSD cosine yields negative point-estimate gaps for $23/91$ artists at the pairwise level ($2/91$ robust under bootstrap) and for $15/91$ in the aggregated-pool scoring regime style-fidelity evaluations typically use. CSLS readout on the frozen backbone reduces the aggregated negative-gap count to $4/91$; combined with positional-embedding interpolation to $336$ pixels it raises unsupervised pair-verification AUC from $0.883$ to $0.905$ across $25$ artist-disjoint splits. We refer to this diagnostic-driven readout protocol on the frozen backbone (CSLS as default, pos-interp $336$ as the stronger optional setting) as CSD+, not a new encoder.A cross-backbone check on CLIP-ViT-L/14, SigLIP-large and DINOv2-Large reproduces the same shared-tradition failure pattern, providing evidence that the residual reflects a shared limitation of the four backbones we tested rather than a CSD-specific artefact. Practical implication: before reporting CSD cosine as an absolute style-fidelity score, run the diagnostic on the candidate corpus; CSLS is the minimal correction when it fails.

AI.tldr: 本文发现CSD的原始余弦相似度作为风格 fidelity 评分存在系统性偏差（在91位艺术家中，23位出现负判别间隙），提出CSD+诊断协议（CSLS + 位置编码插值至336像素）来修正该问题，将无监督成对验证AUC从0.883提升至0.905。
AI.motivation: CSD余弦相似度被广泛用作绝对、校准的风格 fidelity 评分，但该假设是否成立缺乏系统检验。作者希望提出一个无需原型、无需阈值的诊断方法，检验对比风格余弦是否能在候选艺术家语料库上实现"相同vs不同"的绝对解读。
AI.method: 提出"判别间隙"（discrimination gap）作为 corpus-internal 诊断指标；采用CSLS（对比风格相似度）替代原始余弦；引入位置编码插值至336像素；组合形成CSD+协议。在1799幅作品、91位艺术家的公共领域语料库上进行交叉骨干网络（CLIP-ViT-L/14, SigLIP-large, DINOv2-Large）验证。
AI.result: 原始CSD余弦在成对级对23/91位艺术家产生负点估计间隙（稳健Bootstrap下2/91），聚合池评分模式下15/91。CSLS将聚合负间隙降至4/91；结合位置插值至336像素，无监督成对验证AUC从0.883提升至0.905。交叉骨干网络验证表明该失败模式是共享的，非CSD特有。
AI.conclusion: 在将CSD余弦报告为绝对风格 fidelity 评分前，应在候选语料库上运行判别间隙诊断；CSLS是最小修正方案，位置插值336为更强可选项。推荐CSD+（frozen backbone + CSLS + pos-interp 336）作为标准化读数协议。

title: Don't Click That: Teaching Web Agents to Resist Deceptive Interfaces
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference. 23 pages, 8 figures, 19 tables
summary: Vision-language model (VLM) based web agents demonstrate impressive autonomous GUI interaction but remain vulnerable to deceptive interface elements. Existing approaches either detect deception without task integration or document attacks without proposing defenses. We formalize deception-aware web agent defense and propose DUDE (Deceptive UI Detector & Evaluator), a two-stage framework combining hybrid-reward learning with asymmetric penalties and experience summarization to distill failure patterns into transferable guidance. We introduce RUC (Real UI Clickboxes), a benchmark of 1,407 scenarios spanning four domains and deception categories. Experiments show DUDE reduces deception susceptibility by 53.8% while maintaining task performance, establishing an effective foundation for robust web agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUDE框架，通过混合奖励学习与非对称惩罚机制，结合经验总结将失败模式转化为可迁移指导，显著降低VLM网页代理对欺骗性界面的敏感度（降低53.8%），同时保持任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM网页代理易受欺骗性界面元素攻击，但已有方法要么仅检测欺骗而不与任务集成，要么只记录攻击而不提出防御方案，缺乏系统性的防御框架。
AI.method: 提出DUDE（Deceptive UI Detector & Evaluator）两阶段框架：第一阶段采用混合奖励学习（hybrid-reward learning）与非对称惩罚（asymmetric penalties）；第二阶段利用经验总结（experience summarization）将失败模式蒸馏为可迁移的指导知识。
AI.result: 在包含1,407个场景、覆盖四个领域和欺骗类别的RUC基准上，DUDE将欺骗敏感度降低53.8%，同时维持任务性能不显著下降。
AI.conclusion: DUDE为鲁棒网页代理部署提供了有效基础，证明了将欺骗检测与任务执行深度集成的防御思路的可行性。

title: Beyond Majority Voting: Agreement-Based Clustering to Model Annotator Perspectives in Subjective NLP Tasks
summary: Disagreement in annotation is a common phenomenon in the development of NLP datasets and serves as a valuable source of insight. While majority voting remains the dominant strategy for aggregating labels, recent work has explored modeling individual annotators to preserve their perspectives. However, modeling each annotator is resource-intensive and remains underexplored across various NLP tasks. We propose an agreement-based clustering technique to model the disagreement between the annotators. We conduct comprehensive experiments in 40 datasets in 18 typologically diverse languages, covering three subjective NLP tasks: sentiment analysis, emotion classification, and hate speech detection. We evaluate four aggregation approaches: majority vote, ensemble, multi-label, and multitask. The results demonstrate that agreement-based clustering can leverage the full spectrum of annotator perspectives and significantly enhance classification performance in subjective NLP tasks compared to majority voting and individual annotator modeling. Regarding the aggregation approach, the multi-label and multitask approaches are better for modeling clustered annotators than an ensemble and model majority vote.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于标注者一致性聚类的方法来建模标注分歧，在40个数据集、18种语言、三个主观NLP任务上实验，证明该方法相比多数投票和单独建模每个标注者能显著提升分类性能，且多标签和多任务聚合方法优于集成和多数投票。
AI.motivation: NLP数据集中标注分歧普遍存在且有价值，但多数投票仍是主流聚合策略。虽然已有工作探索建模个体标注者以保留其视角，但该方法资源消耗大，且在多种NLP任务中尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出基于一致性的聚类技术来建模标注者之间的分歧。在40个数据集、18种语言上，针对情感分析、情绪分类、仇恨言论检测三个主观NLP任务，比较了四种聚合方法：多数投票、集成、多标签和多任务。
AI.result: 基于一致性的聚类能够利用标注者视角的完整频谱，相比多数投票和个体标注者建模，显著提升了主观NLP任务的分类性能。在多标签和多任务聚合方法上表现优于集成和多数投票。
AI.conclusion: 基于一致性的聚类是一种有效且资源更优的标注分歧建模方法，能在主观NLP任务中取得更好的分类效果，推荐使用多标签或多任务方式进行聚合。

title: SeasonScapes: Learning Large-scale Re-lightable 3D Landscapes with Seasonal Variation from Sparse Webcams
summary: We introduce SeasonScapes framework and a the SeasonScapes dataset: Swiss Sparse-view Mountain Scenes with Seasonal Changes that covers over 50 km x 60 km, composed of more than 85,000 webcam images captured from 32 different locations across 13 timestamps throughout a full year. By projecting these timestamp-specific images onto a 3D mesh, we construct seasonal 3D landscapes that reflect natural appearance changes over time. To address occlusions and missing data, we leverage conditional diffusion models for image-guided inpainting directly on the mesh. The resulting completed meshes can be further relighted using standard physically-based renderer.

AI.tldr: 提出了SeasonScapes框架和数据集，包含超过85,000张覆盖50km x 60km瑞士山区、跨一整年13个时间戳的网络摄像头图像，通过投影到3D网格并结合条件扩散模型进行修复，构建反映季节性变化的3D景观。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景重建方法缺乏对长时间跨度的季节性外观变化（如植被颜色变化、积雪覆盖等）的建模能力，需要一种能够捕捉自然场景随时间动态变化的方法。
AI.method: 1) 构建包含多时间戳图像的SeasonScapes数据集；2) 将时间戳特定图像投影到3D网格上构建季节性3D景观；3) 使用条件扩散模型在网格上直接进行图像引导的修复以处理遮挡和缺失数据；4) 完成后的网格可通过标准物理渲染器重新照明。
AI.result: 构建了覆盖50km x 60km、包含85,000+张图像、32个不同地点、13个时间戳的大型数据集，成功实现了季节性变化的3D景观重建。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效捕捉和重建自然场景随季节变化的外观动态，并支持后续的重新照明等应用。

title: EpiGraph: A Knowledge Graph and Benchmark for Evidence-Intensive Reasoning in Epilepsy
summary: Epilepsy diagnosis and treatment require evidence-intensive reasoning across heterogeneous clinical knowledge, including biosignal patterns, genetic mechanisms, pharmacogenomics, treatment strategies, and patient outcomes. In this work, we present \textsc{EpiGraph}, a large-scale epilepsy knowledge graph and benchmark for evaluating knowledge-augmented clinical reasoning. \textsc{EpiGraph} integrates 48,166 peer-reviewed papers and seven clinical resources into a heterogeneous graph containing 24,324 entities and 32,009 evidence-grounded triplets across five clinical layers. Built upon this graph, \textsc{EpiBench} defines five clinically motivated tasks spanning clinical decision-making, EEG report generation, pharmacogenomic precision medicine, treatment recommendation, and deep research planning. We evaluate six LLMs under both standard and Graph-RAG settings. Results show that integrating \textsc{EpiGraph} consistently improves performance across all tasks, with the largest gains observed in pharmacogenomic reasoning (+30--41\%). Our findings demonstrate that structured epilepsy knowledge substantially enhances evidence-grounded clinical reasoning and provides a practical benchmark framework for evaluating knowledge-augmented LLMs in real-world neurological settings. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LabRAI/EEG-KG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个大规模癫痫知识图谱EpiGraph（含48,166篇论文、7个临床资源、24,324个实体和32,009个三元组）及相应基准EpiBench（涵盖5个临床任务）。实验表明，在图增强检索（Graph-RAG）设置下，LLM在各项任务中均获得提升，尤其在药物基因组学推理中提升30-41%。
AI.motivation: 癫痫诊断和治疗需要跨多种异构临床知识（生物信号模式、遗传机制、药物基因组学、治疗策略和患者结局）进行证据密集型的临床推理，现有知识图谱缺乏针对癫痫领域的规模化构建与系统性评估基准。
AI.method: 1) 构建EpiGraph：整合48,166篇同行评审论文和7个临床资源，形成包含24,324个实体和32,009个三元组的异构图，覆盖5个临床层；2) 定义EpiBench：包含临床决策、脑电图报告生成、药物基因组学精准医学、治疗推荐和深度研究规划5项任务；3) 在标准设置和图增强检索（Graph-RAG）设置下评估6个LLM。
AI.result: 集成EpiGraph在所有任务上持续提升LLM性能，药物基因组学推理任务提升最大（30-41%）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化癫痫知识能显著增强基于证据的临床推理能力，EpiGraph/EpiBench为评估知识增强型LLM在真实神经学场景中的表现提供了实用基准框架。

title: GLiNER2-PII: A Multilingual Model for Personally Identifiable Information Extraction
summary: Reliable detection of personally identifiable information (PII) is increasingly important across modern data-processing systems, yet the task remains difficult: PII spans are heterogeneous, locale-dependent, context-sensitive, and often embedded in noisy or semi-structured documents. We present GLiNER2-PII, a small 0.3B-parameter model adapted from GLiNER2 and designed to recognize a broad taxonomy of 42 PII entity types at character-span resolution. Training such systems, however, is constrained by the scarcity of shareable annotated data and the privacy risks associated with collecting real PII at scale. To address this challenge, we construct a multilingual synthetic corpus of 4,910 annotated texts using a constraint-driven generation pipeline that produces diverse, realistic examples across languages, domains, formats, and entity distributions. On the challenging SPY benchmark, GLiNER2-PII achieves the highest span-level F1 among five compared systems, including OpenAI Privacy Filter and three GLiNER-based detectors. We publicly release the model on Hugging Face to support further research and practical deployment of open PII detection systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLiNER2-PII，一个0.3B参数的PII检测模型，能识别42种PII实体类型。为解决隐私数据稀缺问题，构建了包含4,910条多语言合成文本的数据集。在SPY基准上取得最高F1分数，模型已在Hugging Face开源。
AI.motivation: 现代数据处理系统中可靠检测个人身份信息(PII)越来越重要，但任务难度大：PII类型异构、依赖地区、上下文敏感，且常嵌入嘈杂或半结构化文档中。同时，可共享的标注数据稀缺，大规模收集真实PII存在隐私风险。
AI.method: 基于GLiNER2模型微调出0.3B参数的GLiNER2-PII，支持42种PII实体类型的字符级识别。使用约束驱动的生成流水线构建了包含4,910个标注文本的多语言合成语料库，覆盖多种语言、领域、格式和实体分布。
AI.result: 在SPY基准上，GLiNER2-PII在字符级F1分数上超越OpenAI Privacy Filter和三个GLiNER基检测器等五种对比系统，取得最高性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种高效的小参数PII检测模型，通过合成数据解决了隐私标注数据稀缺问题，在基准测试中表现优异，并开源以支持后续研究和实际部署。

title: LCGNav: Local Candidate-Aware Geometric Enhancement for General Topological Planning in Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Online topological planning has become an effective paradigm for Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE), but existing methods still suffer from two limitations: redundant local depth information and weakened focus on current frontier candidates as the topological graph grows. To address this, we propose LCGNav, a modular local geometric enhancement framework for topological VLN. LCGNav explicitly converts candidate depth views into 3D point clouds and applies physical truncation based on the agent's reachable range, enabling more compact local geometric modeling. It further introduces a dimension-preserving local fusion strategy with transient state degradation, so that geometric enhancement is applied only to the currently relevant ghost nodes without changing the original planner interface. Experiments on R2R-CE and RxR-CE show that LCGNav serves as an effective cross-architecture enhancement module, consistently improving multiple key metrics of representative online topological baselines with low additional training cost. When integrated with ETP-R1, LCGNav achieves the best performance among the compared online topological methods on the val-unseen splits of the R2R-CE and RxR-CE benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/shannanshouyin/LCGNav.

AI.tldr: LCGNav是一个模块化的局部几何增强框架，通过将深度图转为3D点云并物理截断，以及引入维度保持的局部融合策略，有效解决了VLN-CE中拓扑规划的冗余深度信息和候选焦点弱化问题，显著提升了多个基线模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有在线拓扑规划方法存在两个局限：冗余的局部深度信息（缺乏紧凑几何建模）以及随着拓扑图增长对当前前沿候选节点的关注被弱化。
AI.method: 1) 将候选深度视图显式转换为3D点云，基于智能体可达范围进行物理截断，实现更紧凑的局部几何建模；2) 引入维度保持的局部融合策略与瞬态状态退化，使几何增强仅作用于当前相关的ghost节点，不改变原始规划器接口。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE和RxR-CE上，LCGNav作为跨架构增强模块，一致提升了多个在线拓扑基线的关键指标；与ETP-R1集成后在val-unseen上达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: LCGNav是一种高效、通用的增强模块，以较低训练成本即可提升多种在线拓扑方法的性能，代码已开源。

title: WindINR: Latent-State INR for Fast Local Wind Query and Correction in Complex Terrain
summary: Many downstream decisions in complex terrain require fast wind estimates at a small number of user-specified locations and heights for a given forecast valid time, rather than another dense forecast field on a fixed grid. We present WindINR, a latent-state implicit neural representation framework for continuous high-resolution local wind query and sparse-observation correction. WindINR maps static terrain descriptors, a low-resolution background field, and continuous query coordinates to a high-resolution wind state through a latent-conditioned decoder. To enable rapid inference-time correction, WindINR separates reusable representation learning from sample-specific latent-state correction. During training, a privileged encoder infers a reference latent state from high-resolution supervision, a deployable latent predictor estimates an initial latent state from inference-time inputs alone, and their discrepancies are summarized into a dataset-adaptive Gaussian prior over latent corrections. At inference time, within the WindINR module, network weights remain fixed and only the latent state is updated by minimizing a regularized correction objective using sparse observations and their uncertainty. In controlled OSSEs over the Senja region, including a UAV-aided approach scenario and random-observation robustness tests, WindINR improves local high-resolution wind estimates by updating only a compact latent state rather than the full network. The corrected representation remains continuously queryable at arbitrary coordinates and, in our CPU benchmark, yields about a $2.6\times$ online-correction speedup over full-network fine-tuning, suggesting a practical interface between kilometer-scale background products, sparse local observations, and wind queries in complex terrain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WindINR，一种隐式神经表示框架，通过潜在状态校正实现复杂地形下连续、高分辨率的风场查询，支持稀疏观测快速修正，在CPU上比全网络微调快约2.6倍。
AI.motivation: 复杂地形中的下游决策需要在特定位置和高度快速获取风估计，而非固定网格的稠密预报场。现有方法难以同时满足高分辨率连续查询和稀疏观测快速校正的需求。
AI.method: WindINR框架包含：1) 潜在状态隐式神经表示，将静态地形描述、低分辨率背景场和连续查询坐标映射到高分辨率风场；2) 训练阶段分离可复用表示学习与样本特定潜在状态校正（特权编码器、可部署预测器、数据集自适应高斯先验）；3) 推理阶段仅更新潜在状态而非整个网络，通过最小化正则化校正目标融合稀疏观测及其不确定性。
AI.result: 在Senja地区的OSSE实验（含无人机辅助场景和随机观测鲁棒性测试）中，WindINR仅通过更新紧凑潜在状态即可提升局地高分辨率风估计；在CPU基准测试中，在线校正速度较全网络微调提升约2.6倍。
AI.conclusion: WindINR提供了一个实用的接口，连接公里尺度背景产品、稀疏局部观测和复杂地形中的风查询，兼具连续查询能力和高效在线校正优势。

title: Merlin: Deterministic Byte-Exact Deduplication for Lossless Context Optimization in Large Language Model Inference
comment: Preprint. Implementation and open-source community version available at: https://github.com/corbenicai/merlin-community - https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20090991
summary: Data-intensive applications, ranging from large-scale retrieval systems to advanced data pipelines, are increasingly bottlenecked by the processing of highly redundant text corpora. We present Merlin, a local-first, agnostic, high-throughput deduplication and context optimization engine designed to mitigate these inefficiencies. Utilizing a highly optimized, SIMD-friendly open-addressing flat hash set combined with xxHash3-64, Merlin performs rapid, byte-exact deduplication of text passages and data chunks. While broadly applicable to any text-processing workflow, its impact is particularly pronounced in Large Language Model (LLM) ecosystems, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Our empirical evaluations demonstrate an input reduction ranging from 13.9% in low-redundancy datasets to over 71% in high-redundancy pipelines, maintaining absolute data fidelity. Furthermore, we detail the system's integration architecture via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling secure, zero-network-interception deployment across major IDEs and autonomous agents. This paper outlines the core algorithmic design, performance benchmarks, and the architectural principles required to process data at sustained speeds of up to 8.7 GB/s.

AI.tldr: Merlin是一个本地优先、高吞吐量的文本去重与上下文优化引擎，基于SIMD优化的开放寻址哈希表和xxHash3-64实现字节级精确去重，在RAG等LLM生态中可将输入量减少13.9%~71%以上，速度达8.7 GB/s，并通过MCP协议实现安全部署。
AI.motivation: 数据密集型应用（如大规模检索系统和LLM管道）正面临高度冗余文本数据的处理瓶颈，现有方案效率不足，亟需一种高速、精确且通用的去重与上下文优化引擎。
AI.method: 采用高度优化的、支持SIMD的开放寻址平坦哈希集合，结合xxHash3-64哈希函数，实现字节级精确的文本段落与数据块去重。系统通过Model Context Protocol (MCP) 集成到IDE和自主代理中，无需网络拦截即可安全部署。
AI.result: 在低冗余数据集上实现13.9%的输入缩减，在高冗余管道中超过71%，保持数据完全保真度，处理速度持续高达8.7 GB/s。
AI.conclusion: Merlin作为一种通用、本地优先、高吞吐量的去重与上下文优化方案，在LLM生态系统（特别是RAG）中具有显著效果，其MCP集成架构为安全部署提供了可行路径。

title: Dependency-Aware Discrete Diffusion for Scene Graph Generation
summary: Scene graphs (SGs) represent objects and their relationships as structured graphs, enabling applications in image generation, robotics, and 3D understanding. Recent work suggests that conditioning image generation on scene graphs improves compositional fidelity compared to text-only prompting. However, since users typically provide text rather than structured graphs, a key challenge is to generate scene graphs from natural language. Prior work on discrete diffusion has demonstrated success in generating generic graphs such as molecules and circuits, but fails to account for the hierarchical structure and strong dependencies between objects, edges, and relations in scene graphs. We address this limitation by introducing a dependency-aware, hierarchically constrained discrete diffusion model for scene graph generation. Our approach decouples structure and semantics across the forward and reverse processes, enabling the model to capture conditional dependencies. At inference time, we perform training-free conditioning to sample text-aligned scene graphs. We evaluate our method on standard SG benchmarks and demonstrate improvements over both continuous and discrete graph generation baselines across graph and layout metrics. When fed to downstream image generation, our approach yields improved compositional alignment compared to text-to-image models, particularly in multi-object scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种依赖感知、层次约束的离散扩散模型，用于从自然语言生成场景图，在标准基准测试和下游图像生成任务中均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法无法有效处理自然语言到场景图的转换，离散扩散模型未能捕捉场景图中对象、边和关系之间的层次结构与强依赖性。
AI.method: 提出依赖感知、层次约束的离散扩散模型，在正向和反向过程中解耦结构与语义，以捕捉条件依赖关系；推理时采用无训练条件采样生成与文本对齐的场景图。
AI.result: 在标准场景图基准测试中，在图像和布局指标上均优于连续和离散图生成基线；下游图像生成在多目标场景中提升了组合对齐能力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效解决了场景图生成中的层次依赖问题，提升了文本到场景图及下游图像生成的性能。

title: A Game Theoretic Free Energy Analysis of Higher Order Synergy in Attention Heads of Large Language Models
comment: this manuscript has been submitted to Neural Networks
summary: Large language models rely on multihead attention, but interactions among heads remain poorly understood. We apply the Game Theoretic Free Energy Principle (GTFEP): a framework casting multiagent systems as distributed variational inference to analyze attention heads as bounded rational agents. According to GTFEP, each head minimizes its variational free energy, and collective behavior follows a Gibbs distribution over coalition structures whose energy is decomposed into Harsanyi dividends. Using a tractable approximation (uniform prior, deterministic dynamics), coalition free energy reduces to joint Shannon entropy of discretized head outputs (argmax key index). Pairwise dividends become mutual information (nonnegative), while triple dividends correspond to interaction information and can be negative. On BERT, GPT2, and Llama with GSM8K, triple dividends are consistently negative, revealing higher order redundancy. The Nash FEP correspondence guarantees that stationary points of collective free energy are epsilon Nash equilibria; thus, heads with negligible contribution can be pruned with minimal performance loss. Pruning heads with low marginal contribution reduces computational cost with minimal performance loss: for example, pruning 20% of heads in GPT2 reduces FLOPs by 18%, increases throughput by 22%, and raises perplexity only modestly (from 28.4 to 33.4 on GSM8K). Our work shows GTFEP provides a principled foundation for analyzing and optimizing transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文运用博弈论自由能原理(GTFEP)将多头注意力机制中的注意力头视为有限理性智能体，通过变分推理分析其相互作用，发现高阶冗余（三重交互信息为负），并利用头部边际贡献进行剪枝，在GPT2上剪掉20%头部仅带来轻微性能损失（困惑度从28.4升至33.4），同时减少18%FLOPs并提升22%吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型依赖多头注意力机制，但各注意力头之间的相互作用尚不明确，缺乏统一的理论框架来分析头部间的博弈与冗余关系。
AI.method: 将GTFEP应用于注意力头分析，把每个头视为最小化变分自由能的有限理性智能体，利用均匀先验和确定性动力学的近似，将联合自由能简化为离散化头部输出的联合香农熵，用Harsanyi红利分解交互信息，并通过Nash FEP对应保证剪枝的合理性。
AI.result: 在BERT、GPT2和Llama上，三重交互信息（三元红利）均为负值，揭示了高阶冗余；在GPT2上剪掉20%头部，FLOPs减少18%，吞吐量提升22%，困惑度仅从28.4升至33.4。
AI.conclusion: GTFEP为分析和优化Transformer架构提供了理论基础，可有效识别冗余头部并实现高效剪枝。

title: Annotations Mitigate Post-Training Mode Collapse
comment: 21 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables. Accepted at ICML 2026
summary: Post-training (via supervised fine-tuning) improves instruction-following, but often induces semantic mode collapse by biasing models toward low-entropy fine-tuning data at the expense of the high-entropy pretraining distribution. Crucially, we find this trade-off worsens with scale. To close this semantic diversity gap, we propose annotation-anchored training, a principled method that enables models to adopt the preference-following behaviors of post-training without sacrificing the inherent diversity of pretraining. Our approach is simple: we pretrain on documents paired with semantic annotations, inducing a rich annotation distribution that reflects the full breadth of pretraining data, and we preserve this distribution during post-training. This lets us sample diverse annotations at inference time and use them as anchors to guide generation, effectively transferring pretraining's semantic richness into post-trained models. We find that models trained with annotation-anchored training can attain $6 \times$ less diversity collapse than models trained with SFT, and improve with scale.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为"注释锚定训练"的方法，通过在预训练阶段引入语义注释来保持模型生成多样性，解决监督微调导致语义模式崩溃的问题，效果比标准SFT好6倍，且随模型规模扩大而改善。
AI.motivation: 标准的监督微调虽然提升了指令遵循能力，但会导致模型偏向低熵的微调数据，牺牲了预训练阶段应有的语义多样性，且该问题随模型规模增大而恶化。
AI.method: 提出注释锚定训练：在预训练阶段为文档配对语义注释，建立丰富的注释分布反映预训练数据的全貌；在微调阶段保留该分布；推理时采样多样化注释作为锚点引导生成。
AI.result: 相比标准SFT，注释锚定训练可将多样性崩溃程度降低6倍，且随模型规模增大效果更好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在不牺牲预训练语义多样性的前提下，使模型获得后训练的偏好跟随行为，有效弥合了语义多样性差距。

title: Reducing Annotation Burden for Femoral Cartilage Segmentation in Knee MRI via Cross-Sequence Transfer Learning
summary: Purpose: To develop and evaluate cross-sequence transfer learning for automatic femoral cartilage segmentation, testing bidirectional transfer between dual-echo steady-state (DESS) and sagittal proton density-weighted 3D fast spin-echo (Cube) sequences. Materials and Methods: We optimized a modified 2D U-Net on 507 DESS images from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI). We then established same-sequence baselines using subject-level cross-validation on a subset of 44 OAI DESS images and 44 Cube images acquired at the Istituto Ortopedico Rizzoli, Bologna, Italy. Each subset included 22 non-lesioned and 22 lesioned subjects. Finally, we performed transfer learning across sequences by fine-tuning the pretrained models on the target sequence with increasing training set sizes to study convergence, while keeping validation and test sets fixed. Segmentations were evaluated using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and average surface distance (ASD). Lesion effects were assessed with two-sided Mann-Whitney U tests with Bonferroni correction. Results: Same-sequence training yielded higher accuracy on DESS than Cube (DSC, $0.900$ vs $0.830$; $P < .001$). Cube-to-DESS transfer matched DESS performance (DSC, $0.903 \pm 0.032$ vs $0.900 \pm 0.027$), reaching a performance plateau at 9 training subjects. DESS-to-Cube yielded a lower combined DSC ($0.802 \pm 0.049$ vs $0.830 \pm 0.042$), reaching a plateau at 24 training subjects. Lesions did not affect DESS ($P \ge .39$) but reduced Cube accuracy (DSC, $0.805$ vs $0.856$; $P < .001$). Conclusion: Transfer learning across sequences can substantially reduce target-sequence annotation requirements for femoral cartilage segmentation, but performance is direction- and sequence-dependent, and the effects of lesions on segmentation may vary across MRI sequences.

AI.tldr: 研究开发了跨序列迁移学习用于股骨软骨自动分割，发现DESS到Cube的迁移效果优于反向迁移，且病变对MRI序列的分割精度有不同影响。
AI.motivation: 减少不同MRI序列下股骨软骨分割的人工标注需求，探索跨序列迁移学习的可行性及性能差异。
AI.method: 改进2D U-Net模型，先在大规模DESS图像上预训练，再向Cube序列微调迁移，比较双向迁移效果及不同训练集规模下的收敛情况。
AI.result: 同序列训练DESS优于Cube (DSC 0.900 vs 0.830)；Cube→DESS迁移达到DESS水平 (DSC 0.903)，仅需9个训练样本；DESS→Cube迁移略低 (DSC 0.802)，需24个样本；病变不影响DESS但降低Cube精度。
AI.conclusion: 跨序列迁移学习可有效减少目标序列的标注需求，但性能具有方向性和序列依赖性，且病变影响因序列而异。

title: Weighted Rules under the Stable Model Semantics
summary: We introduce the concept of weighted rules under the stable model semantics following the log-linear models of Markov Logic. This provides versatile methods to overcome the deterministic nature of the stable model semantics, such as resolving inconsistencies in answer set programs, ranking stable models, associating probability to stable models, and applying statistical inference to computing weighted stable models. We also present formal comparisons with related formalisms, such as answer set programs, Markov Logic, ProbLog, and P-log.

AI.tldr: 本文在稳定模型语义下引入加权规则概念，借鉴马尔可夫逻辑的对数线性模型，克服了稳定模型语义的确定性，用于解决不一致性、排序稳定模型、赋予概率以及统计推断，并与相关形式化方法进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 克服稳定模型语义的确定性问题，使其能够处理不确定性、不一致性和概率推理等场景。
AI.method: 借鉴马尔可夫逻辑的对数线性模型，在稳定模型语义下引入加权规则。
AI.result: 能够解决回答集程序中的不一致性、对稳定模型进行排序、关联概率，并应用统计推断来计算加权稳定模型。
AI.conclusion: 加权规则框架为稳定模型语义提供了灵活的概率扩展，并与回答集程序、马尔可夫逻辑、Problog和P-log等形式化方法进行了比较。

title: Medical Incident Causal Factors and Preventive Measures Generation Using Tag-based Example Selection in Few-shot Learning
summary: In high-stakes domains such as healthcare, the reliability of Large Language Models (LLMs) is critical, particularly when generating clinical insights from incident reports. This study proposes a tag-based few-shot example selection method for prompting LLMs to generate background/causal factors and preventive measures from details of the medical incidents. For our experiments, we use the Japanese Medical Incident Dataset (JMID), a structured dataset of 3,884 real-world medical accident and near-miss reports. These reports are variably annotated with a wide range of tags--some include descriptive information (e.g., "medications," "blood transfusion therapy"). We compare three few-shot example selection strategies--random sampling, cosine similarity-based selection, and our proposed tag-based method--using GPT-4o and LLaMA 3.3. Results show that the tag-based approach achieves the highest precision and most stable generation behavior, while similarity-based selection often leads to unintended outputs and safety filter activation. These findings suggest that selecting examples based on human-interpretable dataset tags can improve generation precision and stability in clinical LLM applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于标签的少样本示例选择方法，用于提示LLM从医疗事故报告中生成背景/因果因素和预防措施。实验使用日本医疗事故数据集（JMID），比较了随机采样、余弦相似度选择以及基于标签的选择三种策略。结果表明，基于标签的方法在生成精度和稳定性上最优，而基于相似度的方法常导致意外输出和安全过滤器激活。
AI.motivation: 在高风险医疗领域，LLM的可靠性至关重要。现有少样本示例选择方法（如随机采样或基于语义相似度的选择）在医疗场景中表现不稳定，容易产生不可靠输出。因此需要一种更稳定、可解释的示例选择策略来提升LLM在临床报告分析中的表现。
AI.method: 使用日本医疗事故数据集（JMID，含3,884份真实医疗事故与未遂事件报告），提出基于标签（tag）的少样本示例选择方法。与随机采样和余弦相似度选择两种基线方法进行对比，在GPT-4o和LLaMA 3.3两个模型上进行实验，评估生成背景/因果因素和预防措施的精度与稳定性。
AI.result: 基于标签的示例选择方法在生成精度和稳定性上均达到最优；而基于余弦相似度的方法频繁导致意外输出（unintended outputs）和安全过滤器（safety filter）被触发，表现最差。
AI.conclusion: 基于人类可解释的数据集标签来选择少样本示例，能够有效提升LLM在临床应用中生成的精确性和稳定性，是一种优于随机采样和语义相似度选择的策略。

title: Probability-Flow Distillation: Exact Wasserstein Gradient Flow for High-Fidelity 3D Generation
summary: Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) and its variants have been widely used for text-to-3D generation by distilling 2D image diffusion priors. However, the standard SDS objective is prone to severe mode collapse, frequently yielding over-smoothed and over-saturated results. Although recent advancements, such as Score Distillation via Inversion (SDI), mitigate these artifacts and produce visually sharper models, they ultimately fail to faithfully capture the full target distribution. In this work, we show that the bottleneck limiting the sampling capacity of SDI stems from its reliance on the posterior mean estimator, which is mathematically equivalent to a single-step Euler approximation of the deterministic reverse DDIM trajectory. To address this, we propose a naturally motivated extension termed Probability-Flow Distillation (PFD). We establish that PFD corresponds exactly to a Wasserstein gradient flow, thereby inducing principled distribution-matching dynamics. Finally, we show that PFD can synthesize 3D assets with fine-grained, high-fidelity details and achieve improved quality compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出概率流蒸馏（PFD）方法，通过解决SDS和SDI中的模式坍缩和分布匹配问题，实现更高质量的文本到3D生成。
AI.motivation: 现有SDS方法存在模式坍缩，生成结果过度平滑和过度饱和；SDI虽产生更锐利的模型，但无法忠实捕捉完整的目标分布。核心瓶颈在于SDI依赖后验均值估计器，这在数学上等价于确定性逆向DDIM轨迹的单步欧拉近似。
AI.method: 提出概率流蒸馏（PFD）方法，证明PFD精确对应于Wasserstein梯度流，从而引入原则性的分布匹配动力学。
AI.result: PFD能够合成具有精细高保真细节的3D资产，与现有方法相比实现了更优的质量。
AI.conclusion: PFD通过Wasserstein梯度流的理论框架，有效解决了先前蒸馏方法的分布匹配问题，提升了文本到3D生成的质量和细节保真度。

title: Functional Stable Model Semantics and Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories
summary: Recently there has been an increasing interest in incorporating ``intensional'' functions in answer set programming. Intensional functions are those whose values can be described by other functions and predicates, rather than being pre-defined as in the standard answer set programming. We demonstrate that the functional stable model semantics plays an important role in the framework of ``Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories (ASPMT)'' -- a tight integration of answer set programming and satisfiability modulo theories, under which existing integration approaches can be viewed as special cases where the role of functions is limited. We show that ``tight'' ASPMT programs can be translated into SMT instances, which is similar to the known relationship between ASP and SAT.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了函数稳定模型语义在ASPMT框架中的重要作用，并证明紧致的ASPMT程序可转化为SMT实例，类似于ASP与SAT的关系。
AI.motivation: 近年来，将内涵函数（其值可由其他函数和谓词描述，而非预定义）融入回答集编程的兴趣日益增长。作者希望揭示内涵函数在ASPMT框架中的核心作用，并建立ASPMT与SMT之间的理论联系。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，展示功能稳定模型语义在ASPMT框架中的重要性；证明"紧致"ASPMT程序可以转化为SMT实例，类比ASP到SAT的转化关系。
AI.result: 证明了内涵函数在ASPMT框架中扮演重要角色，现有的集成方法可视为函数角色受限的特例；紧致ASPMT程序可转化为SMT实例。
AI.conclusion: ASPMT框架下，内涵函数具有理论重要性，且紧致ASPMT与SMT之间存在可转化关系，为回答集编程与SMT的深度集成提供了理论基础。

title: Speech-based Psychological Crisis Assessment using LLMs
summary: Psychological support hotlines provide critical support for individuals experiencing mental health emergencies, yet current assessments largely rely on human operators whose judgments may vary with professional experience and are constrained by limited staffing resources. This paper proposes a large language model (LLM)-based framework for automated crisis level classification, a key indicator that supports many downstream tasks and improves the overall quality of hotline services. To better capture emotional signals in spoken conversations, we introduce a paralinguistic injection method that inserts identified non-verbal emotional cues into speech transcripts, enabling LLM-based reasoning to incorporate critical acoustic nuances. In addition, we propose a reasoning-enhanced training strategy that trains the model to generate diagnostic reasoning chains as an auxiliary task, which serves as a regulariser to improve classification performance. Combined with data augmentation, our final system achieves a macro F1-score of 0.802 and an accuracy of 0.805 on the three-class classification task under 5-fold cross-validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于大语言模型的自动化危机等级分类框架，通过副语言线索注入和推理增强训练策略，在心理支持热线三分类任务上达到0.802的宏F1分数和0.805的准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前心理支持热线依赖人工评估，但人工判断受限于经验差异和人力不足，亟需自动化方法来提升服务质量与效率。
AI.method: 1) 副语言线索注入：将非语言情感线索插入文本转录中，使LLM能捕捉声学细微差别；2) 推理增强训练：让模型生成诊断推理链作为辅助任务，充当分类的正则化手段；3) 数据增强。
AI.result: 在三分类任务上，5折交叉验证下宏F1分数达0.802，准确率达0.805。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LLM框架能够有效自动化危机等级分类，副语言注入和推理增强策略对提升分类性能均有贡献。

title: Field-Localized Forgery Detection for Digital Identity Documents
summary: Digital identity verification systems used in remote onboarding rely on document images to authenticate users, making them vulnerable to localized manipulations of key identity fields such as facial photographs and textual information. Existing forgery detection methods, developed primarily for natural-image forensics, show limited transferability to structured identity documents. We propose FLiD, a lightweight field-localized framework that targets critical identity regions rather than processing full-document images. A fine-tuned object detector first localizes face and text fields; a frozen MobileNetV3-Small backbone then extracts compact field-level embeddings, which are classified by lightweight neural network with only 191K trainable parameters. FLiD achieves AUC scores of 0.880 (face), 0.954 (text), and 0.923 (both-field attacks), with corresponding EERs of 18.05%, 11.61%, and 15.16%, representing absolute reductions of 29-35 percentage points over a full-document baseline trained from scratch. FLiD also consistently outperforms general-purpose manipulation detectors (TruFor, MMFusion, UniVAD) across all attack scenarios while requiring 13x fewer parameters and 21x fewer FLOPs

AI.tldr: FLiD是一种轻量级、针对身份证件的伪造检测框架，通过聚焦关键字段（人脸和文本）而非整个文档进行检测，在显著降低计算成本的同时，比通用检测器及全文档基线方法取得了更好的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 远程身份验证中的数字身份验证系统依赖于文档图像，容易受到对关键身份字段（如面部照片和文本信息）的局部篡改攻击。现有的基于自然图像的伪造检测方法在结构化身份证件上迁移性差，因此需要一种专门针对身份证件、轻量且高效的伪造检测方法。
AI.method: 提出FLiD框架：首先使用微调后的目标检测器定位人脸和文本字段；然后利用冻结的MobileNetV3-Small骨干网络提取字段级嵌入；最后通过仅191K可训练参数的轻量神经网络进行分类检测。
AI.result: FLiD在人脸攻击、文本攻击和双字段攻击上的AUC分别达到0.880、0.954和0.923，EER分别为18.05%、11.61%和15.16%，相比全文档基线绝对降低了29-35个百分点。同时，FLiD在所有攻击场景下一致优于TruFor、MMFusion、UniVAD等通用检测器，且参数量减少13倍，FLOPs减少21倍。
AI.conclusion: FLiD证明了一种聚焦关键字段的轻量级检测策略在身份证件伪造检测中既高效又有效，能够在保持优异检测性能的同时大幅降低计算开销，为实际远程身份验证场景提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Cplus2ASP: Computing Action Language C+ in Answer Set Programming
summary: We present Version 2 of system Cplus2ASP, which implements the definite fragment of action language C+. Its input language is fully compatible with the language of the Causal Calculator Version 2, but the new system is significantly faster thanks to modern answer set solving techniques. The translation implemented in the system is a composition of several recent theoretical results. The system orchestrates a tool chain, consisting of f2lp, clingo, iclingo, and as2transition. Under the incremental execution mode, the system translates a C+ description into the input language of iclingo, exploiting its incremental grounding mechanism. The correctness of this execution is justified by the module theorem extended to programs with nested expressions. In addition, the input language of the system has many useful features, such as external atoms by means of Lua calls and the user interactive mode. The system supports extensible multi-modal translations for other action languages, such as B and BC, as well.

AI.tldr: Cplus2ASP Version 2 实现了C+语言的确定性子集，通过现代回答集求解技术（f2lp, clingo, iclingo, as2transition工具链）大幅提升性能，支持增量执行、Lua外部原子、用户交互模式，并可扩展支持B和BC等其他动作语言。
AI.motivation: 提升C+动作语言推理系统的效率，使其与现代回答集求解技术兼容，同时保持与Causal Calculator Version 2的完全兼容性。
AI.method: 采用工具链（f2lp, clingo, iclingo, as2transition）组合多个理论成果；增量模式下利用iclingo的增量接地机制；基于模块定理扩展支持嵌套表达式程序；通过Lua调用实现外部原子。
AI.result: 新系统相比于旧版Causal Calculator显著更快，支持增量执行、用户交互、外部原子调用，并可扩展支持B和BC等多模态动作语言翻译。
AI.conclusion: Cplus2ASP Version 2是一个高效、兼容性好且功能丰富的C+语言推理系统，验证了回答集编程在动作推理领域的实用性和可扩展性。

title: PlantMarkerBench: A Multi-Species Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Plant Marker Reasoning
summary: Cell-type-specific marker genes are fundamental to plant biology, yet existing resources primarily rely on curated databases or high-throughput studies without explicitly modeling the supporting evidence found in scientific literature. We introduce PlantMarkerBench, a multi-species benchmark for evaluating literature-grounded plant marker evidence interpretation from full-text biological papers. PlantMarkerBench is constructed using a modular curation pipeline integrating large-scale literature retrieval, hybrid search, species-aware biological grounding, structured evidence extraction, and targeted human review. The benchmark spans four plant species -- Arabidopsis, maize, rice, and tomato -- and contains 5,550 sentence-level evidence instances annotated for marker-evidence validity, evidence type, and support strength. We define two benchmark tasks: determining whether a candidate sentence provides valid marker evidence for a gene-cell-type pair, and classifying the evidence into expression, localization, function, indirect, or negative categories. We benchmark diverse open-weight and closed-source language models across species and prompting strategies. Although frontier models achieve relatively strong performance on direct expression evidence, performance drops substantially on functional, indirect, and weak-support evidence, with evidence-type confusion emerging as a dominant failure mode. Open-weight models additionally exhibit elevated false-positive rates under ambiguous biological contexts. PlantMarkerBench provides a challenging and reproducible evaluation framework for literature-grounded biological evidence attribution and supports future research on trustworthy scientific information extraction and AI-assisted plant biology.

AI.tldr: PlantMarkerBench是一个跨物种基准数据集，用于评估从全文本生物学论文中提取细胞类型特异性标记基因证据的能力，涵盖拟南芥、玉米、水稻和番茄四种植物，包含5,550个句子级证据实例。研究发现，现有前沿模型在处理表达类直接证据时表现较好，但在功能、间接和弱支持证据上性能显著下降，开放权重模型在模糊生物学背景下假阳性率较高。
AI.motivation: 现有植物标记基因资源主要依赖人工数据库或高通量研究，缺乏对科学文献中支撑证据的系统建模，因此需要构建一个可复现的、基于文献证据的评估框架。
AI.method: 采用模块化策展流程：大规模文献检索、混合搜索、物种感知生物学标注、结构化证据提取、人工审核。定义两个任务：判断句子是否为有效的标记基因证据，以及将证据分类为表达、定位、功能、间接或阴性五类。
AI.result: 前沿模型在直接表达证据上表现较强，但在功能、间接和弱支持证据上性能大幅下降；证据类型混淆是主要失败模式；开放权重模型在模糊生物学背景下假阳性率升高。
AI.conclusion: PlantMarkerBench为文献驱动的生物学证据归因提供了具有挑战性且可复现的评估框架，有助于推动可信科学信息提取和AI辅助植物生物学研究。

title: Investigating Anisotropy in Visual Grounding under Controlled Counterfactual Perturbations
comment: To be published in the proceedings of the 5th Explainable AI for Computer Vision (XAI4CV) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary:
Visual Grounding benchmarks assume that the object described by a referring expression is always present in the image, and grounding models are therefore rarely evaluated under semantically mismatched captions. In such cases, models frequently exhibit approximation behavior, producing a plausible bounding box that satisfies only part of the expression (\eg, preserving the original object while ignoring modified contextual cues). Because mismatched captions represent realistic edge cases, this behavior compromises reliability and raises concerns from an explainability perspective. Identifying its underlying causes is thus essential for improving model faithfulness and interpretability.
  Adopting a mechanistic interpretability viewpoint, this work examines whether embedding anisotropy contributes to counterfactual failures. A similarity-controlled counterfactual caption generation protocol is introduced to systematically perturb object or contextual components within predefined embedding similarity intervals, enabling a fine-grained analysis of grounding behavior as a function of alignment. Experiments on two Transformer-based models with markedly different embedding geometries (BERT-based TransVG and CLIP-based SwimVG) reveal no meaningful correlation between cosine similarity and approximation. These findings suggest that anisotropy alone does not account for counterfactual errors, and that robustness requires investigating finer-grained geometric properties of the embedding space.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉定位模型在遇到指代表达式与图像不匹配时会产生近似行为（如忽略修改后的上下文线索而保留原物体）。通过可控反事实字幕生成和两种Transformer模型实验，证明嵌入各向异性并非导致此行为的主要原因，鲁棒性需从更精细的嵌入几何特性入手。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位基准假设指代表达式描述的物体始终存在于图像中，导致模型在语义不匹配的反事实场景下出现近似行为，降低了可靠性和可解释性。作者旨在探究该行为的内在原因，特别是嵌入各向异性是否为其根本因素。
AI.method: 采用可解释性视角，设计基于相似度控制的反事实字幕生成协议，系统性地在预设嵌入相似度区间内扰动物体或上下文组件，以细粒度分析定位行为随嵌入对齐程度的变化。在BERT基的TransVG和CLIP基的SwimVG两种几何特性迥异的Transformer模型上进行实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，余弦相似度与模型的近似行为之间不存在有意义的关联，嵌入各向异性不能解释反事实错误。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入各向异性本身并非造成反事实定位失败的原因，提升模型鲁棒性需要进一步研究嵌入空间中更精细的几何属性。

title: LLM-Guided Monte Carlo Tree Search over Knowledge Graphs: Composing Mechanistic Explanations for Drug-Disease Pairs
comment: Accepted at IJCAI-ECAI 2026. 9 pages (7 content + 2 references), 5 figures, 3 tables. Includes supplementary material (26 pages)
summary: Extracting multi-step explanations from knowledge graphs poses a combinatorial challenge requiring both heuristic guidance (as candidates proliferate with depth) and credit assignment (as path quality emerges over extended sequences). Frontier LLMs, strong on knowledge/reasoning benchmarks, offer a compelling source of such heuristics, yet their knowledge comes sans guarantees and compositional performance degrades as chains lengthen. We thus present TESSERA, a 3-part neuro-symbolic framework that uses LLMs in a circumscribed role: for local discriminative judgement rather than autonomous multi-step generation; the knowledge graph then defines the hypothesis space enforcing hard structural constraints, and MCTS coordinates the long-horizon search with principled credit assignment via backpropagation. LLMs perform dual roles as a prior policy biasing exploration and a comparative state evaluator supplying reward signals. Evaluation on drug mechanism elucidation across two complementary knowledge graphs demonstrates fidelity to curated biology while surfacing coherent alternative mechanisms, with ablations confirming discriminative contribution from both LLM components. Beyond its current application, our framework offers a general paradigm for compositional reasoning over structured knowledge.

AI.tldr: TESSERA是一种神经符号框架，结合LLM的局部判别能力与知识图谱的结构约束，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索进行长序列推理，在药物机制解析任务中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 从知识图谱中提取多步解释面临组合爆炸问题，需要启发式引导和信用分配。前沿LLM虽强但缺乏保证且长链推理性能下降，因此需要一种将LLM限制在局部判别角色、利用知识图谱强制结构约束的方法。
AI.method: 三部分神经符号框架：(1) LLM作为先验策略（偏置探索方向）和比较状态评估器（提供奖励信号）；(2) 知识图谱定义假设空间并强制执行结构约束；(3) MCTS通过反向传播协调长程搜索并进行原则性信用分配。
AI.result: 在两个互补知识图谱上的药物机制解析任务中，TESSERA能忠实于已有生物学知识，同时发现连贯的替代机制。消融实验证实两个LLM组件的判别贡献均有效。
AI.conclusion: TESSERA为结构化知识上的组合推理提供了一种通用范式，超越了当前应用场景。

title: Personalizing LLMs with Binary Feedback: A Preference-Corrected Optimization Framework
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) personalization aims to align model behaviors with individual user preferences. Existing methods often focus on isolated user histories, neglecting the essential role of inter-user differences. We propose C-BPO, a framework that personalizes LLMs via preference-calibrated binary signals. By treating target user data as positive feedback and other users' data as an auxiliary set of implicit negative signals, C-BPO captures distinct inter-user differences. To mitigate the preference overlap issue, where shared task knowledge is erroneously penalized, we derive an objective grounded in Positive-Unlabeled (PU) learning theory. This approach purifies negative signals by subtracting ``positive bias'', ensuring alignment with unique idiosyncrasies without compromising general helpfulness.
