title: Rethinking Evaluation of Multiple Sclerosis (MS) Lesion Segmentation Models
summary: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic autoimmune disease that can significantly reduce the quality of life of a patient. Existing treatment options can only help slow down the progression of the disease. Therefore, early detection and precise monitoring of disease progression are important. Deep learning offers state-of-the-art models for detecting and segmenting MS lesions in brain MRI scans. However, most of these models are evaluated using the Dice score, without accounting for lesion-wise detection and segmentation performance or other metrics that quantify model performance in cases that are complex or confusing for human annotators, or in cases that are essential for disease detection and progression monitoring. In this paper, we highlight the need to rethink the evaluation of MS lesion segmentation models. In this context, we first present problem fingerprinting in detail to highlight what neurologists look for in brain MRI scans for MS detection and progression monitoring, and which metrics are required to properly quantify model performance in these contexts. Additionally, we present an analysis of state-of-the-art models on two open-source datasets using these metrics to highlight their usability for real-world deployment in hospitals.

AI.tldr: 本文批评了当前多发性硬化（MS）病灶分割模型仅依赖Dice系数评估的局限性，提出应引入更贴合临床需求的指标（如病灶级检测性能、复杂病例评估等），并通过实际数据分析现有模型在真实部署中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有MS病灶分割模型多仅用Dice系数评估，忽略了病灶级检测性能、临床复杂病例及疾病监测关键场景的量化指标，导致模型实际临床部署效果不佳。
AI.method: 1. 提出"问题指纹"（problem fingerprinting）方法，明确神经科医生在MRI中关注的MS检测与监测要点；2. 定义更全面的评估指标；3. 在两个开源数据集上对SOTA模型进行多维度分析。
AI.result: 揭示了现有SOTA模型在临床相关指标（如病灶级检测、复杂病例）上的性能不足，表明仅用Dice系数会高估模型的实际可用性。
AI.conclusion: 必须重新思考MS病灶分割模型的评估体系，引入临床导向的指标，才能推动模型向真实医院场景落地。

title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. Existing mobile world models provide either text-based or image-based future states, yet it remains unclear which representation is useful, whether generated rollouts can replace real environments, and how test-time guidance helps agents of different strengths. To answer the above questions, we filter and annotate mobile world-model data, then train world models across four modalities: delta text, full text, diffusion-based images, and renderable code. These models achieve SoTA performance on both MobileWorldBench and Code2WorldBench. Furthermore, by evaluating their downstream utility on AITZ, AndroidControl, and AndroidWorld, we obtain three findings. First, renderable code reconstruction achieves high in-distribution fidelity and provides effective multimodal supervision for data construction, while text-based feedback is more robust for online out-of-distribution (OOD) execution. Second, world-model-generated trajectories can provide transferable interaction experience in the training process and improve agents' end-to-end task performance, although these data do not preserve the original distribution. Last, for overconfident mobile agents with low action entropy, posterior self-reflection provides limited gains, suggesting that world models are more effective as prior perception or training supervision than as universal post-hoc verifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了移动GUI智能体的世界模型在不同模态（delta文本、完整文本、扩散图像、可渲染代码）下的表现，发现可渲染代码重建在分布内保真度最高，文本反馈在分布外更稳健；世界模型生成的轨迹可提升智能体任务性能但无法保留原始分布；对低熵过度自信的智能体，后验自省效果有限，世界模型更适合作为先验感知或训练监督而非通用事后验证器。
AI.motivation: 现有移动世界模型提供文本或图像的未来状态预测，但尚不清楚哪种表示更有效、生成的rollout能否替代真实环境、以及测试时引导如何帮助不同强度的智能体。
AI.method: 筛选并标注移动世界模型数据，训练四种模态（delta文本、完整文本、扩散图像、可渲染代码）的世界模型，在MobileWorldBench和Code2WorldBench上达到SOTA，并在AITZ、AndroidControl、AndroidWorld上评估下游效用。
AI.result: 可渲染代码重建在分布内保真度高且能提供有效的多模态监督；文本反馈在在线分布外执行中更鲁棒；世界模型生成的轨迹可提升智能体端到端任务性能但无法保留原始分布；对低熵过度自信智能体，后验自省效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型更适合作为先验感知或训练监督，而非通用事后验证器；不同模态各有优势，需根据任务场景选择合适的未来状态表示。

title: Neural at ArchEHR-QA 2026: One Method Fits All: Unified Prompt Optimization for Clinical QA over EHRs
summary: Automated question answering (QA) over electronic health records (EHRs) demands precise evidence retrieval, faithful answer generation, and explicit grounding of answers in clinical notes. In this work, we present Neural1.5, our method for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task at CL4Health@LREC 2026, which comprises four subtasks: question interpretation, evidence identification, answer generation, and evidence alignment. Our approach decouples the task into independent, modular stages and employs DSPy"s MIPROv2 optimizer to automatically discover high-performing prompts, jointly tuning instructions and few-shot demonstrations for each stage. Within every stage, self-consistency voting over multiple stochastic inference runs suppresses spurious errors and improves reliability, while stage-specific verification mechanisms (e.g., self-reflection and chain-of-verification for alignment) further refine output quality. Among all teams that participated in all four subtasks, our method ranks second overall (mean rank 4.00), placing 4th, 1st, 4th, and 7th on Subtasks 1-4, respectively. These results demonstrate that systematic, per-stage prompt optimization combined with self-consistency mechanisms is a cost-effective alternative to model fine-tuning for multifaceted clinical QA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Neural1.5方法，通过模块化流水线设计、DSPy MIPROv2自动提示优化、自一致性投票和阶段验证机制，在ArchEHR-QA 2026四项子任务中取得综合第二（平均排名4.00），展示了无需微调即可实现高性能临床问答的能力。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录上的自动化问答需要精确的证据检索、忠实的答案生成以及答案与临床笔记的明确对齐，现有方法在这三个方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 将任务解耦为四个独立模块化阶段（问题理解、证据识别、答案生成、证据对齐），使用DSPy的MIPROv2优化器自动搜索各阶段的高性能提示，通过自一致性投票抑制随机错误，并引入阶段特定验证机制（如自反思和对齐的链式验证）。
AI.result: 在所有四项子任务均参与的队伍中排名第二（平均排名4.00），子任务1-4分别排名第4、第1、第4和第7位。
AI.conclusion: 系统的逐阶段提示优化结合自一致性机制是微调模型的一种经济有效的替代方案，适用于多方面的临床问答任务。

title: S2P-Net: A Spectral-Spatial Polar Network for Rotation-Invariant Object Recognition in Low-Data Regimes
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Preprint. Code available from the author upon request
summary: We present S2P-Net (Spectral-Spatial Polar Network), a compact deep learning architecture that achieves mathematically guaranteed rotation invariance without data augmentation. In this Paper, we also made a comparison to other neural network architectures (CNN`s). Have a look at the results and feel free to contact me for any questions. This is my first paper:) Made by Hackbert

AI.tldr: S2P-Net是一种紧凑型深度学习架构，能在无需数据增强的情况下实现数学上保证的旋转不变性，并与CNN进行了对比。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖数据增强来应对旋转变化，作者希望设计一种从数学层面保证旋转不变性的紧凑网络架构。
AI.method: 提出S2P-Net（Spectral-Spatial Polar Network），一种结合频谱-空间与极坐标变换的紧凑深度学习架构。
AI.result: 与其他CNN架构进行了对比实验，具体结果未在摘要中详述。
AI.conclusion: S2P-Net在不依赖数据增强的情况下实现了数学上可保证的旋转不变性，是一种有效的紧凑架构方案。

title: Agent-ValueBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Values
summary: Autonomous agents have rapidly matured as task executors and seen widespread deployment via harnesses such as OpenClaw. Safety concerns have rightly drawn growing research attention, and beneath them lie the values silently steering agent behavior. Existing value benchmarks, however, remain confined to LLMs, leaving agent values largely uncharted. From intuitive, empirical, and theoretical vantage points, we show that an agent's values diverge from those of its underlying LLM, and the agentic modality further introduces dataset-, evaluation-, and system-level challenges absent from text-only protocols. We close this gap with Agent-ValueBench, the first benchmark dedicated to agent values. It features 394 executable environments across 16 domains, offering 4,335 value-conflict tasks that cover 28 value systems and 332 dimensions. Every instance is co-synthesized through our purpose-built end-to-end pipeline and curated per-instance by professional psychologists. Each task ships with two pole-aligned golden trajectories whose checkpoints anchor a trajectory-level rubric-based judge. Benchmarking 14 frontier proprietary and open-weights models across 4 mainstream harnesses, we uncover three concerted findings. Agent values first manifest as a Value Tide of cross-model homogeneity beneath interpretable counter-currents. This tide bends non-additively under harness pull, and yet more decisively under deliberate steering via embedded skills. Together these results signal that the agent-alignment lever is shifting from classical model alignment and prompt steering toward harness alignment and skill steering.

AI.tldr: 现有价值基准局限于LLM，忽略了智能体系统的独特价值偏差。本文提出Agent-ValueBench，首个专门面向智能体价值的基准，包含394个可执行环境、4335个价值冲突任务。通过对14个前沿模型在4个主流框架上的测试，发现智能体价值呈现跨模型同质性的"价值潮汐"现象，且受框架和技能引导影响，表明智能体对齐的关键正在从传统模型对齐转向框架对齐和技能引导。
AI.motivation: 现有价值基准仅关注LLM，忽略了智能体（agent）在任务执行过程中价值观与底层LLM的差异。作者从直觉、经验和理论三个角度论证了智能体的价值观会与其底层LLM产生分歧，且智能体模态带来了数据集、评估和系统层面的新挑战，因此亟需专门针对智能体价值观的基准测试。
AI.method: 构建了Agent-ValueBench基准，包含394个可执行环境、16个领域、4335个价值冲突任务，覆盖28种价值体系和332个维度。每个实例通过端到端管道协同合成，并由专业心理学家逐例审核。每个任务附带两条极点对齐的金色轨迹，其检查点锚定基于轨迹分级的评估标准。对14个前沿模型（包括专有和开源）在4个主流框架上进行测试。
AI.result: 发现了三个关键结果：(1) 智能体价值表现为"价值潮汐"现象，即跨模型存在同质性，但其中存在可解释的逆流；(2) 这种价值潮汐在框架牵引下呈现非加性弯曲；(3) 通过嵌入式技能进行有意识引导时，价值变化更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 智能体对齐的杠杆正在从传统的模型对齐和提示引导，转向框架对齐和技能引导。这一发现对于未来构建安全、价值对齐的自主智能体系统具有重要指导意义。

title: Grounded or Guessing? LVLM Confidence Estimation via Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking
summary: Large vision-language models suffer from visual ungroundedness: they can produce a fluent, confident, and even correct response driven entirely by language priors, with the image contributing nothing to the prediction. Existing confidence estimation methods cannot detect this, as they observe model behavior under normal inference with no mechanism to determine whether a prediction was shaped by the image or by text alone. We introduce BICR (Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking), a model-agnostic confidence estimation framework that makes this contrast explicit during training by extracting hidden states from a frozen LVLM twice: once with the real image-question pair, and once with the image blacked out while the question is held fixed. A lightweight probe is trained on the real-image hidden state and regularized by a ranking loss that penalizes higher confidence on the blacked-out view, teaching it to treat visual grounding as a signal of reliability at zero additional inference cost. Evaluated across five modern LVLMs and seven baselines on a benchmark covering visual question answering, object hallucination detection, medical imaging, and financial document understanding, BICR achieves the best cross-LVLM average on both calibration and discrimination simultaneously, with statistically significant discrimination gains robust to cluster-aware analysis at 4-18x fewer parameters than the strongest probing baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BICR框架，通过对比真实图像与黑化图像下的隐藏状态，训练轻量级探针来检测LVLM是否真正基于视觉信息做出预测，在多个模型和任务上实现了最优的置信度校准与区分性能。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型存在视觉脱锚问题：即使图像对预测毫无贡献，模型仍能依靠语言先验生成流畅、自信甚至正确的回答。现有置信度估计方法无法检测这一现象，因为它们仅观察正常推理下的模型行为，缺乏机制判断预测是否真正基于图像信息。
AI.method: BICR框架在训练时对冻结的LVLM进行两次隐藏状态提取：一次使用真实图像-问题对，另一次将图像黑化但保持问题不变。在真实图像隐藏状态上训练轻量级探针，并通过排序损失进行正则化，惩罚在黑化视图上产生更高置信度，从而将视觉锚定作为可靠性信号进行学习。
AI.result: 在五种现代LVLM和七种基线方法上评估，覆盖VQA、物体幻觉检测、医学影像和金融文档理解等任务，BICR同时实现了最优的校准和区分性能，区分度增益具有统计显著性，参数量仅为最强探针基线的1/4到1/18。
AI.conclusion: BICR通过显式对比真实与盲视觉条件下的模型行为，能有效检测LVLM是否真正基于图像进行预测，且无需额外推理成本，为视觉语言模型的可靠性评估提供了实用方案。

title: VFM-SDM: A vision foundation model-based framework for training-free, marker-free, and calibration-free structural displacement measurement
summary: Reliable displacement measurement is fundamental for structural health monitoring and digital engineering workflows, as it provides direct structural response information. Vision-based measurement has emerged as a promising approach for low-cost, non-contact displacement monitoring. However, its deployment often remains constrained by task-specific model training or on-site preparation, such as marker installation or manual camera calibration. This study presents a Vision Foundation Model-based framework for Structural Displacement Measurement (VFM-SDM) that integrates VFM-inferred camera parameter estimation and point tracking to reconstruct multi-directional structural displacements via triangulation without task-specific training or on-site preparation, enabling efficient non-contact deployment in real-world applications. Structural geometry constraints are incorporated to suppress physically implausible deviations and improve estimation consistency. A multi-modal field dataset collected from an in-service pedestrian bridge is introduced alongside a unified benchmarking protocol to support reproducible evaluation. Representative results show low amplitude errors (NRMSE$_{\text{range}}$: 0.11/0.12), strong temporal agreement (correlation coefficient: 0.86/0.88), and small peak-to-peak amplitude errors (RPPAE: 0.01/0.02) for vertical and lateral displacements, indicating robust performance under real-world conditions. The proposed framework advances automated, scalable displacement monitoring and lays the groundwork for VFM-enabled structural response measurements in digital twin and data-centric construction workflows.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于视觉基础模型的结构位移测量框架(VFM-SDM)，无需任务特定训练或现场准备，通过VFM推断的相机参数估计和点追踪技术，结合三角测量重建多向结构位移，在实桥数据上验证了准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉位移测量方法受限于任务特定模型训练、标记点安装或人工相机标定等现场准备工作，部署效率低，难以实现自动化、可扩展的非接触式位移监测。
AI.method: 1) 利用视觉基础模型(VFM)自动推断相机参数；2) 结合VFM点追踪技术提取关键点轨迹；3) 通过三角测量重构多向结构位移；4) 引入结构几何约束抑制物理不可信的位移偏差。
AI.result: 在实桥多模态现场数据上，竖向和横向位移的NRMSE_range分别为0.11/0.12，相关系数0.86/0.88，峰峰值误差RPPAE为0.01/0.02，表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: VFM-SDM框架实现了免训练、免现场准备的自动化位移监测，为数字孪生和数据驱动的施工管理中的结构响应测量奠定了基础。

title: EGL-SCA: Structural Credit Assignment for Co-Evolving Instructions and Tools in Graph Reasoning Agents
summary: Graph reasoning agents operating from natural-language inputs must solve a coupled problem: they must reconstruct a structured graph instance from text, decide whether existing computational assets are sufficient, interact with tools under a strict execution protocol, and satisfy an external verifier that checks structured correctness rather than textual plausibility. Existing approaches usually improve either the instruction side or the tool side in isolation, which leaves unclear what should be updated after failure. We propose EGL-SCA, a verifier-centric dual-space framework that models a graph reasoning agent using two collaborative components: an instruction-side policy space for reasoning strategies, and a tool-side program space for executable algorithmic tools. Our central mechanism is structural credit assignment, which maps trajectory evidence to conditional updates, precisely routing failures to either prompt optimization or tool synthesis and repair. To provide sufficient learning signals for dual-space adaptation, we introduce a training distribution stratified by task family, coupled with a Pareto-style retention strategy to balance success, generality, and parsimony. Experiments on four graph reasoning benchmarks show that EGL-SCA achieves a state-of-the-art 92.0\% average success rate. By effectively co-evolving instructions and tools, our framework significantly outperforms both pure-prompting and fixed-toolbox baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出EGL-SCA框架，通过指令策略空间和工具程序空间的双空间协同进化，结合结构信用分配机制，在图形推理任务中达到92.0%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法孤立地改进指令侧或工具侧，导致失败后不清楚应该更新哪一侧。需要一种能精确定位失败原因并针对性更新的框架。
AI.method: 提出EGL-SCA框架，包含两个协同组件：指令侧策略空间（推理策略）和工具侧程序空间（可执行算法工具）。核心机制是结构信用分配，将轨迹证据映射到条件更新，精确地将失败路由到提示优化或工具合成/修复。同时引入按任务族分层的训练分布和Pareto式保留策略。
AI.result: 在四个图形推理基准上达到92.0%的平均成功率，显著优于纯提示和固定工具箱基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过指令和工具的协同进化，双空间框架能有效解决图形推理中的耦合问题，实现结构化正确性验证。

title: RubricEM: Meta-RL with Rubric-guided Policy Decomposition beyond Verifiable Rewards
summary: Training deep research agents, namely systems that plan, search, evaluate evidence, and synthesize long-form reports, pushes reinforcement learning beyond the regime of verifiable rewards. Their outputs lack ground-truth answers, their trajectories span many tool-augmented decisions, and standard post-training offers little mechanism for turning past attempts into reusable experience. In this work, we argue that rubrics should serve not merely as final-answer evaluators, but as the shared interface that structures policy execution, judge feedback, and agent memory. Based on this view, we introduce RubricEM, a rubric-guided reinforcement learning framework that combines stagewise policy decomposition with reflection-based meta-policy evolution. RubricEM first makes research trajectories stage-aware by conditioning planning, evidence gathering, review, and synthesis on self-generated rubrics. It then assigns credit with Stage-Structured GRPO, which uses stagewise rubric judgments to provide denser semantic feedback for long-horizon optimization. In parallel, RubricEM trains a shared-backbone reflection meta-policy that distills judged trajectories into reusable rubric-grounded guidance for future attempts. The resulting RubricEM-8B achieves strong performance across four long-form research benchmarks, outperforming comparable open models and approaching proprietary deep-research systems. Beyond final performance, we perform thorough analyses to understand the key ingredients of RubricEM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 RubricEM，一种基于评分标准的强化学习框架，通过阶段化策略分解和反思式元策略进化，使8B模型在长文本研究任务上超越同类开源模型，接近闭源深度研究系统。
AI.motivation: 训练深度研究代理面临奖励不可验证的挑战——长流程输出无标准答案，且标准后训练方法无法将以往尝试转化为可复用经验。作者认为评分标准不应仅作为最终评估工具，而应作为统一接口来结构化策略执行、评判反馈和智能体记忆。
AI.method: 提出 RubricEM，包含两个核心组件：(1) 阶段化策略分解——将研究轨迹按规划、证据收集、审查和合成等阶段进行划分，各阶段由自生成的评分标准引导；(2) 反思式元策略进化——通过 Stage-Structured GRPO 实现阶段级信用分配，提供更密集的语义反馈；同时训练共享骨干网络的反思元策略，将评判过的轨迹蒸馏为可复用的评分标准导向指导。
AI.result: RubricEM-8B 在四个长文本研究基准测试中表现强劲，超越同类开源模型，性能接近专有的深度研究系统。
AI.conclusion: 评分标准不仅是评估工具，更可作为统一接口来结构化策略、反馈和记忆；RubricEM 验证了在不可验证奖励场景下进行有效强化学习的可行性。

title: DeepTumorVQA: A Hierarchical 3D CT Benchmark for Stage-Wise Evaluation of Medical VLMs and Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) and AI agents have made significant progress in learning to analyze and reason about clinical images. However, existing medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks collapse model capabilities into a single accuracy score, obscuring where and why models fail. We propose DeepTumorVQA, a hierarchical benchmark that follows the multi-stage evidence chain in tumor diagnosis and decomposes 3D CT reasoning into four stages: recognition, measurement, visual reasoning, and medical reasoning. Higher-level questions remain independently scorable, while their ground-truth evidence chains are defined over lower-level primitives. The benchmark contains 476K questions across 42 clinical subtypes on 9,262 3D CT volumes. In addition to a direct reasoning mode for VLMs, DeepTumorVQA provides tool-interaction environments for agent evaluation, where a model can call external tools, including segmentation models, measurement programs, and medical knowledge modules, before answering the question. Evaluating over 30 model configurations, we find that reliable quantitative measurement is the primary bottleneck, making later-stage visual and medical reasoning harder for VLMs, while tool augmentation substantially mitigates this issue. When tools are available, leveraging medical knowledge and tools to reason about medical images becomes a new challenge. We further show that ground-truth step-by-step tool-use traces from DeepTumorVQA can supervise agents and reduce tool-use and reasoning failures. This stage-wise progression from recognition to measurement to visual and medical reasoning provides a concrete roadmap for future medical VLM and AI agent studies. All data and code are released at https://github.com/Schuture/DeepTumorVQA.

AI.tldr: DeepTumorVQA是一个层次化医学VQA基准，将3D CT肿瘤诊断推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理和医学推理四个阶段，包含476K问题，支持直接推理和工具交互两种模式，实验发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，而工具增强可有效缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VQA基准将所有模型能力压缩为单一准确率分数，无法揭示模型在哪些环节以及为何失败。
AI.method: 构建了层次化基准DeepTumorVQA，将肿瘤诊断证据链分解为四个阶段（识别→测量→视觉推理→医学推理），提供直接推理和工具交互两种评估模式，工具包括分割模型、测量程序和医学知识模块。
AI.result: 评估30多种模型配置发现：定量测量是主要瓶颈，影响后续推理；工具增强可显著缓解此问题；当工具可用时，利用医学知识和工具推理成为新挑战；基准中的真实工具使用轨迹可监督智能体减少错误。
AI.conclusion: 从识别到测量再到视觉和医学推理的阶段式进展为未来医学VLM和AI智能体研究提供了具体路线图。

title: Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects: From Passive Assertions to Active Knowledge
summary: Scientific knowledge on the Web is published as passive assertions and cannot decide when to validate evidence, reconcile contradictions, or update confidence as findings accumulate. Curation depends on centralised middleware and institutional continuity, but when registries close, active stewardship stops even when data remain online. We advance the concept of Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects (aFDOs) from an abstract idea to an operational model, to offer a route from passive scientific publication toward accountable, standards-aligned automation that can outlive its publishing institutions. aFDO augments FDOs with three capabilities anchored in Semantic Web standards, namely 1) a policy layer over RDF-star aligned with PROV-O, SHACL, and ODRL for portable condition-action rules, 2) an announcement layer over ActivityStreams 2.0 that bounds per-announcement evaluation cost, and 3) an agreement layer that resolves multi-source contradictions through reputation and confidence weighted agreement under a bounded adversarial model. We provide a formal definition that distinguishes policy specifications, event handlers, and communication interfaces. We evaluate an open reference implementation on 4,305 FDOs grounded in rare-disease ontologies, namely ClinVar, HPO, and Orphanet, combined with controlled synthetic observations. The consensus mechanism resolves 56.3% of 3,914 naturally occurring ClinVar conflicts where multiple submitters disagree and an expert panel has subsequently adjudicated. Under Sybil, collusion, and poisoning attacks, the mechanism degrades gracefully within its design Byzantine-tolerance bound (f < n/5), and fails as predicted beyond that bound.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自治FAIR数字对象（aFDO），将被动科学出版物转化为可自主验证证据、解决矛盾并更新置信度的自动化代理，通过基于语义网标准的策略层、公告层和协议层实现，在罕见病本体冲突解决中达到56.3%的共识率，并能在拜占庭容错边界内优雅降级。
AI.motivation: 现有科学知识在Web上以被动断言的形态发布，无法自主验证证据、调和矛盾或更新置信度；策展依赖中心化中间件和机构持续性，一旦注册库关闭，即使数据仍在线，主动管理也随之停止。因此需要一种能超越发布机构存续期的自动化方案。
AI.method: aFDO在FDO基础上增强三种能力：1）基于RDF-star、PROV-O、SHACL和ODRL的策略层，实现可移植的条件-动作规则；2）基于ActivityStreams 2.0的公告层，约束单次公告评估成本；3）基于声誉和置信度加权一致性的协议层，在有界对抗模型下解决多源矛盾。
AI.result: 在4305个基于罕见病本体（ClinVar、HPO、Orphanet）的FDO上评估，共识机制解决了3914个自然发生的ClinVar冲突中的56.3%。在Sybil、合谋和投毒攻击下，机制在设计的拜占庭容错边界（f < n/5）内优雅降级，超出边界后按预期失效。
AI.conclusion: aFDO将被动科学出版转化为可问责的、与标准对齐的自动化系统，能够超越其发布机构的生命周期持续运行，为去中心化的、自治的科学知识管理提供了可行路线。

title: WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation
summary: Large language and vision-language models increasingly power agents that act on a user's behalf through command-line interface (CLI) harnesses. However, most agent benchmarks still rely on synthetic sandboxes, short-horizon tasks, mock-service APIs, and final-answer checks, leaving open whether agents can complete realistic long-horizon work in the runtimes where they are deployed. This work presents WildClawBench, a native-runtime benchmark of 60 human-authored, bilingual, multimodal tasks spanning six thematic categories. Each task averages roughly 8 minutes of wall-clock time and over 20 tool calls, and runs inside a reproducible Docker container hosting an actual CLI agent harness (OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, or Hermes Agent) with access to real tools rather than mock services. Grading is hybrid, combining deterministic rule-based checks, environment-state auditing of side effects, and an LLM/VLM judge for semantic verification. Across 19 frontier models, the best, Claude Opus 4.7, reaches only 62.2% overall under OpenClaw, while every other model stays below 60%, and switching harness alone shifts a single model by up to 18 points. These results show that long-horizon, native-runtime agent evaluation remains a far-from-resolved task for current frontier models. We release the tasks, code, and containerized tooling to support reproducible evaluation.

AI.tldr: WildClawBench是一个包含60个双语多模态任务的本地运行时基准测试，每个任务平均耗时8分钟、调用20+工具。在19个前沿模型中，最佳模型Claude Opus 4.7仅达62.2%准确率，其余均低于60%，切换工具框架可使同一模型得分波动18个百分点，表明长时域、本地运行时智能体评估仍是未解难题。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试依赖合成沙箱、短时任务和模拟API，无法评估智能体在真实部署环境中的长时域任务表现。
AI.method: 构建60个由人撰写的双语多模态任务，运行在可复现的Docker容器中，使用真实CLI工具框架（OpenClaw、Claude Code、Codex、Hermes Agent），采用混合评分（规则检查、环境状态审计、LLM/VLM语义验证）。
AI.result: 19个前沿模型中，Claude Opus 4.7以62.2%最优，其余均低于60%；切换工具框架导致同一模型性能波动高达18个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 长时域、本地运行时的智能体评估对当前前沿模型而言仍远未解决。

title: Forcing-KV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion Models
summary: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models adopt a streaming generation framework, enabling long-horizon video generation with real-time responsiveness, as exemplified by the Self Forcing training paradigm. However, existing AR video diffusion models still suffer from significant attention complexity and severe memory overhead due to the redundant key-value (KV) caches across historical frames, which limits scalability. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by introducing KV cache compression into autoregressive video diffusion. We observe that attention heads in mainstream AR diffusion models exhibit markedly distinct attention patterns and functional roles that remain stable across samples and denoising steps. Building on our empirical study of head-wise functional specialization, we divide the attention heads into two categories: static heads, which focus on transitions across autoregressive chunks and intra-frame fidelity, and dynamic heads, which govern inter-frame motion and consistency. We then propose Forcing-KV, a hybrid KV cache compression strategy that performs structured static pruning for static heads and dynamic pruning based on segment-wise similarity for dynamic heads. While maintaining output quality, our method achieves a generation speed of over 29 frames per second on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU along with 30% cache memory reduction, delivering up to 1.35x and 1.50x speedups on LongLive and Self Forcing at 480P resolution, and further scaling to 2.82x speedup at 1080P resolution. Code and demo videos are provided at https://zju-jiyicheng.github.io/Forcing-KV-Page.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Forcing-KV，一种针对自回归视频扩散模型的分层KV缓存压缩策略，将注意力头分为静态头（关注帧内保真度与块间过渡）和动态头（控制帧间运动一致性），分别进行结构化和基于片段相似性的动态剪枝，在保持输出质量的同时实现29+ FPS生成速度、30%缓存减少及最高2.82倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视频扩散模型因跨历史帧的冗余KV缓存导致注意力复杂度高、内存开销大，限制了可扩展性。作者观察到不同注意力头具有稳定且差异化的功能模式，据此提出针对性压缩策略以降低开销。
AI.method: 首先通过实证研究将注意力头分为静态头（关注自回归块间过渡和帧内保真度）和动态头（控制帧间运动与一致性）。静态头采用结构化剪枝，动态头基于片段间相似性进行动态剪枝，形成混合KV缓存压缩策略Forcing-KV。
AI.result: 在单NVIDIA H200 GPU上实现29+ FPS生成速度，30%缓存内存减少。在480P分辨率下，LongLive和Self Forcing分别获得1.35x和1.50x加速；1080P分辨率下扩展到2.82x加速，且保持输出质量。
AI.conclusion: Forcing-KV通过头功能专门化分析和混合剪枝策略，有效降低了自回归视频扩散模型的KV缓存冗余，实现了显著的加速和内存节省，为长视频实时生成提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Agent-X: Full Pipeline Acceleration of On-device AI Agents
summary: LLM-based agents deliver state-of-the-art performance across tasks but incur high end-to-end latency on edge devices. We introduce Agent-X, a software-only, accuracy-preserving framework that accelerates both the prefill and decode stages of on-device agent workloads. Agent-X's two key components rewrite prompts to leverage prefix caching tailored to agent-specific input-token patterns and enable LLM-free speculative decoding for fast token generation with minimal overhead. On representative agentic workloads, Agent-X achieves a 1.61x end-to-end speedup in real systems with no accuracy loss and can be seamlessly integrated into existing on-device AI agents. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first to systematically characterize and eliminate latency bottlenecks in on-device agents.

AI.tldr: Agent-X是一个专为边缘设备设计的软件框架，通过前缀缓存和LLM-free推测解码技术，在不损失精度的前提下将智能体工作负载的端到端延迟加速1.61倍。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的智能体在边缘设备上运行时会面临高延迟问题，影响用户体验和实时性，现有方案缺乏针对边缘设备上智能体工作负载的系统性延迟优化。
AI.method: 两个关键组件：1) 重写提示词以利用前缀缓存，针对智能体特有的输入token模式进行优化；2) 无LLM的推测解码，实现快速token生成且开销极小。
AI.result: 在代表性智能体工作负载上，端到端加速1.61倍，且无精度损失，可无缝集成到现有边缘AI智能体中。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统性地表征并消除了边缘设备上智能体的延迟瓶颈，为边缘AI智能体的高效部署提供了可行方案。

title: ELF: Embedded Language Flows
summary: Diffusion and flow-based models have become the de facto approaches for generating continuous data, e.g., in domains such as images and videos. Their success has attracted growing interest in applying them to language modeling. Unlike their image-domain counterparts, today's leading diffusion language models (DLMs) primarily operate over discrete tokens. In this paper, we show that continuous DLMs can be made effective with minimal adaptation to the discrete domain. We propose Embedded Language Flows (ELF), a class of diffusion models in continuous embedding space based on continuous-time Flow Matching. Unlike existing DLMs, ELF predominantly stays within the continuous embedding space until the final time step, where it maps to discrete tokens using a shared-weight network. This formulation makes it straightforward to adapt established techniques from image-domain diffusion models, e.g., classifier-free guidance (CFG). Experiments show that ELF substantially outperforms leading discrete and continuous DLMs, achieving better generation quality with fewer sampling steps. These results suggest that ELF offers a promising path toward effective continuous DLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELF（Embedded Language Flows），一种基于连续嵌入空间的扩散语言模型，通过连续时间流匹配，在离散令牌生成任务上显著优于现有离散和连续扩散语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型主要操作于离散令牌空间，而连续扩散模型在图像/视频领域已取得巨大成功。本文探索能否将连续扩散模型有效应用于语言建模，只需最小化适配。
AI.method: 提出ELF模型：基于连续时间流匹配（Flow Matching）的连续嵌入空间扩散模型。模型在连续嵌入空间中运行直到最后一步，才通过共享权重网络映射到离散令牌。这使得可以直接借鉴图像领域的成熟技术（如无分类器引导CFG）。
AI.result: ELF显著优于领先的离散和连续扩散语言模型，在更少的采样步数下实现了更好的生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 连续扩散语言模型（ELF）为语言建模提供了一条有前景的路径，表明在连续空间进行扩散并最后映射到离散令牌是一种有效的策略。

title: Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for Remote Sensing Single-Image Super-Resolution
summary: Remote Sensing (RS) single-image super-resolution aims to reconstruct high-resolution imagery from low-resolution observations while preserving fine spatial structures. Recent Swin Transformer-based models, including Swin2SR, provide strong spatial context modeling throughshifted-window self-attention, but their feed-forward networks remain generic channel-mixing modules and do not separate low-frequency structural content from high-frequency residual detail. To address this limitation, we propose SFG-SwinSR, a Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for single-image super-resolution in remote sensing. SFG-SwinSR modifies the original Swin2SR attention block by replacing each transformer block's standard feed-forward network with a lightweight Spatial-Frequency Gated Feed-Forward Network (SFG-FFN). The module estimates low-frequency content via a depthwise-blur branch, extracts high-frequency residuals by subtraction, refines them with a lightweight spatial branch, and adaptively injects detail through a bottleneck gate. Experiments on SpaceNet and SEN2VENμS show that SFG-SwinSR improves reconstruction quality under the evaluated settings. On SpaceNet, it achieves 45.19 dB PSNR and 0.9852 SSIM, indicating effective enhancement of high-frequency details. This demonstrates that spatial-frequency transformation within the transformer feed-forward network improves detail reconstruction in RS super-resolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SFG-SwinSR，通过用空间-频率门控前馈网络(SFG-FFN)替换Swin2SR中的标准前馈网络，将低频结构和高频细节分离处理，提升了遥感图像超分辨率重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有Swin Transformer超分辨率模型（如Swin2SR）的注意力机制虽能建模空间上下文，但其前馈网络仍是通用通道混合模块，无法区分低频结构内容与高频残差细节，限制了细节重建能力。
AI.method: 提出SFG-SwinSR模型，核心是用SFG-FFN替换Swin2SR的标准FFN。SFG-FFN包含：深度模糊分支估计低频信息、减法提取高频残差、轻量空间分支细化高频信息、瓶颈门控自适应融合细节。
AI.result: 在SpaceNet上PSNR达45.19 dB、SSIM达0.9852；在SpaceNet和SEN2VENμS数据集上均优于对比方法，有效增强高频细节重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 在Transformer前馈网络中引入空间-频率变换能够有效分离并增强高频细节，改善遥感图像超分辨率的重建效果。

title: ConFixGS: Learning to Fix Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Confidence-Aware Diffusion Priors in Driving Scenes
summary: Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) often struggles in trajectory-based sparse-view driving scenes. Existing Gaussian repair methods mainly target optimization-based 3DGS, while diffusion-based repair is typically restricted to iterative refinement near observed viewpoints, leaving feedforward 3DGS repair underexplored. We propose ConFixGS, a plug-and-play method that learns to fix feedforward 3DGS with confidence-aware diffusion priors. Starting from a pretrained feedforward model, ConFixGS generates diffusion-enhanced local pseudo-targets and validates them through reprojection-based cross-checking against support views. The resulting dense confidence maps guide refinement, enhancing reliable details while suppressing hallucinated or inconsistent evidence. On Waymo, nuScenes, and KITTI, ConFixGS improves challenging novel view synthesis, with PSNR gains of up to 3.68 dB and FID reduced by nearly half. Our results highlight confidence-aware fusion of generative priors and support-view consistency as a key principle for robust feedforward 3D driving scene reconstruction.

AI.tldr: ConFixGS是一种即插即用方法，通过学习使用置信度感知的扩散先验来修复前馈3D高斯泼溅，在稀疏视图驾驶场景中显著提升了新视角合成质量（PSNR提升最高3.68 dB，FID降低近一半）。
AI.motivation: 前馈3DGS在轨迹驱动的稀疏视图驾驶场景中表现不佳，现有修复方法要么针对优化型3DGS，要么局限于观察视角附近的迭代优化，前馈3DGS的修复问题尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 从预训练的前馈模型出发，ConFixGS先生成扩散增强的局部伪目标，然后通过基于重投影的交叉校验与支持视图进行验证，生成密集置信度图来引导细化过程——增强可靠细节同时抑制幻觉或不一致证据。
AI.result: 在Waymo、nuScenes和KITTI数据集上，ConFixGS显著提升了挑战性新视角合成任务，PSNR增益最高达3.68 dB，FID降低近一半。
AI.conclusion: 置信度感知的生成先验与支持视图一致性融合，是实现鲁棒前馈3D驾驶场景重建的关键原则。

title: GuardAD: Safeguarding Autonomous Driving MLLMs via Markovian Safety Logic
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly integrated into autonomous driving (AD) systems; however, they remain vulnerable to diverse safety threats, particularly in accident-prone scenarios. Recent safeguard mechanisms have shown promise by incorporating logical constraints, yet most rely on static formulations that lack temporally grounded safety reasoning over evolving traffic interactions, resulting in limited robustness in dynamic driving environments. To address these limitations, we propose GuardAD, a model-agnostic safeguard that formulates AD safety as an evolving Markovian logical state. GuardAD introduces Neuro-Symbolic Logic Formalization, which represents safety predicates over heterogeneous traffic participants and continuously induces them via n-th order Markovian Logic Induction. This design enables the inference of emerging and latent hazards beyond single-step observations. Rather than simply vetoing unsafe actions, GuardAD performs Logic-Driven Action Revision, where inferred safety states actively guide action refinement without modifying the underlying MLLM. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and AD-MLLMs demonstrate that GuardAD substantially reduces accident rates (-32.07%) while slightly improving task performance (+6.85%). Moreover, closed-loop simulation evaluations, together with physical-world vehicle studies, further validate the effectiveness and potential of GuardAD.

AI.tldr: GuardAD是一种模型无关的自动驾驶安全防护机制，通过神经符号逻辑形式化和马尔可夫逻辑归纳，将安全建模为随时间演化的状态，实现动态交通场景下的安全推理和动作修正，显著降低事故率并提升任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM驱动的自动驾驶系统在动态交通场景下缺乏时间维度的安全推理能力，静态逻辑约束难以应对不断演化的交通交互，导致鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出GuardAD框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 神经符号逻辑形式化——将安全谓词表示为异构交通参与者的马尔可夫逻辑状态；2) 逻辑驱动动作修正——基于推理出的安全状态主动引导动作优化，无需修改底层MLLM。
AI.result: 在多个基准和AD-MLLM上，事故率降低32.07%，任务性能提升6.85%；闭环仿真和实车实验进一步验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: GuardAD通过时间演化的逻辑状态推理，有效增强了自动驾驶系统的安全鲁棒性，且具有模型无关性和实用性。

title: Do multimodal models imagine electric sheep?
summary: Yes. We find that large multimodal models develop mental imagery when solving spatial puzzles, and they do imagine sheep when solving sheep puzzles. We fine-tune a Qwen3.5 VLM to solve twelve diverse visual reasoning tasks -- including tangram, jigsaw, sokoban, 3D mental rotation, and rush hour -- that require understanding geometry, spatial relationships, and the consequences of actions. By supervising the model to predict the open-loop sequence of actions to solve a puzzle from an initial state, we show that the model's activations after each action encode meaningful visual information about the intermediate state. This finding suggests that an imperfect visual world model begins to form as a byproduct of learning to select correct actions, in the absence of any explicit visual supervision. Building on this observation, we propose two ways to sharpen and use the mental images formed by the model. We find that integrating as few as sixteen visual tokens per step into the chain of thought improves the average solve rate from 83% to 89%, with particularly strong gains on reasoning-heavy tasks such as jigsaw and 3D mental rotation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大语言模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成"心理意象"，通过在视觉推理任务上微调模型并监督其预测动作序列，模型的激活编码了中间状态的有意义视觉信息。将少量视觉token整合到思维链中可将平均解决率从83%提升到89%。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型在解决空间推理任务时是否能够自发形成视觉心理意象（mental imagery），并利用这种内隐的视觉表征来提升模型的空间推理能力。
AI.method: 微调Qwen3.5 VLM在12种视觉推理任务（七巧板、拼图、推箱子、3D心理旋转、rush hour等）上进行开放序列动作预测，通过分析模型每步后的激活状态，验证其中是否编码了中间状态的视觉信息。进一步提出将少量视觉token（16个）整合进思维链中。
AI.result: 模型在无显式视觉监督下，其激活状态确实编码了中间状态的视觉信息（即形成了心理意象）。整合16个视觉token到思维链后，平均解决率从83%提升至89%，在拼图和3D心理旋转等推理密集型任务上提升尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 学习选择正确动作的副产品是形成不完美的视觉世界模型（心理意象），利用这些意象可以有效增强模型的空间推理能力，验证了视觉表征在纯语言思维链中的价值。

title: LLM4Branch: Large Language Model for Discovering Efficient Branching Policies of Integer Programs
comment: ICML2026 preprint, camera ready in progress
summary: Efficient branching policies are essential for accelerating Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solvers. Their design has long relied on hand-crafted heuristics, and now machine learning has emerged as a promising paradigm to automate this process. However, existing learning-based methods are often hindered by their dependence on expensive expert demonstrations and the gap between training objectives and the solver's end-to-end performance. In this work, we propose LLM4Branch, a novel framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the discovery of efficient branching policies. Specifically, the discovered policy is an executable program with a program skeleton generated by the LLM and a parameter vector, which is optimized via a zeroth-order method over a few instances with their end-to-end performance feedback. Extensive experiments on standard MILP benchmarks demonstrate that LLM4Branch establishes a new state-of-the-art among CPU-based methods and achieves performance competitive with advanced GPU-based models. Codes are available at https://github.com/hzn18/LLM4Branch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM4Branch框架，利用大语言模型自动发现高效的MILP分支策略，通过零阶优化调整参数，在CPU方法中达到SOTA，性能媲美GPU方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的分支策略依赖昂贵的专家演示，且训练目标与求解器端到端性能之间存在差距，亟需一种更自动化、高效的策略发现方法。
AI.method: 利用LLM生成可执行程序骨架，结合参数向量，通过零阶优化方法在少量实例上基于端到端性能反馈进行参数优化，实现分支策略的自动发现。
AI.result: 在标准MILP基准测试中，LLM4Branch在CPU方法中达到新的SOTA，性能与先进的GPU方法相当。
AI.conclusion: LLM4Branch有效结合LLM的代码生成能力与零阶优化，克服了现有方法的局限性，为MILP分支策略设计提供了新的自动化范式。

title: Discriminative Span as a Predictor of Synthetic Data Utility via Classifier Reconstruction
summary: In many real-world computer vision applications, including medical imaging and industrial inspection, binary classification tasks are characterized by a severe scarcity of positive samples. A widely adopted solution is to generate synthetic positive data using image-to-image transformations applied to negative samples. However, a fundamental challenge remains: how can we reliably assess whether such synthetic data will improve downstream model performance? In this work, we propose a geometry-driven metric that predicts the utility of synthetic data without requiring model training. Our approach operates in the embedding space of a pre-trained foundation model and represents the dataset through difference vectors between samples. We evaluate whether the weight vector of a linear classifier can be expressed within the subspace spanned by these variations by measuring the relative projection error. Intuitively, if the variations induced by synthetic data capture task-relevant directions, their span can approximate the classifier, resulting in low projection error. Conversely, poor synthetic data fails to span these directions, leading to higher error. Across multiple datasets and architectures, we show that this metric exhibits strong correlation with downstream classification performance of CNNs trained on mixtures of real negative and synthetic positive data. These findings suggest that the proposed metric serves as a practical and informative tool for evaluating synthetic data quality in data-scarce settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于几何的度量方法，无需模型训练即可预测合成正样本数据对下游二分类任务的效用。该方法利用预训练基础模型的嵌入空间，通过测量线性分类器权重向量能否被合成数据差异向量张成的子空间近似（即投影误差）来评估数据质量。实验表明该度量与下游分类性能高度相关。
AI.motivation: 在医疗影像、工业检测等真实应用中，正样本极度稀缺，常用图像到图像的变换从负样本生成合成正样本。但如何可靠地评估这些合成数据能否提升下游模型性能是一个基本挑战。
AI.method: 在预训练基础模型的嵌入空间中，通过样本间的差异向量表示数据集。计算线性分类器权重向量在合成数据差异向量张成子空间上的相对投影误差：误差低表示合成数据捕获了任务相关方向，效用高；误差高则效用低。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和架构上的实验表明，该度量与在真实负样本+合成正样本混合数据上训练的CNN的下游分类性能之间存在强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的度量可作为数据稀缺场景下评估合成数据质量的实用且有效的工具，无需实际训练模型即可预测合成数据的效用。

title: Can Agent Benchmarks Support Their Scores? Evidence-Supported Bounds for Interactive-Agent Evaluation
summary:
Interactive agent benchmarks map an agent run to a binary outcome through outcome checks. When these checks rely on surface level signals or fail to capture the agent's actual action path, they cannot reliably determine whether the run succeeded. For example, a benchmark task may ask whether Alice's shipping address was changed, while the outcome check only verifies that the agent clicked "Save." This does not guarantee that the intended state change occurred, since the agent may have modified the wrong record. Treating such a run as successful therefore makes the reported score misleading. Benchmark quality thus depends not only on task design, but also on the reliability of outcome detection.
  We address this problem by introducing an outcome evidence reporting layer for existing benchmarks, without modifying their tasks, agents, or evaluators. The layer performs three functions. First, before scoring, it specifies which stored artifacts are required to verify the claimed outcome for each case. Second, it applies a locked checklist to each completed run and assigns one of three evidence labels: Evidence Pass, Evidence Fail, or Unknown. Third, it reports evidence supported score bounds that quantify uncertainty arising from Unknown cases. Rather than silently counting, discarding, or hiding uncertain cases inside a single aggregate success rate, the framework keeps them explicitly visible.
  We evaluate the outcome evidence layer on five public benchmarks: ANDROIDWORLD, AGENTDOJO, APPWORLD, tau3 bench retail, and MINIWOB. The resulting reports separate several empirically distinct failure modes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结果证据报告层，通过在现有基准测试中添加证据标注（Pass/Fail/Unknown）和置信区间报告，解决了交互式智能体基准测试中结果检测不可靠的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式智能体基准测试的结果检查依赖表面信号（如检测是否点击了"保存"按钮），无法可靠判断任务是否真正成功，导致评估分数具有误导性。基准质量不仅取决于任务设计，还取决于结果检测的可靠性。
AI.method: 在现有基准测试之上引入一个结果证据报告层，不修改原有任务、智能体或评估器。该层完成三个功能：(1) 针对每个案例预先指定需要哪些存储工件来验证结果；(2) 对每个完成运行应用锁定清单，分配三种证据标签之一：证据通过、证据失败或未知；(3) 报告证据支持的分数界限，量化由未知案例带来的不确定性。
AI.result: 在ANDROIDWORLD、AGENTDOJO、APPWORLD、tau3 bench retail和MINIWOB五个公开基准测试上进行了评估，报告成功分离出几种经验上不同的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过将不确定的案例显式可见（而非静默计数、丢弃或隐藏在单一聚合成功率中），提高了基准测试评估的透明度和可靠性。

title: DriveFuture: Future-Aware Latent World Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: Existing latent world models for autonomous driving have opened a promising path toward future-aware driving intelligence. However, they typically treat future latent states as prediction targets or auxiliary signals, rather than directly conditioning trajectory planning. This can entangle current and future features in latent space. In this work, we propose DriveFuture, a future-aware latent world modeling framework for autonomous driving that explicitly learns planning-oriented foresight by conditioning the current latent state modeling process on future world states. Specifically, during training, the model first predicts future latent world states from the current latent state and ego action, and then refines the prediction against the ground-truth future latent state via cross-attention. The resulting future-aware latent serves as an explicit condition for a diffusion-based trajectory planner. During inference, DriveFuture conditions on the predicted future latent state instead of the ground-truth future state. DriveFuture achieves SOTA performance on the public NAVSIM benchmarks, reaching \textbf{55.5} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}, \textbf{89.9} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, and \textbf{90.7} PDMS on NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, respectively. These results suggest that the key to latent world modeling lies not merely in simulating future states, but more importantly in conditioning current decision-making on future states. Notably, as of April 2026, DriveFuture ranks \textbf{1st} on the \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2025/e2e-driving-navhard}{NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}} leaderboard and achieves SOTA performance on \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2024-P/e2e-driving-navtest}{NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}}.

AI.tldr: DriveFuture提出一种面向规划的未来感知潜在世界模型框架，通过将当前潜状态建模显式条件于未来世界状态，实现规划导向的预测，在NAVSIM多个benchmark上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在世界模型将未来潜状态仅作为预测目标或辅助信号，而非直接条件化轨迹规划，导致当前与未来特征在潜空间中纠缠不清。
AI.method: 训练时先预测未来潜状态，再通过与真实未来潜状态进行交叉注意力精炼，得到未来感知潜状态作为扩散轨迹规划器的显式条件；推理时用预测的未来潜状态替代真实值。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM-v2 navhard上达到55.5 EPDMS，navtest上达到89.9 EPDMS；NAVSIM-v1 navtest上达到90.7 PDMS，均取得SOTA并排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 潜在世界建模的关键不仅在于模拟未来状态，更在于将当前决策条件于未来状态上。

title: ASIA: an Autonomous System Identification Agent
summary: Over the years, research in system identification has provided a rich set of methods for learning dynamical models, together with well-established theoretical guarantees. In practice, however, the choice of model class, training algorithm, and hyperparameter tuning is still largely left to empirical trial-and-error, requiring substantial expert time and domain experience. Motivated by recent advances in agentic artificial intelligence, we present ASIA, a framework that delegates this iterative search to a large language model acting as an autonomous coding agent. Building on existing agentic platforms, ASIA closes the loop between hypothesis, implementation, and evaluation without human intervention, requiring only a plain-English description of the identification problem. We conduct an empirical study of ASIA on two system identification benchmarks and analyse the agent's search behaviour, the architectures and training strategies it discovers, and the quality of the resulting models. We also discuss the potential of the approach and its current limitations, including implicit test leakage, reduced methodological transparency, and reproducibility concerns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASIA框架，利用大语言模型作为自主编码代理，自动完成从假设到实现再到评估的系统辨识迭代流程，无需人工干预，只需自然语言描述问题即可。
AI.motivation: 现有系统辨识方法虽然丰富且理论成熟，但在模型类选择、训练算法和超参数调优方面仍依赖大量专家经验和试错，耗时且门槛高。作者希望利用大语言模型的自主编码能力自动化这一过程。
AI.method: 基于智能体人工智能理念，构建ASIA框架，将大语言模型作为自主编码代理，集成到现有智能体平台中，实现"假设-实现-评估"闭环。用户只需提供英文问题描述，代理自动完成模型搜索与调优。
AI.result: 在两个系统辨识基准上进行了实证研究，分析了代理的搜索行为、发现的架构与训练策略，以及最终模型质量。
AI.conclusion: ASIA展示了利用LLM自动化系统辨识的潜力，但也存在隐式测试泄露、方法透明度降低和可重复性不足等问题，需要进一步解决。

title: MOTOR-Bench: A Real-world Dataset and Multi-agent Framework for Zero-shot Human Mental State Understanding
summary: Understanding human mental states from natural behavior is crucial for intelligent systems in the real world. However, most current research focuses on predicting isolated mental state labels, lacking structured annotations of complex interpersonal interactions. To support structured analysis, we introduce MOTOR-Bench, a carefully-designed benchmark with a real-world dataset MOTOR-dataset, containing 1,440 multimodal video clips in collaborative learning scenarios, reflecting key real-world data challenges including natural class imbalance, visual noise, and domain-specific language. Each sample is labeled by educational experts based on self-regulated learning theory. We further evaluate several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models and multi-agent systems in a zero-shot setting on our MOTOR-Bench. However, their performance on this task remains limited, suggesting that existing methods still struggle with structured reasoning from observable behavior to deeper mental states. To address this challenge, we propose a reasoning multi-agent framework, named MOTOR-MAS. It coordinates multiple agents through a structured agent coordination mechanism to infer explicit behaviors, internal cognitions, and psychological emotions. Experimental results show that our MOTOR-MAS outperforms the best single-model benchmark by 15.93 points in Macro-F1 scores for the three labels of behavior, cognition, and emotion, and outperforms the general multi-agent benchmark by 10.2 points in internal cognition prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了MOTOR-Bench基准和MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，用于从自然行为中结构化推理人类心理状态（行为、认知、情感），在协作学习场景数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前研究多聚焦于预测孤立心理状态标签，缺乏对复杂人际交互的结构化标注。现有方法在从可观察行为推理深层心理状态方面表现有限。
AI.method: 构建了包含1,440个多模态视频片段的MOTOR-dataset，基于自我调节学习理论由教育专家标注。提出MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，通过结构化协调机制协同多个智能体推断显性行为、内部认知和心理情感。
AI.result: MOTOR-MAS在行为、认知、情感三个标签的Macro-F1上超过最佳单模型15.93分，在内部认知预测上超过通用多智能体基线10.2分。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在结构化心理推理上仍存在局限，多智能体协同推理是解决该问题的有效方向。

title: SkillEvolver: Skill Learning as a Meta-Skill
summary: Agent skills today are static artifact: authored once -- by human curation or one-shot generation from parametric knowledge -- and then consumed unchanged, with no mechanism to improve from real use. We propose \textbf{SkillEvolver}, a lightweight, plug-and-play solution for online skill learning, in which a single meta-skill iteratively authors, deploys, and refines domain-specific skills. The learning target of SkillEvolver is the skill's prose and code, not model weights, so that the resulting artifact drops into any agent without retraining; and the meta-skill itself is just another skill, loaded through the same interface by any protocol-compliant CLI-agent. Unlike trace-distillation, the meta-skill refines only after deploying the learnt skill, such that the learning signal comes from failures another agent encounters while using it -- not from exploratory traces alone. Refinement iterations are governed by a fresh-agent overfit audit that catches possible leakage as well as deployed-skill-specific failures, including the silent-bypass mode in which a skill appears valid in content but is never invoked at runtime. On $83$ SkillsBench tasks spanning $15^{+}$ domains, SkillEvolver reaches $56.8\%$ accuracy versus $43.6\%$ for curated human skills and $29.9\%$ for the no-skill baseline; on three GPU kernel optimization tasks from KernelBench, it also raises mean speedup from $1.16$ to $1.51$ on average.

AI.tldr: SkillEvolver提出了一种轻量级、即插即用的在线技能学习方案，通过一个元技能迭代地创作、部署和优化领域特定技能，使技能能够从实际使用中持续改进，在83个任务上达到56.8%的准确率，显著优于人工技能（43.6%）和无技能基线（29.9%）。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体技能是静态产物，由人工或一次性生成创建后直接使用，缺乏从实际部署中学习和改进的机制。
AI.method: SkillEvolver采用元技能（meta-skill）框架，通过迭代方式生成、部署和优化技能描述与代码，而非模型权重；优化信号来源于其他智能体使用该技能时遇到的失败案例，而非仅依赖探索轨迹；并引入"新鲜智能体过拟合审计"机制，检测技能泄露、静默绕过等部署失败模式。
AI.result: 在83个SkillsBench任务（覆盖15+领域）上，SkillEvolver达到56.8%准确率，优于人工技能43.6%和无技能基线29.9%；在KernelBench的3个GPU内核优化任务上，平均加速比从1.16提升至1.51。
AI.conclusion: SkillEvolver证明了无需重新训练模型权重，仅通过在线迭代优化技能的文本描述和代码，即可显著提升智能体在多种领域任务上的性能，是一种轻量且有效的技能持续学习方案。

title: Distilling 3D Spatial Reasoning into a Lightweight Vision-Language Model with CoT
summary: Large-scale 3D vision-language models (VLMs) like LLaVA-3D offer strong spatial reasoning but are difficult to deploy due to high computational costs. We propose a knowledge distillation framework that transfers spatial reasoning from a 7B teacher to a 2.29B student model. Our approach achieves 8.7x lower inference latency and a 3x reduction in model size while retaining 54-72% of the teacher's performance. The framework utilizes VGGT as the vision encoder and a multi-task distillation pipeline with uncertainty-aware loss weighting. To improve reasoning without chain-of-thought (CoT) data, we introduce "Hidden CoT": learnable latent tokens that serve as an internal scratchpad before answer generation. This is the first use of latent scratchpad reasoning in distilled 3D VLMs. The student model jointly performs spatial description, depth estimation, and object detection. Experiments on ScanNet and 3D-FRONT show strong spatial understanding, reaching 68-72% accuracy on proximity and contact tasks. Our framework enables efficient 3D scene QA on resource-constrained platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出一个知识蒸馏框架，将7B参数的大规模3D视觉语言模型（LLaVA-3D）压缩至2.29B的学生模型，实现8.7倍推理加速和3倍模型缩小，性能保留54-72%。引入Hidden CoT（可学习的潜在印记令牌）提升推理能力，无需链式思维数据。
AI.motivation: 大规模3D VLM（如LLaVA-3D）展现强大空间推理能力，但计算成本高，难以在资源受限平台部署。需要一种轻量化方案保留空间推理能力。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏框架，使用VGGT作为视觉编码器，多任务蒸馏管道配合不确定性感知损失加权。创新引入"Hidden CoT"——在答案生成前插入可学习潜在令牌作为内部印记板。
AI.result: 学生模型在ScanNet和3D-FRONT数据集上，临近和接触任务达68-72%准确率；8.7倍更低推理延迟，3倍模型尺寸缩减，保留教师模型54-72%性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次在蒸馏式3D VLM中使用潜在印记板推理，有效平衡效率与性能，使3D场景问答能在资源受限平台上运行。

title: SLASH the Sink: Sharpening Structural Attention Inside LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable semantic understanding but often struggle with structural understanding when processing graph topologies in a serialized format. Existing solutions rely on training external graph-based adapters or fine-tuning, which incur high costs and lost generalizability. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of LLMs and present a critical finding: LLMs spontaneously reconstruct the graph's topology internally, evidenced by a distinct "sawtooth" pattern in their attention maps that structurally aligns with the "token-level adjacency matrix". However, this intrinsic structural understanding is diluted by the attention sink. We theoretically formalize this dilution as a representation bottleneck, stemming from a fundamental conflict: the model's anisotropic bias, essential for language tasks, suppresses the topology-aware local aggregation required for graph reasoning. To address this, we propose a training-free solution, named StructuraL Attention SHarpening (Slash), which amplifies this internal structural understanding via a plug-and-play attention redistribution. Experiments on pure graph tasks and molecular prediction validate Slash delivers significant and consistent performance gains across diverse LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM在处理图结构时会在内部注意力图中自发重建图的拓扑结构（表现为"锯齿状"注意力模式），但这种理解被注意力沉点稀释。作者提出无需训练的Slash方法，通过注意力重分配来增强这种内部结构理解，在纯图任务和分子预测中取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方案依赖外部图适配器或微调，成本高且泛化性差。作者希望探索LLM内部机制，找到一种无需额外训练即可增强LLM对图结构理解的方法。
AI.method: 首先通过实验发现LLM注意力图中存在与"token级邻接矩阵"对齐的锯齿模式，证明LLM内部已自发重建图拓扑。理论化该理解被注意力沉点稀释的原因在于各向异性偏差与拓扑感知局部聚合的冲突。提出Slash方法，通过即插即用的注意力重分配来锐化内部结构理解。
AI.result: 在纯图任务和分子预测任务上，Slash在多种LLM上均取得显著且一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: LLM内部已具备图结构理解能力但被稀释，通过训练无关的注意力锐化方法可以有效释放这种内在能力，为无需额外训练的图推理提供了新思路。

title: On-Policy Distillation with Best-of-N Teacher Rollout Selection
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD), which supervises a student on its own sampled trajectories, has emerged as a data-efficient post-training method for improving reasoning while avoiding the reward dependence of reinforcement learning and the catastrophic forgetting often observed in standard supervised fine-tuning. However, standard OPD typically computes teacher supervision under noisy student-generated contexts and often relies on a single stochastic teacher rollout per prompt. As a result, the supervision signal can be high-variance: the sampled teacher trajectory can be incorrect, uninformative, or poorly matched to the student's current reasoning behavior. To address this limitation, we propose BRTS, a Best-of-N Rollout Teacher Selection framework for on-policy distillation. BRTS augments standard student-context OPD with a teacher-context supervision branch constructed from the curated teacher trajectory. Rather than distilling from the first sampled teacher rollout, BRTS samples a small pool of teacher trajectories and selects the auxiliary trajectory using a simple priority rule: correctness first, student alignment second. When multiple correct teacher trajectories are available, BRTS chooses the one most aligned with the student's current behavior; when unconditioned teacher samples fail on harder prompts, it invokes a ground-truth-conditioned recovery step to elicit a natural derivation. The selected trajectory is then used to provide reliable teacher-context supervision inside the OPD loop, augmented with an auxiliary loss on the teacher trajectory. Experiments on AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and AMC 2023 show that BRTS improves over standard OPD on challenging reasoning benchmarks, with the largest gains on harder datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/BWGZK-keke/BRTS.

AI.tldr: BRTS提出了一种基于最佳N选1的教师轨迹选择框架，用于改进在线蒸馏中的监督信号质量，通过在多个教师轨迹中优先选择正确且与学生行为对齐的轨迹，显著提升了推理任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准在线蒸馏（OPD）中，教师监督信号基于学生生成的噪声上下文且通常只采样单个随机教师轨迹，导致监督信号方差大、可能出现错误或无信息的情况，限制了蒸馏效果。
AI.method: BRTS框架在标准OPD基础上增加了教师上下文监督分支。具体包括：1）采样一个小型教师轨迹池；2）采用优先规则选择轨迹——正确性优先、学生对齐次之；3）多个正确轨迹时选择与学生当前行为最对齐的；4）若无条件采样失败则采用真实条件恢复步骤；5）选出的轨迹用于辅助损失监督。
AI.result: 在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和AMC 2023基准测试上，BRTS相比标准OPD取得了显著改进，尤其在较难的推理数据集上提升最大。
AI.conclusion: BRTS通过多轨迹采样和优先级选择策略，有效降低了教师监督信号的方差，提升了在线蒸馏在复杂推理任务上的数据效率和性能。

title: Consistency as a Testable Property: Statistical Methods to Evaluate AI Agent Reliability
summary: This paper establishes a rigorous measurement science for AI agent reliability, providing a foundational framework for quantifying consistency under semantically preserving perturbations. By leveraging $U$-statistics for output-level reliability and kernel-based metrics for trajectory-level stability, we offer a principled approach to evaluating agents across diverse operating conditions. Our proposal highlights the important distinction between the core capability and execution robustness of an agent, showing that minor task-level variations can induce complete strategy breakdowns despite the agent possessing the requisite knowledge for the task. We validate our framework through extensive experiments on three agentic benchmarks, demonstrating that trajectory-level consistency metrics provide far greater diagnostic sensitivity than traditional pass@1 rates. By providing the mathematical tools to isolate where and why agents deviate, we enable the identification and rectification of architectural concerns that hinder the deployment of agents in high-stakes, real-world environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个衡量AI智能体可靠性的严谨度量科学框架，利用U-统计量和基于核的指标分别评估输出可靠性和轨迹稳定性，并通过实验证明轨迹级一致性指标比传统pass@1率具有更强的诊断敏感性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体评估方法无法有效区分智能体的核心能力与执行鲁棒性，缺乏在语义保持扰动下量化一致性的严谨度量体系，阻碍了智能体在高风险场景中的部署。
AI.method: 提出基于U-统计量的输出级可靠性度量与基于核方法的轨迹级稳定性度量，通过数学工具隔离智能体偏离的原因，区分核心能力与执行稳健性。
AI.result: 在三个智能体基准上的实验表明，轨迹级一致性指标比传统pass@1率具有更高的诊断敏感性；小任务级变化可导致完整策略崩溃，即使智能体具备完成任务所需知识。
AI.conclusion: 本文为AI智能体可靠性建立了形式化度量框架，能够识别和修正阻碍智能体在高风险真实环境中部署的结构性问题。

title: Fetal Brain Imaging: A Composite Neural Network Approach for Keyframe Detection in Ultrasound Videos
summary:
This article presents a novel approach to keyframe detection in ultrasound videos, with a particular focus on fetal brain imaging. The proposed model is a composite neural network architecture that combines a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). The CNN extracts spatial features from individual video frames, while the RNN captures temporal dependencies between consecutive frames within each video sequence.
  The proposed model may improve the efficiency and accuracy of fetal brain ultrasound analysis, thereby supporting earlier detection, diagnosis, and treatment planning for selected fetal brain conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合CNN和RNN的复合神经网络架构，用于超声视频中的关键帧检测，特别聚焦于胎儿脑部成像。CNN提取单帧空间特征，RNN捕获帧间时序依赖，旨在提升胎儿脑部超声分析的效率和准确性，支持早期检测与诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有胎儿脑部超声视频分析缺乏高效的关键帧检测方法，而传统方法难以兼顾空间特征与时序信息，影响诊断效率与准确性。本文旨在通过深度学习融合空间与时间特征，优化检测效果。
AI.method: 提出CNN-RNN复合神经网络：CNN模块提取每帧的空间特征，RNN模块建模帧间时序依赖关系，两者联合训练以识别视频中的关键帧。
AI.result: 模型有望提升胎儿脑部超声分析的效率与准确性，但正文未提供具体的量化实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 该CNN-RNN复合架构为胎儿脑部超声关键帧检测提供了一种有效的新思路，可能有助于胎儿脑部疾病的早期发现、诊断和治疗规划。

title: PrimeKG-CL: A Continual Graph Learning Benchmark on Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
summary: Biomedical knowledge graphs underwrite drug repurposing and clinical decision support, yet the upstream ontologies they depend on update on independent cycles that add millions of edges and deprecate hundreds of thousands more between releases. Yet existing continual graph learning has been studied almost exclusively on synthetic random splits of static, generic KGs, a regime that cannot reproduce the asynchronous, structured evolution real biomedical KGs undergo. To this end, we introduce PrimeKG-CL, a CGL benchmark built from nine authoritative biomedical databases (129K+ nodes, 8.1M+ edges, 10 node types, 30 relation types) with two genuine temporal snapshots (June 2021, July 2023; 5.83M edges added, 889K removed, 7.21M persistent), 10 entity-type-grouped tasks, multimodal node features, and a per-task persistent/added/removed test stratification. On three tasks (biomedical relationship prediction, entity classification, KGQA), we evaluate six CL strategies across four KGE decoders, plus LKGE, an LLM-RAG agent, and CMKL. We find that decoder choice and continual learning strategy interact strongly: no single strategy performs best across all decoders, and mismatched combinations can significantly degrade performance. Moreover, only DistMult exhibits a clear separation between persistent and deprecated knowledge, indicating that standard metrics conflate retention of still-valid facts with failure to forget outdated ones; this effect is absent under RotatE. In addition, multimodal features improve entity-level tasks by up to 60%, and a recent CKGE framework (IncDE) failed to scale to our 5.67M-triple base task across five attempts up to 350GB RAM. Data, pipeline, baselines, and the stratified split are released openly. Dataset:huggingface.co/datasets/yradwan147/PrimeKGCL|Code:github.com/yradwan147/primekg-cl-neurips2026

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrimeKG-CL，一个基于真实生物医学知识图谱（含129K+节点、8.1M+边、两个时间快照）的持续图学习基准，系统评估了多种持续学习策略与知识图谱嵌入解码器的组合效果，发现解码器与策略存在强交互作用，且标准评估指标无法区分知识的持久性与过时性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有持续图学习研究几乎仅在静态通用KG上进行人工随机分割，无法模拟真实生物医学KG中结构化、异步的演化过程（如本体独立更新周期带来的大量边新增与废弃）。亟需一个能反映真实演化特征的基准来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建PrimeKG-CL基准：基于9个权威生物医学数据库，包含2021年6月与2023年7月两个真实时间快照（新增5.83M边、移除889K边），设计10个按实体类型分组的任务，提供多模态节点特征及持久/新增/移除的分层测试集。评估6种持续学习策略×4种KGE解码器，以及LLM-RAG代理（LKGE）和CMKL等基线。
AI.result: 1) 解码器与持续学习策略存在强交互，无单一策略通吃所有解码器；2) 仅DistMult能清晰区分持久知识与废弃知识，标准指标混淆了保留正确事实与遗忘过时事实；3) 多模态特征在实体级任务中提升达60%；4) 近期CKGE框架IncDE在5.67M三元组基任务上扩展失败（5次尝试最大350GB RAM）。
AI.conclusion: 真实的生物医学KG持续学习需要关注结构化的知识演化特征，解码器与策略的匹配至关重要，现有评估指标需改进以区分知识持久性与过时遗忘。

title: DRIVE-C: A Controlled Corruption Dataset for Autonomous Driving
summary: DRIVE-C is a controlled corruption dataset designed to evaluate visual perception robustness in autonomous driving systems. It is built from real-world forward-facing driving videos collected across daytime, nighttime, urban, rural, freeway, and parking environments. Clean clips are anonymized via localized face and license plate blurring, then transformed with physics-inspired synthetic degradations. The dataset contains 10 clean clips and 600 corrupted clips spanning 12 camera degradation types across five severity levels, with per-clip metadata and Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI) annotations. DRIVE-C supports robustness benchmarking, degradation-aware modeling, uncertainty estimation, out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, and sensor health monitoring for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). By providing pixel-aligned clean and degraded video clips with fully reproducible corruption parameters, DRIVE-C offers a structured testbed for studying perception reliability under controlled camera degradation.

AI.tldr: DRIVE-C是一个专门用于评估自动驾驶系统视觉感知鲁棒性的受控退化数据集，包含10个干净视频片段和600个经过12种相机退化类型、5个严重等级的退化片段，并提供了全局传感器健康指数(GSHI)标注，可用于鲁棒性基准测试、退化感知建模、不确定性估计、OOD检测和传感器健康监测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统在实际环境中常受到相机退化（如模糊、噪声、遮挡等）影响，但缺乏一个系统化、可控、可复现的退化数据集来评估感知模型的鲁棒性。现有数据集要么是合成数据缺乏真实感，要么是真实数据但退化类型不可控、不可复现。
AI.method: 从真实世界的正向驾驶视频中收集数据，涵盖白天/夜间、城市/乡村/高速/停车场等多种场景。首先对干净片段进行人脸和车牌局部模糊化匿名处理，然后应用受物理学启发的合成退化变换，构建包含12种相机退化类型、5个严重等级的600个退化片段，并提供像素对齐的干净-退化视频对及完整可复现的退化参数。
AI.result: 构建了包含10个干净片段和600个退化片段的DRIVE-C数据集，每个片段附带元数据和全局传感器健康指数(GSHI)标注，所有退化参数完全可复现。
AI.conclusion: DRIVE-C为自动驾驶视觉感知鲁棒性研究提供了一个结构化的受控测试平台，支持多方面的感知可靠性研究，有助于推动ADAS系统在真实退化环境下的性能提升。

title: A Reflective Storytelling Agent for Older Adults: Integrating Argumentation Schemes and Argument Mining in LLM-Based Personalised Narratives
comment: Submitted to ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (TIST)
summary:
This work investigates whether knowledge-driven large language model (LLM)-based storytelling can support purposeful narrative interaction with a digital companion for older adults. To address known limitations of LLMs, including hallucinations and limited transparency, we present a reflective storytelling agent integrating knowledge graphs, user modelling, argumentation theory, and argument mining to guide and inspect narrative generation.
  The study consisted of two phases. Phase I employed participatory design involving 11 domain experts in a formative evaluation that informed iterative refinement. The resulting system generates narratives grounded in structured user models representing health-promoting activities and motivations. Phase II involved 55 older adults evaluating persona-based narratives across four prompts and two creativity levels. Participants assessed perceived purpose, usefulness, cultural relatability, and inconsistencies. The system additionally computed hallucination-risk indicators to evaluate generated narratives.
  Participants recognised personally relevant purposes in roughly two thirds of narratives, while argument-based purposes were identified in around half of these cases. Cultural recognisability strongly influenced willingness to use the functionality, whereas minor inconsistencies were often tolerated when narratives remained understandable and personally relevant. Narratives with higher hallucination-risk indicators were more often perceived as inconsistent, while higher argument-quality indicators tended to co-occur with higher clarity and meaningfulness ratings.
  Overall, the study positions argument mining as a reflective inspection mechanism for comparing formal grounding signals with human evaluations in health-oriented LLM storytelling for older adults.

AI.tldr: 本文研究知识驱动的LLM故事叙述能否支持面向老年人的数字伴侣互动。通过结合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘，构建了反思性故事叙述代理。55名老年人评估发现，约三分之二的故事被识别出个人相关目的，文化可识别性强烈影响使用意愿，高幻觉风险的故事更易被认为不一致。论证挖掘可作为健康导向LLM故事叙述的反思性检查机制。
AI.motivation: 探索知识驱动的LLM故事叙述能否支持面向老年人的有目的性叙事互动，同时解决LLM存在的幻觉和透明度有限的问题。
AI.method: 结合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘，构建反思性故事叙述代理。采用两阶段研究：第一阶段与11名领域专家进行参与式设计迭代；第二阶段让55名老年人评估基于角色的叙事。
AI.result: 参与者在大约三分之二的故事中识别出个人相关目的；基于论证的目的约在一半案例中被识别；文化可识别性显著影响使用意愿；高幻觉风险指标的故事更易被认为不一致；高论证质量指标与高清晰度和有意义性评分相关。
AI.conclusion: 论证挖掘可作为反思性检查机制，用于比较健康导向LLM故事叙述中形式化信号与人类评价之间的关系。

title: CrossVL: Complexity-Aware Feature Routing and Paired Curriculum for Cross-View Vision-Language Detection
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/1nyourlife/Crossvl_cvpr2026
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) enable text-guided object detection but degrade severely under cross-view scenarios where ground and aerial viewpoints differ in altitude, scale, and spatial layout. These geometric changes introduce systematic complexity variations between viewpoints, e.g., ground view images contain dense and highly occluded structures, while aerial images are sparse and globally organized. Fixed VLM fusion mechanisms cannot handle this discrepancy. We propose CrossVL, a framework combining Complexity-Aware Pathway Aggregation (CPA) and Paired Curriculum Learning (PCL) for enhanced cross-view detection for VLM. CPA estimates scene complexity from multimodal statistics and routes visual features through multiple pathways to obtain view-specific representations. PCL leverages semantic consistency of synchronized ground-aerial pairs to provide stable early supervision and then gradually shifts toward randomized sampling. On MAVREC, CrossVL improves Florence-2's aerial mAP from 58.66% to 61.03% and reduces the ground-aerial performance gap from 8.63pp to 6.65pp, while also achieving a 3.3x reduction in variance across random seeds. CPA provides stable complexity-aware feature aggregation, and PCL enhances optimization dynamics. Together, they demonstrate that coordinated architectural and training adaptations are crucial for robust cross-view VLM detection.

AI.tldr: CrossVL框架通过复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）和配对课程学习（PCL），有效提升了视觉语言模型在跨视角目标检测场景下的性能，缩小了地面与航拍视角间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在跨视角场景（地面与航拍）下表现严重退化，因为不同视角在高度、尺度和空间布局上的几何差异导致场景复杂度系统性变化（地面密集遮挡 vs 航拍稀疏全局），而固定VLM融合机制无法处理这种差异。
AI.method: 提出CrossVL框架，包含两个核心组件：1）复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）：从多模态统计量估计场景复杂度，通过多条路径路由视觉特征以获得视角特定表示；2）配对课程学习（PCL）：利用同步地面-航拍对的语义一致性提供早期稳定监督，逐步过渡到随机采样。
AI.result: 在MAVREC数据集上，CrossVL将Florence-2的航拍mAP从58.66%提升至61.03%，地面-航拍性能差距从8.63个百分点缩小至6.65个百分点，随机种子的方差降低了3.3倍。
AI.conclusion: CPA提供稳定的复杂度感知特征聚合，PCL增强优化动力学，两者共同表明协调的架构和训练适应对于鲁棒的跨视角VLM检测至关重要。

title: Bridging Sequence and Graph Structure for Epigenetic Age Prediction
summary: Epigenetic clocks based on DNA methylation have emerged as powerful tools for estimating biological age, with broad applications in aging research, age-related disease studies, and longevity science. Despite advances across machine learning approaches to epigenetic age prediction, spanning penalised linear regression, deep feedforward networks, residual architectures, and graph neural networks, no existing method jointly models co-methylation graph structure and site-specific DNA sequence context within a unified framework. We propose a unified sequence--graph integration framework for epigenetic age prediction that addresses this gap, integrating eight-dimensional DNA sequence statistical features through a lightweight gated modulation mechanism that adaptively scales each site's methylation signal according to its sequence-determined biological relevance prior to graph convolution. Evaluated on 3,707 blood methylation samples against a comprehensive set of baselines, our method achieves a test MAE of 3.149 years, a 12.8\% improvement over the strongest graph-based baseline. Biologically informed statistical features outperform CNN-based sequence encoding, demonstrating that handcrafted sequence features are more effective than end-to-end learned representations in this data regime. Post-hoc interpretability analysis identifies CpG density and local adenine frequency as features with age-dependent importance shifts, consistent with known mechanisms of age-related hypermethylation at CpG-dense promoter regions. Our code is at https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一序列-图融合框架（GraphAge-Seq），通过门控调制机制整合DNA序列统计特征与共甲基化图结构，在血液甲基化数据上将表观遗传年龄预测MAE提升至3.149年，较最强图基线改进12.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有表观遗传时钟方法未能在统一框架中联合建模共甲基化图结构与位点特异性DNA序列上下文，导致序列信息与图结构信息割裂，限制了年龄预测精度。
AI.method: 提出序列-图融合框架：首先提取八维DNA序列统计特征（如CpG密度、局部腺嘌呤频率等），通过轻量级门控调制机制自适应缩放每个位点的甲基化信号，再输入图卷积网络进行年龄预测。
AI.result: 在3,707个血液甲基化样本上，测试MAE为3.149年，比最强图基线提升12.8%；手工序列特征优于CNN端到端学习特征；CpG密度和局部腺嘌呤频率存在年龄依赖的重要性变化。
AI.conclusion: 手工设计的序列统计特征在有限数据下比端到端学习更有效；门控调制机制成功融合了序列上下文与图结构信息；CpG密度和腺嘌呤频率的重要性随年龄变化与已知衰老高甲基化机制一致。

title: Fashion Florence: Fine-Tuning Florence-2 for Structured Fashion Attribute Extraction
summary: We present Fashion Florence, a Florence-2 vision-language model fine-tuned with LoRA to extract structured fashion attributes from clothing images. Given a single photograph, the model generates a JSON object containing category, color, material, style tags, and occasion tags, structured output suitable for direct programmatic consumption by downstream recommendation and retrieval systems. Fine-tuning data is derived from the iMaterialist Fashion dataset (228 labels), where we collapse fine-grained annotations into a compact 6-category, 16-color, 19-style schema via rule-based label engineering. We apply LoRA (r=16, alpha=32) to all decoder linear layers, training for 3 epochs on 3,688 examples. On a held-out test set of 461 images, Fashion Florence achieves 94.6% category accuracy and 63.0% material accuracy, compared to 89.3% / 43.3% for GPT-4o-mini and 87.4% for Gemini 2.5 Flash. Fashion Florence produces valid JSON in 99.8% of outputs while running at 0.77B parameters on a single GPU at zero marginal inference cost. Style tag F1 reaches 0.753 vs. 0.612 (Gemini) and 0.398 (GPT-4o-mini). The model is deployed as a Hugging Face Space and integrated into Loom, an open-source outfit recommendation system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fashion Florence，一个基于Florence-2并使用LoRA微调的视觉语言模型，用于从服装图像中提取结构化时尚属性（类别、颜色、材质、风格标签、场合标签），输出JSON格式，参数量仅0.77B，在测试集上达到94.6%的类别准确率，优于GPT-4o-mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash，并已部署为Hugging Face Space并集成到开源推荐系统Loom中。
AI.motivation: 现有通用大模型（如GPT-4o-mini、Gemini）在细粒度时尚属性提取任务上准确率偏低，且输出格式不规范，难以直接用于下游推荐系统。作者旨在构建一个轻量级、高精度、输出结构化的专用模型，填补通用模型在时尚领域结构化信息提取上的不足。
AI.method: 以Florence-2为基座模型，对全部解码器线性层应用LoRA（r=16, alpha=32）进行微调。训练数据来自iMaterialist Fashion数据集（228个标签），通过规则驱动的标签工程压缩为6类别、16颜色、19风格的紧凑标签体系。在3,688张图片上训练3个epoch，最终模型参数量仅0.77B。
AI.result: 在461张图片的测试集上，类别准确率94.6%，材质准确率63.0%；GPT-4o-mini分别为89.3%/43.3%，Gemini 2.5 Flash为87.4%。JSON格式有效率达99.8%。风格标签F1分数0.753，显著优于Gemini的0.612和GPT-4o-mini的0.398。模型可在单GPU上零边际推理成本运行。
AI.conclusion: LoRA微调的专用小模型在时尚属性提取任务上可大幅超越通用大模型，兼顾高精度、结构化输出和低部署成本，验证了领域专用微调策略在垂直场景中的有效性。

title: Agent-First Tool API: A Semantic Interface Paradigm for Enterprise AI Agent Systems
summary: As AI agents transition from research prototypes to enterprise production systems, the tool interfaces they consume remain rooted in human-oriented CRUD paradigms. This paper identifies five fundamental architectural mismatches between conventional APIs and autonomous agent requirements: exact-identifier dependence, rendering-oriented responses, single-shot interaction assumptions, user-equivalent authorization, and opaque error semantics. We propose the Agent-First Tool API paradigm, comprising three integrated mechanisms: (1) a Six-Verb Semantic Protocol that decomposes tool interactions into search, resolve, preview, execute, verify, and recover phases; (2) a Normalized Tool Contract (NTC) providing structured decision-support metadata including confidence scores, evidence chains, and suggested next actions; and (3) a dual-layer governance pipeline combining static capability policies with dynamic risk escalation. The paradigm is implemented and validated in a production multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 85 registered tools across 6 business domains. Comparative experiments on 50 real operational tasks demonstrate that Agent-First APIs achieve 88% end-to-end task success rate versus 64% for optimized CRUD baselines (+37.5%), while reducing required human interventions by 72.7% and improving autonomous error recovery by 5.8x. We establish that the paradigm is orthogonal and complementary to transport-layer standards such as MCP, operating as the semantic application layer above existing tool discovery and invocation protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向AI智能体的Agent-First Tool API范式，通过六动词语义协议、标准化工具契约和双层治理管线三大机制，解决传统CRUD API与自主智能体之间的五大架构不匹配问题。在85个注册工具的生产系统中验证，任务成功率提升37.5%（88% vs 64%），人工干预减少72.7%，自主错误恢复提升5.8倍。
AI.motivation: 当前AI智能体使用的工具接口仍基于面向人类的CRUD范式，存在五个根本性架构不匹配：精确标识符依赖、渲染导向响应、单次交互假设、用户等效授权、不透明错误语义。这些问题严重制约了智能体在真实生产环境中的自主性和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出Agent-First Tool API范式，包含三大机制：(1) 六动词语义协议（搜索、解析、预览、执行、验证、恢复）；(2) 标准化工具契约（含置信度分数、证据链、建议下一步行动等决策支持元数据）；(3) 双层治理管线（静态能力策略+动态风险升级）。该范式作为语义应用层，与MCP等传输层协议正交互补。
AI.result: 在生产级多租户SaaS平台（85个注册工具，6个业务域）和50个真实运营任务的对比实验中，Agent-First API实现88%端到端任务成功率（vs 64%基线，+37.5%），人工干预减少72.7%，自主错误恢复提升5.8倍。
AI.conclusion: Agent-First Tool API范式有效解决了传统API与自主智能体之间的架构不匹配问题，显著提升了智能体的任务完成能力和自主性，且与现有传输层标准兼容互补。

title: Probing Routing-Conditional Calibration in Attention-Residual Transformers
summary: Post-hoc calibration is usually evaluated as a function of logits or softmax confidence alone, even as routing-augmented architectures increasingly accompany predictions with sample-specific internal routing traces and pair them with claims of calibration-relevant uncertainty. We ask a basic question: do these traces provide stable routing-specific evidence for post-hoc calibration beyond confidence? We study this in Attention-Residual transformers (Kimi Team, 2026) through a matched-confidence diagnostic suite that stratifies examples by routing-derived state, compares subgroup gaps against within-bin routing-permutation nulls, and evaluates matched post-hoc probes differing only in their auxiliary feature. Across our completed AR runs, scalar routing summaries do not provide stable evidence of routing-conditional miscalibration: weighted gaps remain small or seed-sensitive, and only $1$ of $30$ within-bin permutation tests rejects the conditional-null at $α=0.05$ (only on one seed; not stable across seeds in that cell). AR-CondCal, a minimal $2$-D Nadaraya--Watson probe on confidence and routing-depth variance, lies within the seed-variance band of matched confidence-only and predictive-entropy controls and does not reliably improve worst-routing-tertile ECE; bandwidth-sensitivity checks (Scott multiples, CV-NLL, global-ECE oracle) do not change this. A full-vector MLP over $(c, H_1, \ldots, H_L)$ can appear to improve over a linear confidence baseline, but the apparent gain disappears once a capacity-matched confidence-only MLP is included as a control, and shuffled routing profiles achieve comparable performance. Apparent routing-aware calibration gains in this AR setting should not be read as internal-state calibration until matched-confidence, bandwidth, capacity, and permutation controls rule out common confounds.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了注意力-残差（AR）Transformer中，路由轨迹（routing traces）是否能超越置信度（confidence）为事后校准（post-hoc calibration）提供额外信息。通过匹配置信度的诊断工具集（分层比较、排列检验、多种探针）分析发现：路由摘要不能稳定提供路由条件性误校准证据；AR-CondCal（2维NW探针）性能未优于纯置信度或熵的对照；全向量MLP看似提升，但经容量匹配和路由排列控制后效果消失。结论是，在AR设定中，路由感知的校准增益需通过严格对照控制才能被确认为真正的内部状态校准。
AI.motivation: 随着路由增强架构（如Attention-Residual Transformer）被广泛采用，这些模型在输出预测的同时也提供了样本特定的内部路由轨迹（routing traces），并被声称携带有校准相关的不确定性信息。然而，现有的事后校准方法通常仅基于logits或softmax置信度进行评估。本文的核心动机是探究这些路由轨迹是否能提供超越置信度的、稳定的路由特异性证据，用于改进事后校准。
AI.method: 论文在Attention-Residual Transformer上构建了一套匹配置信度（matched-confidence）的诊断工具集：（1）按路由派生状态对样本分层，比较子组间校准差距；（2）进行组内路由排列检验（within-bin routing-permutation nulls）；（3）使用仅有辅助特征（routing vs. non-routing）不同的匹配事后探针进行评估。具体探针包括：AR-CondCal（2维Nadaraya-Watson，基于置信度+路由深度方差）、全向量MLP（置信度+所有层的隐藏状态），以及多种对照（纯置信度探针、预测熵探针、容量匹配的MLP、洗牌路由控制）。
AI.result: （1）标量路由摘要不能提供路由条件性误校准的稳定证据：加权差距较小或对种子敏感；30次组内排列检验中仅在1个种子下拒绝条件零假设（α=0.05），且该结果在同一单元内跨种子不稳定。（2）AR-CondCal（2-D NW）的性能落在纯置信度和预测熵对照的种子方差带内，且不能可靠改善最差路由三分位的ECE；带宽敏感性检查（Scott倍数、CV-NLL、全局ECE的oracle）未改变这一结论。（3）全向量MLP看似优于线性置信度基线，但一旦加入容量匹配的纯置信度MLP作为对照，优势消失；洗牌后的路由配置也能达到可比性能。
AI.conclusion: 在Attention-Residual Transformer设定中，路由感知的校准提升不应被轻易解读为内部状态校准的证据。必须通过匹配置信度、带宽、容量和排列等严格对照控制，才能排除常见混淆因素。这意味着，路由轨迹的表观校准增益可能来源于置信度本身的非线性处理能力或统计波动，而非路由特有的内部状态信息。

title: Deep Arguing
summary: Deep learning has become the dominant approach for creating high capacity, scalable models across diverse data modalities. However, because these models rely on a large number of learned parameters, tightly couple feature extraction with task objectives, and often lack explicit reasoning mechanisms, it is difficult for humans to understand how they arrive at their predictions. Understanding what representations emerge and why they arise from the training data remains an open challenge. We introduce Deep Arguing, a novel neurosymbolic approach that integrates deep learning with argumentation construction and reasoning for interpretable classification with different data modalities. In our approach deep neural networks construct an argumentation structure wherein data points support their assigned label and attack different ones.
