Using differentiable argumentation semantics for reasoning, the model is trained end-to-end to jointly learn feature representation and argumentative interactions. This results in argumentation structures providing faithful case-based explanations for predictions. Structure constraints over the argumentation graph guide learning, improving both interpretability and predictive performance. Experiments with tabular and imaging datasets show that Deep Arguing achieves performance competitive with standard baselines whilst offering interpretable argumentative reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出Deep Arguing，一种将深度学习与论证结构相结合的神经符号方法，用于可解释分类，通过端到端学习特征表示和论证交互，在保持竞争性能的同时提供基于案例的可解释推理。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽性能优异，但因其大量参数、特征提取与任务目标紧密耦合、缺乏显式推理机制，导致人类难以理解其预测过程。理解模型学到的表征及其成因仍是开放挑战。
AI.method: 提出Deep Arguing神经符号方法，深度神经网络构建论证结构（数据点支持其标签、攻击其他标签），使用可微论证语义进行推理，端到端联合学习特征表示和论证交互，并通过图结构约束引导学习。
AI.result: 在表格数据和图像数据集上的实验表明，Deep Arguing在性能上与标准基线相当，同时提供可解释的论证推理过程。
AI.conclusion: Deep Arguing成功融合了深度学习的表征能力与符号论证的可解释性，通过端到端学习生成忠实的基于案例的解释，为构建可解释AI提供了有效的新范式。

title: MoPO: Incorporating Motion Prior for Occluded Human Mesh Recovery
summary: Although recent studies have made remarkable progress in human mesh recovery, they still exhibit limited robustness to occlusions and often produce inaccurate poses and severe motion jitter due to the insufficient spatial features for occluded body parts. Inspired by the rapid advancements in human motion prediction, we discover that compared to occluded image features, pose sequence inherently contains reliable motion prior for estimating occluded body parts. In this paper, we incorporate Motion Prior for Occluded human mesh recovery, called MoPO. Our MoPO mainly consists of two components: 1) The motion de-occlusion module, where we propose a spatial-temporal occlusion detector to detect joint visibility, and then we propose a lightweight motion predictor to complete the occluded body parts by predicting the most plausible joint positions based on history poses. 2) The motion-aware fusion and refinement module, which fuses the completed joint sequence with image features to estimate human shape and initial human pose. Moreover, the completed joint sequence is further used to refine the final human pose through inverse kinematics, which provides the occlusion-free motion prior for regressing human poses. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoPO achieves state-of-the-art performance on both occlusion-specific and standard benchmarks, significantly enhancing the accuracy and temporal consistency of occluded human mesh recovery. Our code and demo can be found in the supplementary material.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoPO方法，通过融合运动先验（历史姿态序列）来提升遮挡场景下的人体网格恢复效果，包含运动去遮挡模块和运动感知融合优化模块，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在遮挡情况下鲁棒性不足，由于缺乏被遮挡部位的空间特征，容易产生不准确的姿态和严重的运动抖动。
AI.method: 1）运动去遮挡模块：利用时空遮挡检测器识别关节可见性，再通过轻量运动预测器基于历史姿态补全被遮挡的关节点；2）运动感知融合优化模块：将补全的关节序列与图像特征融合用于形状和初始姿态估计，并进一步通过逆运动学优化最终姿态。
AI.result: 在遮挡专用数据集和标准基准上均达到SOTA性能，显著提升了遮挡人体网格恢复的准确性和时间一致性。
AI.conclusion: 引入运动先验能有效弥补遮挡带来的图像特征缺失，是提升遮挡人体网格恢复鲁棒性的有效途径。

title: LLM Jaggedness Unlocks Scientific Creativity
summary: As artificial intelligence advances, models are not improving uniformly. Instead, progress unfolds in a jagged fashion, with capabilities growing unevenly across tasks, domains, and model scales. In this work, we examine this dynamic jaggedness through the lens of scientific idea generation. We introduce SciAidanBench, a benchmark of open-ended scientific questions designed to measure the scientific creativity of large language models (LLMs). Given a scientific question, models are asked to generate as many unique and coherent ideas as possible, with the total number of valid responses serving as a proxy for creative potential. Evaluating 19 base models across 8 providers (30 total variants including reasoning versions), we find that jaggedness manifests both across models and within models. First, in a cross-task comparison between general and scientific creativity, improvements in general creativity do not translate uniformly to scientific creativity, revealing divergent capability profiles across models. Second, at the prompt level, stronger models do not improve uniformly; instead, they exhibit high variability, with bursts of creativity on some questions and limited performance on others. Third, at the domain level, individual models display uneven strengths across scientific subfields, reflecting fragmented internal capability profiles. Finally, we show that this jaggedness can be harnessed. We explore mechanisms of inference-time compute, knowledge pooling, and brainstorming to combine models effectively and construct meta-model ensembles that outperform any single model. Our results position jaggedness not as a limitation, but as a resource, a structural feature of AI progress that, when understood and leveraged, can amplify LLM-driven scientific creativity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 SciAidanBench 基准，评估 LLM 在科学创意生成中的"锯齿形"能力分布，发现模型在不同任务、领域和问题间能力增长不均衡，并通过集成策略将这一特性转化为优势。
AI.motivation: AI 模型的能力并非均匀提升，而是在不同任务、领域和规模上呈现锯齿状增长。作者希望系统性地测量和利用这种非均匀性，特别是在科学创意生成这一高价值场景中。
AI.method: 构建 SciAidanBench 基准，包含开放性科学问题，要求模型生成尽可能多且独特的创意。评估 19 个基础模型（8 个供应商，30 个变体），从跨任务、提示级别、领域级别三个维度分析锯齿性，并探索推理时计算、知识池化、头脑风暴等集成策略。
AI.result: 1) 通用创造力与科学创造力提升不同步；2) 强模型在问题间表现高度波动；3) 不同科学子领域能力分布不均；4) 通过元模型集成可超越任何单一模型。
AI.conclusion: 锯齿性不是 AI 发展的缺陷，而是一种结构性特征。理解和利用这种非均匀性，可以通过模型集成有效放大 LLM 的科学创造力。

title: Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning for End-to-End Multi-Object Tracking
comment: Accepted to 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP). Copyright 2026 IEEE. Published in 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP), scheduled for 13-17 September 2026 in Tampere, Finland
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) in dynamic environments relies on robust temporal reasoning to maintain consistent object identities over time. Transformer-based end-to-end MOT models achieve strong performance by explicitly modeling temporal dependencies, yet training them requires extensive bounding-box and identity annotations. Given the high labeling cost and strong redundancy in videos, Active Learning (AL) is an effective approach to improve annotation efficiency. However, existing AL methods for MOT primarily operate at the frame level, which is structurally misaligned with modern end-to-end trackers whose inference and training rely on multi-frame clips. To bridge this gap, we formulate clip-level active learning and propose Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning (CUTAL). In contrast to frame-based approaches, CUTAL scores each clip using uncertainty metrics derived from multi-frame predictions to capture inter-frame correspondence ambiguities, while enforcing temporal diversity to select an informative and non-redundant subset. Experiments show that CUTAL achieves stronger overall performance than baselines at the same label budgets across MeMOTR and SambaMOTR. Notably, CUTAL achieves performance comparable to full supervision for MeMOTR on both datasets using only 50% of the labeled training data.

AI.tldr: 提出CUTAL，一种面向端到端MOT模型的片段级主动学习方法，通过多帧不确定性度量与时序多样性采样，在仅用50%标注数据时达到全监督性能。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法在MOT任务中主要基于帧级采样，与现代端到端跟踪器依赖多帧片段进行推理和训练的结构不匹配，导致标注效率低下。
AI.method: 提出CUTAL方法：(1) 将主动学习从帧级提升到片段级；(2) 基于多帧预测设计不确定性度量，捕捉帧间对应歧义；(3) 引入时序多样性约束，选择信息丰富且非冗余的片段子集。
AI.result: 在MeMOTR和SambaMOTR两个模型上，CUTAL在相同标注预算下优于基线方法；对MeMOTR模型仅用50%标注数据即可达到全监督水平的性能。
AI.conclusion: 片段级主动学习方法CUTAL有效解决了帧级AL与端到端MOT模型结构不匹配的问题，显著降低了标注成本。

title: A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge
comment: 3 pages, 6 figures, accepted at 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2026 (IJCAI-ECAI 2026), Demonstrations Track. URL: https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de
summary: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator (https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de) that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个结合云端和边缘端深度学习预测方法的网络仪表盘演示系统，用于监控城市合流制管道溢流（CSO）的蓄水池填充动态，帮助在极端降雨事件中提前预警并采取预防措施，系统具备应对网络中断的弹性能力。
AI.motivation: 历史城市的合流制污水系统在极端降雨事件下面临溢流（CSO）压力，导致严重的环境和公共健康影响，因此需要提前预测蓄水池填充动态以采取预防措施。
AI.method: 开发了一个基于网络的交互式监控仪表盘（https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de），集成了云端和边缘端的深度学习预测方法，用于溢流监控且具备网络中断耐受能力。
AI.result: 实现了可在云端和边缘端运行的深度学习预测模型，并提供可视化展示界面；演示系统已上线，并配有视频展示。
AI.conclusion: 该演示系统展示了深度学习在CSO预测中的实用性，通过云端与边缘协同部署增强了系统在复杂网络环境下的可靠性和及时预警能力。

title: Learning to Align Generative Appearance Priors for Fine-grained Image Retrieval
summary: Fine-grained image retrieval (FGIR) typically relies on supervision from seen categories to learn discriminative embeddings for retrieving unseen categories. However, such supervision often biases retrieval models toward the semantics of seen categories rather than the underlying appearance characteristics that generalize across categories, thereby limiting retrieval performance on unseen categories. To tackle this, we propose GAPan, a Generative Appearance Prior alignment network that reformulates the learning objective from category prediction toward appearance modeling. Technically, GAPan treats retrieval features with an invertible density model based on normalizing flows. In the forward direction, the flow maps all instance features into a latent density space, where each seen category is modeled by a class-conditional Gaussian prior and optimized via exact likelihood estimation. This formulation preserves richer appearance details by leveraging the invertible property of the flows. In the reverse direction, samples from the high-density regions of these learned priors are mapped back to the feature space to produce appearance-aware anchors that reflect intra-category variation. These anchors supervise a prior-driven alignment objective that aligns retrieval embeddings with category-specific appearance distributions, thereby improving generalization to unseen categories. Evaluations demonstrate that our GAPan achieves state-of-the-art performance on both widely-used fine- and coarse-grained benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出GAPan，通过可逆归一化流将检索特征映射到潜在密度空间，用类别条件高斯先验建模并反向生成外观感知锚点，实现先验驱动对齐，提升细粒度图像检索在未见类别上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 细粒度图像检索依赖可见类别监督学习判别性嵌入，但这种监督会使模型偏向可见类别的语义，而非跨类别泛化的外观特征，限制了在未见类别上的检索性能。
AI.method: 1) 使用归一化流构建可逆密度模型，前向将实例特征映射到潜在密度空间，用类别条件高斯先验建模并做精确似然估计；2) 反向从高密度区域采样，映射回特征空间生成外观感知锚点；3) 用这些锚点监督先验驱动对齐目标，将检索嵌入与类别外观分布对齐。
AI.result: 在细粒度和粗粒度基准上均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: GAPan通过将学习目标从类别预测转向外观建模，利用可逆归一化流保留外观细节并生成外观感知锚点，有效提升了模型在未见类别上的检索泛化能力。

title: DA-SegFormer: Damage-Aware Semantic Segmentation for Fine-Grained Disaster Assessment
comment: Accepted for 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026)
summary: Rapid and accurate damage assessment following natural disasters is critical for effective emergency response. However, identifying fine-grained damage levels (e.g., distinguishing minor from major roof damage) in UAV imagery remains challenging due to the degradation of texture cues during resizing and extreme class imbalance. We propose DA-SegFormer, a damage-aware adaptation of the SegFormer architecture optimized for high-resolution disaster imagery. Our method introduces a Class-Aware Sampling strategy to guarantee exposure to rare damage features, and it integrates Online Hard Example Mining (OHEM) with Dice Loss to dynamically focus on underrepresented classes. In addition, we employ a resolution-preserving inference protocol that maintains native texture details. Evaluated on the RescueNet dataset, DA-SegFormer achieves 74.61\% mIoU, outperforming the baseline by 2.55\%. Notably, our improvements yield double-digit gains in critical damage classes: Minor Damage (+11.7%) and Major Damage (+21.3%).

AI.tldr: DA-SegFormer通过类别感知采样、OHEM+Dice Loss和保留分辨率推理，在无人机灾害图像中实现了细粒度损伤分割，对Minor/Major Damage类别提升显著（+11.7%/+21.3%），mIoU达74.61%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无人机灾害图像中难以区分细粒度损伤等级（如微损与重损），主要受限于图像缩放导致纹理退化以及严重的类别不平衡问题。
AI.method: 1) 类别感知采样策略（Class-Aware Sampling）确保稀有损伤特征被充分学习；2) 在线难例挖掘（OHEM）结合Dice Loss动态聚焦于少数类；3) 保留原始分辨率的推理协议以维持纹理细节。
AI.result: 在RescueNet数据集上mIoU达74.61%，比基线提升2.55%；Minor Damage提升11.7%，Major Damage提升21.3%，均实现两位数增长。
AI.conclusion: DA-SegFormer通过结合采样策略、困难样本挖掘和分辨率保持机制，有效解决了灾害评估中的细粒度损伤识别和类别不平衡问题。

title: Budget-Efficient Automatic Algorithm Design via Code Graph
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for automatic algorithm design (AAD). However, existing pipelines remain inefficient. They operate at the granularity of full algorithms, redundantly rewriting recurring substructures and discarding low-fitness candidates that may contain valuable algorithmic features. We formalize budget-efficient automatic algorithm design, wherein the search policy maximizes realized fitness subject to limited computational cost. We propose a directed acyclic graph representation of algorithms and build a search framework that fully exploits the LLM's output. Instead of querying the LLM for full algorithms, we use it to obtain corrections: compact operators that add, replace, or remove code blocks. Each correction augments the graph, yielding new algorithms that compose with prior corrections. This graph structure decomposes algorithms into sets of corrections, enabling correction-level credit assignment that informs subsequent queries. We complement this framework with theoretical insights into the ideal balance between search depth and breadth at different budget levels. We validate our method empirically on three combinatorial optimization problems, demonstrating consistent superiority of our graph-based search over full-algorithm search at equal token budget. Finally, our experiments suggest that rich contexts help only when the LLM's prior knowledge is shallow, and can hinder performance otherwise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于有向无环图（DAG）的LLM自动算法设计框架，将算法分解为细粒度修正操作（增/删/改代码块），通过图结构实现修正级信用分配，在有限token预算下显著优于传统全算法搜索方法，并揭示了上下文丰富度与LLM先验知识深度的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动算法设计（AAD）效率低下，主要问题包括：1）以完整算法为粒度，重复生成冗余子结构；2）丢弃低适应度候选解，但这些解可能含有有价值的算法特征。需要更高效的搜索范式。
AI.method: 1）将算法表示为有向无环图（DAG）；2）用LLM生成"修正操作"（corrections），即增/删/改代码块的紧凑算子；3）每个修正扩充图结构，新算法由历史修正组合而成；4）建立修正级信用分配机制，指导后续查询；5）理论分析搜索深度与广度的最优平衡。
AI.result: 在三个组合优化问题上，基于图的搜索方法在相同token预算下始终优于全算法搜索；实验发现丰富上下文仅在LLM先验知识浅层时有帮助，否则可能损害性能。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度的修正级搜索比全算法搜索更高效，且搜索策略需根据预算动态平衡深度与广度；上下文丰富度与LLM先验知识之间存在关键的交互效应。

title: EgoMemReason: A Memory-Driven Reasoning Benchmark for Long-Horizon Egocentric Video Understanding
comment: The first two authors contributed equally. Project website: https://egomemreason.github.io/
summary: Next-generation visual assistants, such as smart glasses, embodied agents, and always-on life-logging systems, must reason over an entire day or more of continuous visual experience. In ultra-long video settings, relevant information is sparsely distributed across hours or days, making memory a fundamental challenge: models must accumulate information over time, recall prior states, track temporal order, and abstract recurring patterns. However, existing week-long video benchmarks are primarily designed for perception and recognition, such as moment localization or global summarization, rather than reasoning that requires integrating evidence across multiple days. To address this gap, we introduce EgoMemReason, a comprehensive benchmark that systematically evaluates week-long egocentric video understanding through memory-driven reasoning. EgoMemReason evaluates three complementary memory types: entity memory, tracking how object states evolve and change across days; event memory, recalling and ordering activities separated by hours or days; and behavior memory, abstracting recurring patterns from sparse, repeated observations over the whole week period. EgoMemReason comprises 500 questions across three memory types and six core challenges, with an average of 5.1 video segments of evidence per question and 25.9 hours of memory backtracking. We evaluate EgoMemReason on 17 methods across MLLMs and agentic frameworks, revealing that even the best model achieves only 39.6% overall accuracy. Further analysis shows that the three memory types fail for distinct reasons and that performance degrades as evidence spans longer temporal horizons, revealing that long-horizon memory remains far from solved. We believe EgoMemReason establishes a strong foundation for evaluating and advancing long-context, memory-aware multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoMemReason基准，用于评估多模态系统在超长时间（一周）的第一视角视频理解中的记忆驱动推理能力。包含三种记忆类型（实体、事件、行为）的500个问题，最佳模型准确率仅39.6%，表明长时记忆推理远未解决。
AI.motivation: 现有超长视频基准（如一周时长）主要关注感知和识别任务（如时刻定位、全局摘要），缺乏对跨多天证据整合的推理能力评估。下一代视觉助手（智能眼镜、具身智能体、生活记录系统）需要能够在连续数日的视觉体验中进行记忆积累、状态回溯、时序跟踪和模式抽象，现有评估无法满足这一需求。
AI.method: 构建EgoMemReason基准，包含500个问题，评估三种互补记忆类型：实体记忆（对象状态跨天演变）、事件记忆（跨时段活动回忆与排序）、行为记忆（稀疏重复行为模式抽象）。每个问题平均需5.1个视频片段证据，回溯25.9小时。在17种方法（MLLM和智能体框架）上进行了系统评估。
AI.result: 最佳模型总体准确率仅39.6%。三种记忆类型的失败原因各不相同，且性能随证据时间跨度增加而显著下降，揭示长时记忆推理仍远未解决。
AI.conclusion: EgoMemReason为评估和推进长上下文、记忆感知的多模态系统奠定了坚实基础，揭示了现有方法在超长时间跨度的记忆驱动推理方面的严重不足。

title: The Open-Box Fallacy: Why AI Deployment Needs a Calibrated Verification Regime
summary: AI deployment in sensitive domains such as health care, credit, employment, and criminal justice is often treated as unsafe to authorize until model internals can be explained. This often leads to an excessive reliance on mechanistic interpretability to address a deployment challenge beyond its intended scope. We argue that the gate should instead be calibrated verification: authorization should be domain-scoped, independently checkable, monitored after release, accountable, contestable, and revocable. The reason is twofold. First, model capability is uneven across nearby tasks, so authorization must attach to a specific use rather than to a model in general. Second, societies have long governed opaque expertise through credentials, monitoring, liability, appeal, and revocation rather than mechanism-level explanation. Recent evidence reinforces this distinction between mechanistic understanding and deployment authority: a 53-percentage-point gap between internal representations and output correction shows that understanding may not translate into action, while one scoping review found that only 9.0% of FDA-approved AI/ML device documents contained a prospective post-market surveillance study. We propose Verification Coverage, a six-component reportable standard with a minimum-composition rule, as the metric that should sit beside capability scores in model cards, leaderboards, and regulatory disclosures.

AI.tldr: 本文主张AI部署授权应基于可验证的校准验证（Verification Coverage）而非机械可解释性。模型授权应针对具体用途、独立可查、可监控、可问责、可争议、可撤销。作者提出Verification Coverage作为六维标准，应纳入模型卡和监管披露中。
AI.motivation: 当前在医疗、信贷、刑事司法等敏感领域，AI部署常因模型不可解释而被视为不安全，导致过度依赖机械可解释性来解决超出其范围的部署挑战。作者认为这不当限制了AI的负责任部署。
AI.method: 通过两重论证：1）模型能力在相近任务间不均衡，因此授权应针对特定用途而非整体模型；2）社会长期以来通过凭证、监控、问责、申诉和撤销等机制管理不透明专业知识（如医疗执照制度），而非依赖机制层面的解释。同时引用实证证据（内部表征与输出修正间53%的差距、仅9.0%的FDA批准AI设备包含前瞻性上市后监测研究）支撑论点。
AI.result: 提出Verification Coverage标准，包含六个组件和一个最小组成规则，作为能力评分之外应纳入模型卡、排行榜和监管披露的补充指标。
AI.conclusion: 部署AI系统的门控应基于校准验证（verification-calibrated authorization），而非机械可解释性。通过领域限定、独立可查、发布后监控、可问责、可争议、可撤销的六维标准，才能实现负责任且务实的AI治理。

title: The Cartesian Shortcut: Re-evaluate Vision Reasoning in Polar Coordinate Space
summary: As current Multimodal Large Language Models rapidly saturate canonical visual reasoning benchmarks, a key question emerges: do these strong scores genuinely reflect robust visual understanding? We identify a pervasive vulnerability, the \textbf{Cartesian Shortcut}: visual reasoning benchmarks prevalently build on orthogonal grid-based layouts that can be readily discretized into explicit textual coordinates. Models systematically exploit this property, heavily leveraging text-based deductive reasoning to assist visual problem-solving. To systematically dismantle this shortcut, we introduce \textbf{Polaris-Bench}, which re-formulates 53 visual reasoning tasks in Polar coordinate space with paired Cartesian counterparts as reference, while preserving consistent logical constraints and task semantics -- thus fundamentally breaking the orthogonal prior that models exploit. Comprehensive evaluation across $14$ state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals that frontier models achieving $70$--$83\%$ on Cartesian layouts collapse to $31$--$39\%$ on Polar equivalents, with degradation persisting even under complete logical equivalence. Moreover, reasoning gains observed on Cartesian layouts are severely diminished on Polar equivalents. These findings expose a critical deficiency in current MLLMs: the lack of topology-invariant visual reasoning.

AI.tldr: 当前多模态大模型在视觉推理基准上依赖“笛卡尔捷径”（利用正交网格布局的离散坐标进行文本推理），而非真正的视觉理解。作者提出Polaris-Bench，将53个任务转换为极坐标系，打破正交先验。实验表明，前沿模型在笛卡尔布局上准确率70-83%，在极坐标下骤降至31-39%，揭示了MLLMs缺乏拓扑不变的视觉推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉推理基准因普遍采用正交网格布局，导致模型可利用文本坐标推理而非真实视觉理解，需要设计新的评测方法来暴露这一缺陷。
AI.method: 提出Polaris-Bench，将53个视觉推理任务从笛卡尔坐标系重新构建为极坐标系，同时保持逻辑约束和任务语义不变，系统性地破坏模型依赖的正交先验。
AI.result: 在14个SOTA多模态大模型上测试，前沿模型在笛卡尔布局上准确率70-83%，在极坐标等价任务上骤降至31-39%；即使在逻辑完全等价的情况下退化仍然存在；笛卡尔布局上的推理增益在极坐标下大幅减弱。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLMs严重缺乏拓扑不变的视觉推理能力，高度依赖正交网格布局带来的文本推理捷径，而非真正的视觉理解。

title: PRISM: Generation-Time Detection and Mitigation of Secret Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems introduce a security risk in which sensitive information accessed by one agent can propagate through shared context and reappear in downstream outputs, even without explicit adversarial intent. We formalise this phenomenon as propagation amplification, where leakage risk increases across agent boundaries as sensitive content is repeatedly exposed to downstream generators. Existing defences, including prompt-based safeguards, static pattern matching, and LLM-as-judge filtering, are not designed for this setting: they either operate after generation, rely primarily on surface-form patterns, or add substantial latency without modelling the generation process itself. To resolve these issues, we propose PRISM, a real-time defence that treats credential leakage as a sequential risk accumulation problem during generation. At each decoding step, PRISM combines 16 signals spanning lexical, structural, information-theoretic, behavioural, and contextual features into a calibrated risk score, enabling per-token intervention through green, yellow, and red risk zones. Our central observation is that credential reproduction is often preceded by a measurable shift in generation dynamics, characterised by entropy collapse and increasing logit concentration. When combined with text-structural cues such as identifier-pattern detection, these temporal signals provide an early warning of leakage before a secret is fully reconstructed. Across a 2,000-task adversarial benchmark covering 13 attack categories and three pressure levels in a heterogeneous four-agent pipeline, PRISM achieves F1 = 0.832 with precision = 1.000 and recall = 0.712, while producing no observed leakage on our benchmark (0.0% task-level leak rate) and preserving output utility of 0.893. It substantially outperforms the strongest baseline, Span Tagger, which achieves F1 = 0.719 with a 15.0% task-level leak rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM，一种针对多智能体LLM系统中凭证泄露风险的实时防御方法。PRISM在每个解码步骤结合16种信号（词法、结构、信息论、行为、上下文特征），通过三区（绿/黄/红）机制进行逐token干预。在2000任务对抗基准上，PRISM达到F1=0.832，精度1.000，召回0.712，零泄露率，显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统中存在一种安全风险：一个智能体访问的敏感信息会通过共享上下文传播并在下游输出中出现，作者将这一现象形式化为"传播放大"（propagation amplification）。现有防御方法（提示工程、静态模式匹配、LLM-as-judge过滤）无法有效应对这种跨智能体的渐进式泄露问题。
AI.method: PRISM将凭证泄露视为生成过程中的序列风险累积问题。在每个解码步骤：1）组合16种信号（词法、结构、信息论、行为、上下文特征）计算校准风险分数；2）通过绿/黄/红三区机制实现逐token干预。核心发现：凭证再现前常出现生成动态的可测量变化（熵塌缩、logit集中度增加），结合文本结构线索（标识符模式检测）可在秘密完全重建前发出早期预警。
AI.result: 在2000任务对抗基准（13种攻击类别、3种压力级别、异构四智能体流水线）上：PRISM的F1=0.832，精度=1.000，召回=0.712，任务级泄露率0.0%，输出效用0.893。最强基线Span Tagger的F1=0.719，任务级泄露率15.0%。
AI.conclusion: PRISM通过实时、逐token的风险建模有效解决了多智能体LLM系统中的凭证传播泄露问题，在几乎不影响输出效用的情况下实现了零泄露率，为多智能体系统的安全部署提供了实用方案。

title: Hyperbolic Distillation: Geometry-Guided Cross-Modal Transfer for Robust 3D Object Detection
comment: Current version has been subbmitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. Now, this manuscript's status is Under Review
summary: Cross-modal knowledge distillation has emerged as an effective strategy for integrating point cloud and image features in 3D perception tasks. However, the modality heterogeneity, spatial misalignment, and the representation crisis of multiple modalities often limit the efficient of these cross-modal distillation methods. To address these limitations in existing approaches, we propose a hyperbolic constrained cross-modal distillation method for multimodal 3D object detection (HGC-Det). The proposed HGC-Det framework includes an image branch and a point cloud branch to extract semantic features from two different modalities. The point cloud branch comprises three core components: a 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component (SGVO), a hyperbolic geometry constrained cross-modal feature transfer component (HFT), and a feature aggregation-based geometry optimization component (FAGO). Specifically, the SGVO component adaptively refines the spatial representation of the 3D branch by leveraging semantic cues from the image branch, thereby mitigating the issue of inadequate representation fusion. The HFT component exploits the intrinsic geometric properties of hyperbolic space to alleviate semantic loss during the fusion of high-dimensional image features and low-dimensional point cloud features. Finally, the FAGO compensates for potential spatial feature degradation introduced by the 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component. Extensive experiments on indoor datasets (SUN RGB-D, ARKitScenes) and outdoor datasets (KITTI, nuScenes) demonstrate that our method achieves a better trade-off between detection accuracy and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于双曲约束的跨模态蒸馏方法(HGC-Det)，通过2D语义引导体素优化、双曲几何特征迁移和特征聚合几何优化三个组件，解决多模态3D目标检测中的模态异质、空间错位和表示危机问题，在多个室内外数据集上实现了精度与计算成本的良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态知识蒸馏方法在3D感知任务中受限于模态异质性、空间错位和多模态表示危机，导致融合效率不高，因此需要一种更有效的跨模态蒸馏方法。
AI.method: 提出HGC-Det框架，包含图像分支和点云分支。点云分支有三个核心组件：(1) 2D语义引导体素优化(SGVO)，利用图像语义信息优化3D分支空间表示；(2) 双曲几何约束跨模态特征迁移(HFT)，利用双曲空间的几何特性缓解高维图像特征与低维点云特征融合中的语义损失；(3) 特征聚合几何优化(FAGO)，补偿SGVO可能引入的空间特征退化。
AI.result: 在室内数据集(SUN RGB-D, ARKitScenes)和室外数据集(KITTI, nuScenes)上的大量实验表明，该方法在检测精度和计算成本之间实现了更好的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的HGC-Det通过双曲空间约束和语义引导优化，有效解决了跨模态蒸馏中的核心问题，在多个基准数据集上表现出色。

title: Hierarchical Causal Abduction: A Foundation Framework for Explainable Model Predictive Control
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used to operate safety-critical infrastructure by predicting future trajectories and optimizing control actions. However, nonlinear dynamics, hard safety constraints, and numerical optimization often render individual control moves opaque to human operators, undermining trust and hindering deployment. This paper presents Hierarchical Causal Abduction (HCA), which combines (i) physics-informed reasoning via domain knowledge graphs, (ii) optimization evidence from Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) multipliers, and (iii) temporal causal discovery via the PCMCI algorithm to generate faithful, human-interpretable explanations for control actions computed by nonlinear MPC. Across three diverse control applications (greenhouse climate, building HVAC, chemical process engineering) with expert validation, HCA improves explanation accuracy by 53\% over LIME (0.478 vs. 0.311) using a single set of cross-domain parameters without per-domain tuning; domain-specific KKT-threshold calibration over 2--3 days further increases accuracy to 0.88. Ablation studies confirm that each evidence source is essential, with 32--37\% accuracy degradation when any component is removed, and HCA's ranking-and-validation methodology generalizes beyond MPC to other prediction-based decision systems, including learning-based control and trajectory planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出层级因果溯因法（HCA），融合物理知识图谱、KKT乘子优化证据和PCMCI时序因果发现，为非线性MPC控制动作生成可解释说明。在温室气候、建筑暖通、化工过程三个领域，HCA解释准确率比LIME提升53%，消融实验显示每类证据都不可或缺。
AI.motivation: 非线性MPC因复杂动力学、硬约束和数值优化导致控制动作对操作员不透明，削弱信任并阻碍部署，亟需能忠实、可解释的说明方法。
AI.method: 提出HCA框架，三源证据融合：（i）领域知识图谱的物理推理，（ii）KKT乘子的优化证据，（iii）PCMCI算法的时序因果发现，通过排序与验证机制生成解释。
AI.result: 三领域实验：HCA解释准确率0.478（LIME仅0.311），提升53%；领域特定KKT阈值校准后达0.88；任何单一证据源移除导致准确率下降32-37%。
AI.conclusion: HCA有效提升非线性MPC可解释性，其排序-验证方法论可推广至学习控制和轨迹规划等预测决策系统，且无需跨领域参数调优。

title: Adversarial Attacks Against MLLMs via Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment
summary: Adversarial perturbations can mislead Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) recognize a benign image as a specific target object, posing serious risks in safety-critical scenarios such as autonomous driving and medical diagnosis. This makes transfer-based targeted attacks crucial for understanding and improving black-box MLLM robustness. Existing transfer-based targeted attack methods typically rely on the final global features of the surrogate encoder and anchor optimization to original-resolution target crops, leading to their limited transferability and robustness. To address these challenges, we propose Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment (PRAF-Attack), a targeted transfer-based attack framework that integrates multi-scale global semantic guidance with robust intermediate-layer local alignment. Unlike prior methods that align only the surrogate encoder's final layer, we design an adaptive feature alignment strategy that leverages intermediate representations to enhance transferability. Specifically, we introduce an adaptive intermediate layer selection mechanism to identify transferable hierarchical features across surrogate ensembles via gradient consistency, along with an adaptive patch-level optimization strategy that preserves highly correlated local regions through efficient patch filtering. To overcome the reliance on fixed original-resolution target crops, we propose a progressive resolution processing strategy that gradually refines optimization from coarse to fine, enabling the attack to better exploit target information at multiple scales and achieve stronger transferability. We evaluate PRAF-Attack on a diverse suite of black-box MLLMs, including six open-source models and six closed-source commercial APIs. Compared with seven state-of-the-art targeted attack baselines, the proposed PRAF-Attack consistently achieves superior transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRAF-Attack，一种针对多模态大模型（MLLMs）的基于迁移的定向对抗攻击方法。通过多尺度全局语义引导、中间层自适应特征对齐和渐进式分辨率处理策略，显著提升了黑盒MLLMs上定向攻击的迁移性和鲁棒性。在6个开源和6个闭源商业API模型上，该方法优于7种现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于迁移的定向攻击方法通常依赖代理编码器的最终全局特征，并将优化锚定到原始分辨率的目标裁剪上，导致迁移性和鲁棒性有限。这限制了在黑盒MLLMs上理解和提升模型鲁棒性的能力，尤其是在自动驾驶、医疗诊断等安全关键场景中。
AI.method: PRAF-Attack包含三个核心设计：(1) 自适应中间层选择机制：通过梯度一致性从代理集成中识别可迁移的分层特征；(2) 自适应补丁级优化策略：通过高效补丁过滤保留高相关性的局部区域；(3) 渐进式分辨率处理策略：从粗到细逐步优化，多尺度利用目标信息。
AI.result: 在6个开源黑盒MLLMs和6个闭源商业API模型上进行评估，对比7个最先进的定向攻击基线，PRAF-Attack在迁移性指标上持续取得最优结果。
AI.conclusion: PRAF-Attack通过多尺度语义引导、中间层对齐和渐进式分辨率优化，有效提升了定向对抗攻击在黑盒MLLMs上的迁移能力，为理解和评估MLLMs鲁棒性提供了更强大的攻击工具。

title: Teacher-Aware Evolution of Heuristic Programs from Learned Optimization Policies
summary: LLM-based automatic heuristic design has shown promise for generating executable heuristics for combinatorial optimization, but existing methods mainly rely on delayed endpoint performance. We propose a \emph{teacher-aware evolutionary framework} that uses independently trained learned optimization policies as behavioral teachers. Instead of deploying or imitating the teacher, our method queries it on states visited by candidate heuristic programs and uses its action preferences as local feedback for evolution. The resulting search discovers static executable heuristics guided by both task performance and teacher-derived behavioral signals. Experiments on scheduling, routing, and graph optimization benchmarks show that our method improves over performance-driven LLM heuristic evolution baselines while requiring no neural inference at deployment. These results suggest that learned optimization policies can be repurposed as behavioral feedback sources for automatic heuristic discovery.

AI.tldr: 提出一种教师感知的进化框架，利用独立训练的优化策略作为行为教师，通过查询教师对候选启发式程序访问状态的行为偏好作为局部反馈，引导可执行静态启发式的自动发现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动启发式设计主要依赖延迟的端到端性能反馈，缺乏更细粒度的行为引导信号。
AI.method: 采用教师感知进化框架，独立训练优化策略作为行为教师；不部署或模仿教师，而是查询教师对候选启发式访问状态的动作偏好，作为局部反馈指导进化搜索。
AI.result: 在调度、路由和图优化基准上，该方法优于仅依赖性能驱动的LLM启发式进化基线，且部署时无需神经推理。
AI.conclusion: 学习到的优化策略可作为行为反馈源，用于自动启发式发现，而不仅仅是直接部署或模仿。

title: TOC-Bench: A Temporal Object Consistency Benchmark for Video Large Language Models
summary: Video large language models (Video-LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in general video understanding, yet their ability to maintain temporal object consistency remains insufficiently explored. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on event recognition, action understanding, or coarse temporal reasoning, but rarely evaluate whether a model can consistently preserve the identity, state, and temporal continuity of the same object across occlusion, disappearance, reappearance, state transitions, and cross-object interactions. As a result, current evaluations may overestimate temporal reasoning ability while overlooking failures in object-centric temporal coherence. To address this issue, we introduce TOC-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark specifically designed to evaluate temporal object consistency in Video-LLMs. TOC-Bench is explicitly object-track grounded, where each queried subject is associated with a per frame object trajectory and structured temporal event timeline. To ensure that benchmark items depend on temporally ordered visual evidence rather than language priors, single-frame shortcuts, or unordered frame cues, we propose a three-layer temporal-necessity filtering protocol that removes 60.7% of candidate QA pairs and retains 17,900 temporally dependent items spanning 10 diagnostic dimensions. From this filtered pool, we further construct a human-verified benchmark containing 2,323 high-quality QA pairs over 1,951 videos. Experiments on representative Video-LLMs show that temporal object consistency remains a major unsolved challenge. Current models exhibit substantial weaknesses in event counting, event ordering, identity-sensitive reasoning, and hallucination-aware verification, despite strong performance on general video understanding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TOC-Bench基准，专门评估视频大语言模型在时间维度上的物体一致性（如身份、状态、连续性），通过严格的三层过滤协议去除语言先验和单帧捷径，实验表明现有模型在此任务上存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解基准主要关注事件识别、动作理解等粗粒度时间推理，缺乏对同一物体在遮挡、消失重现、状态变化、跨物体交互等场景下是否保持身份、状态和时间连续性的评估，导致可能高估模型的时序推理能力而忽略物体中心的时间一致性失败。
AI.method: 1) 构建TOC-Bench基准，每个查询主体关联逐帧物体轨迹和结构化时间事件线；2) 提出三层时间必要性过滤协议，去除依赖语言先验、单帧捷径或无序帧线索的候选QA对（过滤掉60.7%），保留17,900个时间依赖项，覆盖10个诊断维度；3) 从中进一步构建含2,323个高质量QA对（1,951个视频）的人工验证基准。
AI.result: 实验表明时间物体一致性仍是重大未解决问题：当前模型在事件计数、事件排序、身份敏感推理和幻觉感知验证方面存在显著弱点，尽管在通用视频理解基准上表现强劲。
AI.conclusion: TOC-Bench揭示了现有Video-LLMs在物体中心的时间一致性推理上的系统性缺陷，为未来模型改进提供了明确的诊断方向和评估标准。

title: Navigating the Sea of LLM Evaluation: Investigating Bias in Toxicity Benchmarks
summary: The rapid adoption of LLMs in both research and industry highlights the challenges of deploying them safely and reveals a gap in the systematic evaluation of toxicity benchmarks. As organizations increasingly rely on these benchmarks to certify models for customer-facing applications and automated moderation, unrecognized evaluation biases could lead to the deployment of vulnerable or unsafe systems. This work investigates the robustness of established benchmarking setups and examines how to measure currently neglected intrinsic biases, such as those related to model choice, metrics, and task types. Our experiments uncover significant discrepancies in benchmark behaviors when evaluation setups are altered. Specifically, shifting the task from text completion to summarization increases the tendency of benchmarks to flag content as harmful. Additionally, certain benchmarks fail to maintain consistent behavior when the input data domain is changed. Furthermore, we observe model-specific instabilities, demonstrating a clear need for more robust and comprehensive safety evaluation frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM毒性基准测试中的评估偏差，发现任务类型从文本补全转为摘要生成会增加有害内容标记倾向，部分基准在不同数据域下表现不一致，且存在模型特定的不稳定性，揭示了现有安全评估框架的缺陷。
AI.motivation: LLM在研究和工业领域被广泛部署，但缺乏对毒性基准测试的系统性评估。组织依赖这些基准来认证模型，但未被识别的评估偏差可能导致不安全系统的上线。
AI.method: 通过系统性实验，改变评估设置（如任务类型从文本补全改为摘要生成、变更输入数据域），并比较不同模型、指标和任务类型下的基准行为，测量被忽略的固有偏差。
AI.result: 1) 任务从文本补全转为摘要生成时，基准标记有害内容的倾向增加；2) 输入数据域变化时，某些基准无法保持一致性；3) 观察到模型特定的不稳定性，表明不同模型对同一基准的反应存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前毒性基准测试存在显著的评估偏差，需要构建更鲁棒、更全面的安全评估框架来弥补这些漏洞。

title: Frequency Adapter with SAM for Generalized Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is a critical task in computer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning. However, deep learning models often struggle to generalize across datasets due to domain shifts arising from variations in imaging protocols, scanner types, and patient populations. Traditional domain generalization (DG) methods utilize causal feature learning, adversarial consistency, and style augmentation to improve segmentation robustness. While effective, these approaches rely on explicit feature alignment, adversarial objectives, or handcrafted augmentations, which may not fully exploit the capabilities of foundation models. Recently, the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has demonstrated strong generalization capabilities in segmentation tasks. SAM-based DG methods attempt to improve medical image segmentation. However, these approaches primarily operate in the spatial domain and overlook frequency-based discrepancies that significantly affect model robustness. In this work, we propose Frequency-based Domain Generalization with SAM (FSAM), a novel framework that integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for efficient fine-tuning and a frequency adapter to incorporate frequency-domain representations for single-source domain generalization. FSAM enhances SAM's segmentation robustness by extracting domain-invariant high-frequency features, mitigating frequency-related domain shifts. Experimental results on fundus and prostate datasets demonstrate that FSAM outperforms existing traditional DG and SAM-based DG approaches in domain generalization. Codes and pre-trained models will be made available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FSAM框架，结合SAM、LoRA和频率适配器，通过提取域不变高频特征提升医学图像分割的跨域泛化能力，在眼底和前列腺数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割的域泛化方法（如因果特征学习、对抗一致性、风格增强）依赖显式特征对齐或手工增强，未能充分利用基础模型潜力；而基于SAM的方法主要在空间域操作，忽略了影响模型鲁棒性的频率域差异。
AI.method: 提出FSAM框架，集成LoRA进行高效微调，并设计频率适配器引入频域表示，用于提取域不变的高频特征以缓解频率相关的域偏移，实现单源域泛化。
AI.result: 在眼底和前列腺数据集上的实验表明，FSAM在域泛化性能上优于传统DG方法和现有的SAM-based DG方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合频域信息与SAM基础模型，FSAM有效提升了医学图像分割的跨域鲁棒性，代码和预训练模型将开源。

title: diffGHOST: Diffusion based Generative Hedged Oblivious Synthetic Trajectories
summary: Trajectories are nowadays valuable information for a wide range of applications. However they are also inherently sensitive, as they contain highly personal information about individuals. Facing this challenge, synthesizing mobility trajectories has emerged as a promising solution to leverage mobility information while preserving privacy. State-of-the-art models, often rely on the false assumptions of generative models implicit privacy and fails to provide privacy guarantees while preserving trajectories utility. Here, we introduce diffGHOST, a conditional diffusion model based on latent space segmentation, designed to answer this challenge. Thus, this paper propose a methodology that identify and mitigate memorization of critical samples using condition segments of a learn latent space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出diffGHOST，一种基于潜在空间分割的条件扩散模型，用于在生成移动轨迹时同时保护隐私和保持数据效用，通过识别和缓解关键样本的记忆化问题来提供隐私保障。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹生成模型依赖生成模型的隐式隐私这一错误假设，无法在保护隐私的同时保持轨迹的效用。
AI.method: 提出diffGHOST，一种基于潜在空间分割的条件扩散模型，利用条件段来识别和缓解关键样本的记忆化问题。
AI.result: 该方法能够在提供隐私保障的同时保持轨迹数据的效用性。
AI.conclusion: diffGHOST通过潜在空间分割和条件段设计，有效解决了轨迹生成中的隐私-效用权衡问题。

title: MolSight: Molecular Property Prediction with Images
summary: Every molecule ever synthesised can be drawn as a 2D skeletal diagram, yet in modern property prediction this universally available representation has received less focus in favour of molecular graphs, 3D conformers, or billion-parameter language models, each imposing its own computational and data-engineering overhead. We present $\textbf{MolSight}$, the first systematic large-scale study of vision-based Molecular Property Prediction (MPP). Using 10 vision architectures, 7 pre-training strategies, and $2\,M$ molecule images, we evaluate performance across 10 downstream tasks spanning physical-property regression, drug-discovery classification, and quantum-chemistry prediction. To account for the wide variation in structural complexity across pre-training molecules, we further propose a $\textbf{chemistry-informed curriculum}$: five structural complexity descriptors partition the corpus into five tiers of increasing chemical difficulty, consistently outperforming non-curriculum baselines. We show that a single rendered bond-line image, processed by a vision encoder, is sufficient for competitive molecular property prediction, i.e. $\textit{chemical insight from sight alone}$. The best curriculum-trained configuration achieves the top result on $\textbf{5 of 10}$ benchmarks and top two on $\textbf{all 10}$, at $\textbf{$\textit{80$\times$ lower}$}$ FLOPs than the nearest multi-modal competitor.

AI.tldr: MolSight首次系统大规模地研究基于视觉的分子性质预测，证明仅凭渲染的二维骨架图像（化学结构式）即可实现竞争性的分子性质预测，并通过化学信息课程学习策略，在10个下游任务中的5个上取得最佳结果，计算量仅为最近多模态竞争对手的1/80。
AI.motivation: 尽管每个合成的分子都可以绘制成2D骨架图，但在现代分子性质预测中，这种普遍可用的表示形式被忽视，而分子图、3D构象或千亿参数语言模型等各自带来了计算和数据工程开销。作者希望探索视觉模型在分子性质预测中的潜力，降低计算成本。
AI.method: 使用10种视觉架构、7种预训练策略和200万张分子图像，在10个下游任务上评估性能；提出化学信息课程学习策略，利用五个结构复杂度描述符将语料库划分为五个递增难度层级。
AI.result: 最佳课程训练配置在10个基准中的5个上取得最高结果，在所有10个上均进入前二，计算量仅为最近多模态竞争对手的1/80。
AI.conclusion: 单一的渲染键线图像经过视觉编码器处理，足以实现具有竞争力的分子性质预测，即"从视觉中获得化学洞察力"。

title: Evidence-based Decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with Uncertainty-driven Active Learning
summary: With the rapid development of deep generative models, forged facial images are massively exploited for illegal activities. Although existing synthetic face detection methods have achieved significant progress, they suffer from the inherent limitation of overconfidence due to their reliance on the Softmax activation function. Thus, these methods often lead to unreliable predictions when encountering unknown Out-of-Distribution (OOD) images, and cannot ascertain the model's uncertainty in its prediction. Meanwhile, most existing methods require massive high-quality annotated data, which greatly limits their practicability across diverse scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose EMSFD (Evidence-based decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with uncertainty-driven active learning), an approach designed to enhance detection reliability and generalizability. Specifically, EMSFD models class evidence using the Dirichlet distribution and explicitly incorporates model uncertainty into the prediction process. Furthermore, during training, the estimated uncertainty is exploited to prioritize more informative samples from the unlabeled pool for annotation, thereby reducing labeling cost and improving model generalization. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that our method enhances the interpretability of synthetic face detection. Meanwhile, our method yields a 15\% increase in accuracy compared to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, which demonstrates the superior detection performance and generalizability of our approach. Our code is available at: https://github.com/hzx111621/EMSFD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EMSFD方法，利用狄利克雷分布建模证据并引入不确定性驱动的主动学习，以解决合成人脸检测中Softmax导致的过度自信问题及对大量标注数据的依赖，在检测可靠性和泛化性上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有合成人脸检测方法因依赖Softmax激活函数而存在过度自信的固有限制，导致面对未知分布图像时预测不可靠；同时大多数方法需要大量高质量标注数据，限制了实际应用场景的泛化能力。
AI.method: EMSFD方法使用狄利克雷分布对类别证据进行建模，将模型不确定性显式融入预测过程；在训练阶段利用估计的不确定性从未标注池中优先选择信息量更大的样本进行标注，从而降低标注成本并提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明EMSFD提升了合成人脸检测的可解释性，相比现有SOTA基线方法准确率提升了15%，展现了优越的检测性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: EMSFD通过基于证据的决策建模和不确定性驱动的主动学习，有效解决了合成人脸检测中的过度自信和数据依赖问题，提高了检测的可靠性与泛化性。

title: Evolving-RL: End-to-End Optimization of Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Capability within Agents
summary: Experience-driven self-evolving agents aim to overcome the static nature of large language models by distilling reusable experience from past interactions, thus enabling adaptation to novel tasks at deployment time. This process places substantial demands on the foundation model's capacities for abstraction, generalization, and in-context learning. However, most existing studies focus primarily on system-level design choices, such as how experience is represented and managed, neglecting the inherent capabilities of the underlying model. While some recent works have started to optimize the experience utilization stage via reinforcement learning, they still fail to treat self-evolution as a unified process to be jointly optimized. To this end, we propose Evolving-RL, an efficient algorithmic framework that jointly improves the experience extraction and utilization capabilities required for self-evolution. Specifically, we center the learning process on experience extraction and evaluation, using the two supervisory signals derived from evaluation to optimize the extractor and solver separately and thus enable their coordinated co-evolution. Experiments on ALFWorld and Mind2Web show that Evolving-RL effectively enhances LLMs' ability to extract and reuse experience, leading to strong performance gains on out-of-distribution tasks (up to 98.7% relative improvement over the GRPO baseline on ALFWorld unseen tasks and 35.8% on Mind2Web), and these gains are fully unlocked only through the coordinated co-evolution of experience extraction and utilization. Furthermore, Evolving-RL inherently functions as an experience-augmented RL algorithm. By internalizing reusable experience patterns directly into model parameters, it achieves remarkable performance gains over standard baselines on both seen and unseen tasks, even in the absence of test-time experience accumulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了Evolving-RL框架，通过联合优化经验提取和利用能力，使LLM能够自主学习进化，在ALFWorld和Mind2Web任务上取得显著性能提升（最高98.7%相对提升）。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化智能体研究多聚焦于系统层面的经验表示与管理设计，忽视了底层模型本身的能力，且未能将自进化视为一个需要联合优化的统一过程。
AI.method: 提出Evolving-RL算法框架，以经验提取和评估为核心，利用评估产生的两种监督信号分别优化提取器（extractor）和求解器（solver），实现两者的协同共进化。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld未见任务上相对GRPO基线提升98.7%，在Mind2Web上提升35.8%。同时，Evolving-RL作为一种经验增强的RL算法，在无需测试时经验积累的情况下也能超越标准基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过协同优化经验提取与利用，Evolving-RL有效提升了LLM的自进化能力，且这种增益只有在两者共同进化时才能完全释放。

title: V-ABS: Action-Observer Driven Beam Search for Dynamic Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general perception, yet complex multi-step visual reasoning remains a persistent challenge. Although recent agentic approaches incorporate tool use, they often neglect critical execution feedback. Consequently, they suffer from the imagination-action-observer (IAO) bias, a misalignment between prior imagination and observer feedback that undermines reasoning stability and optimality. To bridge this gap, we introduce V-ABS, an action-observer driven beam search framework that enables deliberate reasoning through thinker-actor-observer iterations. We also propose an entropy-based adaptive weighting algorithm to mitigate the IAO bias by dynamically balancing the confidence scores between the policy priors and the observational feedback. Moreover, we construct a large-scale supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset comprising over 80k samples to guide the model to assign higher prior confidence to correct action paths. Extensive experiments across eight diverse benchmarks show that V-ABS achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering an average improvement of 19.7% on the Qwen3-VL-8B baseline and consistent gains across both open-source and proprietary models.

AI.tldr: V-ABS提出了一种基于行动-观察驱动的波束搜索框架，通过思考者-行动者-观察者迭代和熵权自适应加权算法，有效缓解了多模态大语言模型在多步视觉推理中的想象-行动-观察偏差，在8个基准测试上平均提升19.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在复杂多步视觉推理中表现不佳，虽然最近基于智能体的方法引入了工具使用，但忽略了关键的执行反馈，导致想象-行动-观察偏差，即先验想象与观察反馈之间的错位，损害了推理的稳定性和最优性。
AI.method: 提出V-ABS框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 思考者-行动者-观察者迭代的波束搜索框架；2) 基于熵的自适应加权算法，动态平衡策略先验与观察反馈的置信度以缓解IAO偏差；3) 构建包含8万+样本的大规模SFT数据集，引导模型为正确行动路径分配更高先验置信度。
AI.result: 在8个多样化基准测试中取得SOTA性能，基于Qwen3-VL-8B基线平均提升19.7%，在开源和闭源模型上均有一致提升。
AI.conclusion: V-ABS通过引入行动-观察驱动的波束搜索和自适应加权机制，有效解决了MLLMs在多步视觉推理中的IAO偏差问题，验证了执行反馈在复杂推理中的关键作用。

title: Urban-ImageNet: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Urban Space Perception
summary: We present Urban-ImageNet, a large-scale multi-modal dataset and evaluation benchmark for urban space perception from user-generated social media imagery. The corpus contains over 2 Million public social media images and paired textual posts collected from Weibo across 61 urban sites in 24 Chinese cities across 2019-2025, with controlled benchmark subsets at 1K, 10K, and 100K scale and a full 2M corpus for large-scale training and evaluation. Urban-ImageNet is organized by HUSIC, a Hierarchical Urban Space Image Classification framework that defines a 10-class taxonomy grounded in urban theory. The taxonomy is designed to distinguish activated and non-activated public spaces, exterior and interior urban environments, accommodation spaces, consumption content, portraits, and non-spatial social-media content. Rather than treating urban imagery as generic scene data, Urban-ImageNet evaluates whether machine perception models can capture spatial, social, and functional distinctions that are central to urban studies. The benchmark supports three tasks within one standardized library: (T1) urban scene semantic classification, (T2) cross-modal image-text retrieval, and (T3) instance segmentation. Our experiments evaluate representative vision, vision-language, and segmentation models, revealing strong performance on supervised scene classification but more challenging behavior in cross-modal retrieval and instance-level urban object segmentation. A multi-scale study further examines how model performance changes as balanced training data increases from 1K, 10K to 100K images. Urban-ImageNet provides a unified, theory-grounded, multi-city benchmark for evaluating how AI systems perceive and interpret contemporary urban spaces across modalities, scales, and task formulations. Dataset and benchmark are available at: huggingface.co/datasets/Yiwei-Ou/Urban-ImageNet and github.com/yiasun/dataset-2.

AI.tldr: 提出了Urban-ImageNet，一个基于社交媒体图像的大规模多模态城市空间感知数据集和评估基准，包含2019-2025年间中国24个城市61个地点的200多万张图像及文本，并构建了HUSIC分层分类体系，支持场景分类、跨模态检索和实例分割三个任务。
AI.motivation: 现有城市图像数据集多将城市影像视为通用场景数据，缺乏从城市学理论出发、能够区分城市空间的社会性、功能性和空间性差异的数据集和评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含200多万张社交媒体图像及文本的多模态数据集，提出了基于城市理论的HUSIC（分层城市空间图像分类）框架，定义10类分类体系，并设计了三个标准化评估任务：场景语义分类、跨模态图文检索和实例分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有模型在监督场景分类上表现良好，但在跨模态检索和实例级城市目标分割上更具挑战性；通过1K、10K到100K的多尺度实验揭示了训练数据规模对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: Urban-ImageNet提供了首个基于理论、跨城市、多模态、多尺度的城市空间感知评估基准，有助于推动AI系统对当代城市空间的深度理解和解释。

title: GESR: A Genetic Programming-Based Symbolic Regression Method with Gene Editing
summary: Mathematical formulas serve as a language through which humans communicate with nature. Discovering mathematical laws from scientific data to describe natural phenomena has been a long-standing pursuit of humanity for centuries. In the field of artificial intelligence, this challenge is known as the symbolic regression problem. Among existing symbolic regression approaches, Genetic Programming (GP) based on evolutionary algorithms remains one of the most classical and widely adopted methods. GP simulates the evolutionary process across generations through genetic mutation and crossover. However, mutations and crossovers in GP are entirely random. While this randomness effectively mimics natural evolution, it inevitably produces both beneficial and detrimental variations. If there existed a metaphorical `God` capable of foreseeing which genetic mutations or crossovers would yield superior outcomes and performing targeted gene editing accordingly, the efficiency of evolution could be substantially improved. Motivated by this idea, we propose in this paper a symbolic regression approach based on gene editing, termed GESR. In GESR, we trained two "hands of God" (two BERT models). Among them, the first leverages the BERT's masked language modeling capability to guide the mutation of genes (expression symbols). The other BERT model guides the crossover of individual genes by predicting the crossover point. Experimental results demonstrate that GESR significantly improves computational efficiency compared with traditional GP algorithms and achieves strong overall performance across multiple symbolic regression tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GESR，一种基于基因编辑的符号回归方法，利用两个BERT模型分别指导基因突变和交叉，相比传统遗传规划算法显著提升了计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传规划（GP）中的突变和交叉是完全随机的，这导致产生大量无效变异，效率低下。作者希望找到一种能"预见"哪些基因编辑会产生优越结果的方法，从而提升进化效率。
AI.method: 提出GESR方法，训练两个BERT模型作为"上帝之手"：一个利用BERT的掩码语言建模能力指导基因突变；另一个通过预测交叉点来指导基因交叉。
AI.result: GESR在计算效率上显著优于传统GP算法，并在多个符号回归任务上取得了良好的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入预训练的BERT模型来指导基因编辑，可以有效提升符号回归中进化搜索的效率，验证了"有指导的进化"相比"随机进化"的优越性。

title: SDTalk: Structured Facial Priors and Dual-Branch Motion Fields for Generalizable Gaussian Talking Head Synthesis
summary: High-quality, real-time talking head synthesis remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing reconstruction- and rendering-based methods typically rely on identity-specific models, limiting cross-identity generalization. To address this issue, we propose SDTalk, a one-shot 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)-based framework that generalizes to unseen identities without personalized training or fine-tuning. Our framework comprises two modules with a two-stage training strategy. In the first stage, we incorporate structured facial priors into the reconstruction module and separately predict 3DGS parameters for visible and occluded regions, enabling complete head reconstruction from a single image. In the second stage, we introduce a dual-branch motion field to model coarse and fine facial dynamics, improving detail fidelity and lip synchronization. Experiments demonstrate that SDTalk surpasses existing methods in both visual quality and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: SDTalk提出了一种基于3D高斯泼溅的一次性说话头合成框架，无需身份特定训练即可泛化到未见身份，包含双模块和两阶段训练策略，在视觉质量和推理效率上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有说话头合成方法依赖身份特定模型，难以跨身份泛化，缺乏通用的一次性合成方案。
AI.method: 两阶段训练：1) 结构化面部先验+分区域预测3DGS参数（可见/遮挡区域）；2) 双分支运动场建模粗细粒度面部动态，提升细节保真度和唇形同步。
AI.result: 在视觉质量和推理效率上均超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SDTalk通过3DGS框架实现了一次性、跨身份泛化的高质量实时说话头合成。

title: The Agent Use of Agent Beings: Agent Cybernetics Is the Missing Science of Foundation Agents
summary: LLM-based foundation agents that perceive, reason, and act across thousands of reasoning steps are rapidly becoming the dominant paradigm for deploying artificial intelligence in open-ended, long-horizon complex tasks. Despite this significance, the field remains overwhelmingly engineering-driven. Engineering practice has converged on useful primitives (tool loops, memory banks, harnesses, reflection steps), yet these are assembled by empirical trial and error rather than from first principles. Fundamental questions remain open: under what conditions does a long-running agent remain on-task? How should an agent respond when its environment exceeds its representational capacity? What architectural properties are necessary for safe self-improvement? We argue that cybernetics, the mid-twentieth-century science of control and communication in complex systems, provides the missing theoretical scaffold for foundation agents. By mapping six canonical laws of classical cybernetics onto six agent design principles, and synthesizing those principles into three engineering desiderata (reliability, lifelong running, and self-Improvement), we arrive at a framework termed Agent Cybernetics. Three application domains, code generation, computer use and automated research, exemplify the analytical framework of agent cybernetics by identifying failure modes and concrete engineering recommendations. We hope that agent cybernetics opens a new research venue and establishes the scientific foundation that foundation agents need for principled, reliable real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"智能体控制论"(Agent Cybernetics)框架，将经典控制论的六条法则映射为智能体设计原则，旨在为基于LLM的基础智能体提供理论支撑，替代当前纯工程试错的实践方式。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM基础智能体在长程复杂任务中表现优异，但该领域严重依赖工程试错，缺乏理论指导。诸如智能体何时保持任务专注、环境超出表征容量时如何应对、安全自我改进所需架构等问题尚无系统回答，亟需理论框架。
AI.method: 将经典控制论的六条法则映射为六条智能体设计原则，并综合为三大工程需求(可靠性、长期运行、自我改进)，形成"智能体控制论"框架，并通过代码生成、计算机使用、自动化研究三个领域进行验证分析。
AI.result: 提出了智能体控制论框架，成功识别了三个应用领域中的失败模式，并给出了具体的工程建议。
AI.conclusion: 智能体控制论为基础智能体的可靠部署提供了亟需的科学基础，开辟了新的研究方向。

title: Learning to Perceive "Where": Spatial Pretext Tasks for Robust Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods primarily learn object-invariant representations but often neglect the spatial structure and relationships among object parts. To address this limitation, we introduce Spatial Prediction (SP), a spatially aware pretext regression task that predicts the relative position and scale between a pair of disentangled local views from the same image. By modeling part-to-part relationships in a continuous geometric space, SP encourages representations to capture fine-grained spatial dependencies beyond invariant categorical semantics, thereby learning the compositional structure of visual scenes. SP is implemented as a decoupled plug-in and can be seamlessly integrated into diverse SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments show consistent improvements across image recognition, fine-grained classification, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation, as well as substantial gains in out-of-distribution robustness for object recognition. To evaluate spatial reasoning, we introduce (1) a position and scale prediction task on image patch pairs and (2) a jigsaw understanding task requiring patch reordering and recognition after reconstruction. Strong performance on these tasks indicates improved spatial structure and geometric awareness. Overall, explicitly modeling spatial information provides an effective inductive bias for SSL, leading to more structured representations and better generalization. Code and models will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Spatial Prediction (SP)，一种空间感知的自监督预文本回归任务，通过预测局部视图间的相对位置和尺度来学习细粒度空间依赖，可无缝集成到现有 SSL 框架，在多项视觉任务上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法主要学习物体不变性表征，但忽略了物体部件的空间结构和关系，限制了模型对视觉场景组成结构的理解能力。
AI.method: 提出 Spatial Prediction（SP）空间感知预文本回归任务，预测同一图像中一对解耦局部视图之间的相对位置和尺度，在连续几何空间中建模部件间关系，作为解耦插件可无缝集成到多种 SSL 框架中。
AI.result: 在图像识别、细粒度分类、语义分割、深度估计等任务上取得一致改进；在物体识别的分布外鲁棒性上获得显著提升；在位置尺度预测任务和拼图理解任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模空间信息为自监督学习提供了有效的归纳偏置，能学到更具结构性的表征并获得更好的泛化能力。

title: MATRA: Modeling the Attack Surface of Agentic AI Systems -- OpenClaw Case Study
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 5th International Workshop on Designing and Measuring Security in Systems with AI (DeMeSSAI 2026), co-located with the 11th IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy (EuroS&P 2026), Lisbon, Portugal, July 10, 2026
summary: LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents with access to tools, databases, and external services, yet practitioners (across different sectors) lack systematic methods to assess how known threat classes translate into concrete risks within a specific agentic deployment. We present MATRA, a pragmatic threat modeling framework for agentic AI systems that adapts established risk assessment methodology to systematically assess how known LLM threats translate into deployment-specific risks. MATRA begins with an asset-based impact assessment and utilizes attack trees to determine the likelihood of these impacts occurring within the system architecture. We demonstrate MATRA on a personal AI agent deployment using OpenClaw, quantifying how architectural controls such as network sandboxing and least-privilege access reduce risk by limiting the blast radius of successful injections.

AI.tldr: 提出了MATRA框架，一个针对自主AI代理系统的威胁建模框架，通过资产影响评估和攻击树分析，将已知LLM威胁转化为特定部署场景下的具体风险，并在个人AI代理部署中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: LLM被广泛部署为自主代理，但从业者缺乏系统方法来评估已知威胁类别如何在特定代理部署中转化为具体风险。
AI.method: 提出MATRA框架，采用资产影响评估和攻击树分析，系统评估LLM威胁在特定部署中的风险，并通过架构控制（如网络沙箱、最小权限访问）量化风险降低效果。
AI.result: 在OpenClaw个人AI代理部署上验证，展示了架构控制（网络沙箱、最小权限访问）如何通过限制成功注入的攻击半径来降低风险。
AI.conclusion: MATRA为自主AI代理系统提供了一种实用的威胁建模方法，能够系统地将已知威胁映射到具体部署风险，并量化安全控制措施的效果。

title: Reasoning Is Not Free: Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing for LLM-as-a-Judge
summary: Reasoning-capable large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted as automated judges, but their benefits and costs in LLM-as-a-Judge settings remain unclear. Through controlled comparisons between reasoning and non-reasoning judges, we show that explicit reasoning substantially improves judgment accuracy on tasks requiring structured verification (e.g., math and coding), while offering limited or even negative gains on simpler evaluations and incurring significantly higher computational cost. These findings motivate that reasoning should be used selectively rather than universally, with awareness of possible distribution shift. We propose a Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing (RACER), which dynamically selects between reasoning and non-reasoning judges under a fixed budget by formulating routing as a constrained distributionally robust optimization problem. RACER explicitly accounts for distribution shift via a KL-divergence uncertainty set, admits an efficient primal--dual algorithm, and enjoys theoretical guarantees including uniqueness of the optimal policy and linear convergence. Extensive experiments show that RACER achieves superior accuracy--cost trade-offs under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RACER框架，通过约束分布鲁棒优化在推理型和非推理型LLM裁判之间动态路由，在固定预算下实现准确性-成本的最佳权衡，并理论证明了策略唯一性和线性收敛性。
AI.motivation: 推理型LLM作为裁判时，虽在结构化验证任务（如数学、编程）上准确率更高，但计算成本显著增加，且在简单任务上收益有限甚至为负。因此需要选择性使用推理，而非通用化应用。
AI.method: 提出RACER（稳健自适应成本高效路由），将路由选择建模为带约束的分布鲁棒优化问题，通过KL散度不确定性集显式建模分布偏移，并设计高效的原-对偶算法求解。
AI.result: 实验表明RACER在分布偏移下实现了优越的准确性-成本权衡，且具有策略唯一性和线性收敛的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 推理型LLM应选择性使用而非通用化，RACER框架能有效在固定预算下动态平衡准确性和成本，尤其适用于存在分布偏移的场景。

title: Towards Generalist Game Players: An Investigation of Foundation Models in the Game Multiverse
summary: The real world unfolds along a single set of physics laws, yet human intelligence demonstrates a remarkable capacity to generalize experiences from this singular physical existence into a multiverse of games, each governed by entirely different rules, aesthetics, physics, and objectives. This omni-reality adaptability is a hallmark of general intelligence. As Artificial Intelligence progresses towards Artificial General Intelligence, the multiverse of games has evolved from mere entertainment into the ultimate ground for training and evaluating AGI. The pursuit of this generality has unfolded across four eras: from environment-specific symbolic and reinforcement learning agents, to current large foundation models acting as generalist players, and toward a future creator stage where agent both creates new game worlds and continually evolves within them. We trace the full lifecycle of a generalist game player along four interdependent pillars: Dataset, Model, Harness, and Benchmark. Every advance across these pillars can be read as an attempt to break one of five fundamental trade-offs that currently bound the whole system. Building on this end-to-end view, we chart a five-level roadmap, progressing from single-game mastery to the ultimate creator stage in which the agent simultaneously creates and evolves within theoretical game multiverse. Taken together, our work offers a unified lens onto a rapidly shifting field,and a principled path toward the omnipotent generalist agent capable of seamlessly mastering any challenge within the multiverse of games, thereby paving the way for AGI.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了游戏作为AGI训练与评估终极场域的发展历程，从专用智能体到通用大模型再到未来创造者阶段，提出了五级路线图，并围绕数据集、模型、工具链和基准四大支柱分析了打破五种根本性权衡的路径。
AI.motivation: 人类能从单一物理世界泛化到规则各异的游戏多元宇宙，这种"全现实适应性"是通用智能的标志。随着AI迈向AGI，游戏多元宇宙成为训练和评估AGI的终极场域，但现有方法缺乏统一视角来审视这一快速演变的领域。
AI.method: 论文从四个相互依赖的支柱（数据集、模型、工具链、基准）出发，追踪通用游戏智能体的完整生命周期；识别出制约整个系统的五种根本性权衡；在此基础上绘制从单游戏精通到终极创造者阶段的五级路线图。
AI.result: 识别出游戏AGI发展的四个时代（专用符号/强化学习智能体→通用大模型玩家→未来创造者阶段），明确五大根本性权衡，提出五级发展路线图，为理解游戏与AGI的关系提供了统一框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过这一端到端的统一视角，为构建能够无缝掌握游戏多元宇宙中任何挑战的全能通用智能体提供了原则性路径，从而为AGI铺平道路。

title: TrajPrism: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Language-Grounded Urban Trajectory Understanding
summary: Urban mobility is naturally expressed both as trajectories in space and as natural-language descriptions of travel intent, constraints, and preferences. However, prior work rarely evaluates these two modalities together on the same real-world trajectories: trajectory modeling often stays geometry-centric, while language-centric mobility benchmarks frequently target route planning and tool use rather than fine-grained, verifiable alignment between text and the underlying route. We introduce TrajPrism, a multi-task benchmark for language-trajectory alignment that unifies (i) instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, (ii) language-driven semantic trajectory retrieval, and (iii) trajectory captioning, together with an evaluation protocol that measures trajectory fidelity, retrieval quality, and language groundedness. We construct TrajPrism by pairing real urban trajectories with judge-filtered language annotations generated under a four-dimensional travel-intent taxonomy. The benchmark contains 300K selected trajectories across Porto, San Francisco, and Beijing, yielding 2.1M task instances from three instruction variants, three retrieval queries, and one caption per trajectory. We further develop proof-of-concept models for each task: TrajAnchor for instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, TrajFuse for semantic trajectory retrieval, and TrajRap for trajectory captioning. These models instantiate the proposed tasks and show that geometry-only trajectory baselines leave a large gap on our protocol, especially where language is part of the input-output interface. We release TrajPrism with code and a reproducible annotation pipeline that is designed to be portable across cities, given compatible trajectory inputs and map resources.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrajPrism，一个统一评估轨迹与语言对齐的多任务基准，包含轨迹生成、语义检索和轨迹描述三项任务，基于30万条真实城市轨迹构建210万任务实例，并提出了三个概念验证模型，揭示了几何轨迹基线在语言-轨迹对齐场景下的显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有工作鲜少在同一真实轨迹上同时评估几何和语言两种模态——轨迹建模偏几何为中心，语言为中心的移动性基准则多聚焦于路径规划和工具使用，缺乏对文本与底层路线之间细粒度、可验证对齐的评估。
AI.method: 构建TrajPrism基准：将真实城市轨迹与经法官筛选的语言标注配对，基于四维出行意图分类生成标注；包含30万条轨迹（波尔图、旧金山、北京），产生210万任务实例（三种指令变体、三种检索查询、每条轨迹一条描述）。提出三个概念验证模型：TrajAnchor（指令条件轨迹生成）、TrajFuse（语义轨迹检索）、TrajRap（轨迹描述生成）。
AI.result: 概念验证模型实例化了所提出的任务，并显示纯几何轨迹基线在协议上存在较大差距，尤其在语言作为输入输出接口的任务中表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: TrajPrism及其可复现的标注流程可跨城市迁移，为轨迹-语言对齐研究提供了标准化评估框架和基准。

title: BabelDOC: Better Layout-Preserving PDF Translation via Intermediate Representation
summary: As global cross-lingual communication intensifies, language barriers in visually rich documents such as PDFs remain a practical bottleneck. Existing document translation pipelines face a tension between linguistic processing and layout preservation: text-oriented Computer-Assisted Translation (CAT) systems often discard structural metadata, while document parsers focus on extraction and do not support faithful re-rendering after translation. We introduce BabelDOC, an Intermediate Representation (IR)-based framework for layout-preserving PDF translation. BabelDOC decouples visual layout metadata from semantic content, enabling document-level translation operations such as terminology extraction, cross-page context handling, glossary-constrained generation, and formula placeholdering. The translated content is then re-anchored to the original layout through an adaptive typesetting engine. Experiments on a curated 200-page benchmark, together with human evaluation and multimodal LLM-as-a-judge evaluation, show that BabelDOC improves layout fidelity, visual aesthetics, and terminology consistency over representative baselines, while maintaining competitive translation precision. The open-source toolkit and its interactive downstream applications are publicly available and have attracted over 8.4K GitHub stars and 17 contributors at the time of writing. A demonstration video is also available.

AI.tldr: BabelDOC是一个基于中间表示（IR）的PDF翻译框架，通过解耦视觉布局与语义内容，实现布局保真的文档级翻译，在200页基准测试中优于现有方法，并已开源获得8.4K+ GitHub星标。
AI.motivation: 现有PDF翻译管道存在语言处理与布局保真之间的张力：文本导向的CAT系统丢弃结构元数据，文档解析器专注于提取但不支持翻译后的忠实重渲染。跨语言视觉丰富文档（如PDF）的翻译缺乏布局保真方案。
AI.method: 提出中间表示（IR）框架BabelDOC，解耦视觉布局元数据与语义内容，支持术语提取、跨页上下文处理、词汇表约束生成和公式占位等文档级翻译操作，再通过自适应排版引擎将翻译内容重新锚定到原始布局。
AI.result: 在200页基准上，布局保真度、视觉美学和术语一致性优于代表性基线；翻译精度保持竞争力；已开源获得8.4K+ GitHub星标和17名贡献者。
AI.conclusion: BabelDOC有效解决了PDF翻译中布局保真与语言处理的矛盾，通过IR框架实现了高质量的文档级翻译与忠实重排版。

title: OZ-TAL: Online Zero-Shot Temporal Action Localization
summary: Online Temporal Action Localization (On-TAL) aims to detect the occurrence time and category of actions in untrimmed streaming videos immediately upon their completion. Recent advancements in this field focus on developing more sophisticated frameworks, shifting from Online Action Detection (OAD)-based aggregation paradigm to instance-level understanding. However, existing approaches are typically trained on specific domains and often exhibit limited generalization capabilities when applied to arbitrary videos, particularly in the presence of previously unseen actions. In this paper, we introduce a new task called Online Zero-shot Temporal Action Localization (OZ-TAL), which aims to detect previously unseen actions in an online fashion. Furthermore, we propose a training-free framework that leverages off-the-shelf Vision-Language Models (VLMs) while introducing additional mechanisms to enhance visual representations and mitigate their inherent biases. We establish new benchmarks and representative baselines for OZ-TAL on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3, and extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches under both offline and online zero-shot settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的在线零样本时序动作定位任务（OZ-TAL），并设计了一个无需训练的框架，利用现成的视觉-语言模型（VLMs）结合增强机制，在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线时序动作定位方法通常针对特定领域训练，泛化能力有限，无法处理未见过的动作类别。作者希望解决这一问题，实现对新动作的在线检测。
AI.method: 提出OZ-TAL新任务；采用无需训练的框架，利用现成视觉-语言模型（VLMs），并引入额外机制来增强视觉表示并缓解VLMs的固有偏差。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3数据集上，该方法在离线和在线零样本设置下均显著优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的OZ-TAL任务和训练-free框架能有效实现零样本在线时序动作定位，具备良好的泛化能力。

title: The Generalized Turing Test: A Foundation for Comparing Intelligence
summary: We introduce the Generalized Turing Test (GTT), a formal framework for comparing the capabilities of arbitrary agents via indistinguishability. For agents A and B, we define the Turing comparator A $\geq$ B to hold if B, acting as a distinguisher, cannot reliably distinguish between interactions with A (instructed to imitate B) and another instance of B. This yields a dataset- and task-agnostic notion of relative intelligence. We study the comparator's structure, including conditions under which it is transitive and therefore induces an ordering over equivalence classes, and we define and analyze variants with querying, bounded interaction, and fixed distinguishers. To complement the theory, we instantiate the framework on a collection of modern models, empirically evaluating pairwise indistinguishability across thousands of trials. The resulting comparisons exhibit a stratified structure consistent with existing rankings, hinting that the proposed framework yields meaningful empirical orderings. Our results position indistinguishability as a unifying lens for reasoning about intelligence, suggesting a foundation for evaluation and, potentially, training objectives that are inherently independent of fixed datasets or benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出广义图灵测试（GTT）框架，通过不可区分性来比较任意智能体的能力，无需特定数据集或任务即可获得相对智能排序。
AI.motivation: 现有智能评估方法依赖固定数据集或基准任务，缺乏通用性。作者希望建立一个数据集无关、任务无关的相对智能比较框架。
AI.method: 定义图灵比较器 A ≥ B，即当B作为区分者无法可靠区分"A模仿B"和另一个B的交互时成立。研究其传递性等结构性质，并定义询问、有限交互、固定区分者等变体。在多个现代模型上通过数千次试验进行经验评估。
AI.result: 经验比较呈现出分层结构，与现有排名一致，表明该框架能产生有意义的经验排序。
AI.conclusion: 不可区分性可作为推理智能的统一视角，为不依赖固定数据集或基准的评估乃至训练目标提供基础。

title: INFANiTE: Implicit Neural representation for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI
summary: Spatio-temporal fetal brain atlases are important for characterizing normative neurodevelopment and identifying congenital anomalies. However, existing atlas construction pipelines necessitate days for slice-to-volume reconstruction (SVR) to generate high-resolution 3D brain volumes and several additional days for iterative volume registration, thereby rendering atlas construction from large-scale cohorts prohibitively impractical. We address these limitations with INFANiTE, an Implicit Neural Representation (INR) framework for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI scans, bypassing both the costly SVR and the iterative non-rigid registration steps entirely, thereby substantially accelerating atlas construction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INFANiTE outperforms existing baselines in subject consistency, reference fidelity, intrinsic quality and biological plausibility, even under challenging sparse-data settings. Additionally, INFANiTE reduces the end-to-end processing time (i.e., from raw scans to the final atlas) from days to hours compared to the traditional 3D volume-based pipeline (e.g., SyGN), facilitating large-scale population-level fetal brain analysis. Our code is publicly available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/INFANiTE-5D74

AI.tldr: INFANiTE是一种基于隐式神经表示(INR)的框架，用于从临床厚层MRI扫描中学习高分辨率胎儿脑时空图谱，绕过昂贵的切片到体积重建(SVR)和迭代非刚性配准步骤，将处理时间从数天缩短到数小时。
AI.motivation: 现有胎儿脑图谱构建流程需要数天时间进行切片到体积重建(SVR)和额外的迭代体积配准，使得大规模队列的图谱构建不切实际。
AI.method: 提出INFANiTE框架，基于隐式神经表示(INR)直接从临床厚层MRI扫描学习高分辨率胎儿脑时空图谱，完全绕过SVR和迭代非刚性配准步骤。
AI.result: 在主体一致性、参考保真度、内在质量和生物合理性方面优于现有基线，尤其在稀疏数据设置下表现突出；端到端处理时间从数天缩短到数小时。
AI.conclusion: INFANiTE框架显著加速了胎儿脑时空图谱的构建，使大规模人群水平的胎儿脑分析成为可能。

title: PathISE: Learning Informative Path Supervision for Knowledge Graph Question Answering
summary: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) aims to answer user questions by reasoning over Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Recent KGQA methods mainly follow the retrieval-augmented generation paradigm to ground Large Language Models~(LLMs) with structured knowledge from KGs. However, training effective models to retrieve question-relevant evidence from KGs typically requires high-quality intermediate supervision signals, such as question-relevant paths or subgraphs, which are time- and resource-intensive to obtain. We propose PathISE, a novel framework for learning high-quality intermediate supervision from answer-level labels. PathISE introduces a lightweight transformer-based estimator that estimates the informativeness of relation paths to construct pseudo path-level supervision. This supervision is then distilled into an LLM path generator, whose generated paths are grounded in the KG to provide compact evidence for inductive answer reasoning. ExtensiveISE experiments on three KGQA benchmarks show that PathISE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art KGQA performance, and provides reusable supervision signals that can enhance existing KGQA models, without relying on costly LLM-refined supervision signals. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PathISE-2F87.

AI.tldr: PathISE框架通过从答案标签中学习高质量中间监督信号（伪路径监督），无需昂贵的人工标注，即可训练LLM生成KG中的紧凑证据路径，实现高效的知识图谱问答。
AI.motivation: 现有KGQA方法依赖高质量中间监督信号（如相关路径或子图）来训练检索模型，但这些信号获取成本高昂。本文旨在从易获取的答案级标签中自动学习高质量的中间监督信号，降低对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 提出PathISE框架，包含两个阶段：(1) 使用轻量级Transformer-based估计器从答案标签中学习估计关系路径的信息量，构建伪路径级监督；(2) 将伪监督蒸馏到LLM路径生成器中，使其生成的路径可在KG中检索作为紧凑证据，用于诱导式答案推理。
AI.result: 在三个KGQA基准数据集上，PathISE达到与SOTA竞争或更优的性能；生成的监督信号可复用于增强现有KGQA模型，且无需依赖昂贵的LLM精炼监督。
AI.conclusion: PathISE验证了从答案标签自动学习路径级监督的可行性，为KGQA提供了一种低成本、高可复用性的中间监督信号生成方案，有效降低了对人工标注的依赖。

title: ERASE: Eliminating Redundant Visual Tokens via Adaptive Two-Stage Token Pruning
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable large language models (LLMs) to process high-resolution images, significantly improving real-world multimodal understanding. However, this capability introduces a large number of vision tokens, resulting in substantial computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, various vision token pruning methods have been proposed. Nevertheless, existing approaches predominantly rely on learned semantic features within the model to capture visual redundancy. Moreover, they lack adaptive mechanisms to adjust pruning strategies according to the complexity of the input image. In this paper, we propose ERASE, a two-stage vision token pruning framework that identifies and retains salient tokens through pruning strategies adaptive to image complexity. Experiment results demonstrate that ERASE significantly reduces vision tokens while preserving accuracy. For Qwen2.5-VL-7B, at a token pruning ratio of 85\%, ERASE retains 89.46% of the original model accuracy, whereas the best prior method retains only 78.1%. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tuna-Luna/ERASE.

AI.tldr: 提出ERASE框架，通过自适应图像复杂度的两阶段视觉令牌剪枝，在85%剪枝率下保留89.46%的原始精度（最佳先前方法仅78.1%）。
AI.motivation: VLM处理高分辨率图像产生大量视觉令牌导致计算开销巨大，现有剪枝方法依赖语义特征缺乏自适应机制。
AI.method: 提出ERASE两阶段剪枝框架，根据输入图像复杂度自适应调整剪枝策略，识别并保留显著视觉令牌。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B上，85%令牌剪枝率下保留89.46%原始精度，远超最佳先前方法（78.1%）。
AI.conclusion: ERASE有效减少视觉令牌数量同时保持高精度，证明了自适应剪枝策略的优越性。

title: Interpretable Machine Learning for Football Performance Analysis: Evidence of Limited Transferability from Elite Leagues to University Competition
summary: Machine learning has become increasingly prevalent in football performance analysis, yet most studies prioritize predictive accuracy while implicitly assuming that learned performance determinants and their interpretations are transferable across competition levels. Whether interpretability remains reliable under domain shift-from elite to university football remains largely unexplored. This study investigates whether performance determinants learned from elite competitions are structurally transferable to university-level football and whether their interpretations remain robust under domain shift. Models were trained on large-scale event data from the top five European leagues and applied to university football data from National Tsing Hua University (NTHU) using an identical feature space. Random Forest and Multilayer Perceptron models were interpreted using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Counterfactual Impact Score (CIS). Across five experiments, elite football exhibited a stable and consistent hierarchy of performance determinants across leagues, models, and explanation methods. In contrast, NTHU university football showed substantial reordering of key indicators, reduced explanation stability, weaker structural agreement with elite domains, and increased sensitivity to explanation method. These findings suggest that interpretability robustness is domain-dependent. Rather than reflecting methodological limitations alone, instability in explanations under domain shift may serve as a diagnostic signal of structural ambiguity in the target domain.

AI.tldr: 本研究探討從菁英足球（歐洲五大聯賽）學習到的表現決定因素與解釋方法，是否能直接遷移至大學足球（清華大學）。結果發現，菁英足球的解釋結構穩定且一致，但大學足球在特徵重要性排序、解釋穩定性及領域一致性上顯著下降，顯示可解釋性的穩健性具有領域依賴性。
AI.motivation: 大多數機器學習研究在運動表現分析中只追求預測準確率，卻假設學到的決定因素與解釋可以跨層級遷移。然而，從菁英至大學足球的領域轉移下，解釋是否依然可靠，目前尚無研究探討。
AI.method: 使用歐洲五大聯賽大量事件數據訓練隨機森林與多層感知器模型，並以相同特徵空間應用於清華大學足球數據。採用SHAP與CIS兩種解釋方法進行可解釋性分析。
