AI.result: 菁英足球在不同聯賽、模型與解釋方法下展現穩定的表現決定因素層級結構；大學足球則出現關鍵指標重新排序、解釋穩定性下降、與菁英領域結構一致性減弱，以及對解釋方法敏感度增加。
AI.conclusion: 可解釋性的穩健性具有領域依賴性。領域轉移下的解釋不穩定性不僅是方法限制，更可能作為目標領域結構模糊性的診斷信號。

title: Geometric 4D Stitching for Grounded 4D Generation
summary: Recent 4D generation methods complete scene-level missing information using generative models and reconstruct the scene into radiance-based representations. However, these pipelines often present geometric inconsistencies in the generated content, and the radiance-based reconstruction requires expensive optimization. Furthermore, radiance-based representations often absorb these geometric inconsistencies into their view-dependent nature, failing to enforce the grounded geometric consistency. To address these issues, we propose Geometric 4D Stitching, an efficient framework that explicitly identifies missing geometric regions and complements them with geometrically grounded 4D stitches. As a result, our method constructs 4D scene representations in under 10 minutes on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU per one-step scene expansion, while improving geometric consistency. Moreover, we demonstrate that our explicit 4D stitching supports interative expansion of 4D mesh as well as 4D scene editing.

AI.tldr: 提出了Geometric 4D Stitching框架，通过显式识别缺失几何区域并用几何一致的4D补丁进行补全，在10分钟内构建4D场景表示，同时提升几何一致性，支持4D网格迭代扩展和场景编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有4D生成方法存在几何不一致问题，且基于辐射场的重建需要大量优化，辐射表示会将几何不一致吸收进视角依赖性中，无法强制执行几何一致性。
AI.method: 提出Geometric 4D Stitching框架，显式识别缺失的几何区域，并用几何上可靠的4D补丁（stitches）进行补全。
AI.result: 在单张NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU上，每次场景扩展可在10分钟内完成4D场景表示构建，同时提升了几何一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅高效构建4D场景，还支持4D网格的迭代扩展和4D场景编辑，具有更好的实用性和几何可靠性。

title: New AI-Driven Tools for Enhancing Campus Well-being: A Prevention and Intervention Approach
comment: PhD Dissertation, University of Missouri, May 2026
summary: Campus well-being underpins academic success, yet many universities lack effective methods for monitoring satisfaction and detecting mental health risks. This dissertation addresses these gaps through prevention (improving feedback collection) and intervention (advancing mental health detection), unified under an integrated framework. For prevention, we developed TigerGPT, a personalized survey chatbot leveraging LLMs to engage users in context-aware conversations grounded in conversational design and engagement theory, achieving 75% usability and 81% satisfaction. To address its limitations in repetitiveness and response depth, we introduced AURA, a reinforcement-learning framework that adapts follow-up question types (validate, specify, reflect, probe) within a session using an LSDE quality signal (Length, Self-disclosure, Emotion, Specificity), initialized from 96 prior conversations. AURA achieved +0.12 mean quality gain (p=0.044, d=0.66), with 63% fewer specification prompts and 10x more validation behavior. For intervention, we examine Expressive Narrative Stories (ENS) for mental health screening, showing BERT(128) captures nuanced linguistic features without keyword cues, while conventional classifiers depend heavily on explicit mental health terms. We then developed PsychoGPT, an LLM built on DSM-5 and PHQ-8 guidelines that performs initial distress classification, symptom-level scoring, and reconciliation with external ratings for explainable assessment. To reduce hallucinations, we proposed Stacked Multi-Model Reasoning (SMMR), layering expert models where early layers handle localized subtasks and later layers reconcile findings, outperforming single-model solutions on DAIC-WOZ in accuracy, F1, and PHQ-8 scoring. Finally, a cohesive framework unifies these tools, enabling adaptive survey insights to flow directly into specialized mental health detection models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套校园心理健康综合框架，包含两个预防工具（TigerGPT聊天机器人、AURA强化学习对话系统）和两个干预工具（ENS文本分析、PsychoGPT诊断模型及SMMR推理方法），实现了从满意度调查到心理风险检测的闭环。
AI.motivation: 高校缺乏有效的满意度监测和心理健康风险检测方法，现有反馈收集方式效果不佳，心理健康筛查工具存在依赖关键词、幻觉等问题。
AI.method: 预防侧：TigerGPT（基于LLM的个性化调查聊天机器人）+ AURA（强化学习框架，通过LSDE质量信号动态调整追问类型）；干预侧：ENS（BERT(128)进行心理叙事分析）+ PsychoGPT（基于DSM-5/PHQ-8的LLM诊断模型）+ SMMR（分层专家模型堆叠推理减少幻觉）。
AI.result: TigerGPT达75%可用性、81%满意度；AURA实现+0.12平均质量增益（p=0.044, d=0.66），追问减少63%；SMMR在DAIC-WOZ数据集上准确率、F1和PHQ-8评分均优于单模型方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一框架将预防性调查与干预性检测串联，实现了校园心理健康的端到端管理，验证了LLM在该领域的可行性与优势。

title: Omni-Persona: Systematic Benchmarking and Improving Omnimodal Personalization
summary: While multimodal large language models have advanced across text, image, and audio, personalization research has remained primarily vision-language, with unified omnimodal benchmarking that jointly covers text, image, and audio still limited, and lacking the methodological rigor to account for absent-persona scenarios or systematic grounding studies. We introduce Omni-Persona, the first comprehensive benchmark for omnimodal personalization. We formalize the task as cross-modal routing over the \emph{Persona Modality Graph}, encompassing 4 task groups and 18 fine-grained tasks across ${\sim}750$ items. To rigorously diagnose grounding behavior, we propose \emph{Calibrated Accuracy ($\mathrm{Cal}$)}, which jointly rewards correct grounding and appropriate abstention, incorporating absent-persona queries within a unified evaluation framework. On our dedicated experiments, three diagnostic findings emerge: (i) open-source models show a consistent audio-vs-visual grounding gap that RLVR partially narrows via dense rule-based supervision; (ii) answerable recall and parameter scale are incomplete diagnostics, since strong recall can coexist with absent-persona hallucination and larger models do not always achieve higher $\mathrm{Cal}$, exposing calibration as a separate evaluation axis; and (iii) SFT is bounded by the difficulty of constructing annotated ground-truth supervision at scale, while RLVR generalizes more consistently through outcome-level verifiable feedback yet drifts toward conservative behavior and lower generation quality under our reward design. Omni-Persona thus serves as a diagnostic framework that surfaces the pitfalls of omnimodal personalization, guiding future post-training and reward design.

AI.tldr: 提出Omni-Persona，首个全模态个性化基准，形式化为跨模态路由与Persona Modality Graph，提出校准精度Cal以统一评估含缺失角色场景的个性化表现，揭示开源模型音频-视觉差异、召回率/规模不足以诊断、SFT受限而RLVR虽泛化更好但趋向保守等发现。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在文本、图像、音频上虽有进展，但个性化研究仍主要停留在视觉-语言层面，缺乏统一的、覆盖文本/图像/音频的全模态基准，且未能严谨处理缺失角色场景或进行系统化归因研究。
AI.method: 构建Omni-Persona基准，涵盖4个任务组和18个细粒度任务（约750项）；提出Persona Modality Graph进行跨模态路由形式化；设计Calibrated Accuracy (Cal)指标，在正确归因与适当弃权之间联合奖励，纳入缺失角色查询的统一评估框架。
AI.result: (i) 开源模型存在音频vs视觉的归因差距，RLVR通过密集规则监督可部分弥补；(ii) 可回答召回率和参数规模不能完全诊断模型表现，强召回可能与缺失角色幻觉共存，大模型并不总获得更高Cal；(iii) SFT受限于大规模标注真实监督的构建难度，RLVR通过结果级可验证反馈泛化更一致，但当前奖励设计下趋于保守行为且生成质量下降。
AI.conclusion: Omni-Persona作为诊断框架，揭示了全模态个性化的潜在陷阱，为未来后训练和奖励设计提供指导方向。

title: Med-StepBench: A Hierarchical Reasoning Framework for Evaluating Hallucinations in Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong performance in medical image understanding, but frequently generate clinically plausible yet incorrect statements, raising significant safety concerns. Existing medical hallucination benchmarks primarily focus on 2D imaging with one-shot diagnostic questions, offering limited insight into whether predictions are grounded in correct localization and abnormality identification, allowing critical reasoning errors to remain hidden behind seemingly correct diagnoses. We introduce Med-StepBench, the first large-scale benchmark for step-wise hallucination detection in 3D oncological PET/CT, comprising over 12,000 images and more than 1,000,000 image-statement pairs across volumetric and multi-view 2D data, which decomposes clinical reasoning into four expert-designed diagnostic stages. Using clinician-verified annotations, we perform the first step-level evaluation of general-purpose and medical VLMs, revealing systematic failure modes obscured by aggregate accuracy metrics. Furthermore, we show that current VLMs are highly susceptible to adversarial yet clinically plausible intermediate explanations, which significantly amplify hallucinations despite contradictory visual evidence. Together, our findings highlight fundamental limitations in grounding multi-step clinical reasoning and establish Med-StepBench as a rigorous benchmark for developing safer and more reliable medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: Med-StepBench是首个面向3D肿瘤PET/CT的逐步幻觉检测大规模基准，包含12,000+图像和1,000,000+图像-语句对，将临床推理分解为四个专家设计的诊断阶段。研究发现当前VLMs在逐步推理中存在系统性失败模式，且易受对抗性中间解释影响而放大幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗幻觉基准主要关注2D成像和一次性诊断问题，无法检测预测是否基于正确的定位和异常识别，导致看似正确的诊断背后隐藏关键推理错误。需要更细粒度的逐步推理评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含12,000+图像和1,000,000+图像-语句对的大规模基准Med-StepBench，涵盖体积和多视图2D数据；将临床推理分解为四个专家设计的诊断阶段；使用临床医生验证的标注进行逐步评估。
AI.result: 揭示了通用和医疗VLMs在逐步评估中的系统性失败模式，这些模式被聚合准确性指标所掩盖；当前VLMs极易受到看似合理但实际具有对抗性的中间解释的影响，即使存在矛盾的视觉证据，也会显著放大幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现突显了当前VLMs在多步骤临床推理接地方面的根本局限性；Med-StepBench可作为开发更安全、更可靠的医疗VLMs的严格基准。

title: NanoResearch: Co-Evolving Skills, Memory, and Policy for Personalized Research Automation
summary: LLM-powered multi-agent systems can now automate the full research pipeline from ideation to paper writing, but a fundamental question remains: automation for whom? Researchers operate under different resource configurations, hold different methodological preferences, and target different output formats. A system that produces uniform outputs regardless of these differences will systematically under-serve every individual user, making personalization a precondition for research automation to be genuinely usable. However, achieving it requires three capabilities that current systems lack: accumulating reusable procedural knowledge across projects, retaining user-specific experience across sessions, and internalizing implicit preferences that resist explicit formalization. We propose NanoResearch, a multi-agent framework that addresses these gaps through tri-level co-evolution. A skill bank distills recurring operations into compact procedural rules reusable across projects. A memory module maintains user- and project-specific experience that grounds planning decisions in each user's research history. A label-free policy learning converts free-form feedback into persistent parameter updates of the planner, reshaping subsequent coordination. These three layers co-evolve: reliable skills produce richer memory, richer memory informs better planning, and preference internalization continuously realigns the loop to each user. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NanoResearch delivers substantial gains over state-of-the-art AI research systems, and progressively refines itself to produce better research at lower cost over successive cycles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NanoResearch，一个通过三层次协同进化实现个性化研究自动化的多智能体框架，包括技能库、记忆模块和无标签策略学习，能够在多轮迭代中持续提升研究质量并降低成本。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的多智能体研究自动化系统缺乏个性化能力，无法适应不同研究者的资源配置、方法论偏好和输出格式差异，导致系统产出千篇一律，无法真正服务个体用户。
AI.method: 提出NanoResearch框架，包含三个协同进化的层次：1）技能库（skill bank）将重复操作蒸馏为可复用的过程性规则；2）记忆模块维护用户和项目特定经验；3）无标签策略学习将自由形式反馈转化为规划器的持续参数更新。
AI.result: 实验表明NanoResearch显著优于最先进的AI研究系统，并在多轮迭代中持续自我优化，以更低成本产出更好的研究成果。
AI.conclusion: 个性化是研究自动化真正可用的先决条件，NanoResearch通过三层次协同进化有效解决了现有系统缺乏个性化能力的核心瓶颈。

title: Hystar: Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval via Dynamic SVD Modulation
summary: Query-based image retrieval (QBIR) requires retrieving relevant images given diverse and often stylistically heterogeneous queries, such as sketches, artworks, or low-resolution previews. While large-scale vision--language representation models (VLRMs) like CLIP offer strong zero-shot retrieval performance, they struggle with distribution shifts caused by unseen query styles. In this paper, we propose the Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval (Hystar), a lightweight framework that dynamically adapts model weights to each query's style. Hystar employs a hypernetwork to generate singular-value perturbations ($ΔS$) for attention layers, enabling flexible per-input adaptation, while static singular-value offsets on MLP layers ensure cross-style stability. To better handle semantic confusions across styles, we design StyleNCE as part of Hystar, an optimal-transport-weighted contrastive loss that emphasizes hard cross-style negatives. Extensive experiments on multi-style retrieval and cross-style classification benchmarks demonstrate that Hystar consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance while being parameter-efficient and stable across styles.

AI.tldr: Hystar通过轻量级超网络动态调整查询适配权重，结合StyleNCE对比损失，在多风格图像检索中取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLRM（如CLIP）在处理未见查询风格（如草图、艺术作品、低分辨率预览）时存在分布偏移问题，检索性能下降。
AI.method: 提出Hystar框架：1）超网络生成注意力层的奇异值扰动(ΔS)实现动态适配；2）MLP层使用静态奇异值偏移保持跨风格稳定性；3）设计StyleNCE最优传输加权对比损失，强调难跨风格负样本。
AI.result: 在多风格检索和跨风格分类基准上，Hystar一致超越强基线方法，达到SOTA性能，同时保持参数高效和跨风格稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了查询风格分布偏移问题，兼顾了动态适应性与跨风格鲁棒性。

title: Probing Cross-modal Information Hubs in Audio-Visual LLMs
summary: Audio-visual large language models (AVLLMs) have recently emerged as a powerful architecture capable of jointly reasoning over audio, visual, and textual modalities. In AVLLMs, the bidirectional interaction between audio and video modalities introduces intricate processing dynamics, necessitating a deeper understanding of their internal mechanisms. However, unlike extensively studied text-only or large vision language models, the internal workings of AVLLMs remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we focus on cross-modal information flow between audio and visual modalities in AVLLMs, investigating where information derived from one modality is encoded within the token representations of the other modality. Through an analysis of multiple recent AVLLMs, we uncover two common findings. First, AVLLMs primarily encode integrated audio-visual information in sink tokens. Second, sink tokens do not uniformly hold cross-modal information. Instead, a distinct subset of sink tokens, which we term cross-modal sink tokens, specializes in storing such information. Based on these findings, we further propose a simple training-free hallucination mitigation method by encouraging reliance on integrated cross-modal information within cross-modal sink tokens. Our code is available at https://github.com/kaistmm/crossmodal-hub.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了音视频大语言模型（AVLLMs）中跨模态信息流动机制，发现模型主要通过“下沉令牌”（sink tokens）中的“跨模态下沉令牌”子集来编码音视频融合信息，并据此提出了一种无需训练的幻觉缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 音视频大语言模型（AVLLMs）虽已展现出强大的多模态联合推理能力，但其内部跨模态信息处理机制尚不明确，且缺乏像纯文本或视觉语言模型那样的深入理解。
AI.method: 通过分析多个近期AVLLMs，聚焦于音频与视觉模态间的跨模态信息流，研究一个模态的信息如何编码在另一模态的令牌表示中，并基于发现提出无需训练的幻觉缓解方法。
AI.result: 发现两个共性现象：1）AVLLMs主要在下沉令牌中编码融合的视听信息；2）并非所有下沉令牌都持有跨模态信息，存在专门的“跨模态下沉令牌”子集承担此功能。
AI.conclusion: 基于跨模态下沉令牌的发现，提出了一种简单且无需训练的幻觉缓解方法，通过鼓励模型依赖这些令牌中的融合跨模态信息来减少幻觉。

title: MUSDA: Multi-source Multi-modality Unsupervised Domain Adaptive 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
summary: With the advancement of autonomous driving, numerous annotated multi-modality datasets have become available. This presents an opportunity to develop domain-adaptive 3D object detectors for new environments without relying on labor-intensive manual annotations. However, traditional domain adaptation methods typically focus on a single source domain or a single modality, limiting their effectiveness in multi-source, multi-modality scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for multi-source, multi-modality unsupervised domain adaptation in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. Given multiple labeled source domains and one unlabeled target domain, our framework first introduces hierarchical spatially-conditioned (HSC) domain classifiers, which jointly align features from both camera and LiDAR modalities at two distinct levels for each source-target domain pair. To effectively leverage information from multiple source domains, we construct a prototype graph between each pair of domains. Based on this, we develop a prototype graph weighted (PGW) multi-source fusion strategy to aggregate predictions from multiple source detection heads. Experimental results on three widely used 3D object detection datasets - Waymo, nuScenes, and Lyft - demonstrate that our proposed framework effectively integrates information across both modalities and source domains, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多源、多模态无监督域自适应3D目标检测框架，通过层次化空间条件域分类器对齐跨模态特征，并利用原型图加权融合策略聚合多源预测，在多个自动驾驶数据集上取得了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有域自适应方法通常局限于单一源域或单一模态，难以有效利用多源、多模态数据中的丰富信息，因此需要一种能同时处理多源域和多模态输入的域自适应框架。
AI.method: 提出层次化空间条件 (HSC) 域分类器，在相机和LiDAR两个模态上分两个层级对齐每个源-目标域对的特征；构建原型图 (prototype graph) 连接各域对，并设计原型图加权 (PGW) 多源融合策略来聚合多个源检测头的预测结果。
AI.result: 在Waymo、nuScenes和Lyft三个数据集上的实验表明，所提框架有效整合了跨模态和跨源域信息，一致优于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作验证了多源、多模态域自适应在3D目标检测中的可行性，为无需人工标注的新环境部署提供了有效途径。

title: CLEF: EEG Foundation Model for Learning Clinical Semantics
summary: Clinical EEG interpretation requires reasoning over full EEG sessions and integrating signal patterns with clinical context. Existing EEG foundation models are largely designed for short-window decoding and do not incorporate clinical context. We introduce CLEF, a clinically grounded long-context EEG foundation model. CLEF represents EEG sessions as 3D multitaper spectrogram tokens, enabling tractable Transformer modeling at session scale, and aligns embeddings with neurologist reports and structured EHR data through contrastive objectives. We evaluate CLEF on a new 234-task benchmark spanning disease phenotypes, medication exposures, and EEG findings, with more than 260k EEG sessions from over 108k patients. CLEF outperforms prior EEG foundation models on 229 of 234 tasks, improving mean AUROC from 0.65 to 0.74. Reconstruction-only pretraining surpasses prior EEG foundation models, while report and EHR alignment yields further gains. Held-out concept and external-cohort experiments suggest that these representations transfer beyond observed alignment targets. These results support session-scale, clinically grounded representation learning as a promising foundation-model paradigm for clinical EEG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLEF，一种基于临床上下文的长序列脑电图（EEG）基础模型。通过3D多锥度频谱图标记表示EEG会话，并结合神经科医生报告和结构化电子病历数据进行对比学习对齐。在包含234个任务、超过26万次EEG会话的基准测试中，CLEF在229个任务上优于以往模型，平均AUROC从0.65提升至0.74。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型主要面向短窗口解码，无法处理完整EEG会话中的长时间序列推理，且未融入临床上下文信息（如医生报告、电子病历数据），限制了其在真实临床场景中的应用效果。
AI.method: (1) 将EEG会话表示为3D多锥度频谱图标记，实现会话尺度的Transformer建模；(2) 通过对比学习目标，将EEG嵌入与神经科医生报告及结构化电子病历数据进行对齐。
AI.result: 在包含234个任务、超过26万次EEG会话（覆盖10.8万+患者）的基准上，CLEF在229/234任务中超越此前模型，平均AUROC从0.65提升至0.74。仅重构预训练已超越此前EEG基础模型，报告与电子病历对齐进一步带来性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 会话级别的、基于临床上下文的表示学习是临床EEG基础模型的有效范式，学到的表征可迁移至未直接对齐的目标任务和外部队列。

title: Slum Detection and Density Mapping with AlphaEarth Foundations: A Representation Learning Evaluation Across 12 Global Cities
summary: Pixel-level slum mapping has long been constrained by limited cross-city generalisation, the absence of continuous density estimation, and weak global comparability. AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF), a globally consistent 64-dimensional annual surface embedding at 10 m, offers a new analysis-ready basis for lightweight slum monitoring, but its applicability to slum detection - an indirectly coupled task shaped by both built form and socio-economic processes - remains untested. We evaluate AEF on slum classification and sub-pixel density estimation across 12 cities and 69 city-year pairs (2017-2024), using GRAM pseudo-masks as supervisory labels. The evaluation spans four training strategies, two protocols (random split and 3x3 spatial block cross-validation), six auxiliary feature configurations, and five baseline models, complemented by representation-level analyses (PCA, SHAP) and full-AOI mapping. Five findings emerge. (1) Same-city cross-year training is optimal under both protocols (median spatial F1 = 0.616, R^2 = 0.466); temporal expansion outperforms cross-city transfer, indicating city-scale representational drift. (2) Regression R^2 is driven primarily by zero/non-zero boundary discrimination: positive-pixel R^2 is consistently negative across all cities, revealing limited capacity to model intra-pixel density gradients at 10 m. (3) PC36 is consistently top-ranked across tasks; classification saturates at k = 32 while regression remains unsaturated at k = 64. (4) POI features yield the largest density gain (Delta R^2 = +0.064). (5) For six cities meeting dual-task usability thresholds, full-AOI inference across 2017-2024 preserves slum cluster structure (mean SSIM = 0.926). The study delineates the capabilities and complementarity needs of foundation-model embeddings for slum monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF) 基础模型嵌入在12个城市、69个城市-年对（2017-2024）中的贫民窟分类和亚像元密度估计性能。研究发现：同城市跨年份训练最优（中位空间F1=0.616, R²=0.466）；回归任务主要依赖零/非零边界判别，正像元内密度梯度建模能力有限；PC36在两类任务中均排名最高；POI特征带来最大密度增益（ΔR²=+0.064）；6个城市的全AOI推断可保留贫民窟集群结构（平均SSIM=0.926）。研究勾勒了基础模型嵌入在贫民窟监测中的能力与互补需求。
AI.motivation: 像元级贫民窟制图长期受限于跨城市泛化能力差、缺乏连续密度估计以及全球可比性弱。AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF) 提供的全球一致64维年度地表嵌入（10m分辨率）为轻量级贫民窟监测提供了新基础，但其在贫民窟检测——这一由建筑形态和社会经济过程共同塑造的间接耦合任务——中的适用性尚待验证。
AI.method: 在12个城市、69个城市-年对（2017-2024）上，使用GRAM伪掩膜作为监督标签，评估AEF的贫民窟分类和亚像元密度估计性能。涵盖四种训练策略、两种协议（随机分割和3x3空间块交叉验证）、六种辅助特征配置和五种基线模型，辅以表征级分析（PCA、SHAP）和全AOI制图。
AI.result: (1) 同城市跨年份训练最优；(2) 回归R²主要由零/非零边界判别驱动，正像元R²在所有城市均为负值；(3) PC36在两类任务中均排名最高，分类在k=32饱和，回归在k=64仍未饱和；(4) POI特征带来最大密度增益；(5) 6个城市全AOI推断保持贫民窟集群结构（平均SSIM=0.926）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究系统界定了基础模型嵌入在贫民窟监测中的能力边界与互补需求。AEF嵌入在跨城市泛化、连续密度梯度建模方面存在局限，需结合POI等辅助特征和更精细的表征维度来提升性能。

title: MaD Physics: Evaluating information seeking under constraints in physical environments
summary: Scientific discovery is fundamentally a resource-constrained process that requires navigating complex trade-offs between the quality and quantity of measurements due to physical and cost constraints. Measurements drive the scientific process by revealing novel phenomena to improve our understanding. Existing benchmarks for evaluating agents for scientific discovery focus on either static knowledge-based reasoning or unconstrained experimental design tasks, and do not capture the ability to make measurements and plan under constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose Measuring and Discovering Physics (MaD Physics), a benchmark to evaluate the ability of agents to make informative measurements and conclusions subject to constraints on the quality and quantity of measurements. The benchmark consists of three environments, each based on a distinct physical law. To mitigate contamination from existing knowledge, MaD Physics includes altered physical laws. In each trial, the agent makes measurements of the system until it exhausts an allotted budget and then the agent has to infer the underlying physical law to make predictions about the state of the system in the future. MaD Physics evaluates two fundamental capabilities of scientific agents: inferring models from data and planning under constraints. We also demonstrate how MaD Physics can be used to evaluate other capabilities such as multimodality and in-context learning. We benchmark agents on MaD Physics using four Gemini models (2.5 Flash Lite, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Pro, and 3 Flash), identifying shortcomings in their structured exploration and data collection capabilities and highlighting directions to improve their scientific reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出了MaD Physics基准，用于评估智能体在物理科学发现中受限于测量质量和数量时的推理与规划能力，测试发现现有模型在结构化探索方面存在不足。
AI.motivation: 现有科学发现基准要么只关注静态知识推理，要么关注无约束的实验设计，无法评估智能体在资源约束下进行测量和规划的能力。
AI.method: 设计了三个基于不同物理定律的环境（含修改版以避免知识污染），智能体在预算限制下进行测量，然后推断物理定律并预测系统状态。
AI.result: 用四个Gemini模型（2.5 Flash Lite, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Pro, 3 Flash）进行基准测试，发现模型在结构化探索和数据收集方面存在缺陷。
AI.conclusion: MaD Physics能有效评估科学智能体的模型推断和约束下规划能力，并揭示了当前模型在科学推理方面的改进方向。

title: Only Train Once: Uncertainty-Aware One-Class Learning for Face Authenticity Detection
summary:
The rapid evolution of generative paradigms has enabled the creation of highly realistic imagery, which escalating the risks of identity fraud and the dissemination of disinformation. Most existing approaches frame face forgery detection as a fully supervised binary classification problem. Consequently, these models typically exhibit significant performance decay when tasked with detecting forgeries from previously unseen generative paradigms. Furthermore, these methods focus exclusively on either DeepFakes or fully synthesized faces, thereby failing to provide a generalized framework for universal face forgery detection. In this paper, we address this challenge by introducing FADNet (Face Authenticity Detector Net),
  % a self-supervised framework that
  which reformulates face forgery detection as a one-class classification (OCC) task. By training exclusively on authentic facial data to capture their intrinsic representations, FADNet flags any image whose feature embedding deviates significantly from the learned distribution of real faces as a forgery. The framework incorporates Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) to quantify predictive uncertainty and utilizes a plug-and-play pseudo-forgery image generator (PFIG) to tighten decision boundaries around authentic data. Extensive experimental evaluations on the DF40 and ASFD benchmarks demonstrate that FADNet achieves superior performance and generalization capabilities. Specifically, FADNet substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, yielding a remarkable average accuracy of 96.63\% and an average precision of 98.83\%.

AI.tldr: 提出了FADNet，一个基于单类分类的自监督人脸伪造检测框架，仅使用真实人脸数据训练，结合证据深度学习和伪伪造生成器，在DF40和ASFD基准上达到96.63%准确率和98.83%精确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸伪造检测方法多为全监督二分类，在面对未见过的生成范式时性能下降严重，且无法同时检测DeepFakes和完全合成人脸，缺乏统一的通用检测框架。
AI.method: 将人脸伪造检测重新定义为单类分类任务，仅用真实人脸数据训练以学习其内在表示；引入证据深度学习量化预测不确定性；设计即插即用的伪伪造图像生成器来收紧真实数据的决策边界。
AI.result: 在DF40和ASFD基准上达到96.63%平均准确率和98.83%平均精确率，显著优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: FADNet通过单类分类范式有效解决了跨生成范式的泛化问题，为通用人脸伪造检测提供了统一框架。

title: The First Drop of Ink: Nonlinear Impact of Misleading Information in Long-Context Reasoning
summary: As large language models are increasingly deployed in retrieval-augmented generation and agentic systems that accumulate extensive context, understanding how distracting information affects long-context performance becomes critical. Prior work shows that semantically relevant yet misleading documents degrade performance, but the quantitative relationship between the proportion of distractors and performance remains unstudied. In this work, we systematically vary the hard-distractor proportion in fixed-length contexts, revealing a striking nonlinear pattern: as the proportion of hard distractors increases, performance drops sharply within the first small fraction, while the remainder of the range yields only marginal additional decline. We term this ''The First Drop of Ink'' effect, analogous to how a single drop of ink contaminates water. Our theoretical and empirical analyses grounded in attention mechanics show that hard distractors capture disproportionate attention even at small proportions, with diminishing marginal impact as their proportion grows. Controlled experiments further show that filtering gains mainly come from context-length reduction rather than distractor removal; substantial recovery requires reducing the hard-distractor proportion to near zero, highlighting the importance of upstream retrieval precision.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了长上下文中的“第一滴墨水”效应：硬干扰文段的比例即使很小（如第一小部分），也会导致模型性能急剧下降，后续增加干扰反而边际影响递减。理论和实验表明，注意力机制使少量干扰过度捕获注意力，且性能恢复需要将干扰比例降至接近零。
AI.motivation: 已有工作表明语义相关但具有误导性的文档会损害大语言模型在长上下文中的表现，但干扰文段的比例与性能之间的定量关系尚未被研究。
AI.method: 在固定长度上下文中系统改变硬干扰文段的比例，通过理论分析（基于注意力机制）和实证实验观察性能变化模式，并进行控制实验分离上下文长度缩减与干扰移除的影响。
AI.result: 发现非线性模式：干扰比例在最初的小范围内导致性能急剧下降，之后继续增加干扰只带来微小的额外下降。注意力机制分析表明硬干扰在低比例时已过度捕获注意力，且边际影响递减。控制实验表明过滤收益主要来自长度缩减而非干扰移除，大幅恢复需要将干扰比例降至接近零。
AI.conclusion: 长上下文性能对硬干扰高度敏感，强调提高上游检索精度的重要性，而非依赖下游过滤。

title: ExtraVAR: Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping for Resolution Extrapolation in Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have emerged as a strong alternative to diffusion for image synthesis, yet their fixed training resolution prevents direct generation at higher resolutions. Naively transferring training-free extrapolation methods from LLMs or diffusion models to VAR yields three characteristic failure modes: global repetition, local repetition, and detail degradation. We trace them to a unified band-stage mismatch: VAR generates images in a coarse-to-fine, scale-wise process where each stage is driven by a distinct dominant RoPE frequency band, and each failure mode emerges when the dominant band of a particular stage is disrupted. Building on this insight, we propose Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping, a training-free strategy that assigns each frequency band a stage-specific remapping rule, jointly suppressing all three failure modes. We further observe that attention becomes systematically dispersed as the image resolution increases. Existing methods typically depend on predefined attention scaling factors, which are neither adaptive to the target resolution nor capable of faithfully capturing the actual extent of attention dispersion. We therefore propose Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration, which quantifies dispersion via a resolution-invariant normalized entropy and yields a closed-form per-head scaling factor that realigns the extrapolated-resolution attention entropy with its training-resolution counterpart. Extensive experiments show that our method consistently outperforms prior resolution-extrapolation methods in both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Our code is available at https://github.com/feihongyan1/ExtraVAR.

AI.tldr: 提出两种训练无关的扩展方法（阶段感知RoPE重映射+熵驱动注意力校准），解决VAR模型在更高分辨率图像生成时的重复、细节退化等问题。
AI.motivation: VAR模型在固定分辨率上训练后，无法直接生成更高分辨率的图像，而简单套用LLM或扩散模型的外推方法会导致全局重复、局部重复和细节退化三种失败模式。
AI.method: 1. Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping：为每个频率波段分配阶段特定的重映射规则，抑制三种失败模式。2. Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration：通过分辨率不变的归一化熵量化注意力分散程度，导出闭式逐头缩放因子，对齐外推分辨率与训练分辨率的注意力熵。
AI.result: 在结构连贯性和细节保真度上 consistently 优于先前的分辨率外推方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一分析VAR外推失败的根本原因（波段-阶段不匹配）并针对性地提出两种训练无关的校正方法，有效提升了VAR模型在更高分辨率下的图像生成质量。

title: From Controlled to the Wild: Evaluation of Pentesting Agents for the Real-World
summary: AI pentesting agents are increasingly credible as offensive security systems, but current benchmarks still provide limited guidance on which will perform best in real-world targets. Existing evaluation protocols assess and optimize for predefined goals such as capture-the-flag, remote code execution, exploit reproduction, or trajectory similarity, in simplified or narrow settings. These tools are valuable for measuring bounded capabilities, yet they do not adequately capture the complexity, open-ended exploration, and strategic decision-making required in realistic pentesting. In this paper, we present a practical evaluation protocol that shifts assessment from task completion to validated vulnerability discovery, allowing evaluation in sufficiently complex targets spanning multiple attack surfaces and vulnerability classes. The protocol combines structured ground-truth with LLM-based semantic matching to identify vulnerabilities, bipartite resolution to score findings under realistic ambiguity, continuous ground-truth maintenance, repeated and cumulative evaluation of stochastic agents, efficiency metrics, and reduced-suite selection for sustainable experimentation. This protocol extends the state of the art by enabling a more realistic, operationally informative comparison of AI pentesting agents. To enable reproducibility, we also release expert-annotated ground truth and code for the proposed evaluation protocol: https://github.com/jd0965199-oss/ethibench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将评估重点从任务完成转向已验证漏洞发现的实际AI渗透测试评估协议，结合结构化真实数据与LLM语义匹配、二分图解析等方法，更真实地比较AI渗透代理的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AI渗透测试基准局限于简化场景下的预定义目标（如夺旗、远程代码执行等），无法充分评估代理在真实渗透测试中所需的复杂探索、开放式搜索和战略决策能力。
AI.method: 提出实用评估协议：(1) 从任务完成转向已验证漏洞发现；(2) 结构化真实数据+LLM语义匹配识别漏洞；(3) 二分图解析在模糊性下评分；(4) 持续维护真实数据；(5) 重复累积评估随机代理；(6) 效率指标；(7) 精简测试套件选择。
AI.result: 该协议能够更真实、更具操作信息性地比较AI渗透代理，支持在涵盖多种攻击面和漏洞类型的复杂目标上进行评估。
AI.conclusion: 提出的评估协议扩展了现有技术水平，提供更贴近实际的AI渗透测试性能比较，并开源了专家标注的真实数据及代码以确保可复现性。

title: PixelFlowCast: Latent-Free Precipitation Nowcasting via Pixel Mean Flows
summary: Precipitation nowcasting aims to forecast short-term radar echo sequences for extreme weather warning, where both prediction fidelity and inference efficiency are critical for real-world deployment. However, diffusion-based models, despite their strong generative capability, suffer from slow inference due to multi-step sampling trajectories, limiting their practical usability. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) improves efficiency via straightened trajectories, but relies on latent space compression, which inevitably discards high-frequency physical details and degrades fine-grained prediction quality. To address these limitations, we propose PixelFlowCast, a two-stage probabilistic forecasting framework that achieves both high-efficiency and high-fidelity prediction without latent compression. Specifically, in the first stage, a deterministic model first produces coarse forecasts to capture global evolution trends. In the subsequent stage, the proposed KANCondNet extracts deep spatiotemporal evolution features to provide accurate conditional guidance. Based on this, a latent-free, few-step Pixel Mean Flows (PMF) predictor employs an $x$-prediction mechanism to generate high-quality predictions, effectively preserving fine-grained structures while maintaining fast inference. Experiments on the publicly available SEVIR dataset demonstrate that PixelFlowCast outperforms existing mainstream methods in both prediction accuracy and inference efficiency, particularly for long sequence forecasting, highlighting its strong potential for real-world operational deployment.

AI.tldr: PixelFlowCast是一个两阶段概率预测框架，通过结合确定性模型和条件流匹配，在无需潜在空间压缩的情况下实现高效高保真的降水临近预测。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型推理慢，条件流匹配虽提升效率但依赖潜在压缩导致高频物理细节丢失，亟需一种兼顾效率与保真度的预测方法。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用确定性模型生成粗粒度预测捕捉全局趋势；第二阶段用KANCondNet提取深层时空特征，再通过无潜在空间的Pixel Mean Flows（PMF）预测器采用x-预测机制生成细粒度高质量预测。
AI.result: 在SEVIR数据集上，PixelFlowCast在预测准确性和推理效率上均优于现有主流方法，尤其在长序列预测中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PixelFlowCast解决了生成式模型在临近预测中的效率-保真度权衡问题，具有实际业务部署的潜力。

title: EchoPrune: Interpreting Redundancy as Temporal Echoes for Efficient VideoLLMs
summary: Long-form video understanding remains challenging for Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs), as the dense frame sampling introduces massive visual tokens while sparse sampling risks missing critical temporal evidence and leading to LLM hallucination. Existing training-free token reduction methods either treat videos equally as static images or rely on segment-level merging heuristics, which weaken fine-grained spatiotemporal modeling and introduce additional overhead. In this paper, we propose EchoPrune, a lightweight and training-free token pruning method that improves temporal resolution under a fixed LLM-side visual token budget. Our core idea is to interpret redundant video tokens as temporal echoes: if a token is well reconstructed from the previous frame, it is merely a temporally redundant echo; otherwise, it may capture new events, motion, or query-relevant visual evidence. Based on this insight, EchoPrune scores visual tokens by (i) query-guided crossmodal relevance and (ii) temporal reconstruction error, measured by correspondence matching and echo matching across consecutive frames. The selected tokens preserve task-relevant cues and temporal novelty while suppressing predictable redundancy, allowing VideoLLMs to observe more frames without increasing the decoding budget. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-OV, Qwen2.5VL, and Qwen3VL across six video understanding benchmarks show that EchoPrune enables VideoLLMs to process up to 20x frames under the same token budget, yielding improved performance (+8.6%) and inference speedup (5.6x for prefilling) on Qwen2.5VL-7B.

AI.tldr: EchoPrune是一种无需训练的轻量级token剪枝方法，通过将冗余视频token视为"时间回声"来筛选高信息量token，使得VideoLLMs在固定token预算下能处理多达20倍的帧数，性能提升8.6%，推理加速5.6倍。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解中，密集帧采样带来大量视觉token，稀疏采样又容易遗漏关键时序证据导致LLM幻觉。现有训练-free的token减少方法要么将视频等同于静态图像，要么依赖片段级合并启发式，削弱了细粒度时空建模并引入额外开销。
AI.method: 提出EchoPrune，一种轻量级、无需训练的token剪枝方法。核心思想是将冗余视频token解释为"时间回声"：如果某个token能从前一帧良好重建，则它是时间冗余的"回声"；否则可能捕捉到新事件、运动或查询相关的视觉证据。通过查询引导的跨模态相关性评分和时序重建误差评分（利用对应匹配和回声匹配）来选择token。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-OV、Qwen2.5VL和Qwen3VL上，涵盖六个视频理解基准的广泛实验表明：EchoPrune在相同token预算下可处理多达20倍的帧数，在Qwen2.5VL-7B上性能提升8.6%，推理速度（预填充阶段）提升5.6倍。
AI.conclusion: EchoPrune通过识别并保留任务相关线索和时序新颖性、抑制可预测冗余，有效提升了VideoLLMs在长视频理解中的效率和准确性。

title: Explanation-Aware Learning for Enhanced Interpretability in Biomedical Imaging
comment: Under review at IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI)
summary: Deep neural networks for medical image diagnosis often achieve high predictive accuracy while relying on spurious or clinically irrelevant visual cues, limiting their trustworthiness in practice. Post-hoc explanation methods are widely used to visualize model decisions in the form of saliency maps; however, these explanations do not influence how models learn during training, allowing non-causal or confounding features to persist. This motivates the incorporation of explanation supervision directly into the training objective to guide model attention toward clinically meaningful regions and promote clinically grounded decision-making. This paper presents a systematic approach to integrate explanation loss into model training and analyzes how different explanation loss designs and supervision strengths influence both predictive performance and spatial faithfulness of explanations. To quantitatively assess interpretability, two complementary explanation performance metrics-annotation coverage and saliency precision-are introduced, enabling rigorous evaluation beyond qualitative visualization. Our experimental results reveal a clear trade-off between explanation quality and explanation loss coefficients. Furthermore, quantitative statistical analysis yields consistently improved explanation alignment while maintaining comparable accuracy. Experiments were conducted on annotated chest X-ray datasets; however, the proposed framework is applicable to a broad range of annotated biomedical imaging modalities. Overall, these findings demonstrate that explanation supervision is not a monolithic design choice and provide practical guidance for incorporating explanation loss into training objectives under noisy clinical annotations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将解释损失（explanation loss）直接融入深度学习模型训练目标中，引导模型关注临床相关区域，并在胸部X光数据集上验证了该方法能在保持预测精度的同时显著提升解释对齐质量，同时揭示了解释质量与损失系数之间存在权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在医学图像诊断中常依赖虚假或临床无关的视觉线索（虚假关联），导致模型可信度不足。事后解释方法无法在训练过程中影响模型学习，因此需要将解释监督直接融入训练目标，引导模型关注临床有意义的区域。
AI.method: 系统性地将解释损失（explanation loss）集成到模型训练目标中，设计不同形式的解释损失和不同监督强度；引入两种定量解释性能指标——标注覆盖率（annotation coverage）和显著性精度（saliency precision），用于评估解释的空间忠实度。
AI.result: 实验表明：解释质量与损失系数之间存在明确的权衡关系；定量统计分析显示解释对齐性持续改善，同时保持可比的预测精度；该框架在带有噪声临床标注的胸部X光数据集上有效。
AI.conclusion: 解释监督并非单一的设计选择，本文为在噪声临床标注下将解释损失融入训练目标提供了实用指导，且该框架可推广至多种带标注的生物医学影像模态。

title: Remember the Decision, Not the Description: A Rate-Distortion Framework for Agent Memory
summary: Long-horizon language agents must operate under limited runtime memory, yet existing memory mechanisms often organize experience around descriptive criteria such as relevance, salience, or summary quality. For an agent, however, memory is valuable not because it faithfully describes the past, but because it preserves the distinctions between histories that must remain separated under a fixed budget to support good decisions. We cast this as a decision-centric rate-distortion problem, measuring memory quality by the loss in achievable decision quality induced by compression. This yields an exact forgetting boundary for what can be safely forgotten, and a memory-distortion frontier characterizing the optimal tradeoff between memory budget and decision quality. Motivated by this decision-centric view of memory, we propose DeMem, an online memory learner that refines its partition only when data certify that a shared state would induce decision conflict, and prove near-minimax regret guarantees. On both controlled synthetic diagnostics and long-horizon conversational benchmarks, DeMem yields consistent gains under the same runtime budget, supporting the principle that memory should preserve the distinctions that matter for decisions, not descriptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以决策为中心的記憶压缩方法DeMem，通过率失真理论确定最优的遗忘边界，在固定存储预算下只保留对决策有区分的记忆，并在合成和对话基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆机制基于描述性标准（相关性、显著性、摘要质量）组织经验，但智能体的记忆价值不在于忠实描述过去，而在于区分那些在固定预算下对支持良好决策至关重要的历史轨迹。
AI.method: 将记忆压缩建模为决策中心的率失真问题，用压缩导致的决策质量损失来衡量记忆质量，导出精确的遗忘边界和记忆-失真前沿，并设计DeMem在线记忆学习器，仅在数据证明共享状态会导致决策冲突时细化分区，同时给出近最小最大遗憾保证。
AI.result: 在合成诊断任务和长程对话基准上，DeMem在相同运行时预算下持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 记忆应保留对决策有区分的特征，而非对过去的描述性刻画。

title: MFVLR: Multi-domain Fine-grained Vision-Language Reconstruction for Generalizable Diffusion Face Forgery Detection and Localization
summary: The swift advancement in photo-realistic face generation technology has sparked considerable concerns across society and academia, emphasizing the requirement of generalizable face forgery detection and localization methods. Prior works tend to capture face forgery patterns across multiple domains using image modality, other modalities like fine-grained texts are not comprehensively investigated, which restricts the generalization capability of models. Besides, they usually analyze facial images created by GAN, but struggle to identify and localize those synthesized by diffusion. To solve the problems, in this paper, we devise a novel multi-domain fine-grained vision-language reconstruction (MFVLR) model, which explores comprehensive and diverse visual forgery traces via language-guided face forgery representation learning, to achieve generalizable diffusion-synthesized face forgery detection and localization (DFFDL). Specifically, we devise a fine-grained language transformer that studies general fine-grained language embeddings using language reconstruction. We propose a multi-domain vision encoder to capture general and complementary visual forgery patterns across the image and residual domains. A vision decoder is designed to reconstruct image appearance and achieve forgery localization. Besides, we propose an innovative plug-and-play vision injection module to enhance the interaction between the vision and language embeddings. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate that our network outperforms the state of the art on different settings like cross-generator, cross-forgery, and cross-dataset evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态细粒度视觉-语言重建模型(MFVLR)，通过语言引导的伪造表征学习，实现可泛化的扩散模型合成人脸伪造检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 现有伪造检测方法多局限于图像模态，忽视细粒度文本等模态信息，且难以检测扩散模型生成的人脸图像，泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计细粒度语言Transformer学习语言嵌入；多域视觉编码器捕捉图像域和残差域的伪造模式；视觉解码器重建图像外观并进行伪造定位；提出即插即用的视觉注入模块增强视觉-语言交互。
AI.result: 在跨生成器、跨伪造类型、跨数据集等多种设置下均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 多模态细粒度视觉-语言重建方法有效提升了扩散合成人脸的伪造检测与定位的泛化能力。

title: SocialDirector: Training-Free Social Interaction Control for Multi-Person Video Generation
summary: Video generation has advanced rapidly, producing photorealistic videos from text or image prompts. Meanwhile, film production and social robotics increasingly demand multi-person videos with rich social interactions, including conversations, gestures, and coordinated actions. However, existing models offer no explicit control over interactions, such as who performs which action, when it occurs, and toward whom it is directed. This often results in wrong person performing unintended actions (actor-action mismatch), disordered social dynamics, and wrong action targets. To address these challenges, we present SocialDirector, a training-free interaction controller that enhances the generation model by modulating cross-attention maps. SocialDirector contains two modules: Social Actor Masking and Directional Reweighting. Social Actor Masking constrains each person's visual tokens to attend only to their own textual descriptions via a spatiotemporal mask, avoiding actor-action mismatch and disordered social dynamics. Directional Reweighting amplifies attention to directional words (e.g., "leftward", "right"), leading each action towards its intended target. To evaluate generated social interactions, we annotate existing datasets with interaction descriptions and build a fully automated evaluation pipeline powered by open-source VLMs. Experiments on different video generation models show that SocialDirector significantly improves interaction fidelity and approaches the upper bound set by real videos.

AI.tldr: SocialDirector是一个无需训练的视频交互控制器，通过调节交叉注意力图，解决多人视频生成中角色-动作不匹配、社交动态混乱和动作目标错误的问题，显著提升交互保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型无法对多人社交交互（如对话、手势、协调动作）进行显式控制，常出现演员与动作不匹配、社交动态混乱、动作目标错误等问题，亟需一种无需训练的交互控制方法。
AI.method: 提出SocialDirector，包含两个模块：(1) Social Actor Masking，通过时空掩码约束每个角色的视觉token仅关注其自身文本描述，避免动作-角色错配；(2) Directional Reweighting，放大方向性词汇的注意力权重，引导动作朝向正确目标。该方法无需训练，直接调节生成模型的交叉注意力图。
AI.result: 在多个视频生成模型上的实验表明，SocialDirector显著提升了交互保真度，接近真实视频的上限水平。同时构建了基于开源VLM的全自动评估管线。
AI.conclusion: SocialDirector通过无需训练的注意力调制机制，有效解决了多人社交交互视频生成中的关键控制问题，为电影制作和社交机器人等应用提供了实用方案。

title: Initiation of Interaction Detection Framework using a Nonverbal Cue for Human-Robot Interaction
summary: This paper describes an initiation of interaction(IoI) detection framework without keywords for human-robot interaction(HRI) based on audio and vision sensor fusion in a domestic environment. In the proposed framework, the robot has its own audio and vision sensors, and can employ external vision sensor for stable human detection and tracking. When the user starts to speak while looking at the robot, the robot can localize his or her position by its sound source localization together with human tracking information. Then the robot can detect the IoI if it perceives the face of the speaker faces the robot. In case that the user does not speak directly, the robot can also detect the IoI if he or she looks at the robot for more than predefined periods of time. A state transition model for the proposed IoI detection framework is designed and verified by experiments with a mobile robot. In order to implement and associate our model in a robot architecture, all the components are implemented and integrated in the Robot Operating System(ROS) environment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需关键词的、基于音频与视觉传感器融合的人机交互启动检测框架，使机器人能在家庭环境中通过声音定位、人脸朝向和注视时长判断用户是否意图交互，并在ROS中实现验证。
AI.motivation: 在家庭环境中，传统基于关键词的交互启动方式不够自然，用户可能不会使用特定唤醒词。因此，作者希望让机器人通过多模态感知（语音+视觉）自主判断用户何时意图与其互动，使交互更自然、直觉化。
AI.method: 1）融合机器人自身音频传感器（声源定位）与视觉传感器（人脸检测与朝向判断），并接入外部视觉传感器增强人体跟踪稳定性；2）检测条件分两种：A. 用户说话且看向机器人（声源定位+人脸朝向验证）；B. 用户不说话但注视机器人超过预设时长；3）设计状态转移模型描述交互启动流程；4）在ROS环境下实现并集成所有组件。
AI.result: 通过移动机器人实验验证了所提出的状态转移模型的有效性，表明该框架能够成功检测用户发起的交互意图。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需唤醒词的、基于多传感器融合的IoI检测方法，实现了更自然的HRI交互启动，并在ROS中成功部署和验证。

title: HYPERPOSE: Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention for 3D Human Pose Estimation
summary: We introduce HYPERPOSE, a novel 3D human pose estimation framework that performs spatio-temporal reasoning entirely within the Lorentz model of hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^d$ to natively preserve the hierarchical tree topology of the human skeleton. Current state-of-the-art pose estimators aim to capture complex joint dynamics by relying on transformers and graph convolutional networks. Since these architectures operate exclusively in Euclidean space which fundamentally mismatches the inherent tree structure of the human body, these methods inevitably suffer from exponential volume distortion and struggle to maintain structural coherence. To this end, we depart from flat spaces and aim to improve geometric fidelity with Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention (HKPSA), natively embedding complex joint relationships without distortion, alongside a multi-scale windowed hyperbolic attention mechanism that efficiently models temporal dynamics in $O(TW)$ complexity. Furthermore, to overcome the well-known instability of training non-Euclidean manifolds, HYPERPOSE introduces a novel Riemannian loss suite and an uncertainty-weighted curriculum, enforcing physical geodesic constraints like bone length and velocity consistency. Extensive evaluations on the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets demonstrate that HYPERPOSE achieves state-of-the-art structural and temporal coherence, significantly reducing both volume distortion and velocity error, while establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks in overall positional accuracy.

AI.tldr: HYPERPOSE是一个在双曲空间中进行3D人体姿态估计的框架，通过Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention (HKPSA)和多尺度窗口化双曲注意力机制，原生保持人体骨骼的树形拓扑结构，在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D姿态估计方法基于欧几里得空间，与人体骨骼天然的树形层次结构不匹配，导致指数级体积失真和结构一致性问题。
AI.method: 1) Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention (HKPSA) — 在洛伦兹模型中原生嵌入关节关系；2) 多尺度窗口化双曲注意力机制，以O(TW)复杂度建模时间动态；3) 黎曼损失套件和不确定性加权课程学习，强制执行骨骼长度和速度一致性等物理测地线约束。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上，在结构一致性、时间一致性、体积失真和速度误差方面显著降低，并在整体位置精度上达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间能够原生匹配人体骨骼的树形拓扑，在保持结构几何保真度的同时有效提升3D姿态估计的精度和时间一致性。

title: ViSRA: A Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent for Multi-modal Large Language Models
summary: Recent advances in Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) target 3D spatial intelligence, yet the progress has been largely driven by post-training on curated benchmarks, leaving the inference-time approach relatively underexplored. In this paper, we take a training-free perspective and introduce ViSRA, a human-aligned Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent, as a framework to probe the spatial reasoning mechanism of MLLMs. ViSRA elicits spatial reasoning in a modular and extensible manner by leveraging explicit spatial information from expert models, enabling a plug-and-play flexible paradigm. ViSRA offers two key advantages: (1) human-aligned and transferable 3D understanding rather than task-specific overfitting; and (2) no post-training computational cost along with heavy manual curation of spatial reasoning datasets. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvement across a set of MLLMs on both existing benchmarks and unseen 3D spatial reasoning tasks, with ViSRA outperforming baselines by up to a 15.6% and 28.9% absolute margin respectively.

AI.tldr: ViSRA是一种无需训练的视频空间推理智能体，通过模块化方式利用专家模型的显式空间信息，提升了多模态大语言模型在3D空间推理任务上的表现，无需额外训练成本。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM的3D空间智能进展主要依赖后训练和人工标注基准，而推理阶段的潜力未被充分挖掘，作者希望探索一种无需训练、模块化的空间推理机制。
AI.method: 提出ViSRA框架，以训练无关的方式，通过专家模型提取显式空间信息，以模块化、可扩展的方式引导MLLM进行空间推理，支持即插即用。
AI.result: 在多个MLLM上，ViSRA在现有基准和未见过的3D空间推理任务上分别提升高达15.6%和28.9%的绝对性能。
AI.conclusion: ViSRA证明了一种无需训练、人工对齐的模块化空间推理范式有效，避免了任务特定过拟合和繁琐的后训练成本，具有良好的泛化性和迁移性。

title: Think as Needed: Geometry-Driven Adaptive Perception for Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous driving scenes range from empty highways to dense intersections with dozens of interacting road users, yet current 3D detection models apply a fixed computation budget to every frame, wasting resources on simple scenes while lacking capacity for complex ones. Existing approaches compound this problem: Transformer-based interaction models scale quadratically with the number of detected objects, and frame-by-frame processing causes the system to immediately forget objects the moment they become occluded. We propose Enhanced HOPE, an adaptive perception architecture that measures the geometric complexity of each incoming LiDAR frame using an unsupervised statistical estimator and routes it through a shallow or deep processing path accordingly, requiring no manual scene labels. To keep interaction modeling efficient, we replace quadratic pairwise attention with a linear-time subspace-based network that groups nearby objects into clusters and processes them jointly. The computational savings from these two mechanisms free up resources for a persistent temporal memory module that retains previously detected objects and traffic rules across frames, enabling the system to recall occluded objects seconds after they disappear from view. On the nuScenes and CARLA benchmarks, Enhanced HOPE reduces latency by 38% on simple scenes with no accuracy loss, improves mean Average Precision by 2.7 points on rare long-tail scenarios, and tracks objects through occlusions lasting over 5 seconds, where all tested baselines fail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Enhanced HOPE，一种自适应感知架构，通过无监督场景复杂度估计动态调整计算资源，用线性复杂度聚类替代二次注意力机制，并引入持久时序记忆模块实现遮挡目标的长时追踪。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测模型对所有帧使用固定计算预算，简单场景浪费资源、复杂场景能力不足；Transformer模型计算量随目标数平方增长；逐帧处理导致遮挡目标立即遗忘。
AI.method: 1) 无监督统计估计器评估每帧几何复杂度，路由至浅层或深层处理路径；2) 线性时间子空间网络将邻近目标聚类联合处理，替代二次注意力；3) 持久时序记忆模块保留历史检测结果与交通规则，支持跨帧召回遮挡目标。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和CARLA上，简单场景延迟降低38%且无精度损失；长尾场景mAP提升2.7个点；可追踪超过5秒的遮挡目标，所有基线方法均失败。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应计算分配、高效交互建模和持久记忆机制，Enhanced HOPE在保持精度的同时大幅提升效率，并首次实现了长时遮挡下的鲁棒跟踪。

title: MicroWorld: Empowering Multimodal Large Language Models to Bridge the Microscopic Domain Gap with Multimodal Attribute Graph
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show remarkable potential for scientific reasoning, yet their performance in specialized domains such as microscopy remains limited by the scarcity of domain-specific training data and the difficulty of encoding fine-grained expert knowledge into model parameters. To bridge the gap, we introduce MicroWorld, a framework that constructs a multimodal attributed property graph (MAPG) from large-scale scientific image--caption corpora and leverages it to augment MLLM reasoning at inference time without any domain-specific fine-tuning. MicroWorld extracts biomedical entities and relations via scispaCy or LLM-based triplet mining, aligns images and entities in a shared embedding space using Qwen3-VL-Embedding, and assembles a knowledge graph comprising approximately 111K nodes and 346K typed edges spanning eight relation categories. At inference time, a graph-augmented retrieval pipeline matches query entities to the MAPG and injects structured knowledge context into the MLLM prompt. On the MicroVQA benchmark, MicroWorld improves the reasoning performance of Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct by 37.5%, outperforming GPT-5 by 13.0% to achieve a new state-of-the-art. Furthermore, it yields a 6.0% performance gain on the MicroBench benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate the enhanced generalization capability introduced by MicroWorld. A qualitative case study further reveals both the mechanisms through which structured knowledge improves reasoning and the failure modes that point to promising future directions. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ieellee/MicroWorld.

AI.tldr: MicroWorld是一个为多模态大模型（MLLM）构建的多模态属性属性图谱（MAPG）框架，在不进行领域微调的情况下，通过推理时注入结构化知识，将Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct在MicroVQA基准上的推理性能提升37.5%，超越GPT-5达13.0%，达到新最优水平。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在科学推理中潜力巨大，但在显微镜等专门领域表现受限，主要原因是领域专用训练数据稀缺以及将细粒度专家知识编码进模型参数困难。
AI.method: 1) 从大规模科学图像-标题语料中构建多模态属性属性图谱（MAPG），通过scispaCy或LLM三元组挖掘提取生物医学实体与关系；2) 使用Qwen3-VL-Embedding将图像与实体对齐到共享嵌入空间；3) 构建包含约111K节点和346K条带类型边（8种关系类别）的知识图谱；4) 推理时通过图增强检索管道将查询实体匹配到MAPG，并将结构化知识注入MLLM提示中。
AI.result: 在MicroVQA基准上，MicroWorld将Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct推理性能提升37.5%，超越GPT-5达13.0%，达到新SOTA；在MicroBench基准上获得6.0%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MicroWorld通过推理时注入结构化知识，无需域特定微调即可显著增强MLLM在显微镜领域的推理与泛化能力。定性案例研究揭示了结构化知识提升推理的机制及失败模式，为未来方向提供启示。

title: Fashion130K: An E-commerce Fashion Dataset for Outfit Generation with Unified Multi-modal Condition
summary: Recent research work on fashion outfit generation focuses on promoting visual consistency of garments by leveraging key information from reference image and text prompt. However, the potential of outfit generation remains underexplored, requiring comprehensive e-commercial dataset and elaborative utilization of multi-modal condition. In this paper, we propose a brand-new e-commerce dataset, named Fashion130k, with various occasions, models, and garment types. For the consistent generation of garment, we design a framework with Unified Multi-modal Condition (UMC) to align and integrate the text and visual prompts into generation model. Specifically, we explore an embedding refiner to extract the unified embeddings of multi-modal prompts, within which a Fusion Transformer is proposed to align the multi-modal embeddings by adjusting the modality gap between text and image. Based on unified embeddings, the attention in generation model is redesigned to emphasis the correlations between prompts and noise image, inducing that the noise image can select the pivotal tokens of prompts for consistent outfit generation. Our dataset and proposed framework offer a general and nuanced exploration of multi-modal prompts for generation models. Extensive experiments on real-world applications and benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of UMC in visual consistency, achieving promising result than that of SoTA methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为Fashion130k的新电商数据集，并设计了统一多模态条件（UMC）框架，通过嵌入精炼器和融合Transformer对齐文本与视觉提示，实现服装的视觉一致性生成，效果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有服装生成工作主要依赖参考图像和文本提示来提升视觉一致性，但缺乏全面的电商数据集，且对多模态条件的利用不够充分，服装生成的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 构建Fashion130k电商数据集；提出UMC框架，包含嵌入精炼器（提取统一多模态嵌入）和融合Transformer（对齐文本与图像模态间的差距）；重新设计生成模型中的注意力机制，增强提示与噪声图像之间的相关性，使噪声图像能选择关键提示token以实现一致生成。
AI.result: 在真实应用和基准测试上的大量实验表明，UMC在视觉一致性方面取得了有竞争力的结果，优于当前最优方法（SoTA）。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供的数据集和框架为生成模型中多模态提示的通用且细致探索奠定了基础，有效提升了服装生成的一致性。

title: Thermal-Det: Language-Guided Cross-Modal Distillation for Open-Vocabulary Thermal Object Detection
summary: Existing open-vocabulary detectors focus on RGB images and fail to generalize to thermal imagery, where low texture and emissivity variations challenge RGB-based semantics. We present Thermal-Det, the first large language model (LLM) supervised open-vocabulary detector tailored for thermal images. To enable large-scale training, we develop a synthetic dataset by converting GroundingCap-1M into the thermal domain and filtering captions to remove RGB-specific terms, yielding over one million thermally aligned samples with bounding boxes, grounding texts, and detailed captions. Thermal-Det jointly optimizes detection, captioning, and cross-modal distillation objectives. A frozen RGB teacher provides geometric and semantic pseudo-supervision for paired but unlabeled RGB-thermal data, transferring open-vocabulary knowledge without manual annotation. The model further employs a Thermal-Text Alignment Head for text calibration and a Modality-Fused Cross-Attention module for dual-modality reasoning. Unlike prior domain-adaptation methods, the detector is fully fine-tuned to internalize thermal contrast patterns while preserving language alignment. Experiments on public benchmarks show consistent 2-4% AP gains over existing open-vocabulary detectors, establishing a strong foundation for scalable, language-driven thermal perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Thermal-Det，是首个利用大语言模型监督的开放词汇热成像检测器。通过将GroundingCap-1M转换为热域并过滤RGB特定术语，构建了百万级热对齐合成数据集。模型联合优化检测、描述和跨模态蒸馏目标，利用冻结的RGB教师网络提供伪监督，并设计了热-文本对齐头和模态融合交叉注意力模块。在公开基准上取得了2-4%的AP提升。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测器仅针对RGB图像设计，无法泛化到热成像领域。热成像图像具有低纹理和发射率变化的特点，导致基于RGB的语义理解失效。因此需要专门为热成像设计开放词汇检测方法。
AI.method: 1) 合成数据集构建：将GroundingCap-1M转换为热域，过滤RGB特定术语，得到百万级热对齐样本；2) 联合优化目标：同时优化检测、描述和跨模态蒸馏；3) 冻结RGB教师网络：为未标注的RGB-热成像配对数据提供几何和语义伪监督；4) Thermal-Text Alignment Head：进行文本校准；5) Modality-Fused Cross-Attention：实现双模态推理。
AI.result: 在公开基准上，相比现有开放词汇检测器，取得了2-4%的平均精度（AP）提升。
AI.conclusion: Thermal-Det建立了可扩展的、语言驱动的热成像感知基础，证明全微调策略能内化热对比模式同时保持语言对齐，优于先前的域适应方法。

title: Scaling Vision Models Does Not Consistently Improve Localisation-Based Explanation Quality
summary: Artificial intelligence models are increasingly scaled to improve predictive accuracy, yet it remains unclear whether scale improves the quality of post-hoc explanations. We investigate this relationship by evaluating 11 computer vision models representing increasing levels of depth and complexity within the ResNet, DenseNet, and Vision Transformer families, trained from scratch or pretrained, across three image datasets with ground-truth segmentation masks. For each model, we generate explanations using five post-hoc explainable AI methods and quantify mask alignment using two localisation metrics: Relevance Rank Accuracy (Arras et al., 2022) and the proposed Dual-Polarity Precision, which measures positive attributions inside the class mask and negative attributions outside it. Across datasets and methods, increasing architectural depth and parameter count does not improve explanation quality in most statistical comparisons, and smaller models often match or exceed deeper variants. While pretraining typically improves predictive performance and increases the dependence of explanations on learned weights, it does not consistently increase localisation scores. We also observe scenarios in which models achieve strong predictive performance while localisation precision is near zero, suggesting that performance metrics alone may not indicate whether predictions are based on the annotated regions. These results indicate that larger models do not reliably provide higher-quality explanations, and that explainability should therefore be assessed explicitly during model selection for safety-sensitive deployments.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了11个不同规模和架构的视觉模型，发现更大的模型并不能可靠地提供更高质量的解释，且模型预测性能与解释定位精度之间存在显著脱节。
AI.motivation: 随着AI模型规模不断扩大，虽然预测精度提升，但模型可解释性是否随之改善尚不明确。本研究旨在系统探究模型规模与事后解释质量之间的关系。
AI.method: 选取ResNet、DenseNet、Vision Transformer三个系列共11个视觉模型（含从零训练和预训练），在三个带真实分割掩码的数据集上，使用五种事后可解释性方法生成解释，并用Relevance Rank Accuracy和提出的Dual-Polarity Precision两个定位指标量化掩码对齐程度。
AI.result: 更大更深的模型在大部分统计比较中并未显著提升解释质量，小模型常能与大模型匹敌甚至更优。预训练虽提升预测性能并增强解释对权重的依赖，但未一致提升定位分数。存在模型预测性能高但定位精度近乎为零的情况。
AI.conclusion: 模型规模扩大并不能可靠地提升解释质量，在安全敏感场景中，应将可解释性作为明确的评估指标纳入模型选择过程。

title: MicroViTv2: Beyond the FLOPS for Edge Energy-Friendly Vision Transformers
summary: The Vision Transformer (ViT) achieves remarkable accuracy across visual tasks but remains computationally expensive for edge deployment. This paper presents MicroViTv2, a lightweight Vision Transformer optimized for real-device efficiency. Built upon the original MicroViT, the proposed model is designed based on reparameterized design, specifically Reparameterized Patch Embedding (RepEmbed) and Reparameterized Depth-Wise convolution mixer (RepDW) for faster inference, and introduces the Single Depth-Wise Transposed Attention (SDTA) to capture long-range dependencies with minimal redundancy. Despite slightly higher FLOPs, MicroViTv2 improves accuracy up to 0.5% compared to its predecessor and surpassing MobileViTv2, EdgeNeXt, and EfficientViT while maintaining fast inference and high energy efficiency on Jetson AGX Orin. Experiments on ImageNet-1K and COCO demonstrate that hardware-aware design and structural re-parameterization are key to achieving high accuracy and low energy consumption, validating the need to evaluate efficiency beyond FLOPs. Code is available at https://github.com/novendrastywn/MicroViT.

AI.tldr: MicroViTv2 是一种轻量级 Vision Transformer，通过重参数化设计（RepEmbed、RepDW）和 SDTA 注意力机制，在略微增加 FLOPs 的情况下提高了精度和推理速度，在边缘设备上超越 MobileViTv2、EdgeNeXt、EfficientViT 等模型。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformer (ViT) 在视觉任务中表现优异，但计算成本高，难以部署在边缘设备上。现有轻量级模型仍有提升空间，需要兼顾精度、速度和能效。
AI.method: 提出 MicroViTv2，包含三种关键技术：重参数化补丁嵌入（RepEmbed）、重参数化深度可分离卷积混合器（RepDW）用于加速推理，以及单深度可分离转置注意力（SDTA）用于捕获长距离依赖并减少冗余。
AI.result: 相比 MicroViT，精度提升最高 0.5%；在 ImageNet-1K 和 COCO 上超越 MobileViTv2、EdgeNeXt、EfficientViT；在 Jetson AGX Orin 上保持快速推理和高能效。
AI.conclusion: 硬件感知设计与结构重参数化是实现高精度与低能耗的关键，仅以 FLOPs 衡量效率不够充分，需要结合实际硬件指标进行评估。

title: Improving Temporal Action Segmentation via Constraint-Aware Decoding
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) divides untrimmed videos into labeled action segments. While fully supervised methods have advanced the field, challenges such as action variability, ambiguous boundaries, and high annotation costs remain, especially in new or low-resource domains. Grammar-based approaches improve segmentation with structural priors but rely on complex parsing limiting scalability. In this work, we propose a lightweight, constraint-based refinement framework that enhances TAS predictions by integrating statistical structural priors such as transition confidence, action boundary sets, and per-class duration, that can be directly extracted from annotated data. These constraints are integrated into a modified Viterbi decoding algorithm, allowing inference-time refinement without retraining or added model complexity. Our approach improves both fully and semi-supervised TAS models by correcting structural prediction errors while maintaining high efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/LUNAProject22/CAD

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级的基于约束的时序动作分割细化框架，通过将统计结构先验集成到改进的维特比解码算法中，在不重新训练的情况下提升分割质量。
AI.motivation: 现有全监督时序动作分割方法面临动作变异性、边界模糊和高标注成本等挑战，基于语法的方法虽能改善分割但依赖复杂解析、可扩展性差。
AI.method: 从标注数据中提取转换置信度、动作边界集和每类时长等统计结构先验，将其集成到改进的维特比解码算法中，实现推理时细化而不需重新训练或增加模型复杂度。
AI.result: 该方法在全监督和半监督时序动作分割模型上均能纠正结构化预测错误，同时保持高效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架轻量、高效，无需额外训练即可提升时序动作分割质量，代码已开源。

title: Active-SAOOD: Active Sparsely Annotated Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
summary: Reducing the annotation cost of oriented object detection in remote sensing remains a major challenge. Recently, sparse annotation has gained attention for effectively reducing annotation redundancy in densely remote sensing scenes. However, (1) the sparse data reliance on class-dependent sampling, and (2) the lack of in-depth investigation into the characteristics of sparse samples hinders its further development. This paper proposes an active learning-based sparsely annotated oriented object detection (SAOOD) method, termed Active-SAOOD. Based on a model state observation module, Active-SAOOD actively selects the most valuable sparse samples at the instance level that are best suited to the current model state, by jointly considering orientation, classification, and localization uncertainty, as well as inter- and intra-class diversity. This design enables SAOOD to operate stably under completely randomly initialized sparse annotations and extends its applicability to broader real-world. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that Active-SAOOD significantly improves both performance and stability of existing SAOOD methods under various random sparse annotation. In particular, with only 1\% annotated ratios, it achieves a 9\% performance gain over the baseline, further enhancing the practical value of SAOOD in remote sensing. The code will be public.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Active-SAOOD，一种基于主动学习的高效稀疏标注定向目标检测方法，通过联合考虑方向、分类、定位不确定性和类别多样性，在仅1%标注率下实现9%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像中的定向目标检测标注成本高，现有稀疏标注方法依赖类别相关采样且缺乏对稀疏样本特性的深入研究，限制了其发展。
AI.method: 提出Active-SAOOD，包含模型状态观测模块，在实例级别主动选择最有价值的稀疏样本，联合考虑方向不确定性、分类不确定性、定位不确定性以及类间和类内多样性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，Active-SAOOD显著提升了现有SAOOD方法的性能和稳定性，在仅1%标注比例下，相比基线获得9%的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使SAOOD能在完全随机初始化的稀疏标注下稳定运行，拓展了其在实际遥感场景中的应用价值。

title: Task-Agnostic Noisy Label Detection via Standardized Loss Aggregation
comment: Accepted to IEEE ISBI 2026. The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Noisy labels are common in large-scale medical imaging datasets due to inter-observer variability and ambiguous cases. We propose a statistically grounded and task-agnostic framework, Standardized Loss Aggregation (SLA), for detecting noisy labels at the sample level. SLA quantifies label reliability by aggregating standardized fold-level validation losses across repeated cross-validation runs. This formulation generalizes discrete hard-counting schemes into a continuous estimator that captures both the frequency and magnitude of performance deviations, yielding interpretable and statistically stable noisiness scores. Experiments on a public fundus dataset demonstrate that SLA consistently outperforms the hard-counting baseline across all noise levels and converges substantially faster, especially under low noise ratios where subtle loss variations are informative. Samples with high SLA scores indicate potentially ambiguous or mislabeled cases, guiding efficient re-annotation and improving dataset reliability for any classification task.

AI.tldr: 提出标准化损失聚合（SLA）框架，通过聚合交叉验证的损失值来检测医学影像中的噪声标签，在眼底数据集上优于硬计数基线方法。
AI.motivation: 医学影像大数据集中的标签噪声普遍存在（由于观察者间差异和模糊病例），需要一种统计稳健且任务无关的样本级噪声标签检测方法。
AI.method: SLA框架将离散的硬计数方案推广为连续估计器，通过聚合重复交叉验证中标准化后的折级验证损失，量化标签可靠性，同时捕捉性能偏差的频率和幅度。
AI.result: 在公共眼底数据集上，SLA在所有噪声水平下一致优于硬计数基线，并且在低噪声比下收敛速度更快，能有效识别模糊或错误标注的样本。
AI.conclusion: SLA提供了一种可解释、统计稳定的噪声评分方法，可指导高效的重标注过程，提升任何分类任务的数据集可靠性。

title: BathyFacto: Refraction-Aware Two-Media Neural Radiance Fields for Bathymetry
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to ISPRS Open Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, Special Issue "3D Underwater Mapping from Above and Below"
summary: Through-water photogrammetry based on UAV imagery enables shallow-water bathymetry, but refraction at the air-water interface violates the straight-ray assumption of Structure-from-Motion and causes systematic depth bias. We present BathyFacto, a refraction-aware two-media extension of Nerfacto integrated into Nerfstudio that targets metrically precise underwater point clouds. BathyFacto uses a shared hash-grid-based density field with a medium-conditioned color head that receives a one-bit medium flag (air or water) and traces each camera ray as two segments: a straight segment in air up to a planar water surface and a refracted segment in water computed via Snell's law with known refractive indices. To allocate samples efficiently across the air-water boundary, we employ a single proposal-network sampler that operates on a virtual straight ray spanning both media, combined with a kinked density wrapper that transparently corrects water-segment positions along the refracted direction before density evaluation. A data adaptation pipeline converts photogrammetric reconstructions to a Nerfstudio-compatible format, estimates the water plane from boundary markers, and provides per-pixel medium masks to gate refraction. We also extend the point cloud export with refraction-corrected backprojection and reversible coordinate transforms to world and global frames. On a simulated two-media scene with known ground truth, BathyFacto with refraction achieves a Cloud-to-Mesh mean distance of 0.06 m and 87 % completeness, compared to 0.52 m / 29 % for the Nerfacto baseline and 0.36 m / 21% for conventional MVS without refraction correction.

AI.tldr: 提出了BathyFacto，一种基于NeRF的折射感知双介质重建方法，在模拟水下场景中显著优于传统方法（点云精度0.06m vs 0.52m）。
AI.motivation: 无人机穿水摄影测量中，空气-水界面的折射现象违反了SfM的直线射线假设，导致系统性深度偏差，现有方法缺乏精确的折射校正。
AI.method: 基于Nerfacto扩展为双介质模型：共享哈希网格密度场+介质条件颜色头（空气/水标志位）；每条射线分为空气直线段和经Snell定律计算的水中折射段；使用虚拟直线射线的提议网络采样+kinked密度包装器校正折射位置；数据管道自动估计水面并生成逐像素介质掩膜。
AI.result: 在模拟双介质场景中，BathyFacto的点云到网格平均距离0.06m/完整度87%，远优于Nerfacto基线（0.52m/29%）和传统MVS（0.36m/21%）。
AI.conclusion: 折射感知的NeRF方法能有效校正穿水摄影测量中的系统性深度偏差，实现高精度浅水水深测量。

title: MTA-RL: Robust Urban Driving via Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning
summary: Robust urban autonomous driving requires reliable 3D scene understanding and stable decision-making under dense interactions. However, existing end-to-end models lack interpretability, while modular pipelines suffer from error propagation across brittle interfaces. This paper proposes MTA-RL, the first framework that bridges perception and control through Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Unlike previous fusion models that directly regress actions, RGB images and LiDAR point clouds are fused using a transformer architecture to predict explicit, geometry-aware affordance representations. These structured representations serve as a compact observation space, enabling the RL policy to operate purely on predicted driving semantics, which significantly improves sample efficiency and stability. Extensive evaluations in CARLA Town01-03 across varying densities (20-60 background vehicles) show that MTA-RL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Trained solely on Town03, our method demonstrates superior zero-shot generalization in unseen towns, achieving up to a 9.0% increase in Route Completion, an 11.0% increase in Total Distance, and an 83.7% improvement in Distance Per Violation. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that our multi-modal fusion and reward shaping are critical, significantly outperforming image-only and unshaped variants, demonstrating the effectiveness of MTA-RL for robust urban autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 提出MTA-RL框架，通过多模态Transformer预测3D可行驶区域表示，结合强化学习实现鲁棒的城市场景自动驾驶，在CARLA模拟器中展现优越的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端模型缺乏可解释性，模块化流水线则在脆弱接口间存在误差传播问题，亟需一种兼具可解释性与稳定性的感知-控制桥梁框架。
AI.method: 将RGB图像和LiDAR点云通过Transformer架构融合，预测显式的几何感知可行驶区域表示；随后以这些结构化表示作为紧凑的观测空间，供RL策略基于预测的驾驶语义进行决策。
AI.result: 在CARLA Town01-03不同密度场景下均优于SOTA；仅在Town03训练即可在未见城镇实现零样本泛化，Route Completion提升9.0%，Total Distance提升11.0%，Distance Per Violation提升83.7%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合与奖励塑形对性能至关重要，MTA-RL为鲁棒的城市自动驾驶提供了有效方案。

title: What Concepts Lie Within? Detecting and Suppressing Risky Content in Diffusion Transformers
summary: The rise of text-to-image (T2I) models has increasingly raised concerns regarding the generation of risky content, such as sexual, violent, and copyright-protected images, highlighting the need for effective safeguards within the models themselves. Although existing methods have been proposed to eliminate risky concepts from T2I models, they are primarily developed for earlier U-Net architectures, leaving the state-of-the-art Diffusion-Transformer-based T2I models inadequately protected. This gap stems from a fundamental architectural shift: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) entangle semantic injection and visual synthesis via joint attention, which makes it difficult to isolate and erase risky content within the generation. To bridge this gap, we investigate how semantic concepts are represented in DiTs and discover that attention heads exhibit concept-specific sensitivity. This property enables both the detection and suppression of risky content. Building on this discovery, we propose AHV-D\&S, a training-free inference-time safeguard for image generation in DiTs. Specifically, AHV-D\&S quantifies each textual token's sensitivity across all attention heads as an Attention Head Vector (AHV), which serves as a discriminative signature for detecting risky generation tendencies. In the inference stage, we propose a momentum-based strategy to dynamically track token-wise AHVs across denoising steps, and a sensitivity-guided adaptive suppression strategy that suppresses the attention weights of identified risky tokens based on head-specific risk scores. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AHV-D\&S effectively suppresses sexual, copyrighted-style, and various harmful content while preserving visual quality, and further exhibits strong robustness against adversarial prompts and transferability across different DiT-based T2I models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AHV-D&S，一种无需训练、推理阶段的防护方法，通过注意力头向量（AHV）检测和抑制Diffusion Transformer（DiT）架构T2I模型中的风险内容生成，有效抑制色情、侵权风格等有害内容，同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有风险概念消除方法主要针对早期U-Net架构，而基于Diffusion Transformer（DiT）的新一代T2I模型由于语义注入与视觉合成通过联合注意力纠缠在一起，难以隔离和擦除风险内容，存在防护空白。
AI.method: 1. 发现DiT中注意力头具有概念特异性敏感性；2. 提出AHV（Attention Head Vector）量化每个文本token在各注意力头上的敏感性，作为检测风险生成倾向的判别签名；3. 推理阶段采用基于动量的策略动态追踪token级AHV；4. 提出敏感性引导的自适应抑制策略，根据头特异性风险分数抑制风险token的注意力权重。
AI.result: 大量实验表明AHV-D&S能有效抑制色情、侵权风格及多种有害内容生成，同时保持视觉质量，并对对抗性提示和跨不同DiT-T2I模型迁移表现出强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AHV-D&S是一种训练-free、推理时生效的防护方案，填补了DiT架构T2I模型风险内容防护的空白，利用注意力头的概念特异性敏感性实现检测与抑制的统一。

title: A Comparative Study of Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Out-of-Distribution Detection
comment: Accepted to IEEE ISBI 2026. The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for building reliable AI systems, as models that produce outputs for invalid inputs cannot be trusted. Although deep learning (DL) is often assumed to outperform traditional machine learning (ML), medical imaging data are typically acquired under standardized protocols, leading to relatively constrained image variability in OOD detection tasks. This motivates a direct comparison between ML and DL approaches in this setting. The two approaches are evaluated on open datasets comprising over 60,000 fundus and non-fundus images across multiple resolutions. Both approaches achieved an AUROC of 1.000 and accuracies between 0.999 and 1.000 on internal and external validation sets, showing comparable detection performance. The ML approach, however, exhibited substantially lower end-to-end latency while maintaining equivalent accuracy, indicating greater computational efficiency. These results suggest that for OOD detection tasks of limited visual complexity, lightweight ML approaches can achieve DL-level performance with significantly reduced computational cost, supporting practical real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了传统机器学习（ML）与深度学习（DL）在医学图像分布外（OOD）检测任务上的表现，发现两者性能相当（AUROC达1.000），但ML方法计算效率显著更高，适用于受限视觉复杂度的场景。
AI.motivation: 尽管DL通常被认为优于ML，但医学图像在标准化采集协议下变异性有限，这促使在OOD检测任务中直接比较ML与DL的性能与效率。
AI.method: 在包含6万多张眼底与非眼底图像（多种分辨率）的开放数据集上，分别使用ML和DL方法进行OOD检测，并在内部和外部验证集上评估AUROC和准确率。
AI.result: 两种方法在内外验证集上均达到AUROC 1.000、准确率0.999–1.000；但ML方法的端到端延迟显著更低，计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 对于视觉复杂度有限的OOD检测任务，轻量级ML方法能达到DL级别的性能，同时大幅降低计算成本，更适合实际部署。

title: Developing a foundation model for high-resolution remote sensing data of the Netherlands
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, under review in a journal
summary: We develop a foundation model using 1.2m high resolution satellite images of the Netherlands. By combining a Convolutional Neural Network and a Vision Transformer, the model captures both low- and high-frequency landscape features, such as fine textures, edges, and small objects as well as large terrain structures, elevation patterns, and land-cover distributions. Leveraging temporal data as input, the model learns from broader contextual information across time, allowing the model to exploit the temporal dependencies, such as topographic features, land-cover changes, and seasonal dynamics. These additional constraints reduce feature ambiguity, improve representation learning, and enable better generalization with fewer labeled samples. The foundation model is evaluated on multiple downstream tasks, ranging from use cases within the Netherlands to global benchmarking datasets. On the vegetation monitoring dataset of the Netherlands, the model shows clear performance improvements by incorporating temporal information instead of relying on a single time point. Despite using a smaller model and less pretraining data limited to the Netherlands, it achieves competitive results on global benchmarks when compared to state-of-the-art models. These results demonstrate that the model can learn rich, generalizable representations from limited data, achieving competitive performance on global benchmarks while using a fraction of the parameters of larger state-of-the-art remote sensing models. To maximize reproducibility and reuse, we made the scripts and the model accessible on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 基于荷兰120万张高分辨率卫星影像，结合CNN和Vision Transformer构建基础模型，利用时序数据提升表征学习能力，在荷兰植被监测和全球基准数据集上取得有竞争力的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感基础模型通常依赖大规模全球数据和高计算成本，作者希望探索是否可以利用一个国家范围内（荷兰）的有限数据，结合时序信息训练出具有良好泛化能力的基础模型。
AI.method: 1) 使用120万张荷兰高分辨率卫星影像；2) 结合CNN（捕捉低频特征如纹理、边缘、小物体）和Vision Transformer（捕捉高频特征如地形结构、土地覆盖分布）；3) 引入时序数据作为输入，利用时间依赖性（地形特征、土地覆盖变化、季节动态）减少特征歧义。
AI.result: 1) 在荷兰植被监测数据集中，引入时序信息相比单时间点显著提升性能；2) 尽管模型更小、预训练数据仅限荷兰，在全球基准数据集上仍达到与最先进模型竞争的结果；3) 用更少的参数实现了有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 证明了从有限地理范围的数据中也能学到丰富、可泛化的表征，为资源受限场景下的遥感基础模型训练提供了可行路径；代码和模型已开源。

title: DynGhost: Temporally-Modelled Transformer for Dynamic Ghost Imaging with Quantum Detectors
summary: Ghost imaging reconstructs spatial information from a single-pixel bucket detector by correlating structured illumination patterns with scalar intensity measurements. While deep learning approaches have achieved promising results on static scenes, two critical limitations remain unaddressed: existing architectures fail to exploit temporal coherence across frames, leaving dynamic ghost imaging largely unsolved, and they assume additive Gaussian noise models that do not reflect the true Poissonian statistics of real single-photon hardware.
